受资金不足、订阅数下降等诸多问题影响，这也是编辑部最后一次修改这本攻略。但我们相信，总有一天，流梦礁会变得比当年还要繁华，等到那时，让我们再在文字里相会吧。
E: As you all know, this place is unlike the fake and capitalistic territory of The Family, In this city crafted from the Primordial Dreamscape, there are no restraints from strict laws and no pursuit from the Bloodhounds. It welcomes all visitors, offering boundless freedom. However, with the vast breadth of the Dreamscape, what other recommended attractions are there beyond major landmarks? Our editorial team has curated this guide exclusively for you, and we hope you thoroughly enjoy your time here. 1. Bolt Grand Hotel Located in the heart of the commercial district and at the perfect height, the Bolt Grand Hotel offers a prime location that allows guests to admire the impressive skyline above and bustling streets below. The hotel's observation deck at the billboard on top of the building was once ranked as a vital spot that all local couples must hit. Note 1: The hotel is currently closed for temporary maintenance due to memoria instability. Note 2: The Watchmaker has acquired this hotel, and a special exhibition featuring the beloved Clockie is now open to the public in the first-floor lobby. Note 3: The Watchmaker has implemented a new policy, providing free accommodation for one year to individuals who have been ostracized here by The Family and are willing to contribute to maintaining community order, ensuring that no one is left homeless. Note 4: Due to a significant decrease in residents at Dreamflux Reef and the departure of the Watchmaker, the hotel has now closed after facing severe challenges in sustaining its operations. We sincerely appreciate your support throughout the years. 2. Carter's Bakery Don't underestimate the unassuming appearance of one small piece of bread. Master Baker Carter's craftsmanship even won over that bread-hater named Gallagher. "To make delicious bread in the Dreamscape, the secret ingredients are the chef's joy, affection for the guests, and a touch of familial warmth." If this is your first visit, make sure to arrive early, as the queue can become a truly nightmarish experience. Note 1: The bakery is currently celebrating its thirtieth anniversary and offering its special Supreme Yummy Bread to everyone. Note 2: Due to a significant decrease in residents, Carter's Bakery has faced challenges. Thankfully, with the financial backing from the Watchmaker, Carter's daughter has taken the helm, ensuring that the flavors remain as exceptional as ever. Note 3: The bakery is currently semi-permanently closed. 3. Memoria Singularity This spacial distorted area belonging to Dreamscapes will allow you to observe rare memoria wonders firsthand. If you're an inorganic being, you would not want to miss this stunning amazement. And if you're organic, then you're also sure to be won over by this awe-inspiring spectacle. Its untouched and pure nature will unveil the true essence of the dream. Note 1: You will find a variety of restaurants near the edge of the Singularity. Tasty food is the best condiment to breathtaking scenery. Note 2: You will find a restaurant near the Singularity. Don't forget to satisfy your hunger while indulging in the breathtaking scenery. Note 3: You will find a restaurant near the Singularity. Please kindly note its opening hours. 4. Crowe Toy Mall Crowe Toy Mall has all the characters you love, be it Clockie, Brother Hanu, or Origami Birds. Officially authorized by the Watchmaker, this toy mall will awaken your inner child. There is also a Clockie-themed puzzle event, and customers who collect all the clues can redeem a ticket at the receptionist desk for the latest Clockie's Big Adventure series movie. Note 1: Due to the recent frequent turbulences in the Dreamscape, the Watchmaker has procured a large quantity of relief supplies for all affected residents. Please queue up on the first floor to receive them. Note 2: Clockie's Big Adventure: Starshipville will be released soon, and the mall will host related themed activities related to the new movie. Note 3: Due to certain reasons, the mall is now facing significant challenges in sustaining its operations and has decided to close down at the end of this month. All toys in the mall will be donated to neighboring communities. Please visit the distribution points to acquire the toys. ... We regret to inform you that this will be the final revision of this guide from our team due to financial pressure, declining subscription numbers, and various other challenges. However, we firmly believe that Dreamflux Reef will one day flourish even more than it ever did, and when that time comes, let us meet again through words.

C: 他还会回来的，我知道。 我，弗朗西斯七世，以代代相传的蝾螈徽章为誓，那由我所统治的疆域……其中的三分之一，在今日过后，将会划归眼前的女士所有。 为此，经她之手，时隔七百年，这片大地将再次一统，两个国家间宿命般的仇怨也将就此终结。无论如何，为此我始终愿意不惜一切代价——我所拥有的姓氏，她的「荣光」胜于一切。 就做一些小小的纠正吧，公司当然不会做出这种程度的干涉，更不会支持以暴力造就的独裁。抛去这位国王夸张的形容，眼下发生的一切，只是与更加文明的人合作，来终结掉一些……不合理的敌意。 我，弗朗西斯七世，以代代相传的蝾螈徽章为誓，我愿意舍弃自己通行无阻的敕令，并交予眼前的这位女士。 为此，经她之手，天灾将会终结，即使所剩无多，但我的子民……他们将能去往更为光明的所在。 弗朗西斯在此以代代相传的蝾螈徽章为誓，请您为我寻回那批货物吧，我不是在意自己的事业，但我的家人……他们需要我的这份收成。 他们……正在等着我回去，但我不能两手空空，为此我愿意不惜一切代价。 现在我知道什么是代价了，弗朗西斯愿意质押蝾螈徽章，从它被铸造出来的那一刻，家族就曾说过「不可离身，太阳总会升起」。 那或许有意义，或许没有，但这已经无所谓了，请救救我唯一的亲人吧。 他还会回来的，我知道。 不错，即使是公司的人，我在他们看来也越来越恶毒。但你或许也会相信……无论是哪一场交易，倘若你也在场，并且试着阻止这一切，或许反倒会受到这位可怜人不顾一切的攻击吧？ 他会不惜以死相逼——无论他的死亡，又或是你的。 对于未能拥有的事物，人们在判断它的价值时总是采取一种不可理喻的体系，并且愿意为此得不偿失。是啊，我的结局必然永不到来。 但他没有犯下任何错误，只不过没能懂得…… 无法事事得偿所愿，是造物者在力所能及的范围内，给出的……最具价值的仁慈。 似乎有一位乞丐被赶出了这里……他刚才是在看我吗？
E: He'll be back. I know he will. I, Francis VII, swear by this salamander insignia, which has been handed down for generations, that of the kingdom over which I rule... one third of it shall be given to the lady before me, for her to administer from here on out. To this end, through her, the land shall be unified once again after seven hundred years and the fated enmity between the two kingdoms shall come to an end. I shall attain this goal no matter the cost, for the reputation of my family name and her "glory" are of paramount importance. Some minor corrections are required, for the IPC would never interfere to this degree, nor would it ever support autocratic rule by means of violence. Remove the exaggerated descriptions of this king. Everything that we're doing right now is for the sole purpose of collaborating with more civilized people, in pursuit of eliminating some... nefarious enmity. I, Francis VII, swear by this salamander insignia, which has been handed down for generations, that I am willing to give up the edict that grants me unimpeded passage and hand it over to the lady before me. To this end, through her hand, the natural disasters shall cease. Even if only a few of my subjects remain... those who live will be able to reach a brighter place. I, Francis VII, swear by this salamander insignia, which has been handed down for generations, and plead for you to retrieve that batch of goods. I am asking not out of concern for my own business, but rather for the sake of my family... They need this harvest of mine. They... are waiting for my return, yet I cannot appear before them with empty hands. For this, I am willing to pay the price, no matter how steep. Now I know what "price" is. Francis is prepared to pawn the salamander insignia as collateral. From the moment the finished insignia was removed from the furnace, the family's advice had been: "Never let this leave your side, for the sun shall yet rise again." There might be more to their words than I can tell — or maybe not — but it doesn't matter anymore. Please, save the only kin I have left. He'll be back. I know he will. That's right, even the folks over at the IPC find me more and more contemptible by the day. But if it's you, maybe you'll agree with me... It didn't matter which deal it was. If you'd been there... If you'd tried to stop it all, this poor wretch might even have savagely turned on you instead. Yes, he would even threaten to take your life... or his own. People tend to evaluate the worth of the unattainable in a way that defies reason, even if doing so does more harm than good. My ending will indeed never come. But he didn't do anything wrong. He didn't understand, that's all... Things don't always go your way in life... That's the most valuable mercy the Creator can within their means. Seems like a beggar had been chased out... Was he looking at me just now?

C: 备注：以波尔卡•卡卡目、寂静领主、巧合为关键词，于克莱恩手札中筛出以下内容。 7月█日 今天是我们重逢的日子。「燃素循环理论」、「生物波」勘探法、「灰玺金」合成技术，看上去完全不相干的学术成就，却把柏环、拉姆、我都送进了能源研究部。时隔多年，我们又在同一个屋檐下从事研究了。拉姆看上去非常开心。 至于「天才俱乐部成员」的身份，说实话，我们仨没有什么特别的感受，从读书时我便清楚「天才」只是对「超越认知的才华」一种粗略总结——不同天才专攻的领域也各不相同，哈那德•庞奇、纽尔•伊曼，好像还有个叫波尔卡•卡卡目的天才，他们所成就的一切，我难以企及，而我所完成的一切，他们也只能望尘莫及。 不过天才俱乐部的同僚并不值得关心，他们都远在天外；看上去，还是我们师兄妹三人的办公室关系更让人心焦吧。  █月5日 我送了拉姆一副外骨骼。我在无名指骨上镶了一枚98%纯度的「灰玺金」颗粒，我把它藏得很好，它看上去就像一枚戒指…不，这和谁都不能说。如果之后她发现了，我就说，这只是制作时的巧合罢了。 10███ 昨日我们在极地科考，拉姆终于用生物信息波勘探出她追寻已久的地下能源。那足够俄亥提星所有城市使用半个世纪。她兴奋得把鞋子都踢掉了。柏环告诉我他们又离婚了，这是他们第四次离婚。我不知道我应该表达出什么情绪…巧合的是，当时荒原上有只翻飞的蝴蝶在我眼前停留了很久，不知道为什么它很像我，我第一次知道在俄亥提星的极地有这样的生物。 ██月█日 不对，这绝不对。如果她不去，柏环就会去，那么在爆炸中死的会是柏环，可柏环被我送进了医院。何况当天，为什么正好█████，正好██全部██闭，而她恰巧█████？是巧合？还是说…… █████ 我发现了拉姆藏在柏环实验室的摄像头——天知道她需要摄像头监控干什么，不过这并不重要。通过调取监控，我能确定，我提前安置在燃素观测仪器里的「灰玺金」并没有发挥作用，柏环受伤并非因为我动的手脚——但是燃素聚合体泄露，又完全符合我的预期。这不可能是巧合。有谁在推动我的计划实现。 ██月15日 拉姆砸烂了那副外骨骼，当然也包括那枚「灰玺金」颗粒。按理来说，一柄普通的锤子不会和「灰玺金」发生任何反应，但是中控室的意外绝不是什么巧合。 是谁给了拉姆这柄特殊的锤子？她为什么会在那个时候砸烂外骨骼？这实在太不合理了。 ██月█4日 波尔卡•卡卡目还活着？我以为那是位已故的天才…我好像有些眉目了。
E: Note: The following text was retrieved from Klein's handwritten notes using the keywords Polka Kakamond, Lord of Silence, and coincidence. Jul ██ Today marks our reunion. The Phlogiston recycling theory, the bio-wave prospecting method, and the synthesis technology for Grayseal Gold... These academic achievements seem unrelated, but they have brought Bohdan, Lambda, and me together in the Energy Research Lab. After so many years, we are now doing research under the same roof once again, and Lambda seems very happy. Regarding our membership in the Genius Society, truth be told, the three of us haven't attached too much significance to it. From my student days, it was clear to me that "genius" was merely a broad term for exceptional brilliance. Different geniuses excel in various fields. The feats achieved by the geniuses Harald Punch, Nyul Iman, and someone named Polka Kakamond are beyond my wildest dreams. However, they can never replicate what I have done, either. However, I can't care less about the other members of the Genius Society, as they are too far away from us. The dynamics among us three classmates concern me more at present. ███ 05 I gifted Lambda a set of exoskeleton. Unknown to her, I discreetly implanted a 98% pure Grayseal Gold pellet in the structure of its ring finger, cleverly disguising it as a ring... No, this is my secret not meant for sharing, and if she discovers it later, I'll simply attribute it to a coincidence while crafting the exoskeleton. Oct ██ During our polar expedition yesterday, Lambda finally successfully located the underground energy source she had long pursued using bio-waves. This discovery could power all the cities on planet Ohioti for half a century. Her elation was palpable — she even kicked off her shoes. Then, Bohdan told me they divorced again. This is their fourth re-marriage and divorce. I was unsure how to react... Coincidentally, a butterfly fluttered in the wilderness, lingering before my eyes for quite a while. I don't know why, but that butterfly resembles me in some inexplicable manner. It was the first time I realized such creatures existed in the polar regions of planet Ohioti. ███ ██ No, something is definitely off. If she hadn't gone there, Bohdan would have been there, and it would have been him who got killed in the explosion, but instead, I sent him to the hospital. Furthermore, why did ██████████ and all the █████ were closed, and she happened to █████? Is this a mere coincidence? Or perhaps...? ███ ██ I've found the camera Lambda had hidden in Bohdan's lab. God knows why she would need that surveillance, but that's not important. The surveillance record shows that the Grayseal Gold I had discreetly placed in the Phlogiston observation device didn't work as I had planned. In other words, Bohdan wasn't wounded because of my plan, but the Phlogiston leakage aligned perfectly with my expectations. This can't be a mere coincidence. Someone else has been moving my plan forward. ███ 15 Lambda smashed that exoskeleton along with the Grayseal Gold pellet. Technically, an ordinary hammer wouldn't have reacted with the Grayseal Gold, but the incident in the central control room couldn't be a mere coincidence. Who gave Lambda that special hammer? And why would she smash the exoskeleton at that precise moment? It simply doesn't make sense. ███ █4 Polka Kakamond is still alive? I thought that Genius had passed away... This discovery has given me some insights.

C:
光历2147年，圣城直面黑潮之灾，渐隐于夜幕中。 以此卷记叙逝者，书下奥赫玛之殇。 军士、司祭、学者阵亡者 …… • 阿尔菲奥斯，马隆萨 - 孪生兄弟，为圣城同死。

/
• 佩特拉 - 英勇的山之民，其牺牲不朽。


/
• 玛格什 - 睿智的学者，不幸于市集身陨。


/
• 尤里萨 - 辅祭，为护同伴而亡。


/
• 涅柔娅 - 刻法勒司祭，其使命结于归宿。
市民阵亡者 …… • 安提戈涅 - 阿加西亚斯之女，死于倒塌之家中。 • 特阿吉斯 - 三子之母，怀抱幼子而同亡。

/
• 艾犹卜 - 正直之人，于祈祷中逝去。


/
• 博莱斯 - 体恤民众者，直面黑潮造物而亡。


/
• 希吉拉 - 商人，于铺内死亡。


/
• 卢克雷提娅 - 大地兽的友人，竟应竟之事后离去。


/
• 马尔库斯 - 饱经风霜，于奥赫玛外奔赴命运。
不明去向者 • 赫格西娅 - 朴实之人，失踪。 其他 • 无名遗体十具，面容难辨。 …… 愿塞纳托斯的温婉，携斯人魂灵至新世。 我们将于西风的尽头再会。
E:
In the year 2147 of the Light Calendar, the holy city faced the calamity of the black tide and faded into the night. This tome chronicles the fallen and records the sorrow of Okhema. Fallen Soldiers, Priests, and Scholars ... • Alpheus and Malonza – Twin brothers who perished for the holy city.

/
• Petros – A valiant Mountain Dweller, his sacrifice immortal.


/
• Margusa - A wise researcher who unfortunately passed away at a market.


/
• Ulysse – A acolyte, perished while shielding companions.


/
• Nereia – A Kephale priest, her mission ended at her resting place.
Fallen Citizens ... • Antigone – Daughter of Acacias, perished in a collapsed home. • Theagis – A mother of three, perished embracing her youngest.

/
• Albus – A righteous man, passed away in prayer.


/
• Bolaris – A man of the people, perished facing the Black Tide Creatures.


/
• Hygilos – A merchant, found dead in his shop.


/
• Lucretia – A friend of the dromas, perished after fulfilling what should be done.


/
• Marcus – A weathered man, met his fate beyond Okhema.
Missing Persons • Hegesia – A humble soul, missing. Others • Ten unidentified bodies, features unrecognizable. ... May the grace of Thanatos guide these souls to a new world. We shall meet again at the end of the west wind.

C:
【欢喜月 第三日】
终于抵达斯缇科西亚了！这座城比我想象中更美。海水的颜色像是蜂蜜与蓝宝石的混合，阳光照在上面，闪闪发光。我庆幸自己接受了大祭司提出的前往神殿协助祭祀的邀请。

住处已安排妥当，就在海边！每晚都能听见海浪拍打岸边的声音，像是法吉娜的低语在耳畔回响。明天就是满月祭典，希望能得到海洋泰坦的青睐。

【欢喜月 第五日】
已经很晚了，但我必须记录下今天看到的一切。满月祭典超出我的想象！大祭司说斯缇科西亚与奥赫玛不同，这里的仪式少了些规矩，多了几分狂热，果然如此。

当夜幕降临，成百上千的灯火在蜜酿海上点亮，人们将特制的灯盏放入水中，那些灯会随着水流漂向海洋深处。据说这些灯光能引导法吉娜的目光，让她看见我们的虔诚。

人们开始饮酒，不是小口啜饮，而是狂饮！那蜜酿闪着金色的光芒，喝下去如同火焰在喉中流淌。我也喝了一些，然后…事情变得模糊。我记得自己跳入了海中，与众人一同在浅滩起舞。记得看见人与海兽共舞，有一瞬间，我甚至以为看见了海妖！可能只是蜜酿作祟。

我隐约记得，远方的海面上，似乎传来了一阵奇异的乐声，像竖琴与海浪的混合。那声音令人迷醉，却又带着一丝悲伤，像是在呼唤什么。

【欢喜月 第九日】
今天海面异常平静，像是一面镜子，反射着天空的景象。大祭司说这是个好兆头，法吉娜正在注视我们。

昨晚我又听到了那乐声，更加清晰。没有人能告诉我那是什么，他们都沉浸在自己的欢愉中。那音乐像是在讲述一个故事，一个关于孤独和背叛的故事。我发现自己无法抗拒地被它吸引，几乎想要潜入水中寻找源头。

神殿里的事务很简单，主要是准备祭品和酿造圣水。大祭司教我如何将普通的海水变成「法吉娜之泪」——一种特殊的圣水，据说能治愈心灵的创伤。但她警告我永远不要尝它的味道。「那不是为凡人准备的。」她如是说。

【长昼月 第一日】
今天某些事情发生了变化。有人说看见了海面上出现了「涟漪」——不是普通的波纹，而是像…像水面被什么东西破坏了一样。

街上的人们似乎更加狂热了，酒馆日夜不息。我问大祭司是否正常，她只是微笑，说在长昼月，法吉娜的信徒总是更加活跃。但我感觉不仅仅如此。

今晚的乐声比以往任何时候都清晰。我认为那一定是海瑟音——传说中的黄金裔歌者。古老的故事说她曾是海妖，现在在深海独自演奏，等待着逝去同伴们的归来。那音乐中包含的哀伤几乎令人窒息。

【长昼月 第七日】
我今天开始梦游了……醒来时发现自己站在海边，衣服湿透，嘴里尝到咸涩的海水。更可怕的是，我记得梦中的情景——我跟随着那音乐，走入海中，看见了…一个舞台？
那是一个水下的舞台，周围坐满了人，但他们都不动，像是被冻结在时间中。舞台中央站着一位女子，手持竖琴，演奏着那首哀伤的曲子。她转向我，说了些什么，但我听不见。然后我惊醒了。

城里的人越来越少了。不是离开，而是…消失。他们参加夜间的狂欢，然后就再也没回来。我询问大祭司，她说他们「回归了法吉娜的怀抱」。

不知为何，我记起了旧时的童谣：
 「法吉娜的杯中盛满旧日的泪， 饮者将见故乡，永不得归。」

【自由月 第四日】
城中的狂欢达到了顶峰。人们不再工作，不再思考，只是喝酒、跳舞、寻欢，仿佛明天就是世界的最后一天。

我今天冒险潜入了海中，试图寻找那音乐的源头。水下的世界令人惊叹——我看见了古老的建筑，像是一座水下城市的遗迹。那必定是传说中的海妖之都，法吉娜承诺给予海妖的永恒欢宴之地。但现在，那里只有废墟和孤独的歌声。

【纷争月 第一日】
我决定离开斯缇科西亚。这里的疯狂已经无法忍受，人们变得越来越不像人类，而更像是……

临行前，大祭司给了我一个小瓶子，里面装着闪光的液体。
「海妖的眼泪，」她说，「如果你听见歌声呼唤，就喝下它。你会找到你寻找的真相。」

我不知道自己是否有勇气这么做。但我知道，只要海瑟音还在歌唱，法吉娜的遗产就还未完全消逝。或许有一天，世界会恢复平衡，满溢之杯不再盛满泪水，而是盛满欢乐。

这是我在斯缇科西亚的最后一篇日记了。愿法吉娜保佑所有饮者，愿海瑟音的乐声指引迷失的灵魂。
E:
Month of Joy, Day 3
Finally, Styxia! This city surpasses all my expectations in beauty. The sea appears as a mesmerizing blend of honey and sapphire, sparkling brilliantly in the sunlight. I'm grateful I accepted the High Priest's invitation to assist with the temple rituals.

Accommodations have been arranged perfectly, right by the seashore! Every night I hear waves breaking against the shore, sounding like Phagousa's whispers in my ears. The full moon ceremony will be held tomorrow, and I hope to receive the Ocean Titan's blessing.

Month of Joy, Day 5
It's late, but I must record everything I saw today. The full moon ceremony far exceeded my expectations! The High Priest had mentioned that rituals in Styxia differ from those in Okhema with fewer rules and more fervor, and this proved absolutely true.

As night fell, hundreds of lights illuminated the sea of honey brew hues. People placed specially crafted lanterns in the water, which currents carried toward the deep ocean. They say these lights guide Phagousa's gaze, allowing her to witness our devotion.

People began drinking, not in small sips but great gulps! The honey brew shimmered with a golden glow and burned like fire down the throat. I drank some too, and then... everything felt like a blur. I remember jumping into the sea, dancing in the shallows with everyone. I recall seeing humans dancing with sea creatures, and for a brief moment, I thought I saw sea sirens! Perhaps it was just the brew's effects.

I have a vague recollection of strange music from the distant sea, a sound blending harp notes with ocean waves. The melody was bewitching yet carried a hint of sorrow, as if calling out to something.

Month of Joy, Day 9
The sea today is remarkably calm, a perfect mirror reflecting the sky above. The High Priest says this is a positive omen, that Phagousa is watching over us.

I heard that mysterious music again last night, more distinctly this time. No one could explain what it was, they're all too absorbed in their festivities. The melody seemed to tell a story of loneliness and betrayal. I found myself strangely drawn to it, almost wanting to dive underwater to seek its source.

Duties at the temple are simple, mainly preparing offerings and brewing sacred water. The High Priest taught me how to transform ordinary seawater into "Tears of Phagousa" — special holy water said to heal spiritual wounds. She warned me never to taste it, saying, "It is not meant for mortal lips."

Month of Everday, Day 1
Something changed today. People report seeing "ripples" on the sea — not ordinary waves, but disturbances, as though... the surface of the water had been mutilated by something.

People in the streets seem increasingly frenzied, with taverns operating all day and night. When I asked the High Priest if this was normal, she just smiled and said Phagousa's followers always become more active during the Month of Everday. But I sense there's more than meets the eye.

Tonight, the music sounds clearer than ever before. I believe it must be Hysilens, the legendary Chrysos Heir songstress. Ancient tales say she was once a sea siren who now plays alone in the ocean depths, waiting for her departed companions to return. The profound sorrow in that music is almost suffocating.

Month of Everday, Day 7
I've started sleepwalking today... I woke to myself standing at the beach, clothes drenched, with salt water on my lips. More disturbing still, I remember my dream. I followed that haunting music into the sea and discovered a... stage?
It was an underwater stage surrounded by seated figures, all motionless as if frozen in time. At the center stood a woman with a harp, playing that mournful melody. She turned to me and spoke, but I couldn't hear her words. Then I awoke with a start.

People in the city grow fewer each day. Not because they're leaving, but because they're... vanishing. They joined the nightly celebrations and never returned. When I asked the High Priest about this, she simply said they had "returned to Phagousa's embrace."

Strangely, I'm reminded of an old nursery rhyme:
"Phagousa's chalice filled with tears of old. Those who drink see home, but nevermore return."

Month of Freedom, Day 4
The city's celebrations have reached the peak of their feverish intensity. People have stopped working and thinking. They only drink, dance, and seek pleasure, as if tomorrow were the last day of the world.

Today I ventured underwater, seeking the music's source. The submerged world was breathtaking. I discovered ancient structures, seemingly the ruins of an underwater city. This must be the dwelling of the sea sirens that legends speak of, the place of eternal celebration Phagousa promised them. Now only ruins remain, accompanied by that solitary, mournful song.

Month of Strife, Day 1
I've decided to leave Styxia. The madness here has become unbearable. The people are changing into something less human and more like...

Before leaving, the High Priest gave me a small vial containing a glowing liquid.
"It's the Siren's Tear." she said. "If you hear the song calling to you, drink this. You'll discover the truth you seek."

I don't know if I'll ever find the courage to drink it. But I know that as long as Hysilens continues to sing, Phagousa's legacy lives on. Perhaps someday the world will find balance again, and the Chalice of Plenty will overflow not with tears, but with joy.

This is my final journal entry from Styxia. May Phagousa bless all who drink, and may Hysilens' melody guide lost souls home.

E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with golden stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

E: A luxurious bath prepared to reward the heroes who saved the world, at the moment when dawn was about to fade, it finally reflected the end of their mission.

E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 白日消陨于白日梦，理想幻灭于理想国。返归坍圮的乐园，再一次扼杀祂的奥体与他的大愿。
E: As reveries vanish within The Reverie, so do ideals perish in an idealized world. Return to the lost paradise and once again strangle both THEIR mystical body and his great wish.

C: 银鬃铁卫策划了对裂界的反击战。借助作战辅助装置「照雪灯炉」的力量，扫荡在残响回廊中徘徊的敌人。
E: The Silvermane Guards organized a counterattack against the Fragmentum. With the power of the combat support device "Snowshine Lamp," sweep through the enemies wandering in the Corridor of Fading Echoes.

C: 鹤运物流需要一位优秀的机巧鸟操作者，而你恰好是一位优秀的机巧鸟操作者。操作机巧鸟寻找鹤运物流丢失的货物。
E: Heron Express needs an outstanding cycrane controller, which you happen to be. Control the cycrane to find the shipment Heron Express lost.

C: 斯缇科西亚的王室宝库曾是富丽堂皇的所在，如今早已被劫掠一空，只剩下一片荒芜。
E: The royal treasury of Styxia was once a place of grandeur, but now it lies plundered and desolate.

C: 浮空关塞最顶端的平台，据说艾格勒的神体就栖息在此处，以天幕为眼睑、掌控世间的晨昏。
E: The highest platform at the top of the floating frontier fortress, where it is said that the divine body of Aquila resides. With the sky as its eyelids, it governs the dawn and dusk of the world.

C: 曾经映射世间天象的巨大画壁，如今已经破损不堪。
E: The enormous mural that once reflected the celestial phenomena of the world is now severely damaged and in ruins.

C: 翁法罗斯至深的遗迹，埋葬「全世」过往的大墓。褪去了「神话」的修饰，巨型储存阵列明灭不停，记录着不为人知的过往。
E: The deepest ruin in Amphoreus, the great tomb where the pasts of "all worlds" are buried. Stripped of its "mythical" embellishments, the colossal storage matrix flickers incessantly, recording an unknown past.

C: 金人巷内随时随地会发生的大小事。帮助街坊邻里解决麻烦，提高商会口碑，说不定会有意料之外的收获。
E: Ordinary life problems that can happen any time in Aurum Alley. Lend a hand to the neighborhood, improve the Merchant Guild's reputation, and you may just stumble upon some unexpected benefits.

C: 维修科的鲍勃带着他的「宝贝」回到了空间站，他对你这位「空间站的大英雄」颇为崇拜，执意邀请与你分享他的「宝贝」……
E: Bob from the Maintenance Department has brought his "precious" back to the space station. He offers his admiration and adoration to you, the "hero of the station," and insists that you share in his "precious"...

C: 「记忆」中诞生的模因生命，由某种认知的碎片堆积而成。它们遵从自身承载的概念，徘徊于忆域之中，渴望吞纳更多的忆质。
E: Memetic lifeforms born from "Remembrance," assembled from accumulated fragments of cognition. They operate based on the concepts they are comprised of, lingering in the Memory Zone, hungering to imbibe more memoria.

C: 自远古时期便在翁法罗斯存在的自然生物，由裂分之枝，瑟希斯为其赋予活性。从未被任何城邦驯服过，性情暴烈不羁，泰坦的赐福同时也成为了致命的武器。
E: A natural creature from the ancient Amphoreus era, brought to life by Cerces, the Bough of Rift. Untamed by any city, they are feral and unruly. As it turns out, the blessings of the Titans have transformed into a lethal weapon.

C: 匹诺康尼的服务器械，因梦境中的情绪干扰而陷入失控。原本是电视节目中的娱乐演员，失控后仍在演绎自己多变的身份，为观众带来惊喜或是惊吓。
E: Penacony's service machinery that got out of control due to the emotional interference in the Dreamscape. Originally an entertainer on a television program, this out-of-control actor continues to portray their roles, surprising or frightening the audience.

C: 匹诺康尼的服务器械，因梦境中的情绪干扰而陷入失控。原本是「苏乐达」汽水的派送员，失控后仍在挥洒甜蜜，让所有人都来品尝美味的饮品。
E: Penacony's service machinery that got out of control due to the emotional interference in the Dreamscape. Originally a SoulGlad deliveryman, this out-of-control servant continues to exude sweetness, enticing everyone to indulge in the tasty drink.

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血。天谴之矛下的歌者，唱诵着赞美战士与疯王的诗句，以神咒呼唤尼卡多利的赐福。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They are singers under the Lance of Fury. In their lyrics come praises for soldiers and the mad king, using divine spells to call upon Nikador's blessings.

C: 通过解析<color=#f29e38ff>「骇入声明」</color>涂鸦模拟银狼的攻击算法，每回合对敌方目标造成量子属性伤害。该伤害无视弱点属性削减敌方全体的韧性，当该伤害击破敌方目标弱点时，触发量子属性的弱点击破效果。强度等级3。
E: By analyzing <color=#f29e38ff>hacking callcard</color> graffiti and simulating Silver Wolf's attack algorithms, deal Quantum DMG to the enemies every turn. This DMG reduces all enemies' Toughness regardless of their Weakness Type. When this DMG inflicts Weakness Break to an enemy, it will trigger the Quantum Weakness Break effect. Power Level 3.

E: After using Technique, at the start of the next battle, Yanqing deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> more DMG for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s) to targets whose current HP percentage is equal to or higher than <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 陷入【魄散】状态的敌人会向着远离藿藿的方向逃跑。与陷入【魄散】状态的敌人进入战斗，有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的基础概率使敌方目标攻击力降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>回合。
E: Enemies in Horror-Struck will flee from Huohuo. When entering battle with enemies in Horror-Struck, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> base chance of reducing the enemies' ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

C: 攻击力提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，防御力提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>
E: Increases ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and DEF by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 每个轮开始时，随机使1名我方「巡猎」或「智识」命途目标立即行动，并使其造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>回合。
E: At the beginning of each Cycle, randomly causes an ally following the Path of The Hunt or the Path of Erudition to take action immediately, and increases their DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

C: 敌人拥有虚韧性，且弱点被击破时使其行动延后<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>，同时为【记忆紊流】增加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>段攻击段数，若目标是精英级别及以上的目标，则额外增加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak></color>段攻击段数，最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>段。\n每个轮开始时，【记忆紊流】的每段攻击对随机敌方目标造成1次固定数值的伤害。
E: Enemies have Exo-Toughness and their actions are delayed by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> after they are Weakness Broken. At the same time, add <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> hit(s) to "Memory Turbulence"'s Hits Per Action. If the target is an Elite enemy or higher, then additionally add <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak></color> hit(s), up to a max of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> hits.\nAt the start of every Cycle, every hit by the "Memory Turbulence" causes 1 instance of DMG, dealing a set amount of DMG to random enemy targets.

C: 公司的学术代表，拉帝奥教授仿佛「讨坏型人格」具象化。任何人对他的第一印象都会落在他怪诞的头罩上，给人带来了一种*疏离感*。或许，你可以给自己整一个石膏头试试——
E: The IPC's academic representative, Dr. Ratio, is the walking epitome of a "people-displeaser." Everyone's first impression is focused on his creepy head covering that radiates a vibe of *antipathy*. Maybe you can also try getting a plaster cast head of your own...

C: 你在磐岩镇的诊所里做娜塔莎助手，一位矿工意外受伤昏迷不醒，娜塔莎尽力救助，并表示希望家人多和患者说话，如果十小时内醒来多半就是挺过了，没有醒来可能就很危险了。他的家人尝试了很多次无果，娜塔莎看向了你——
E: You act as Natasha's assistant at the Boulder Town clinic. A miner has become comatose due to an accident. Natasha does her best to treat him, and hopes that the family can keep talking to the patient — if he wakes up within ten hours, the worst will probably pass, but if he doesn't, it would be a dangerous situation. His family has tried umpteenth times to no avail, and Natasha looks to you...

C: 「朱明仙舟的怀炎将军，会带着他的孙女云璃前来罗浮参加演武仪典。」在景元看来，云璃与彦卿年龄相仿，钟爱收藏各类剑器，自幼研习剑术，两人肯定能聊得来…彦卿有些不开心地出门去了，景元不解地向你询问原因——
E: "General Huaiyan of the Xianzhou Zhuming will accompany his granddaughter Yunli to the Luofu to participate in the Wardance." In Jing Yuan's opinion, Yunli and Yanqing are of similar age, love collecting all manner of swords, and have studied swordsmanship since their youth — these two will definitely hit it off... Yanqing was a little upset when he left the house, and Jing Yuan bemusedly asks you why...

C: 阿兰拜托你清剿一个舱段的反物质军团残余，保护公共财产…却没想到怪物没有，反倒是有个呜呜伯破坏了设施——
E: Arlan has asked that you eliminate Antimatter Legion remnants in a zone to protect public assets... Yet you're surprised to find out that there are no monsters, but a Wubbaboo is breaking the equipment here...

C:
星穹列车的历代领航员中，「观星者」我见与你是同一类人。

神秘的领航员，有关他的智库记载曾多次被虚构史学家篡改。
现在普遍认为，我见在第二次繁荣的尾声登上星穹列车。他的旅途先后历经阿基维利的陨落和纳努克的诞生——几乎是在最艰辛的时代，我见仍然没有放下职责。
在此时期，不少无名客离开了列车，也有「开拓」的团体同室操戈…我见勉强地维持着世界与世界的联系。据说在这段漫长的孤航中，星穹列车的乘员一度只剩下两人。但紧随其后的，便是法尔肯•阿蒙森的英雄年代。
我见在卸任后离开了星穹列车。同一时期，宇宙中开始出现「厄兆先锋」的身影。
E:
Among all the past Navigators in the Astral Express, you are most alike to Isee, aka the "Starseer."

He is a mysterious Navigator, whose accounts in the data bank have been frequently manipulated by History Fictionologists.
It is now widely believed that Isee boarded the Astral Express toward the end of the Second Prosperity. His journey led him through the successive events of the fall of Akivili and the birth of Nanook, enduring some of the most challenging times, yet he remained steadfast in his commitment to duty.
During that period, a number of the Nameless left the Express, and different groups following Trailblaze were also embroiled in internal conflicts. Isee was barely maintaining the connections between the worlds. It is rumored that at one juncture during this extensive and solitary voyage, the Crew dwindled to just two members. However, this was closely followed by the heroic years of Falcon Amundsen.
Isee left the Astral Express after stepping down from the Navigator position. During the same period, the Omen Vanguards began to appear in the universe.

C: 你是一名意志坚定的人，直截了当，富有正义感。\n你果断务实并且精力充沛，快速有力地采取行动。\n你擅长激励并保护身边的人，如同灯塔一般发挥引领作用。
E: You are a strong-willed person who is straightforward and righteous.\nYou are decisive, pragmatic, and energetic, often taking swift and assertive action.\nYou demonstrate exceptional ability in inspiring and safeguarding those around you, leading as a guiding light.

C: 应对忆域迷因「狂怒褪去之壳」
E: Counters Memory Zone Meme "Shell of Faded Rage"

E: When Boss Mirage uses "Soulfreed" in Phase II, it will target <color=#f29e38ff>all</color> statues.

C: 召唤物的点数越大，其生命上限越高。
E: The higher the summons' Points, the higher their Max HP.

C: 贝洛伯格的守护者，永屹之城贝洛伯格无可质疑的统治者。\n可可利亚秉持传承自历代守护者的神迹权能，在战斗中号令冰雪的力量冻结敌人。
E: The Guardian of Belobog, and the indisputable ruler of the Towering Citadel, Belobog.\nCocolia possesses the divine authority passed down through the generations of Guardians, giving her command over ice and snow to freeze her enemies in battle.

C: 代码受到影响后的错误投影。参照本体为美梦剧团中演奏谐乐的琴师。本应于「谐乐大典」之中献奏，如今却被「秩序」所缚，上演着关于「未来」的剧目。来日是永恒的长歌，幸福的愿景汇于弦上，以琴声呼唤谱曲的君王。
E: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is a musician responsible for playing the harmonious tune in the Sweet Dreams Troupe. It should be playing in the Charmony Festival, but it is now bound by Order and keeps performing scenes of the "Future." The future is an eternal ballad, a vision of happiness strung together, calling to the composing sovereign with the melody of a harp.

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血，蕴藏掠夺而来的「理性」。被制造出来的意义并非是研究普遍的知识，而是钻研杀戮的兵法与弱肉强食的残酷理论，散布假名为哲学的疯病。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They contain plundered "rationality" within their vessels. The reason behind their creation is not truly toward the study of universal knowledge, but to delve deep into brutal martial tactics and the merciless laws of survival, further spreading madness masquerading as philosophy.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为死龙·玻吕刻斯，冥河中沉眠的死龙，受炼成召引再度苏醒，化成槁骨腐肉的模样。\n它曾是「死亡」的泰坦，逆溯冥河向上，离开乌有之界于现世搁浅。它曾随冥河潮汐涌上大地，为翁法罗斯的万事万物烙上命定的终局。那些将死的，或已死的存在，皆会因它的归来感受到灵魂深处的颤栗。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referenced entity is Netherwing: Pollux, the slumbering dragon in the River of Souls, which has been reawakened by an alchemical summoning and morphed into a thing of rot and decay.\nIt once was the Death Titan, swimming upstream in the River of Souls' currents, leaving the realm of non-existence and stranded in the mortal world. Once, they followed the tides of the River of Souls to drown the living lands, branding all things in Amphoreus with a fated end. All the existences that will die or have died will feel a shudder in the depths of their souls with the dragon's return.

C: 迷失在群星中的跨维度生物，性温，味甘，不可食用。一生中大部分时间花在进食和逃跑上。偶遇它的旅行者视之为吉兆。
E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

C: 力量本源的至极化身，它背后蕴含的能量形式并不为人知晓。\n反物质引擎会为其他敌人提供能量并强化其技能。
E: The ultimate embodiment of power. The form of the energy that accumulates behind it remains unknown.\nThe Antimatter Engine will grant energy to other enemies and enhance their abilities.

E: Deals Ice DMG to one designated target, with a high chance to Freeze the target.

C: 召唤1个建木枝梢【繁花之抄（幻象）】。【繁花之抄（幻象）】可以使其他敌方的韧性无法被削减，【繁花之抄（幻象）】被消灭后解除所有韧性无法被削减的效果。
E: Summons an Ambrosial Arbor Branch: "Twig of Glorious Blooms (Illusion)." Twig of Glorious Blooms (Illusion) prevents friendly units' Toughness from being reduced. This effect is removed when Ambrosial Arbor Branch: Twig of Glorious Blooms (Illusion) is defeated.

E: When Hoolay enters the "<u>Lunar Devourer</u>" state, DMG taken decreases, their Toughness can be reduced, and they apply "Irate" to themselves. "Irate" has a starting stack number that decreases by 1 after every target's turn ends. This unit will exit the "Lunar Devourer" state whenever "Irate" reduces to 0 stacks.

C: 对我方全体造成物理属性伤害，消耗所有<u>【灾难之力】</u>额外造成数次少量物理属性伤害，消耗的【灾难之力】层数越多，伤害的段数越多。
E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets and consumes all <u>"Calamity Power"</u> to additionally deal several instances of minor Physical DMG. The more consumed "Calamity Power" stacks, the higher the instances of DMG.

E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets and consumes all <u>"Calamity Power"</u> to additionally deal several instances of minor Physical DMG. The more "Calamity Power" stacks are consumed, the more instances of DMG.

C: 对于行走在「开拓」命途上的人们来说，星穹列车永远是温暖的港湾。
E: The Astral Express will always be a haven for those on the Path of Trailblaze.

C: 贝洛伯格矿业的象征，与行政区截然相反的倒影。拥挤、压抑、逼仄。
E: The epitome of Belobog's mining industry: A crowded, depressing, and suffocating industrial town — the exact opposite of the Administrative District.

C: 在阳雷骑士讨伐并弑杀艾格勒后，残余的天空文明来到大地，将浮空要塞的废墟留藏在漫漫天际一隅。
E: After the Daythunder Knights defeated and slew Aquila, the remnants of the sky civilization descended to the earth, leaving the ruins of the floating fortress hidden in a remote corner of the vast sky.

C: 区域 - 法则
E: Domain — Protocols

C: 「研究理应是为升华生命，而生命绝不会用悲鸣来表达感激。」 ——佚名合著，《学会规章第十七版》 「若智慧生命行于正确之路，为何宇宙文明会停滞不前？」一群学者如是询问千篇一律的星空。对此诘问，俱乐部的天才置若罔闻，学会的凡夫则茫无所知，而能够给出解答的，除却启蒙他们的「原始博士」外再无他人。 这群狂热的学者很快站在了文明的对立面，自愿成为「返祖实验」最坚实的拥趸。他们坚信「智识」早已步入歧路，「退行」才是唯一的救赎——正如断除愚昧的枯枝后，知识的新芽方能从废墟中参出。他们坚信求识理应百无禁忌，全然不顾这些残虐的行径已经逾越科学边界，一头扎入了「谬种」的领域，在漫长的实验里，研究者与被研究者的界线也逐渐模糊， 宇宙中流传着一种说法，「原始博士」性情古怪，从不与任何「人类」产生联系。可这些追随者对世界产生的滋扰，又丝毫不亚于偶像本人。直到游侠举枪击穿一座实验室的铁门，却被喷涌而出的香蕉海吞没——人们终于意识到，过去名为「源究院」的团体已经不复存在，取而代之的，是一片向着「原始」退行的恐怖丛林。
E: "Research is supposed to elevate life, but life will never express gratitude with cries of sorrow." — Anonymous Co-Author, Guild Bylaws, 17th Edition "If intelligent creatures are advancing on the right path, why do cosmic civilizations come to a standstill?" A group of scholars poses this question to the unchanging stars. In response to this question, the Society's geniuses turn a deaf ear, and the ordinary in the Guild are clueless. Apart from Dr. Primitive, the one who gives them enlightenment, no one can grace them with an answer. These fervent scholars very quickly find themselves on the opposing side of civilization, voluntarily becoming the staunchest advocates for atavistic experiments. They insist that Erudition had long strayed from the straight and narrow and that regression is the only salvation — Only after severing the withered branches of ignorance can new saplings of knowledge rise from the ruins. They are convinced that any means are necessary in the pursuit of knowledge, recklessly disregarding the fact that these brutal methods have already overstepped the boundaries of science, wholeheartedly throwing themselves into heresies. In the long course of their experimentation, the line between the researcher and the researched also gradually blurs. There is a tale being told in the universe: Dr. Primitive is an eccentric, never seeking to consort with humanity. But the disturbances wrought in the world by these followers of his were no less significant than their idol. It wasn't until the Rangers shot through a lab's metal door, only to be engulfed by a sea of bananas pouring out, that people finally realized that the organization known as the Source Research Institute had ceased to exist, replaced by a horrific forest that is regressing into the primeval.

E: A series of hairpin turns ahead — steer with precision and maintain your rhythm!

E: Complete the race and place in the top #1

E: Help the performing Intellitron on the streets of the Golden Hour

E: Investigate the Oak Family Crest at Dewlight Pavilion

E: Unlocked by Default

C: 蕉覆
E: Hardy Leaf Sheath

C: 你循声望去，一位忍者装扮的少女正以独特方式亮相。「缭乱忍侠•AKA乱破，拜见阁下！」
E: You turned towards the sound to find a ninja girl making quite a unique entrance. "Dazzling Ninja, AKA Rappa, nice to meet ya!"

C: 丹恒请求姬子重放卡芙卡的通讯，并指认刃为极度危险之人。姬子猜到刃与丹恒的过去有关，丹恒主动离开列车前往仙舟「罗浮」。
E: Dan Heng asked Himeko to replay Kafka's transmission and identified Blade as an extremely dangerous individual. Himeko inferred a connection between Blade and Dan Heng's past. Dan Heng voluntarily left the Express to head to the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 为保护一位行商，一名云骑军士兵正与魔阴身怪物交战。丹恒伸出援手，加入战斗。
E: To protect a traveling merchant, a Cloud Knight soldier was engaged in battle with a mara-struck monster. Dan Heng stepped in to help and joined the fight.

C: 银枝投入地与真蛰虫交流，似乎将其认作了一只「呜呜伯」。
E: Argenti enthusiastically communicated with the True Sting, apparently mistaking it for a "Wubbaboo."

C: 阮•梅用触碰来感知你的状态，并请你吃下她的糕点。阮•梅向你问起她的研究，你尝试回答，却发现言语不受自己控制。
E: Ruan Mei reached out to sense your condition through touch and offered you a pastry. When she asked about her research, you tried to answer but realized your voice no longer obeyed your thoughts.

C: 你与三月七回到克里珀堡。布洛妮娅称公司员工们正对贝洛伯格进行「资产评估」，她向你们展示托帕提供的合同，请你们谈谈看法。
E: You and March 7th returned to Qlipoth Fort, where Bronya explained that IPC workers were conducting an "asset evaluation" of Belobog. She showed you Topaz's contract and asked for your thoughts.

C: 天击将军<color=#f29e38ff>飞霄</color>出手阻止了云璃与彦卿的切磋。飞霄自称在丹鼎司中求医问药，接受白露的诊疗。云璃归还飞剑，与彦卿言和。
E: The Merlin's Claw, <color=#f29e38ff>Feixiao</color>, intervened to stop the sparring match between Yunli and Yanqing. Feixiao claimed she was seeking medical treatment at the Alchemy Commission and had received care from Bailu. Yunli then returned the Flying Sword and made peace with Yanqing.

C: 雪衣等人接近关押呼雷的囚室，遭到「犀犬猎群」策问官末度所率领的步离人劫狱者偷袭。雪衣与貊泽奋力抵抗，坚守囚室大门。
E: As Xueyi and others approached Hoolay's prison cell, borisin jailbreakers who led by Mok Tok of the Rhinohound Pack ambushed them. Xueyi and Moze fought back fiercely, holding their ground at the cell door.

C: 你和瓦尔特坚持要救出晴霓，战况僵持之际，驭空带领云骑前来救援。
E: You and Welt insisted on rescuing Qingni, and just as the battle reached a stalemate, Yukong arrived with the Cloud Knights to reinforce you.

C: 你们尝试拯救垂死的云骑。云骑士兵自知命不久矣，拼尽最后力气为你们指出符玄及其所率军队的驻扎方位。
E: As you attempted to save a dying Cloud Knight, they expend their final strength to reveal the location of Fu Xuan and her garrison.

C: 青年的声音称，所思之她已先行蜕生，而自己仍要等待许久，直至蜕生降临。
E: A youth's voice said that the woman he longs for had already gone through her hatching rebirth. Yet, he still has to wait for a long time before his hatching rebirth comes.

C: 流萤的记忆述说着：「是出口…沿着这边应该能离开……」可惜这条路，最终通向「死亡」的巢穴。
E: Firefly's memory stated: "It's an exit... Following this path should lead me out of this place..." Unfortunately, this path ultimately led one to the lair of "Death."

C: 波提欧向路人打听梦境里的变故。杰诺与萨宾娜沉浸在对谐乐大典的品论中，对流言不屑一顾。看来他们什么也不知道。
E: Boothill asked passersby about strange occurrences in the dreamscape. Jno and Sabrina were too absorbed in discussing the Charmony Festival to care about rumors, and appeared to know nothing.

C: 庇护逐梦客助其崛起，最终却成压迫者，善意反酿恶果。
E: Aiding the Dreamchaser to rise led them to become an oppressor themselves. His goodwill sowed the seeds of harm.

C: 你们进入《愚仆颂》的剧目世界，目睹家系内斗与家族掌权，匹诺康尼成梦想之地。
E: You entered the world of the play Ode to Fool, witnessing the internal conflict within lineages and how The Family controlled the land's power, where Penacony became the Land of the Dreams.

C: 剧中人探讨君王之必要，宰相主张众人应为彼此负责。
E: The characters in the play discussed the necessity of having a king, while the chancellor opined that the masses should be responsible for each other.

C: 将军质问君王缺位后的庇护者，宰相回应应团结互助自强。
E: The general demanded to know who would protect the land when the king is absent, and the chancellor responded that the masses should unite and become strong together.

C: 你与丹恒、瓦尔特汇合，了解家族与公司微妙局势，舒翁以特调纪念无名客与加拉赫，并与你们告别。
E: You met up with Dan Heng and Welt and understood the intricate situation between The Family and the IPC. Siobhan commemorated the Nameless and Gallagher with a special drink and bid farewell to your group.

C: 丹恒留步解答你的疑问，进一步探讨梦境、秩序与列车的责任。
E: Dan Heng stopped and answered your questions regarding the Dreamscape, the Order, and the Express's duties.

C: 沉溺感再次来袭，你与丹恒、芭蕉花酱陷入与睡蕉小猴的同化中。所幸乱破没有受到影响，她以霸道而迅速的手刀唤醒大家。
E: The drowsy sensation hit again, and you, Dan Heng, and Nanabloom-chan started to sync with the state of Slumbernana Monkey. Fortunately, Rappa remained unaffected and swiftly woke everyone up with her forceful karate chop.

C: 睡蕉小猴风潮平息后，《银河忍法帖》成为校园里最流行的模因。蒙塔娜邀请三月七参加「观忍社」，三月七则选择先去看看新开幕式。
E: After the Slumbernana Monkey incident died down, Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions became the hottest meme on campus. Montana invited March 7th to join the Ninja Appreciation Society, but March 7th decided to check out the opening ceremony first.

C: 在空无的潜意识中，波提欧与助蕉交谈。助蕉称睡蕉小猴想要传达给人们的，只有一个疑问——「您会因此更加不幸吗？」
E: In the empty subconscious, Boothill conversed with Assistanana, who said that the Slumbernana Monkey only wanted to convey one question to people: "Would this make you more miserable?"

C: 星期日欲查清橡木余毒，不顾危险重回匹诺康尼，只为给过往画上句号。
E: Sunday wanted to clear out the remaining damage from the Oak Family's deeds. He returned to Penacony despite the dangers, only so that he could put an end to his past.

C: 你与白厄、万敌遇到「黄金狮首」，得知尼卡多利正酝酿着某个阴谋。狮首恳请万敌终结尼卡多利，让「纷争」泰坦以战士的身份死去。
E: You, Phainon, and Mydei found a Chryseus Leo that told you Nikador was planning something sinister. It begged Mydei to kill Nikador so that the Strife Titan could die as a warrior should.

C: 你们看到「公正天秤」，那是「律法」泰坦塔兰顿的象征物。「律法」的火种已经归位，接替其神职的黄金裔如今不知所踪。
E: You spotted the Scales of Justice, which symbolized Talanton, the Law Titan. You learned the Law Titan's Coreflame had been returned, but the Chrysos Heir who took over Talanton's role was nowhere to be seen.

C: 在完成四份灵魂的归位后，格奈乌斯称，他已经知晓，该去哪里寻找最后的一瓣神性「理智」。
E: Once the four split soul fragments had been restored, Gnaeus revealed he now knew where to find the final shard of divinity, "Reason."

C: 你从睡梦中醒来，迷迷与丹恒正在等你。黄金裔们大概已经在创世涡心做好准备，等你们去见证火种的归还。
E: You awoke from your dreams to find Mem and Dan Heng waiting for you. The Chrysos Heirs were likely already prepared at the Vortex of Genesis, awaiting your arrival to witness the return of the Coreflame.

C: 「谒见系统」系统修复完成。大黑塔与终端交互，再次尝试谒见博识尊。
E: With that, the Audience System was fully restored. The Herta interacted with the terminal, making another attempt to audience with the Nous.

C: 遐蝶轻触死囚的前额，霎时，惊慌、震颤与哭嚎随风散去，一切陷入死寂。「督战圣女」的人生由此开始。
E: Castorice gently touched a prisoner's forehead. His panic, tremors, and wails of anguish disappeared in an instant, and everything returned to a deathly silence. This was where the Maiden of War's life began.

C: 你们发现更多被打到的黑潮造物。如果赛飞儿所言属实，那么这些战斗痕迹或许是万敌所为。
E: You encountered some fallen Black Tide Creatures. If Cipher was to be believed, this was likely the handiwork of Mydei as he cut a path through his enemies.

C: 赛飞儿回到奥赫玛，伫立于黎明云崖。时移事迁，她不禁回想起千年往事。
E: Cipher returned to Okhema, and stood in silence for a long time in Dawncloud. With the passage of time, she couldn't help but remember a story from a thousand years ago.

C: 壁画上描绘着「天空」泰坦艾格勒，即「晨昏之眼」。这是艾格勒在神话中最常见的形态，不出意外的话，你们很快就能一睹它的真容。
E: The mural depicted Aquila, the Sky Titan, also known as the "Eye of Twilight." This was Aquila's most common form in mythology, and if all went well, you would soon get to see them in person.

C: 在创世涡心，一如每一次永劫回归的尽头，盗火行者面对新生的白厄，进行使命的传递。他将仪式剑交予对方，示意其杀死自己。
E: At the Vortex of Genesis, like how every Eternal Recurrence ended, the Flame Reaver faced the newly reborn Phainon to pass on the mission. He offered the ceremonial blade, asking the new Phainon to kill him.

C: 你在梦中聆听音符小姐用圣杯索回真名的心愿。音符小姐不肯解除宝具，除非知更鸟用令咒命令她，知更鸟则打赌众人能自行脱离困境。
E: In your dream, you heard Miss Note wish upon the Holy Grail to reclaim her True Name. She refused to release her Noble Phantasm unless Robin used a Command Spell on her, but Robin bet that all of you could escape without it.

C: 刻律德菈来到贝洛伯格。昔涟向刻律德菈介绍这座城市的「大守护者」，一位在灾难中挺身而出的领袖。
E: Cerydra then visited Belobog, after which Cyrene introduced her to the city's Supreme Guardian, a leader who had stepped forward in the face of catastrophe.

C: 德谬歌化作妖精与你相遇，却遗忘了一切，而今她希望能以「昔涟」的名字被你呼唤。身为「翁法罗斯之心」，她是击败铁墓的关键之一。
E: Demiurge met you as a fairy, but had lost all memories. Now she wished to be called by the name "Cyrene." As the Heart of Amphoreus, she is one of the keys to defeating Irontomb.

C: 你于灵水盆溶解「愿望」与「绝望」，向这片温柔的小世界道别。从今以后，世界不再需要神谕许诺的明天。
E: You dissolved the "wishes" and "despair" in the spirit basin, bidding farewell to this gentle little world. From now on, the world no longer required a tomorrow promised by prophecies.

C: 银狼的投影利用奇物穿过墙壁，进入无名之间。星核猎手们就是在那里，把星核放入了你的体内。
E: Silver Wolf projected herself through the wall using a Curio and entered the Nameless Space. It was there that the Stellaron Hunters implanted the Stellaron into your body.

C: 丹恒推测，翅粉能让人产生类似「个人所求」的事物。银枝转述真蛰虫的遗言——「尽情庆祝吧，你们终究无法察觉霸主的存在！」
E: Dan Heng theorized that the wing dust made people see things they desire. Argenti recounted True Sting's last words — "Celebrate all you want, for you will never be able to acknowledge the existence of the overlord!"

C: 阮•梅向你解释，她在点心中加入了「反吐真剂」。阮•梅想让你作为助手，回收她在空间站培育的「生命」，她会给你「奖励」。
E: Ruan Mei explained that she had mixed an "Anti-Truth Serum" into the pastries. She wanted you to assist in retrieving the "lifeforms" she had nurtured on the space station, promising a "reward."

C: 你们出发前往丹鼎司洞天。
E: You set out for the Alchemy Commission delve.

C: 前来处理此事的是仙舟神秘机构「十王司」，桂乃芬由此猜测绥园中一定发生了非同寻常之事。她邀请你一同前去探险，寻找真相。

C: 步离人终于被打败。无名剑士隐瞒了他将堕入魔阴的消息，让当地的人民用「孤云」杀死变成孽物的自己，并要他们建立石碑镇压怪物。
E: The borisin were finally defeated. Hiding the fact he was falling into mara, the nameless swordsman asked the local people to use Guyun to kill the abomination, which he would eventually become. He also instructed them to build a stone monument to suppress the monster.

C:
敌方攻击时我方失去<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>个战技点，敌方死亡时我方获取<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>点战技点。
敌方获取【妖火】时，获取者下次攻击时我方额外失去<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>个战技点。

每次使用驱邪术后，我方全体角色攻击力提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>、防御力提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>，可叠加。
E:
When enemies attack, allies lose <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> Skill Point(s). When enemies are defeated, allies receive <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> Skill Point(s).
When enemies obtain Fiendfire, the next attack of the unit that obtained Fiendfire will cause allies to lose an additional <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> Skill Point(s).

Each time the exorcismics is used, all allies' ATK increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> and DEF by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>. This effect is stackable.

C:
敌方对我方攻击并造成伤害时，会使我方陷入风化状态，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>回合，最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>层，每次行动仅能生效一次。在风化状态下，我方目标每回合开始时受到等同于攻击者<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的风属性持续伤害。
敌方获取【妖火】时，获取者下次攻击会额外使我方陷入<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>层风化状态。

每次使用驱邪术后，我方全体角色攻击力提高<unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak>、防御力提高<unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak>，可叠加。
E:
When an enemy attacks and deals DMG to an ally, that ally will be inflicted with Wind Shear for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s), stacking up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s). This can only take effect 1 time per action. While in Wind Shear, at the start of each turn, the ally will receive Wind DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of the attacker's ATK.
When enemies obtain Fiendfire, the next attack from the unit that obtained Fiendfire will additionally inflict <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> more stack(s) of Wind Shear.

Each time the exorcismics is used, all allies' ATK increases by <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> and DEF by <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak>. This effect is stackable.

C: 这儿曾是你熟悉故土的一角，旧日的回忆纷纷涌现，数不清的影子徘徊来去。不过，眼下朋友们音讯不明，你不打算继续在此停留。
E: This was once a part of your familiar home. Memories of the past swell up into your mind, and countless bygone shadows swivel before your eyes. However, your friends are currently missing. You have no plans to remain here.

C: 【序号】 EVD-X043FE21-001 【名称】粗花呢外套，粗纺羊毛马甲，白衬衫 【基本特征】左胸处有直径8厘米左右的燃素灼烧痕迹 【取证地点】俄亥提中央综合科学院能源研究部「柏环」研究室 【当事人信息】柏环（死亡），能源分析领域首席科学家，天才俱乐部#7成员 【现场分析】 根据现场情况来看，当事人携带「灰玺金」颗粒，吸附了大量燃素，于心脏处瞬时形成近千度高温。外套、马甲、以及衬衫均留下烧灼痕迹。 烧灼处留下半截未烧尽的无名指骨，经鉴定该指骨来自拉姆，或与高纯度「灰玺金」颗粒有关。 【证言补充】 「…我们早该想到人总有疏忽的时候，何况他其实从未对丧妻一事释怀……」 根据研究室的学者们描述，制定安全手册规范的柏环不应该犯下如此「低等错误」。 【备注信息】 「灰玺金」是由天才俱乐部成员#9成员克莱恩研制的稀有合金，具备捕获并储存燃素的性质。 当一系列的巧合太多时，巧合还是巧合吗？ 【相关文档】 「严禁携带高纯『灰玺金』合金产品进入置有燃素观测库的实验室。」出自能源研究部实验室安全手册。
E: [ID] EVD-X043FE21-001 [Name] Tweed jacket, coarse spun wool vest, and white shirt [Key Feature] Displays an 8-centimeter Phlogiston burn mark on the left chest [Location] Bohdan laboratory in the Energy Research Lab, Ohioti Central Academy of Sciences [Individual Involved] Bohdan (Deceased), the best scientist in the energy analysis field and member No. #7 of the Genius Society. [Site Analysis] The traces on the site indicate that the Grayseal Gold pellets carried by the subject absorbed a substantial amount of Phlogiston, resulting in a temperature spike of nearly 1,000 degrees Celsius near the subject's heart, leaving burn marks on the jacket, vest, and shirt. Half of an unburnt finger bone was found in the burnt area, identified as originating from Lambda or related to the high-purity Grayseal Gold pellets. [Supplementary Testimony] "...We should have been more caring about him, especially considering he never truly let go of his wife's death..." According to other scholars at the lab, Bohdan, who devised the safety manual specifications, should not have made such a "simple mistake." [Additional Information] Grayseal Gold is a rare alloy developed by Klein, member No. #9 of the Genius Society, known for its ability to absorb and store Phlogiston. When a series of coincidences pile up, does that still count as a coincidence? [Relevant Document] "It is strictly forbidden to bring high-purity Grayseal Gold alloy products into laboratories with Phlogiston observation areas." Excerpted from the Energy Research Laboratory Safety Manual.

C:
在执行「思维切片」计划前，他以「远行」为由与隐居处的友人告别，友人担忧他年事已高，便将一双漂亮的手工鞋赠送给赞达尔，叮嘱他前路小心。

「呵呵，走在路上会摔倒也是自然，」赞达尔假装无心地回应，「只不过被同一块石绊倒两次便是一种耻辱了。你放心吧，我绝不会做那种蠢事。」

在那之后遥远的未来，赞达尔已然消失。取而代之的是，不同的「思维切片」们将前往银河不同的时空，以不同的面貌，互不相沟通的方式，各自寻找破除「监牢」的解法…所谓的「思维切片」不过是「赞达尔」的缺陷，也许正是因为缺少了什么，他才如愿变得更加偏执，更加纯粹。

它们都只是赞达尔的一个侧面，有人会自暴自弃，有人会接受牢笼，有人会想方设法阻止「思维切片」计划，正如他曾有过一丝犹豫…但一定会有人贯彻最初的计划。

在权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>的深处，吕枯耳戈斯打量着自己的机械身体，它与最初的赞达尔已截然不同…它如今已是神话之中的安提基色拉人。
E:
Before executing the "Thought Fragment" project, he bid farewell to his friend at the recluse location under the pretext of "going on a long journey." Worried about his advanced age, his friend gifted Zandar a beautiful pair of handmade shoes, urging him to tread carefully on the path ahead.

"Heh. Stumbling while walking is only natural," Zandar responded with feigned nonchalance, "but getting tripped by the same stone twice is just embarrassing. Don't worry. I won't do anything that stupid."

Long after that parting, Zandar had vanished in the distant future. In his place, different "Thought Fragments" would travel to various space-time across the cosmos, each taking different forms and never communicating with each other while seeking solutions to break free from the "prison" on their own... These so-called "Thought Fragments" were nothing but imperfections in "Zandar." Perhaps it was precisely because something was missing that he became, as he wished, more obsessive... more pure.

They are all just different facets of Zandar. Some will give up, some will accept the cage, some will try everything to stop the "Thought Fragment" project just as he once had a moment of hesitation... but there will definitely be someone who will carry out the original plan.

Lycurgus examined its mechanical body deep within Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>. It was now vastly different from the original Zandar... It had become an Antikytheran of legend.

C: 关联条目 - 「虚无」
E: Related Entry — The Nihility

C: 我不知该如何形容自己确认这一点时的震撼：我们的每一步都在模拟博识尊的计算中，仿佛祂才是模拟宇宙的缔造者，而我们是数据。我开始理解迷思和机器头的纠葛了，如果一切未知都被解明，「神秘」将何去何从？现在想来，斯蒂芬•劳艾德一直不希望自己被博识尊选入天才俱乐部，也许这件事从一开始就在祂的演算中——斯蒂芬，你没得选。
E: I don't know how I can describe the kind of shock I had when I confirmed this discovery: Every step we took were within the simulated Nous' calculations as if THEY were the architect of the Simulated Universe, and we are data instead. I'm beginning to understand the entangled conflict between Mythus and Droidhead. If all the unknowns are to be exposed, where does that leave Enigmata? In hindsight, Stephen Lloyd always wished he was not selected by Nous to join the Genius Society, but this may have been another calculated move by the Aeon — Stephen had no choice.

C: 「欢愉」
E: Elation

C: 随手捡起一个皮球，胡乱地涂画上各色脸庞，千般面相皆不过是小丑，喜怒哀乐只剩下欢愉。\n觐见之人请别太严肃，酒馆里都是好朋友，乐子神和你手牵手。
E: Serendipitously pick up a ball and paint faces upon its surface with abandon. These faces are but clownish visages, and of the emotions, only Elation remains.\nCommuner! Don't be so serious. The taverns are filled with friends, and The Laughter is with you.

C: 尚未获得该奇物，需在「差分宇宙」中收集获得…
E: This Curio has not been unlocked. It can be collected in Divergent Universe...

C: 你喜欢听故事吗？谁人的惊魂冒险，谁人的爱情史诗，就像是溶洞里的钟乳石，记忆的水滴流下，打造出无与伦比的宝藏。老妇人哈哈大笑，她曾在独角兽星云的航行中被陨石雨击坠，却在救援船上偶遇了阔别多年的旧友。将军掩面而泣，由于他的错误判断，舰队在黄柑橘星云的最终战一败涂地，他失去了三条手臂，硕大的鳞翅也无法再飞起。你将他们的故事写下，随他们而笑，也同他们而哭。\n\n谁不认识你？来自新伦蒂尼恩的传记作家——嘘，请侧耳倾听，下一个故事就要来了。
E: Do you like listening to stories? The thrilling adventures and epic love stories of others are akin to the stalactites in a cave, as they are invaluable treasures formed by the drip of memories. An elderly lady lets out a guffaw — she was once hit by a meteor rain during her voyage in the Unicorn Nebula but ran into a long-lost friend on the rescue ship. A general is in tears — his fleet suffered a crushing defeat in the deciding battle in the Yellow Citrus Nebula due to his erroneous judgment. Having lost three arms, he also can no longer fly with his huge scale wings. You write down their stories, laughing and crying along with them.\n\nWho doesn't know you? You're a biographer from New Londinium. Shush, listen carefully — the next story is coming.

C:
银色的护卫舰群，在无垠的黑暗中巡游，全息的舱室内，映射出脚下苍白的大地。那里有不再运行的计算机集群，瘫痪至今的诸城被苔草覆盖，你不知道废墟下埋藏着什么，只知道自己仍肩负守卫它的使命。

族群里的叛逆者在唾骂中离去，他们去往广阔的星间。你也想离开，可却无法承受族人们指责的眼睛，无法背叛，你所受的教育、你的家庭和刻印在脑部芯片的原始逻辑。你剥离了身体，脑细胞与舰群融为一体，一如将你制造出的亲族。

你将永恒地捍卫那故去的死城，却不再质问，自己究竟在替谁人守陵。
E:
A cluster of silver frigates glides through the infinite darkness, their holographic cabins illuminated by the pale earth beneath your feet. That place contains a collection of defunct computers, and cities long paralyzed lie smothered in moss and grass. You have no idea what secrets are buried beneath the rubble, only that it remains your duty to guard it.

The rebels of the clan depart in foul words, venturing into the vast expanse of interstellar space. You yearn to leave as well, but the accusing eyes of your kin weigh heavily on you. You cannot betray your education, your family, or the primitive logic etched into your brain chip. Instead, you relinquish your physical form, merging your cerebral neurons with the fleet, just as the kindred who created you once did.

You will guard the dead city for eternity, yet you no longer question for whom you protect this tomb.

C:
哪怕博识如你，定也没到过糜烂的卡萨科，
那里的人常年瘫倒在床榻，唯有手指灵活。
轻轻勾动食指，果子便顺着窗口滚到床边，
再拍拍右手，贼之手便从屋外提溜来蜜酿。
果子偷自山上的果园，
蜜酿盗自邻居的酒窖。
那儿还有口水井，扎格列斯的恩赐让它永不枯竭，
琼浆和小麦源源不断地从中涌出，
仿佛连最胆大的骗子也不敢扯的弥天大谎。
多么幸福！你偷取我来我抢夺你，
足不出户便能高枕安居。
卡萨科在腐臭中度过无数日夜，就连死亡，
也只需动动手指的时间。
E:
Even one as knowledgeable as you have likely never been to the decayed land of Cassacco.
There, people lie bedridden year-round, their fingers being the only agile part of their bodies.
With a finger's curl, fruit rolls through open windows to their bedsides.
A quick clap summons honey brews brought by a Thief's Hand.
Fruits are stolen from orchards up the mountain.
Honey brews are pilfered from neighbors' cellars.
A mystical well, said to bear Zagreus' blessing, never runs dry,
Pouring forth nectar and wheat in endless supply.
It's a grandiose lie so outlandish that even the boldest liar wouldn't dare to tell.
How blissful! You steal from me, I seize from you.
Life is effortless, never requiring one to step outside.
Cassacco has rotted through countless days and nights. There, even death
Requires no more than the snap of a finger.

C:
可惜不能与你同行，朋友，
我们正要去剿灭那群可憎的家伙。
丧心病狂的信徒，收留来孩童，
每个人都会获得一首诗歌，
波澜壮阔的「过去」，与惨无人道的折磨。
名为科林刻的，要在三岁时扼死毒蛇，
名为德卡墨斯的，弹琴到小指折断。
为满足疯人的妄想，
有多少被剥夺了人生的少年，
没能成为科林刻，最终沉没在水里？
还有多少人正在成为他的路上，
直到从蒂尔科亚山的顶峰摔落？
在我们聊天的空当里，恶毒的秘仪仍在继续，
只为用相同的过往，再造英雄的传奇。
E:
It's a pity that I cannot accompany you, my friend.
We are about to eradicate that detestable group,
A deranged cult that preys on children.
They give each of the children a poem
That glorifies a "past" entwined with inhuman torture.
The child named Corinchi was forced to strangle a venomous snake at the age of three,
While Dekamos played the harp until their pinky snapped.
To fulfill the delusions of the Mad One,
How many youths have been deprived of their lives,
Never becoming Corinchi, only to drown in despair?
And how many are on their way to becoming them,
Until they fall from the peak of Mount Tilkoya?
Even as we speak, the wicked rituals continue,
All to recreate the legends of heroes with the same tragic past.

C:
你有见过蝶翼的衣匠吗？自从墨涅塔陨落，
地上便愈发难寻他们的行踪。
并非所有的生命都有山之民那样幸运，
生来以刻法勒为模板。
法吉娜的海妖，艾格勒的奇兽，
无数希冀新生的造物与眷属，
蒙受金衣者的点拨，
如当年的墨涅塔那般，
被包裹进金丝的蛹中，
而后，灵魂被编织成人形。
理由总是轻浮，或是爱上某位凡人，
或是希冀与哪位英雄在角斗场里比拼。
可战争终究摧毁了一切，不忍背叛自己的造主，
我的恋人也在清晨蜕去外壳，翻飞它动人的双翼。
E:
Have you ever seen a garmentmaker of butterfly wings? Ever since the fall of Mnestia,
They have become rare to find.
Not all beings are as fortunate as the Mountain Dwellers,
Born with Kephale as their template.
The siren of Phagousa, the wondrous beast of Aquila,
And countless creations and Titankins yearning for rebirth,
Had once received the guidance of the Gilded One.
Just like Mnestia,
They were wrapped within cocoons of golden threads,
And later, their souls were woven into humanoid forms.
The reasons are always frivolous, either love for a mortal
Or the desire to duel a hero in the arena.
Yet war ultimately destroyed it all. Unable to betray its creator,
My beloved shed its shell at dawn and fluttered those enchanting wings.

C: 熔岩
E: Lava

C: 三只小猪
E: Three Little Pigs

C: *完美*大挑战！
E: The *Perfect* Grand Challenge!

C: 陨星散落宇宙各处，有人表示曾听到它与自己交流，诱惑人们向其许愿。它是否真的无所不能，实现愿望又是否不需要代价？据传有组织行走星间，只为收集解开陨星的奥秘。没人知道这是某位星神的赐福，还是所有人都落入了一场人造的阴谋之中。
E: Meteorites fell across all corners of the cosmos. People once claimed they could hear these rocks communicating with humans, luring people to wish upon them. Can they truly grant any and all wishes without a cost? It's said that there's an organization that strides between stars solely to uncover the mystery behind the meteorites. No one knows whether these rocks are an Aeon's blessings, or whether everyone has been drawn into an artificial conspiracy.

C: 在登上星际和平公司的押送船前，传奇骇客「零号」曾公开向全球宣告，自己在以太网络的深处留下了一串作弊代码，只要把它输入游戏文档，再白痴的玩家也能让朋克洛德的秩序崩盘瓦解。虽然几大企业多次联合声明，作弊代码已被他们销毁，但直到今天，你仍能在数据边缘看到一艘艘即将深潜的航船，载着意气风发的骇客们踏上寻宝之旅——「朋克洛德是个平衡性极差的垃圾游戏，所以，我做了点修改。」
E: Before they boarded the IPC escort ship, the legendary hacker Zero once publicly announced to the whole planet that they had left a cheat code hidden deep within the Aether Network, and that even the newest of newbie players needed only to insert it into the game files to overturn Punklorde's order completely. Although various major companies have announced that the cheat codes have been eliminated, you can still see at the brink of the data a fleet of ships ready at all times to make a deep dive, taking groups of high-spirited hackers setting off on a treasure hunt in high spirits. "Punklorde is a game with trash balance, so I've made some adjustments."
