E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Hyacine: "<unbreak>0.35</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 这样吗…{M#他}{F#她}——很关键？
E: {M#He's}{F#She's}... that important?

C: 我是建议你上列车啦。你留下对我有那么一点好处，但总得来说没什么帮助。
E: My advice would be to get on. You're not doing me that big of a favor by staying anyway.

C: 关于「选择」…
E: About the decision...

C: 你不像是喜欢旅行的人。
E: You don't seem like someone who likes to travel.

C: 坐上列车并不完全等同于「旅行」或者「冒险」…星穹列车代表的是「开拓」，知道吗？
E: Being on the Express isn't exactly the same as "traveling" or "adventuring..." The Astral Express symbolizes "trailblazing" you understand?

C: 我想上车。
E: I want to join the Express.

C: 你没事就好。军团的威胁已经解除，你可以放心了。
E: It's good that you've made it through in one piece. You can rest easy now that the threat from the Legion has been neutralized.

C: 难道是嫌我啰嗦吗？还、还是说觉得和我这个年龄段的聊天已经有代沟了？！
E: Is it because you think Pom-Pom talks too much? Or is it Pom-Pom's age? You youngsters gotta learn to bridge that generation gap.

C: …是你啊。门没锁，进来吧。
E: ...Oh, it's you. The door's not locked. Come in.

C: 来到这里…真的是正确的选择么？
E: Coming on board the Express... Was it really the right decision?

C: 兔子形状的躺椅上放着小熊，这画面就像它的主人一样三心二意。
E: There's a bunny-shaped lounge chair with a teddy bear sitting in it. A fitting metaphor for their conflicted owner.

C: 「星神」——想想看，多么神奇的存在！有些星神曾经和你我一样，都是普通人类，但不知怎的，祂们就得到超越我们想象的力量！祂们诡秘、强大、沉默、可怕！关于祂们的谜团，三言两语根本说不清楚。
E: Aeons... think about it. What mystical existences! Some Aeons used to be ordinary humans like you and me, but somehow THEY managed to obtain power beyond our imagination! THEY are mysterious, powerful, silent and terrifying! It's hard to explain all the mysteries surrounding THEM.

C: 什么四十二，你到底有没有听我说话——我们想弄清楚「星神」的奥秘！现在想让你参与这个项目！
E: <unbreak>42</unbreak> what? Are you even listening to me? We want to solve the mystery behind the Aeons! Right now I want you to participate in this project!

C: 没什么，回见。
E: That's all. See you soon.

C: 因为你问了。
E: You wanted to know.

C: 难道你很希望我怀疑吗？对自己声称的身份，就这么没有自信？不，我不怀疑。我看得出你们并非这个世界的人。
E: Do you wish me to doubt it? Or perhaps you're not confident in that identity yourself? Haha... No, I do not doubt it. I can see that you are not from this world.

C: 好吧好吧，那你说。
E: Alright, spit it out then.

C: …这是计划好的背叛，毫无疑问。
E: ...This is an orchestrated betrayal, obviously.

C: 要是能把我的情况告诉他，他肯定会帮我的。
E: If I could just find a way to tell him about my situation, I'm sure he'd help me.

C: {F#说好的枕头大战呢？}
E: {F#Didn't someone mention a pillow fight?}

C: 这是我们应该做的，银鬃铁卫必须对市民的生命安全负责。
E: Well, this is our duty as Silvermane Guards. We are responsible for the safety of the citizenry.

C: 没有。
E: No.

C: …姐，你气色不太对，发生什么了吗？
E: ...Sis, you look a bit pale. Did something happen?

C: 就我们这几个人去闯克里珀堡？还是打消这个念头吧，希儿姑娘，你本事再大，我也不能放任你去送死啊。
E: Attempting to storm Qlipoth Fort by ourselves? Forget it, Seele. I don't care how skilled you are. I'm not sending you on a suicide mission.

C: …希露瓦小姐！
E: ...Miss Serval!

C: 布洛妮娅！我们回来啦。
E: Bronya, we're back!

C: 呵…照片拍完了，街也逛累了，接下来……
E: *yawn* ... That's enough sightseeing and photo-taking to last me a while...

C: 走啦走啦，才一晚而已——姬子和杨叔都是成熟的大人，很有耐心的！
E: Come onnnn! Himeko and Mr. Yang are grown-ups — I'm sure they'll cope without us for one night.

C: 终于到了这个时候…唉，道别真是令人伤感呀……
E: Here we are at last... *sigh* It's sad to say goodbye.

C: 您说的这两件事，我都没听过…请、请务必仔细给我讲讲！
E: I haven't heard of either of them actually... But I'd love to hear all about them!

C: …不，没什么。这的确是我的东西。
E: ...I—It's nothing. You're right, it does belong to me.

C: 也不排除这个可能。布洛妮娅大人善读人心…她应该知道，要是没有足够强烈的理由，你是绝对不会踏进克里珀堡半步的。
E: I wouldn't rule it out — she's good at reading people's minds... she would've known that you'd never set foot in Qlipoth Fort voluntarily.

C: （杰帕德似乎在专心收拾行李……）
E: (Looks like Gepard's got his work cut out for him...)

C: 你静静地倾听，行李没有发出微弱的嘀嗒声。你松了口气。
E: You inch in closer and quietly listen. The luggage doesn't make a faint ticking sound. You breathe a sigh of relief.

C: 巨大的星球仪。
E: A giant armillary sphere.

C: 你看见菜单上写着：「火淇淋，传说中的夏天味道。——1元/根。警告：辣椒过敏者禁止购买。」
E: You see on the menu: "Fire Chillin' Ice Cream. Legendary taste of the summer. 1 shield each. Warning: Forbidden for those with chili allergies."

C: 关上盖子。
E: Close the lid.

C: 话又说回来，你为什么执着于翻开城市里每只垃圾桶？这能让你得到什么？
E: Wait, why are you so interested in rooting through every trashcan in the city? What do you have to gain?

C: 你是怎么认识的桑博？
E: How did you get to know him?

C: …你总会遇到他们的。
E: ...You can always find them.

C: 你不是又带我们瞎绕圈吧？
E: Gah, so you're leading us on another wild goose chase?

C: 嘿，别的镇子的状况比我们还差呢。
E: *sigh* The situation in other towns is even worse than ours.

C: 虎克有些值钱的宝贝落在铆钉镇里了……
E: I've got to get back to my treasure!

C: 你也不要太溺爱她了，外来者。我知道想拒绝虎克是一件难事，但人还是得学会说「不」才行呢。
E: You shouldn't indulge her, outsider. Uh-uh, I know it's difficult to tell Hook "no," but sometimes it just has to be done.

C: 虎克不想单独把「菌菌」的眼睛留下来。如果拿到「菌菌」的小朋友发现他没有眼睛，肯定会很伤心吧？
E: I don't want to keep Junjun's eyes. If some kid gets a Junjun with no eyes, they'll be sad, right?

C: 这孩子真是的，多说了她两句就跑得没影儿了。
E: *sigh* That girl... I'd barely gotten two sentences out.

C: 冷静一点…
E: Calm down...

C: …我有很多地方…咳咳…要用钱，没办法。
E: ...There's a lot of holes I need to fill... *cough* with money...

C: 不是我危言耸听，再这么下去，你迟早会倒在擂台上——永远都起不来的那种。明白了吗？
E: I'm not being alarmist. If you go on like this, sooner or later you'll fall in the ring — the kind of fall you'll never recover from. Do you understand?

C: 奇怪的是，每次都是不同的人把包裹交到我手上，他们都不愿意透露究竟是谁如此慷慨……
E: Strangely, it's never the same guy who delivers the package, and none of them would tell me who the generous donor is...

C: 我想给他买奶粉，也赶过好几趟市集了，但奶粉有价无市，而我工资交完房租就不剩多少了……
E: I want to buy baby formula. I have been to the market several times, but the milk is expensive and always in short supply, and after the rent is paid, there's not much left...

C: 没有大人在，太危险了…
E: It's dangerous for you to be here alone.

C: 好的，我这就为您安排。
E: Alrighty. Let me get it ready for you right away.

C: 可可利亚牺牲了，那个铁卫姑娘就会接过「大守护者」的位子吧？
E: Now that Cocolia is no more, I guess our Silvermane girl is about to become the next supreme guardian?

C: 哎哟，这下坏了…小伙子？小伙子——你没事吧？
E: Oh my, this doesn't look good... Can you hear me? Are you okay?

C: 开…开工？这么快？哎哟，我头好疼……
E: Action... stations? Already? Ooh, um — ow, oww...! My head...

C: 没错。
E: Right.

C: 啊，在那之前，我还得先回一趟机械屋拿一件东西。{NICKNAME}，要不你就先去北边等我们吧？
E: Oh, but before that, I need to go back to the workshop and get something. {NICKNAME}, why don't you head north first and we'll catch up with you.

C: 把时间花在那些看上去有点奖励的东西上吧，这只是个路灯。
E: Spend some time on the things that might have a reward, this is only a street lamp.

C: 你离开这座垃圾箱，将它抛之脑后，不再理睬。
E: You leave this dumpster and forget all about it.

C: 错了，但情有可原，谁会没事去数垃圾桶的数量呢？因此，这个游戏就到此为止吧，太幼稚了！它太幼稚了！
E: This is the wrong answer, but it is understandable. Who would count the number of existing trashcans? So, let's stop this game right now. It's too childish! Childish!

C: 在博识学会的鼎力支持下，我们已初步掌握了绕过星核污染的技术，并在一百一十三个星系进行了实验，取得了可喜的成果。
E: With the Intelligentsia Guild's ardent support, we have begun developing technologies to bypass Stellaron Corrosion. Experiments conducted across <unbreak>113</unbreak> galaxies have shown promising results.

C: 沉寂已久的巡海游侠现身阿斯德纳星系，这是继琥珀<unbreak>2155</unbreak>纪「血色翁瓦克」以来，该派系首次出现大规模的集结行动。
E: The once-quiet Galaxy Rangers have made a notable reappearance in the Asdana system, marking the first significant mobilization of the group since the Crimson Vonwacq event of <unbreak>2155</unbreak> AE, indicating a momentous resurgence.

C: 演武仪典是仙舟联盟的节庆仪式。在举办这一庆典期间，一座仙舟将以比武、竞技等方式纪念云骑军在「巡猎」星神的庇佑下赢得胜利。
E: The Wardance is a celebratory tradition within the Xianzhou Alliance. Throughout this celebration, a Xianzhou vessel pays tribute to the Cloud Knight victories achieved under the Aeon, The Hunt, through displays of combat and competitive events.

C: 让我们讨论一下。
E: Can we talk about it first?

C: 为什么！
E: Why!?

C: 滞留仙舟期间，如有用得上天舶司和云骑军的地方，不用客气。
E: If there's anything the Sky-Faring Commission or the Cloud Knights can do for you during your stay, don't hesitate to make it known.

C: 它如何掩人耳目，绕过天舶司的核查与太卜司的推演，又被置于何处？
E: How did it manage to bypass the Sky-Faring Commission's inspections and the Divination Commission's predictions? Where is it now?

C: 都戒严了，宣夜大道还是那么繁华…真不愧是仙舟。
E: That Starwatcher Avenue would be so crowded even with a lockdown... Xianzhou is really a sight to behold.

C: 失礼了，在下是地衡司勤务。看您的打扮，是造访「罗浮」的外客吗？
E: Oh, my apologies. I'm an orderly from the Realm-Keeping Commission. Judging by your dress, you must be visitors to the Luofu?

C: 今天地衡司发了公告，「星槎海」的港口也关闭了。云骑军四处出动，封锁设施。朋友们，珍惜还能打牌的好日子吧。
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission made an announcement today — Starskiff Haven has been closed off and the Cloud Knights are shutting everything down. We need to enjoy our celestial jade-playing days while they last!

C: …还有这种事？我也刚来「罗浮」……
E: ...Seriously? I just got to the Luofu myself...

C: 罗浮封锁之事，你知道多少？
E: How much do you know about the Luofu being sealed off?

C: …都说了我刚从「曜青」仙舟调过来嘛，确实没怎么来过这儿。
E: ...I told you, I was only just transferred here from the Yaoqing. I don't come here very often.

C: 加紧动身吧。
E: Let's hurry.

C: 我是个没什么意思的人呢……
E: I'm not a very interesting person...

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 哎呀，你们来啦。
E: Oh, you've arrived.

C: 你这很神往的语气又是怎么回事？
E: Ugh, why don't you go and marry her, huh?

C: 不能就地审讯吗？星核猎手多狡猾啊，万一又给她跑了？
E: Can't we do the questioning here? The Stellaron Hunters are slippery, what if she makes a break for it?

C: 有人用完后故意将之破坏，或许是卡芙卡。
E: It looks like someone used it and then destroyed it — possibly Kafka.

C: 唔？箱子上还夹着一张字条？「喜欢吗？这儿有奖励哦~」
E: Huh? There's a note here too. "Take your fancy? There's a reward inside~"

C: 快看，那儿有人。
E: Look, there's someone over there!

C: （提供治疗）
E: (provides medical attention)

C: 逗他们玩玩罢了，军爷。嘻嘻，没有「丰饶」的赐福，你们短生种可承受不了这种「转变」。
E: We're just having fun, sir, hehe... Without the blessing of the Abundance, you short-life species would never be able to endure the transformation.

C: 景元去哪里了？
E: Where is Jing Yuan?

C: 你必须做到，不然一切许诺都不作数。要怪就怪你的前世吧，若不是他当初做了那件混账事，若化龙之力能够完整传承，我根本用不着逼你。
E: You must do it, or my promise will count for naught. If you wish to blame someone, blame your previous incarnation. Had he not committed that terrible sin — had the power of dragon transmutation been passed on intact — I would have no need to compel you.

C: 丹恒，你能来，真是太好了！
E: Anyway, it's great to have you with us, Dan Heng!

C: 你留在这里，率云骑镇守这条通道，以免另有事端。
E: Remain here — lead the Cloud Knights in defense of this passage. We must prevent further incidents.

C: 但前方的对手并非丰饶孽物…而是反物质军团的「绝灭大君」。过了这条道后，就是{RUBY_B#岚}帝弓司命{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#纳努克}烬灭祸祖{RUBY_E#}的对垒了……
E: ...but the adversary ahead of us is not an Abomination of Abundance. They are a Lord Ravager of the Antimatter Legion. Crossing this line will bring you into the conflict between the {RUBY_B#Lan}Reignbow Arbiter{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Nanook}the Ruin Author{RUBY_E#}...

C: 任务谈不上。只是星核降灾、「药王秘传」作乱、「建木」重生，乃至反物质军团渗透罗浮…这一切始末详略，我须向联盟高层具呈公文，以备调查。
E: It's not a mission. The Stellaron crisis, the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus rebellion, the Arbor's resurrection, not to mention the Antimatter Legion infiltrating the Luofu... All of these incidents need reporting at the highest level for investigation.

C: 先说幻胧…
E: Let's discuss Phantylia first...

C: 我想见见罗浮如今的持明龙尊。
E: I want to meet the current high elder of the Vidyadhara.

C: 放在平日，魔阴身征兆出现前，便会有十王司的接引者将仙舟人带入因果殿，留下生平经历后归于寂灭。人们都习惯了以短促的「告别」代替仪式繁冗的「安葬」。
E: Ordinarily, the Ten-Lords Commission guides people to the Hall of Karma before any symptoms of mara are detected. There, they leave behind their lives and wait for their time to come. People are used to a short "farewell" as opposed to a tedious "burial" process.

C: 其实…「停云」是…
E: Actually... Tingyun...

C: 丹恒。
E: Dan Heng.

C: 我怕他生我的气，虽然很想与他再战一回……
E: I'm worried that he still holds some grudge against me. But to be honest, I'd love to have another spar with him.

C: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
E: I'm leaving the Luofu.

C: 我们说好啦，你随时回来，我随时教你打牌。
E: We're in agreement then. You can come back any time and I'll teach you how to play.

C: 这只谛听抬起前爪，圆滚滚的脑袋在空中画了个弧线，转了方向，向远处跑去。
E: Diting lifts its front paws, draws an arch in the air with its round head, turns around, and runs off into the distance.

C: 死…是什么意思？是指去很远很远的地方再也回不来了吗？就跟我的爸爸妈妈一样？
E: Dead... What does "dead" mean? Does it mean, going to a really really really far away place forever and ever, and never coming back? Like my mommy and daddy?

C: 你们药王秘传这样公开恐吓我们无辜小朋友，胆子真大啊？
E: Y—You guys must think you're pretty tough, bullying kids like us out in the open.

C: 那那那那…我们答应你！你可要说话算话啊！
E: O—O—Okay, we promise! But you have to keep your word too!

C: 不知道咱们是哪一间，走吧走吧，杨叔他们肯定在前台排队了，我们快去汇合！
E: Where are our rooms? Come on, Mr. Yang and the rest must be at the front desk. Let's hurry up and meet them there!

C: 左边，走廊尽头。我在那里等你。
E: Left, to the end of the corridor. I will wait there for you.

C: 我们在办理入住时遇到了些问题，给您带来的不便，深感抱歉。请问这位先生是？
E: We're sorry for all the trouble our check-in seems to have caused. Might I ask for your name?

C: 那肯定是「薄暮的时刻」啦！来度假胜地怎么可以不去购物天堂！我已经准备好装满购物袋了！
E: The Moment of Dusk, obviously! How can you not visit the shopping paradise when you're at the resort of all resorts! I'm all ready to fill my bags to the brim!

C: 您只要穿过那边的门扉，就可以抵达「黄金的时刻」了——祝您享受一段难忘的美梦！
E: You just go right through that door to reach Golden Hour. I wish you an unforgettable dream!

C: 我现在是阿基维利了？
E: Am I Akivili now?

C: （潜意识的潜力深不可测，{M#先生}{F#女士}！）
E: (The subconscious has vast potential, {M#sir}{F#madam}!)

C: 原、原来如此…报告长官，我们正在捉拿偷渡犯——就是这个小姑娘，可疑得很，一定是她！
E: I—I see... Sir, the thing is, we're trying to apprehend a stowaway, and that young lady there looks very suspicious. We're sure she's the one!

C: 我？不，不是的…我还不是家族一员，只是在为他们工作……
E: Me? No, I'm not one of them — not yet. I merely work for them...

C: 谈起大多数人入梦后的第一站，那自然就是「奥帝购物中心」！这里的梦境贩售店超级出名。
E: The first stop most people head to as soon as they arrive in the Dreamscape is the Oti Mall! The Dreamscape Sales Store here is super famous.

C: 这里就是刚才提到的奢侈品商店。
E: This is the luxury store I told about you earlier.

C: 桑博先生…在匹诺康尼做什么？
E: Mr. Sampo, what's the purpose of your visit to Penacony?

C: 那是…电视机吗？
E: Is that... a TV?

C: 我能感受到，有些似是而非的事物陪伴在你身旁。可惜我无法像你一样与之沟通。
E: I can feel the presence of something inexplicable next to you, but it's a shame that I can't communicate with him like you can.

C: 到底是家族的盛会，也许应邀而来的客人比我们想象中还要多上许多呢。
E: After all, it is a grand event held by The Family. The guestlist could be a lot longer than we imagine.

C: 会说话的钟表。我一定是疯了。
E: A talking clock? I must be losing my mind.

C: 全听您的吩咐！您是我们最尊贵的客人——
E: We're at your disposal! You're our most distinguished guest!

C: 嗐，让各位来宾看笑话了…真是不好意思。
E: This is embarrassing... I feel bad for causing such a spectacle.

C: 预备——起！
E: Ready... Go!

C: 呃，这个…嗐，总会有办法的！先别想那么多了，还是先享受当下吧！
E: Argh. That... well, there's got to be a way! Don't think about that much stuff. Let's enjoy what we've got now first!

C: 我不想这么做。
E: I don't want to.

C: 要走了吗？
E: You're going?

C: 碎片好像飞到两侧的房间里了。
E: The pieces look like they flew to both sides of the room.

C: （这是我梦境的一部分——这个梦的舞台就是贝洛伯格。）
E: (This is part of my Dreamscape — Belobog is the setting for this dream.)

C: 没错…塔塔洛夫就是用这样的把戏耍了我：「你这样巨大的身躯，垃圾袋怎么容得下你呢？」于是我当着他的面钻进了垃圾袋，就这样遭到封印。
E: Ah, yes, Tatalov used the same trick against me. "With such a massive body like yours, how can a bag fit you?" And so I slipped into a trash bag before him and found myself sealed.

C: 你若将金垃圾赐予我，我便许诺你世上最美丽的垃圾桶——也就是我——与你结伴而立，共同面对风吹雨打。
E: If you bestow upon me this golden trash, I shall promise you the most beautiful trashcan in the world — myself. I will stand beside you as a partner beyond peer and face all your trials and triumphs by your side.

C: 到底该怎么打开？
E: How can this be opened?

C: 她名叫「花火」，是混入匹诺康尼的假面愚者…放心，那姑娘暂时不会再打各位的主意了。她一定自以为得逞，正不知在何处得意洋洋呢。
E: Her name is Sparkle, a Masked Fool who has infiltrated Penacony... Don't worry. She won't be bothering you for now. She's probably patting herself on the back for a job well done.

C: 咦，原来每个人看到的是一样的么？我记得…然后是一间客房，再通过镜子来到一条长长的走廊……
E: Huh, so everyone saw the same thing? I remember... it was a room, and then through a mirror, I came to a long hallway...

C: 可以啊，不愧是你！那就长话短说……
E: Nicely done, as expected! I'll cut to the chase then...

C: 只能走我来时的路了。二位，请跟我来吧。
E: We'll just have to take the way I came. Follow me.

C: （黄泉是某位星神的令使？砂金的话，真的可信吗……）
E: (Acheron is the Emanator of a particular Aeon? Can I really believe Aventurine...?)

C: 匹诺康尼可是郑重承诺过：在家族编织的美梦中，每一位客人的安全都会得到保障。遇险者会被强制唤醒，平安地回到现实。
E: Penacony has made a solemn commitment to protect the safety of anyone inside a Family dream. Any person in distress will be forcibly awakened and safely returned to reality.

C: 就这么悄无声息地化作泡沫消散，到最后也无人知晓……
E: It'll just quietly float off like a bubble and pop, nobody ever being the wiser...

C: 千载难逢的机会…我在匹诺康尼四处调查、广交朋友，为的就是这一刻。
E: Truly a once-in-a-blue-moon opportunity... I've been investigating and making lots of friends all over Penacony precisely for this very moment.

C: 我试过用更简单直接的方式了结此事，但结果如你所见，我正站在这里与你对峙——我失败了。「剧本」无可违逆。
E: I tried settling this in an easier and more direct way, but as you can see, here I am, confronting you: I failed. Can't ever go against "the script."

C: 家族是打算隐瞒知更鸟小姐的死讯吧，这件事要是传开，匹诺康尼就真要「血流成河」了……
E: The Family is planning on covering up all news about Miss Robin's death. If news gets out, Penacony is going to turn into a bloodbath...

C: 艾迪恩公园的空气甜如蜂蜜——这是苏乐达糖浆特有的味道。
E: Aideen Park's air is sweet as honey — a scent unique of the SoulGlad syrup.

C: 这里头够气派啊。看来星期日先生是完全不打算给自己树立清高的形象。
E: Impressive. So much for Mr Sunday's reserved, virtuous image.

C: ——教授，又得仰仗你的智慧了。
E: ...Doc, I'll need your brainpower again.

C: 我也需要知道她是什么人，如果我的好运货真价实，她一定能成为重要的棋子。而在这件事上能帮我的*朋友*，越多越好。
E: Moreover, I need to know her identity. If I'm lucky, she could be an important pawn. And it's good to have more helpful friends when dealing with this matter.

C: …该死的，听起来我的下场横竖都一样啊。
E: Sounds like I'm going to end up the same either way.

C: 这么厉害啊…
E: He's that good huh...

C: 拜托各位继续调查案情了，我在现实中等待你们的好消息。
E: Please continue to investigate the case. All I can do is sit tight in the real world. I look forward to hearing your progress.

C: （看来他还是不打算松口……）
E: (Looks like he still doesn't want to budge an inch...)

C: …得，这下克里珀来了也存护不了他了。
E: ...Great, even if Qlipoth were here, THEY wouldn't be able to protect him.

C: 这便是我这一路浅浅的见闻……
E: This is what I've seen and heard along the way...

C: 我都空了一天啦。各位，欢迎光临「惊梦酒吧」——
E: I have the whole day to spare. Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to Dreamjolt Hostelry!

C: 快看，{NICKNAME}，是个好帅气的大姐姐——和希露瓦同一款哎！
E: Look, {NICKNAME}! A lady as cool as Serval!

C: 我胆小、怯懦，向往发光的地方，却不敢走到聚光灯下。我需要她的指引，因为我自己什么都做不到……
E: I'm too timid and shy, longing to shine but afraid of stepping into the spotlight. I need her guidance, because I'll never be able to do anything alone...

C: …艾米绮走了？
E: ...Amiky has left?

C: 用这杯「过早的埋葬」向你致意，梦想家——
E: Here's to you, dreamer, with this glass of "The Premature Burial"...

C: 恕我直言，有人试图在谐乐大典召开前夕引发混乱，这恰恰符合公司的利益…家族应当有理由怀疑是公司在从中作梗。
E: With all due respect, it's in the IPC's interest to wreak havoc before the Charmony Festival... and The Family has every reason to suspect the IPC's involvement.

C: 这次真安静啊，是他终于消失了…还是我快要消失了？
E: It's so quiet this time. Is he finally gone...? Or am I the one about to disappear?

C: 啊…真的是你。
E: Ah... It really is you.

C: …看吧。
E: ...Look.

C: 恕我直言，银河中有许多关于巡海游侠现状的传闻，都不是什么美好的故事。我很难相信你。
E: Pardon my frankness, but there are plenty of rumors in the cosmos regarding the Galaxy Rangers' current status, and none of them are pretty stories. I have a hard time believing you.

C: 把这当作来自彼岸之人的忠告吧：你比我更清楚，匹诺康尼已然背离了「同谐」。无论你们的目的是什么…我只能看见一种结局。
E: Take it from someone on the other side of your so-called river: You know better than I do that Penacony has already deviated from the Harmony. Whatever your intentions may be... I foresee only one outcome.

C: 直到很久以后，车里再度响起一声轻叹。
E: It wasn't until much later that a soft sigh once again broke the quiet in the car.

C: 瓦尔特先生，你也在？
E: Mr. Yang, you're here too?

C: 快帮帮忙，我在路上遇见一个家族的人！他吓得不轻，我就想让他冷静点。结果……
E: Quickly, come help! I bumped into a member of The Family on the way here. He was so scared and I just wanted to calm him down. But...

C: 人们过着自给自足的生活，不知该怎么形容，但总觉得这里才像真正的梦中世界……
E: Everyone here is living a self-sufficient life... I don't know how to describe it, but this place feels like the real Dreamscape...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>鸟儿…生来就属于天空。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Birds... belong to the sky.</color>

C: 据米凯先生所说，他们在很久以前就去世了。
E: According to Micah, they died long ago.

C: 它…就是匹诺康尼大剧院本身。
E: It... is the Penacony Grand Theater itself.

C: 若「以强援弱」果真是乐园的根基……
E: If "the strong defending the weak" is truly the foundation of paradise...

C: 呵呵，无妨。谐乐大典本意是为增进银河的幸福和谐，但既然我们已知晓真相，那及时叫停便是。
E: Hehe, no need to worry about troubling anyone. The Charmony Festival was meant to spread joy and harmony across the Cosmos. But now that we know the truth, I'm afraid we'll have to cancel it.

C: 这…真的能算是活着吗……
E: Is this... truly "living"...?

C: 是自此以后，不再有任何雏鸟坠亡大地。
E: No more fledglings would ever crash to their death.

C: 兹事体大，非同等闲。既然瓦尔特先生诚心相求，我自当亲力亲为，以示回应。如有必要，整个橡木家系也可随各位差遣。
E: The magnitude of this matter is enormous, and cannot be taken lightly. Since Mr. Yang has asked with such earnestness, I will personally respond in kind. If there is a need, the entire Oak Family will be mobilized to heed your call.

C: 星期日，可否使你向祂恳求，降下光芒，并代祂朝我提问，令所有谎言无所遁形？
E: Sunday, might I ask you to beseech THEM to cast THEIR light unto me, and question me in THEIR stead, so that no lies may be concealed?

C: 纵使星神消亡，也会留下无主的命途。在包容万象的「同谐」中…自然也可能有旧日的杂音悄然滋生。
E: Though an Aeon may perish, paths with no masters still linger. In the all-forgiving Harmony... echoes of bygone dissonance may subtly arise.

C: 是的，之前伙伴们已经先行入住了。我叫「丹恒」，酒店系统中应该有我的个人信息。
E: Yes, my companions already checked in. My name is Dan Heng, and I believe my personal information is recorded in your system.

C: 我还是更关注家族的异样。因为这场盛会，十数条命途的行者被召集至匹诺康尼。家族再怎么包容，也不会做出如此反常的举动。
E: Anyway, what worries me more are the anomalies within the Family. They've summoned followers from various paths for the festival. No matter how generous The Family might be, this move seems highly unusual.

C: 你们回来了？前面有两个人上车，说要找波提欧乘客。我让她们先在观景车厢等候了帕。
E: You're back? Two guests just boarded, saying they were looking for Boothill, so I told them to wait in the Parlor Car.

C: 我和三月与流萤小姐相识的时间不久，还不熟悉彼此…{NICKNAME}与她搭档或许更稳妥些。
E: March and I haven't known Miss Firefly for too long, and aren't overly familiar with her... It'd probably be better if the two of you paired up.

C: 没错。只要能威胁到星核，无论是谈判还是战斗，都有机会占据上风。
E: That's right — as long as we pose a threat to the Stellaron, either with words or otherwise, we have a chance at gaining the upper hand.

C: 什么鬼地方！钟表匠这个骗子！
E: What in tarnation is this hellhole! The Watchmaker is a big fat liar!

C: 「太、太好了！我喜欢这种…刺、刺激的生活！」
E: "Th—This is great! I love living on the... w—wild side!"

C: 亲爱的朋友，欢迎光临「钟表匠」构造的美妙世界！在前方等着你们的，是钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子！
E: Dear friends, welcome to the wonderful world created by the Watchmaker! Awaiting you up ahead is the titular character from the beloved Clockie animation — Clockie!

C: 看吧，我的内心早已空无一物了。
E: See, I'm just empty inside.

C: 但倘若你所言确实非虚…「纯美」在上，我们就借这场命中注定的对决检验你的能力吧！
E: But if what you say is true... In the name of Beauty, let us use this fated duel to test your mettle!

C: 我将在此地遥望各位沐浴在聚光灯下，与观众们一道献上最诚挚的欢呼与喝彩。
E: I shall remain here, gazing from afar as you bask in the limelight, joining the audience in offering you the most heartfelt cheers and applause.

C: 再想想看。
E: Think it over some more.

C: 到头来，我心向「同谐」，冒险而为的善举没有任何意义，反成了恶行，造就了一位可悲的压迫者，还有千千万万被压迫的人……
E: In the end, my heart aligned with the Harmony, and the good deed I dared to undertake held no value, turning instead into a wrongdoing. It created a lamentable oppressor and countless oppressed individuals...

C: 「依信中内容来看…应该是卡斯别林亚特-Ⅷ吧？她正在那里巡游……」
E: "From what the letter indicates... She must be in Kasbelina-VIII, correct? She's touring there right now..."

C: 但她也是星期日先生的妹妹…即便拥有再伟大的理想，他一定也不希望至亲为此献身吧。
E: But the fact that she's also Mr. Sunday's younger sister... No, I doubt he'd wish harm on his own flesh and blood, no matter how grand the ambition.

C: 既然各位笃信{RUBY_B#「开拓」的星神}阿基维利{RUBY_E#}的道路，就向我展现祂的勇气和觉悟吧。
E: If you truly believe in {RUBY_B#Aeon of Trailblaze}Akivili's{RUBY_E#} path, then show me THEIR courage and determination.

C: 这满墙的书籍，就是那位米哈伊尔航海士留下的日志吗？
E: Are those books on the bookshelf logbooks left behind by that seafarer?

C: 你不也一样吗？刃，你渴望的终结…从来不是由他人定义的。
E: Are you not the same, Blade? The end you desire is not one dictated by others.

C: 不然要如何解释呢？家族特意借「钟表匠」的邀请让一众命途行者滞留其中，却唯独放逐了「虚无」的令使……
E: Yes, or how else can we explain it? The Family deliberately used the Watchmaker's invitation to keep all the Pathstriders here but banished the Emanator of the Nihility...

C: 「为教天地万物归于可知，『秩序』太一降生。」
E: "Ena the Order emerged, destined to restore all existence."

C: 「然而，众生复向太一呼告：『你以「秩序」为万民定义，却令我等晓得自己不过是你的傀儡！』」
E: "Yet, all beings cried out to Ena — 'Under the banner of the Order, you have defined all things in the Cosmos... but this made us realize that we are but puppets in your hands!'"

C: 距「谐乐大典」开幕4系统时 星穹列车
E: 4 system hours until Charmony Festival - Astral Express

C: 「主人！您终将归来！而我将永远守望，直到您因我的忠诚而嘉奖于我！」
E: "Master! Hope you will return in due course! And I shall stand vigilant, awaiting the reward for my loyalty!"

C: 知道了。
E: Got it.

C: 还记得吗？当时钟的指针拨回起点，列车启动跃迁，将你送入一场陌生的梦境。虽然摸不着头脑，但那位巡海游侠「黄泉」为你指明了出路。
E: Do you remember everything? When the clock turned back, the Express started a warp jump, sending you to a strange dream. You were bewildered back then, and then a Galaxy Ranger named Acheron showed you a way out.

C: 嗯…我也赞同。不过那颗星球在星核之灾后已经彻底变样了吧？听说那里的陆地已经不复存在，主要住民也全都洗了牌……
E: Count me in. Still, I imagine that planet must have changed entirely after the Stellaron Disaster. I've heard that its landmasses no longer exist, and the native population has completely changed...

C: 三月七说得没错。虽然「求救信号突然中断」意味着我们多半来不及了…但我觉得还是先去确认一下为好。
E: March is right. Though the fact that the distress signals have ceased means we're probably too late... but I still think we should investigate the situation there.

C: 既然大家都这么说，那我们就去探探虚实好了。我也投江户星。
E: If that's the general sentiment, then we should indeed investigate. I vote for Edo Star too.

C: 三月七说得没错。虽然「求救信号突然中断」意味着我们多半来不及了…但我觉得还是先去确认一下为好。
E: March is right. Though the fact that the distress signals have ceased means we're probably too late... but I still think we should investigate the situation there.

C: 愿此行，终抵群星
E: May This Journey Lead Us Starward

C: <size=40>博雷克林•铁尔南</size>
E: <size=40>Breukelen Tiernan</size>
...Huh?

C: 如果难以从内部突破，就向外部寻求帮助，我们早就知道有一种办法了。
E: If breaking through from the inside proves challenging, we can seek assistance from the outside. We've long been aware of a potential solution.

C: 犯不着惊动仙舟联盟，一辈子只能用一次的宝贝你好好留着吧。成千上万的自由意志？小意思——
E: Keep your once-in-a-lifetime treasure. We don't need to bother the Xianzhou Alliance for such a tiny request. You want thousands of people with unwavering free will? Hah, that's easy...

C: 或许，是因为还有人的遗憾没有平息吧。
E: Because someone's regrets haven't been fulfilled, perhaps.

C: 你的过去，该有多辛苦啊……
E: What hardships you must have experienced...

C: 哪里的话，我只是在感叹这次你又没输成。不仅只身一人深入狼巢，挖掘出了流梦礁的真相，还在那位纯美骑士的帮助下全身而退……
E: No, I'm just impressed. Not only did you venture alone into Penacony and discover the truth of Dreamflux Reef, but you also managed to escape with the help of that Knight of Beauty...

C: 这里是{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}沉眠无相者{RUBY_E#}的万千表征之一，但同样，也是清醒之人告别「虚无」的出口。
E: This place is one of the thousands of manifestations belonging to {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}the sleeping and shapeless{RUBY_E#}, and it's also an exit out of the Nihility for the awake ones.

C: 已经睡得够久了，{NICKNAME}，让他见识下你的起床气！
E: We've done enough sleeping already, let's show them a wake-up call!

C: 你在说什么啊，别睡糊涂了吧…「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
E: What are you talking about? Are you still half-asleep or something...? The Order's dream is over.

C: 还有，刃让你多加小心。他没明说，但多半是这个意思——「在匹诺康尼，诱惑又会出现」——他说话真的很含蓄。
E: Oh, by the way, Blade wanted you to be more careful. He didn't explicitly say it, but I think he was trying to say something like... "Temptation will show up again in Penacony." He's always so subtle with his words.

C: 哎呀，好像不太合你胃口呢…对不起对不起，等回到现实了再带你去吃好的。
E: Oops, not to your liking huh... Sorry, I'll treat you to a nice meal once we get back to reality.

C: 账账发出了殷切的叫声，好像一个「飞碟堡」根本满足不了它的胃口。
E: Numby lets out an earnest cry, as if a Floatdisc Burger can't satisfy its appetite.

C: 哼唧…哼唧？
E: Oink... oink?

C: 但你对于匹诺康尼的了解还不够深…嚯嗬嗬嗬…面对垂涎三尺的贪狼，老奥帝我可不打算坐以待毙。
E: However, perhaps you don't know much about Penacony... Ohohoho... Old Oti won't sit idly by when faced with a greedy wolf.

C: 姬子在哪里？
E: Where is Himeko?

C: 不太对…别心急，慢慢来。
E: Not quite right... No rush. Take your time.

C: 你在太一之梦里遭遇了什么？
E: What happened to you in Ena's dream?

C: 很可惜，也不是这样。
E: Unfortunately, that's not quite the case.

C: 本姑娘天生丽质，才不会有黑眼圈！
E: A natural beauty like me never has dark circles!

C: 快来，请坐！咱们可得好好聊聊！
E: Please, have a seat! Let's have a pleasant conversation!

C: 让纳努克对我俯首称臣！
E: Make Nanook bow down to me!

C: 看来「慈玉女士」并非没有幽默感…你不得不承认，她运用黑色幽默的技巧在你之上。
E: It seems that "Lady Bonajade" is not without a sense of humor... You have to admit, her skill in using dark humor is superior to yours.

C: 回答正确！但，很可惜……
E: Correct answer! But, it's a shame...

C: 你打算做什么？
E: What's your plan?

C: 究竟是字面意义的终结，还是有如死亡般的痛苦，或是千钧一发的死境…在既定的终点到来前，它们并无不同，而我依旧能做出许多选择。我也坚信……
E: Whether it be a literal ending, suffering akin to death, or a harrowing deathscape... Before the appointed destination arrives, they are all the same, yet I can still make myriad choices. I also firmly believe that...

C: 来和加拉赫告别。
E: We've come to say goodbye to Gallagher.

C: 他们也年轻过，和我们一样跌跌撞撞、打打闹闹。伙伴、对手、旅途、冒险、所有难过和开心的回忆…我们习惯的「每一天」，他们也同样经历过。
E: They were also young once, stumbling and bumbling around just like us, getting into scraps and mischief, that sort of stuff. Companions, enemies, journeys, adventures, all the sad and happy memories... The "every day" that we're used to, they've lived through them too.

C: 而米哈伊尔先生留给我们的，正是在这个问题面前，他给出的解答。它或许并不完美，却能让一位历尽沧桑的老无名客，在人生的最后释然一笑。
E: And what Mr. Mikhail has left for us is his answer to this very question. It may not be perfect, but it left a smile on this storied, jaded old Nameless' face at the end of his life.

C: 是啊，所以眼下最重要的，就是把我们在匹诺康尼的见闻带给列车长。
E: So the most important thing right now is to tell the conductor what we saw in Penacony.

C: 它也许是温暖、快乐的，也许是痛苦、悲伤的，每当我们回首过去，总会发现身后留下的只是这么一个个微小但难忘的瞬间，和一些在其中永恒不变的事物……
E: Perhaps it's a source of warmth and happiness, or maybe it brings pain and sorrow. Each time we reminisce on our past, we always seem to notice a tiny, but unforgettable instant that we left behind us, along with certain other things that remain constant throughout...

C: 帕姆说「燃料」就快耗光了…
E: Pom-Pom said we might run out of fuel...

C: 这只猴子貌似在给其他猴子讲课，但你听不懂这些*蕉言蕉语*——希望在折纸大学的课上，你不会有同样的感受。
E: This monkey seems to be teaching other monkeys, but you can't understand their Bananese — let's hope you don't feel the same way in your classes at Paperfold University.

C: 这么不合群，小心入学以后交不到朋友。来，我把你们也拉进来！
E: You'll have a hard time making friends at school if you stay out of touch. Here, I'll add you two to the group.

C: 校规说的清清楚楚，在考场上，考官说的就是规则！所以……
E: The academy regulations very clearly state that the examiner's word is law in the examination room, so...

C: OK，就这样。
E: Okay, that'll do.

C: 镜头能代替台词传递一切，她的沉默便是提问，你的反应便是回答——一个符合「逻辑」的答案。
E: The camera can convey everything in place of words. Her silence is a question and your reaction is an answer. You gave a logical answer.

C: 不满意，我想自己选。
E: I'm not satisfied. Let me choose for myself.

C: 筑梦学院
E: Dreamweaver Academy

C: 加入「饥饿」。
E: Add "Hunger."

C: 喂，你理解了什么啊……
E: Hey, what do you mean by that?

C: 是啊，实话说，我记不起你的名字了，这些年我见过的人太多。
E: That's right. Though truth be told, I don't remember your name anymore. I've met too many people over the last few years.

C: 看来您完全是一无所知嘛，这已经是很简单的题目了。
E: Looks like you're completely clueless about Slumbernana. These are pretty much no-brainers, you know.

C: 现代，能人，猿，史前
E: Human, Denisovan, Ape, Prehistoric.

C: 难道说，是助蕉们让您来找我的？
E: Don't tell me... Was it the Assistanana that sent you after me?

C: 他香蕉的，等会儿…这是我自己？
E: Wait a banana... is that... me?

C: 倒也不用这么消极。现在看来，流梦礁就是敌人真正的目标。
E: All hope is not lost yet. It looks like Dreamflux Reef is the enemy's real target.

C: 眼下当然存在一种拯救流梦礁的方式。只要家族介入，解决这里的异变绝非难事。但这未必是众人能接受的走向。
E: At present, there is an obvious way to save Dreamflux Reef. As long as The Family steps into the picture, resolving the mutation that's occurred here would be a piece of cake. However, this is not a solution that the masses may be willing to accept.

C: 哈，就是这样！
E: Hah, that's my boy!

C: 我知道这事荒唐了点，但赶紧挪个地儿，要么去派对上把你们的地盘救回来，要么让派对多给你们奏个哀乐。
E: I know I'm being a lil' demanding here, but get your hide parts over to that party right now and save your home, or I'll make sure to dedicate an elegy for every one of you!

C: 没事了就跟我来，带你们去个好地方。
E: Everything ironed out between you two now? Follow me then.

C: 它静静地坐在房中，默不作声。看着它的傻脸，你的耳边莫名响起了一声……「蕉」？
E: It silently sits in the middle of the room, mute and stoic. Looking at its dumb face, a voice inexplicably reaches your ears... "bana"?

C: 暴力开启
E: Open it with violence

C: 这堂课的内容是「把校园装点成大家喜欢的样子」。来，同学们拿好这个——
E: Today's session is about "decorating the campus to your liking." Here, grab one of these.

C: 快点画！再墨迹就下课了蕉！
E: Hurry! Don't dawdle, or the class will be over bana!

C: 最后一位同学…嗯？怎么什么都没有。
E: Moving on to the last student... Hmm? Where's your design?

C: 祸从口出…
E: Words have consequences...

C: 但假以时日，阁下定能寻得自己的忍道。
E: But I say with certainty that you will discover your own way of the ninja someday.

C: 蕉，蕉蕉……
E: Bana, bana...

C: 我也没手啊蕉。
E: I have no hands to begin with, bana.

C: 阁下，请自重！
E: Please see more value in your life!

C: 是猴…不对，是谐乐蕉师！
E: Monkey—no, I mean, I'm Charmony BananAdvisor!

C: 伎乐忍徒，说出最后的台词吧。
E: Ninja Initiate Gigaku, deliver your final line.

C: 没错。模因污染是一种传播现象，它会影响认知的信息粒子，把受污染者对特定事物的感官变成另一种模样，就像是影片的特效。
E: You're right. Memetic corruption comes about from the dissemination of data. It alters particles of information picked up by the cognitive module, skewing the sensory perception of certain objects in those that have been corrupted. Much like special effects in a film.

C: 久等了。哦，又多了一位想见睡蕉小猴的社员吗？
E: Thank you for waiting. Oh, another member hoping to see Slumbernana Monkey?

C: 喂，等等——
E: Hey, wait—!

C: 呃…该不会现在，我变成主角了吧？因为这把枪？
E: I'm the star of the show now? All 'cause of this here gun?

C: 当然，基于你的记忆…你最后的记忆停留在哪里？在放牧，还是在劈柴？
E: Yes, of course. This dream is based off your memories... What do you last remember? Were you herding? Or chopping firewood?

C: 联觉信标也好了？他宝贝的太宝了个贝的好啦！宝贝！
E: My Synesthesia Beacon's back to normal? Dagnabbit, that's forkin' amazing! Hot diggity fudge!

C: 既然所有的事都这么简单，那我也犯不着太聪明，懂了吧……
E: Since everything's turned out to be so simple, there's no need to use too much of my intellect. You catch my drift?

C: 声音就此远去——
E: The sound fades away—

C: 「答案很简单，小姐，这位先生……」
E: "The answer is simple, Miss, this gentleman here..."

C: 请问——「您会因此更加不幸吗？」
E: Here's a question: "Will this make you worse off?"

C: 初次见面，缭乱•忍侠！
E: Greetings, Dazzling Ninja!

C: 原来如此，这位演员的戏路是「特效电影」。
E: I see... This talent would do well in special effect films.

C: 拒绝服用
E: Refuse to swallow it.

C: 能人<unbreak>75</unbreak>，你在做什么！？
E: What are you doing, Denisovan <unbreak>75</unbreak>!?

C: 警告：C<unbreak>11</unbreak>通道防卫系统疑似出现故障，请技术猿尽快排查。
E: Warning: Corridor C<unbreak>11</unbreak>'s security system appears to have malfunctioned. Technical Apes to troubleshoot at once.

C: 各、各位同学…排好队，人人都有份！
E: F—Fellow students... There's enough for everyone, so please queue up!

C: （富贵和他的父亲好像已经想通了……）
E: (It seems like Richie and his father have figured it out...)

C: 啊哈哈，只是个无关紧要的小角色而已。
E: Ahahaha, I'm just going to be a minor character.

C: 哼，想逃？
E: Hmph, think you can escape?

C: 《银河忍法帖》
E: Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions

C: 里面…就是*我们*长大的地方。
E: Go inside... and you'll see the place where we grew up.

C: 看在同行过的份上，行行好吧…
E: Won't you go easy on us? We traveled together before, remember...?

C: 风堇小姐，那个外号……
E: Um, Miss Hyacine, about that nickname... Could you—

C: …我原本在这里等待风堇小姐，正巧撞见了缇安大人。当时这位伤者的情况已经十分危急…我只能先做些应急处理。
E: ...I was waiting here for Miss Hyacine when I bumped into Lady Trianne. By then, this man was already in critical condition... so I had to perform some emergency treatment first.

C: 好喔，我们，大手拉小手！去树庭！
E: Okie-dokie! Everybody, let's hold hands! To the Grove we go!
Hm...

C: 都这么多天啦，我和蝶已经是好朋友了！
E: Cas and I are now good friends after traveling together for so many days!

C: 我们…我们要先告诉阿雅吗？
E: Should we... should we inform Agy about this?

C: *我们*看到了…火种还在，只是……
E: We see it... The Coreflame is still there, but...

C: …除他拼死逃出，树庭恐怕凶多吉少。
E: ...It's likely he is the only one who managed to escape from the Grove, against all odds.

C: （敲打雕像）
E: (Knock on the statue)

C: 不转不是开拓者。
E: Consider it done.

C: 那么，水车动了么？——没有，因为水车得有水才能动。真是太让人遗憾了。
E: Has the waterwheel moved? — No, because it needs water to turn. What a pity.

C: 到了。烦请为吾撷取一枚花瓣，置于池中。
E: We're here. Could you kindly pluck a petal for me and place it into the pool?

C: 似乎是「莲食学派」的所有者。
E: She seems to be the head of the Lotophagists.

C: 呵…诸位果真通过考验了啊。
E: Heh... All of you have indeed passed the trial.

C: 那刻夏老师……
E: Professor Anaxa...

C: 等到泰坦进攻就会好起来的。
E: Things will get better when the Titan attacks.

C: 这么多怪物……
E: So many monsters...

C: 大家，不用担心！缇安保护大家！
E: Don't worry! Trianne will protect everyone!

C: 他们还说，王子率领的{RUBY_B#悬锋城流亡军}悬锋孤军{RUBY_E#}是翁法罗斯最勇猛的军队，战无不胜。
E: They also said that the {RUBY_B#Kremnoan army in exile}Kremnoan Detachment{RUBY_E#} led by the crown prince is the bravest army across all of Amphoreus. No one can defeat them!

C: 哈哈哈，那我就给你说道说道。当年，悬锋城的建立者带着一众战士在特雷托斯城郊围猎雄狮……
E: Hahaha! Let me enlighten you. A long time ago, the founder of Castrum Kremnos led a group of warriors to hunt down a lion on the outskirts of the city of Tretos.

C: 动手么，吾师？
E: Shall we, sir?

C: 他们总劝我遗忘…可我岂能忘记？
E: They all tell me to forget... But how could I ever?

C: 阿雅，你想到什么了吗？
E: Have you thought of something, Agy?

C: 我们会尽力而为。
E: We will do everything we can.

C: 哀地里亚…是遐蝶以前所在的城邦？
E: Aidonia... Is that the city Castorice used to live in?

C: 那之后的第二十个黄昏，我们终于反攻入哀地里亚城中，接受了僭主的求和，但负隅顽抗的叛军却在城中设伏……
E: Twenty dusks later, we finally breached the walls of Aidonia and entertained the tyrant's plea for peace. However, the rebels refused to surrender and set up an ambush within the city...

C: 我都想躲在圣城不出去了。
E: I never want to leave the holy city again.

C: 老师，这么多年了，您与阿格莱雅大人还是……
E: So, after all these years, you and Lady Aglaea are still...

C: 麻烦是老朋友了。
E: Trouble is my old friend by now.

C: 黑潮是奥赫玛，乃至整个翁法罗斯的大敌。曾经，纷争的势力对圣城虎视眈眈，但不可否认的是，那群战争眷属也将黑潮阻拦在悬锋城外。
E: The black tide is not just an enemy of Okhema, but all of Amphoreus. Even back when the forces of Strife coveted the holy city, their warriors still undeniably halted the black tide outside Castrum Kremnos.

E: This obsession for returning home has become a sickness for our people! Wise as you are, I refuse to believe that you can't see the truth...

C: 歌耳戈之子，注定要浴血代冠——！
E: The son of Gorgo is destined to be crowned in blood!

C: 大工匠，近来可好？
E: Grand Craftsman, how have you been?

C: （我给这个娃娃…取了和自己一样的名字？）
E: (I named this doll... after myself?)

C: （是巧合，还是……）
E: (Was it just a coincidence, or...)

C: 只要那家伙存在，就会威胁到圣城，还有逐火的征程。
E: Their mere presence will endanger the holy city and the Flame-Chase.

C: 当然是为了同样的事。记得吗？明天，*我们*要为大家揭示神谕的过往。
E: For the same thing, of course. Remember? Tomorrow, we will reveal the prophecy's past to everyone.

C: 好壮观，好大的房间！
E: Wow! This room is huge!

C: 真的！缇安没骗人…刚才还有的，怎么突然就不见了呢？
E: I swear! Trianne is telling the truth! It was right there — where did it go?

C: 这是什么？
E: What's this?

C: 对，和「逐火之旅」如出一辙…那刻夏老师认为盗火行者的出现，也许是黑潮进一步蔓延的表征。
E: Yes, just like the Flame-Chase Journey is doing. Professor Anaxa thinks the Flame Reaver's arrival is likely a sign that the black tide has spread further.

C: 如何保证计划的可行性？
E: How do we make sure that the plan will work?

C: 那群拉冬人正和宿敌坎帕人交战，把山岳当成了游击的本营。吉奥刻勒斯自学了通用语，他从士兵口中套出了情报——
E: The Ladonians were at war with their archenemies, the Campanians, and they used the mountain as a base to carry out guerrilla warfare operations. When Geocles, who had taught himself the common tongue, approached a soldier, he learned a shocking piece of news:

C: 现在，你终于能带领族人还乡，去重铸悬锋的荣光了。
E: And now, you can at last bring our people home and reforge the glory of Kremnos.

C: 风堇？
E: Hyacine?

C: 从这里到悬锋城，路途漫长。
E: The road to Castrum Kremnos from here is long.

C: 愿您战无不胜。
E: May triumph always be yours.

C: 欢迎回来！
E: Welcome back!

C: 那刻夏老师，我想…不如你先找个地方休息片刻？
E: Professor Anaxa, why don't you... find someplace to rest first?

C: *我*想留在这里，再多陪陪缇安。
E: I want to stay here with Trianne for a bit longer.

C: 因为翁法罗斯已步入纷争世？
E: Is it because Amphoreus has entered Era Bellica?

C: 发明创造？你们独自做的吗？
E: Invented? On your own?

C: 好吧，那我们下次再来！谢谢你，大姐姐。
E: Okay, then. We'll come back next time! Thank you!

C: ——好让我为这濒毁的世界，开辟出万千道路！
E: — so that I may open a myriad of paths for this imperiled world!

C: *明天见*…是世上最伟大的预言。
E: See you tomorrow is the greatest prophecy in the world.

C: 嗯？那是知更鸟？她怎么来这儿了？
E: Hmm? Isn't that Robin? What's she doing here?

C: 原来如此。我刚才就在奇怪，明明是我们频道拿下了独家采访权和播放权，怎么还有人来戗行。来人，赶快清场！
E: I see. I was just wondering why someone else was taking my job, considering our channel secured exclusive rights to this interview and broadcast. Security, clear the area!

C: 去记录下这场圣杯战争中那些参战者的经历，同时帮助你身旁这位野心勃勃的年轻人得偿所愿！
E: Go record the stories of the participants in this Holy Grail War, and help this ambitious young man by your side fulfill his wish!

C: 这两者最核心的区别在于，前者有得谈，后者没得谈。所以，如果我是你……
E: And the key difference? The first one can be negotiated. The second? Not so much. So if I were you...

C: 那投枪…是怎么回事？怎么清场了？
E: That spear... What just happened? It wiped the field!

C: 虽然维持我存续的力量似乎并非从您身体流出，但…我确实能感受到和你之间存在着连结。
E: While the energy sustaining me does not seem to originate from you... there is, without a doubt, a connection between us.

C: 这些是…什么东西？
E: What... are these things?

C: 可惜人们总会记得那些打赢战争的人，而不是那些力图让战争消失的人……
E: But people always remember the ones who win wars. Never the ones who try to end them...

C: 好，来<unbreak>100</unbreak>个！
E: Alright, we'd like <unbreak>100</unbreak> burgers!

C: 因为我并非来自匹诺康尼的历史…我甚至，并非来自你们所在世界的历史。
E: That's because I don't come from Penaconian history... In fact, I don't come from the history of your world at all.

C: 是求和…不，是谈和。至少要向他们传达我们无意争斗的想法。
E: It's about making peace... not begging. At the very least, we should show them we have no intention of fighting.

C: 原本应当保持「神秘的隐匿」的「圣杯战争」，摇身一变成了公开的娱乐节目。
E: Instead of something that must maintain the Concealment of Mystics, the Holy Grail War will become a public entertainment spectacle instead.

C: 这里是…你的故乡？
E: Is this... your homeland?

C: 我从没见过这样的玩具。我人生的前十五年，大部分时间都花在了养马和练剑上。到了休息的时候，有个叫梅林的魔术师会来到梦中向我宣讲为王治国的教诲。
E: I've never seen a toy like this. My first fifteen years were mostly spent caring for horses and honing my swordsmanship. During my breaks, a mage named Merlin would visit me in my dreams, and teach me about ruling as a king.

C: 没有永恒的王权…
E: But no kingdom lasts forever...

C: 好想能拥有一匹坐骑…在太阳落下前，骑上它穿过这片原野……
E: I wish I had a horse... to ride across these fields before the sun sets...

C: 根据额度分类整理。
E: Sort by budget category.

C: 所以，你很高兴自己留在了这里，没有车票，没有球棒，没有危险，平静而安逸的生活。
E: So you are glad you stayed. No ticket. No bat. No danger. Just a quiet, peaceful, and undisturbed life.

C: 你身上的那个玩偶，就是某位英雄存在过的证明。
E: The doll you carry is proof of a certain hero's existence.

C: 我要出发了。
E: I must set off.

C: 梅林也曾这么警告过我。
E: That's what Merlin told me, too.

C: 与此同时，脱离梦境的御主与从者们走进了大剧院的中心……
E: Meanwhile, the Master and their Servants, freed from the dreamscape, stepped into the heart of the Grand Theater...

C: 斯科特先生的麻烦当然该由公司同僚来操心才是。
E: Mr. Skott's issues will be handled by the IPC.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬！真是感人的告白哟！阿斯娜，希望你的愿望能有实现的那天。
E: Hahaha! Now that's a heartfelt confession! Asna, I do hope your wish comes true one day.

C: 他怎么都不亏啊。
E: That old fox didn't lose a thing.

C: 别担心，奥帝先生的公关团队会替我解决的——上辈子我做梦都想把克劳克影视乐园改造成我的噩梦乐园，没想到，竟然以这种方式实现了。
E: Don't worry. Mr. Oti's PR team will handle it. I used to dream of turning Clock Studios Theme Park into my own nightmare park. Who knew I'd get my wish this way?

C: 它忆域迷因的，等我找到奥帝那狗东西，绝对要把他的绒球薅到地上！
E: That old fool. Once I find that darn Oti, I'm gonna tear his puffball and stomp it right down to the ground!

C: 别再硬撑了，斯科特先生！它的目标是我，没必要白白牺牲你的性命啾。
E: Stop pushing yourself, Mr. Skott! Its target is me. You don't have to throw your life away for nothing!

C: 这不是能听懂么。啧，也不能放着不管——你们能听懂{F#她}{M#他}在说什么吗？
E: So you can understand that. Tch, guess I can't just leave {F#her}{M#him}... Can you make sense of what {F#she}{M#he}'s saying?

C: 一个勤劳的守护者，只是勤劳到有些工作狂罢了。我见过的绝望很多很多…但要想吞没我，你这些虚假的幻觉还不够！
E: A hardworking guardian, though admittedly somewhat of a workaholic. I've seen far too many forms of despair... but to break me? Your fake illusions don't even come close!

C: 你不是对圣杯不感兴趣吗？
E: I thought you didn't care about the Holy Grail?

C: 出发喽！
E: Let's move out!

C: 那里什么都没有。
E: But nothing's there!

C: 这只是个玩笑。
E: Oh, come on. Take a joke, will you?

C: 所以星穹列车主动担起送她还乡的职责，是出于道义？
E: So, is it out of goodwill that the Astral Express volunteered to send her back home?

C: 啊，这个…那个…{NICKNAME}来吧！{M#他}{F#她}说话有条理。
E: Oh, uh... About that... Why don't you ask {NICKNAME} instead! {M#He}{F#She} knows how to present things logically!

C: 咦，你怎么啦？
E: Huh? What's wrong?

C: 因为你最为不幸，偏偏落入{RUBY_B#幻胧}那位大君{RUBY_E#}手中，肉体和精神都遭受了毁灭。
E: Because you were the most unfortunate. You fell into the hands of {RUBY_B#Phantylia}that Lord Ravager{RUBY_E#} who destroyed your body and spirit.

C: 「不必疑惑，继续向前吧。」
E: "Don't question it. Keep moving forward."

C: 怎么有点耳熟又有点陌生……
E: Why does that sound oddly familiar...

C: 而我开拓的对象并非未知的世界，而是这片星空下，每一个活生生的人。
E: The goal of my Trailblazing is not the unknown world, but every living being who exists under the stars.

C: 我以普通人的姿态四处漫游，不幸落入了皮皮西人的陷阱。那道令停云女士四分五裂的恶作剧，也同样将虚弱的我一分为二。
E: I was roaming around as an ordinary person when I unfortunately fell into that Pepeshi's trap. The prank that fragmented Miss Tingyun also divided my fragile self into two.

C: 我果然很讨厌你。
E: I truly dislike you.

C: 我没有别的话想说了，交给大家定夺吧。
E: I have nothing more to add. I'll let you all decide, then.

C: 哎呀！不能光顾着聊天了，我还得多准备几块电池，万一落在了特别原始的地方呢？
E: Anyway, enough chitchat! I better pack some extra batteries in case we end up somewhere without power!

C: 无人知晓，这是你们将要揭示的答案。
E: No one knows. That's what you're about to find out.

C: 星穹列车要分家了？
E: The Express is splitting up?

C: 瞧瞧这些黑塔人偶，做工多么精致？我可不止一次听说，有些人在背后暗暗地夸赞：「她真好看」……
E: Look at these puppets! Aren't they dearly exquisite? Let's just say I've already heard many others secretly gushing, "She looks so pretty" on more than one occasion...

C: 嗯…奇怪了……
E: Hmm... That's strange...

C: 「无差别攻击模块」……
E: The "Attack Anything Everything Module"...

C: 机器头，我费了这么大功夫只为来到你的面前，可不许无视我啊。
E: After all that I've done to reach you, Droidhead... You'd better not snub me.

C: 不对，这根本不是什么命途之声…到底怎么回事？
E: No, this isn't the Voice of the Path at all...! What in the world is going on?

C: 要么就是你们被忆庭的人忽悠了。总之，我先用模拟宇宙检索了这四个字，虽然已经筛选掉了一眼无关的结果……
E: Perhaps those Garden folks lied to you. Anyhow, I've looked up the name Amphoreus in the Simulated Universe. Though clearly irrelevant results have already been filtered out...

C: 帕姆，你的「员工餐」准备好了吗？
E: Pom-Pom, have you prepared our meals already?

C: 不像是智库中记载的任何一个物种，这也是理所当然，翁法罗斯对于我们是彻彻底底的「未知」。
E: It's unlike any of the known species in our data bank. But I guess that's to be expected. We know nothing about Amphoreus, after all.

C: 如果三月七此时在你身旁，她一定用少女的脑回路为眼前的景观找到奇妙且跳脱的譬喻。可惜，现在只能由你来代行团队摄影师的职责了。
E: If March 7th were here, she'd definitely use her girlish imagination to come up with some whimsical and creative metaphors for the scenery. Unfortunately, it's up to you to take on the team's photographer duties now.

C: 诺杜斯先生，您平安无事就好。
E: Mr. Noldus, I'm glad you're all right.

C: 哪里哪里，先生演奏得非常好！
E: No, not at all! Your performance was wonderful, sir!

C: 也是如今唯一的人类城邦，<color=#dbc291ff>「圣城」奥赫玛</color>存在的意义。
E: It's also the reason for the <color=#dbc291ff>holy city Okhema</color>'s existence — the only human city left in our present day.

C: ——「揭开帷幕，激起往昔的涟漪！」
E: "...Lift the curtain and stir up ripples of past reverie!"

C: 不要妄动，优先保护市民！
E: Don't be rash! Protect the citizens first!

C: 这就是黄金裔，世人眼中的英雄，却也是身负缺陷的凡人。
E: Well, that's the Chrysos Heirs. Revered as heroes by the masses, but still imperfect mortals at their core.

C: 再来几个，也许就能联系上列车了。
E: A few more, and maybe we can reconnect with the Express!

C: 如果这场仪式令你感到不快，我向你致歉。但请理解…我不得不这么做。
E: I apologize if this ritual upset you, but I hope you understand... I had no other choice.

C: 嗯？你们这身打扮，到底是……
E: Hmm? Your outfits, who exactly...

C: 这下三月七成天女了。
E: March 7th has now become a celestial maiden.

C: 零食，毛绒玩具，可爱的衣服。
E: With snacks, plushies, and cute clothes.

C: 此地名为云石天宫，是奥赫玛的公共浴场。换作平时，气氛会更熙攘些。
E: We're here at Marmoreal Palace, Okhema's public baths. Normally, this place would be much livelier.

C: 四问已经完成。
E: All four questions have been asked and answered.

C: 金丝揭露了你们的动摇。很遗憾，两位没能通过考验。
E: The golden thread has exposed your hesitations. Regrettably, the both of you have failed the test.

C: 遐蝶将她纤白的食指搭在了你的脉搏处。
E: Castorice places her slender, pale finger over your pulse.

C: 阿格莱雅，作为第一个遇见他们的本地人——有关两位的去留，我也想提供一些看法。
E: Aglaea, as the first local to encounter them... I have some thoughts I would like to share regarding their fates.

C: 二位，不妨上前几步，亲自试试？
E: Why not step forward and listen to them for yourselves?

C: 在一名长成智械模样的奥赫玛公民的协助下，你们驶离了翁法罗斯，没有遭受那所谓「天外诅咒」的谴罚。
E: With the assistance of an Okhema citizen resembling an Intellitron, you depart Amphoreus without suffering the so-called "curse from beyond the sky."

C: 虽然还有不少疑问，但大脑已经困乏到难以思考了…白厄说得没错，先休息吧，把问题留给明天。
E: Plenty of questions are still up in the air, but my brain is too tired to handle them... Phainon's right. Let's call it a day and save them for tomorrow.

C: 准备，准备！等不及啦，好慢！
E: Get ready! Get ready! I don't wanna wait! Slowpoke!

C: 如果我出了什么事…
E: If something should happen to me...

C: 别看他表面老实，其实内心精明得很。
E: He might look honest, but he's a lot shrewder than he seems.

C: 平手，真是凑巧啊。
E: It's a tie. Funny how things work out, huh?

C: 温度又升高了，这里还在运作吗？
E: It's getting even hotter. Is this place still in use?

C: 我的抉择无需粉饰，救世主。不过是一次放下骄傲的自我流放，不值得被编撰为颂歌。
E: There's no need to glorify my choice, Deliverer. It was just a self-imposed exile that cost me my pride. Not something worth celebrating in a song.

C: 以我的一千道伤疤和一百条性命，换你在史诗中荣耀的死亡！
E: I trade a thousand scars and a hundred lives of mine for your glorious death!

C: 我们理解。谢谢你，缇宝老师。
E: We understand. Thank you, Tribbie.

C: 看，<color=#dbc291ff>宝珠映照出了相反的时空。</color>
E: Look, <color=#dbc291ff>an inverse time dimension is reflected by those orbs.</color>

C: 一动不动…果然没用吗？
E: No movement at all... Not the right item.

C: 银狼？
E: Silver Wolf?

C: 这里也有被遗弃的扎格列斯之手，借用一下吧。
E: There's an abandoned Hand of Zagreus here. Let's use it.

C: 的确…大工匠活了太久，不可能记住经手过的每一件委托。还有别的方法吗……
E: That makes sense. With such a long life, the Grand Craftsman can't remember every single item he's made. Is there another way?

C: 碎片，完整。记忆…涌现。
E: Fragments, complete. Memory... appear.

C: 呵…我就姑且收下你的承诺吧。
E: Heh... I'll hold you to that promise for now.

C: 哈哈，开玩笑的。
E: Haha, I'm just teasing you.

C: 连孩童的玩物也不放过…贪婪也是你原罪的一部分吗？
E: Even a child's toy isn't safe from your grasp... Is greed one of your vices?

C: 迈德漠斯是个懦夫！随他离开悬锋城的人愧对{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的名…耻辱的逃亡者，此生将无法再沐浴荣光！
E: Mydeimos is just a coward! Those who deserted Kremnos with him have brought shame upon the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}... Despicable traitors will never bask in glory again!

C: 如此一来，我们所处的时代已经比较明朗了。
E: With that, we should have enough to determine the time period we are currently in.

C: 这项目这么硬核吗？
E: Is this competition really that hardcore?

C: 「听说了吗？欧利庞王的谋臣们正在拟定计划，他们好像打算对奥赫玛发动总攻。」
E: "Have you heard? King Eurypon's advisors are coming up with a plan to launch an all-out attack on Okhema."

C: 是眷属…当心。
E: The Titan's kin... Be careful.

C: 我们该怎么阻止它？
E: How do we stop them then?

C: 它的疯狂源于外因。
E: There was something out there that sent them into madness.

C: 还有什么事要做吗？
E: Did we forget something?

C: 又不是人家想这样的，你不许评价！
E: I didn't ask to be like this! No judging!

C: 「若要延续{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的抗争，与不可名状的黑潮对抗……」
E: "If you are to inherit {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s relentless fight against the unspeakable black tide..."

C: 你应该已经注意到了，这里的每一位黄金裔都背负着某种…缺陷。或是不死的诅咒，或是不断流失的人性，或是……
E: You must have noticed by now. Every Chrysos Heir here bears... a flaw of sorts. Be it the curse of immortality, or the constant erosion of their humanity, or...

C: 我要正式向你们道谢，异邦人。若没有你们出手相助，与{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的战役恐怕会艰辛百倍不止。
E: I want to formally thank you, outsiders. Were it not for your aid, our campaign against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} would have been a hundred times more arduous.

C: 也对，毕竟是这位圣兽突然的提议。但它和泰坦有着千丝万缕的联系，不容轻视。
E: I understand. It was the sacred beast's idea, after all. However, it warrants careful consideration, given their intricate ties to the Titan.

C: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
E: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world —"

C: 天界旅者…你本该…消散……
E: Traveler from the sky... You should have... dissipated already...

C: 我的意识，还能在人间停留多久？
E: How much longer can my consciousness remain in the mortal realm?

C: 年幼的我同样不能接受这个结果。{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}…当然，还有你。能求的泰坦我求了个遍，可惜，都无济于事。
E: When I was young, I couldn't accept this outcome either. {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#},\n{RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}... and you, of course. Although I prayed to every Titan that I could think of for help, my efforts were ultimately futile.

C: 阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下！久仰大名——
E: Lord Anaxagoras! I've heard so much about you...

C: 可笑，我的忠诚无需任何证明。
E: How absurd. My loyalty is unquestionable.
Urk...!

C: 我倒想教{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}用秤砣砸醒你。走着瞧就走着瞧！
E: And I pray that {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} smacks some sense into you with their scales. We shall see how this turns out!

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>轻轻触碰。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>A gentle touch.</color>

C: 她似乎在说：「你好。」
E: She seems to be saying, "Hello."

C: 那两位，来我府上作客吧，换个更正式的场合谈生意。循着我播下的风，找到我的住处，没问题吧？
E: Tell you what, why don't you two come over to my place? It'll make a better venue for proper business discussions. You can find where I live through the winds I've sown, right?

C: 你忘了？我应该表明过自己的态度吧。
E: Did you forget my stance to all this? I thought I made myself very clear.

C: 你还挺会做顺水人情。
E: You sure are helpful when it doesn't cost you anything.

C: 鱼…不见了？人…也不见了……
E: Are the fish... gone? The people... are gone, too...

C: 是和我类似的情况？
E: Are they in the same situation as me?

C: 没错，就是我。
E: That's me.

C: 啊，你们的模样…莫非是女王提到的异邦勇士？
E: Ah, by the looks of it... you must be the foreign warriors that the queen had mentioned, right?

C: 斯缇科西亚…带来死亡的恶龙……
E: Styxia... an evil dragon that brings Death...

C: 我…也想回应她的这份信任。
E: I... really want to repay her for that trust.

C: 您误会了…我们只是路过时听到了您的喊声，因此前来看看。
E: You've misunderstood us... We simply heard your shouts as we were passing by, then decided to come over to find out what happened.

C: 那，按照刚才炼金术士的说法…小蝶你也是巨龙残躯的一部分？
E: But Cas, if that alchemist speaks the truth... does that mean you're also part of the dragon body?

C: 但现在，您不必再藏于心间了。我可以告诉您，那女孩的人生，已被您尽力守护住了。
E: But you no longer need to hide that story. I can assure you that you have protected that girl's life well.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而是伴随有限的生命降临的冲动和欲念，令他们沉醉痴狂，无法自拔。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>But instead became fixated and obsessed with the impulses and desires tied to a finite existence.</color>

C: 就像从前那样……
E: Just like before...

C: 前方是那死者的疆域哪……
E: Ahead lies the realm of the dead...

C: 如果海瑟音大人还在世，她应该也能做到。
E: If Lady Hysilens was still alive, I think she might be able to do that, too.

C: 迷迷成功了……
E: Mem did it...

C: 晚些时候再说。
E: Not now.

C: 可她的女儿莉维娅呢？她逃出生天了吗？没有：她、披索，还有其他许多孩子，我童年时最亲密的玩伴们…他们全都被黑潮吞没，变成了扭曲的造物！
E: And what of Livia, her daughter? Did she make it out alive? ...No, she didn't. Livia, Piso, and so many other children... My childhood friends... They were all swallowed by the black tide and turned into monsters.

C: 别忘记「开拓」，让它成为你的指引。
E: Remember the Trailblaze. Let it guide your way.

C: 没想到小小一个窃忆者，脑袋里还藏了不少东西。
E: I never expected a mere Memosnatcher to be actually hiding so much inside her head.

C: 失礼了，黑塔女士，介意分享您的发现吗？
E: Please pardon me, Madam Herta. Would you mind sharing with us what you've discovered?

C: 嘻嘻嘻，都听您的……
E: Hehehe, as you wish...

C: 嚯…好一番壮观的景象，这就是翁法罗斯的入口吗？
E: Oh... What a magnificent sight. Is this the entrance to Amphoreus?

C: 想必，您还想听听第三条逻辑链？
E: I assume that you still wish to hear the third logic chain?

C: 所以，信众将登上泰坦断崖视为一种与神同行的方式。
E: Their followers have since believed that scaling this Titan cliff is one way of being with the god.

C: 那刻夏的研究方向是…
E: What is Anaxa's field of study?

C: 没关系，眼下先回收针对泰坦的研究就好。
E: Don't worry about it. We'll just collect everything we can find on the Titans for now.

C: 但是我可以，老师！时机已经成熟，给我需要的一切，我将代您完成这至高至伟的大功业。
E: But I can, sir! I can do it for us! The time is right. Give me all that I need, and I shall accomplish this grand feat on your behalf.

C: 但依「等价交换」的原则，我也必须向你索取我需要之物。
E: However, in accordance with the principle of "equivalent exchange," I must also demand from you what I need.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这或许是我此生唯一一次能挽救一条生命的机会，我没有犹豫的理由。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>This may be the only time I can ever save someone's life. There is no need for me to think twice.</color>

C: 我们在这里等你的消息。
E: We will be waiting here for your good news.

C: 那刻夏，告诉我：你所说的一切前提，是我们*能够*找到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的存在，没错吧？
E: Anaxa, pray tell: Everything that you've mentioned hinges on the premise that we can find {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}'s existence, right?

C: 我用炼金创造的奇迹。至于具体是什么，又是怎么做到的，就先卖个关子吧。
E: A miracle that I created with alchemy. As for what it is and how I was able to accomplish it, I'll keep the answers to myself for now.

C: …有喔。
E: ...Yes, I would.

C: 害怕什么？
E: What are you afraid of?

C: 我也无法断言。但…无论答案是什么，无论我们如何被他人、被世界塑造——
E: I don't know either. But, regardless of what the answer is, regardless of how we're shaped by others, or even by this world...

C: 记得吗？我说过炼金是转化、淬炼和扬升的艺术，这也同样适用于追求真理。无论多么难以置信，世界的真相已从杂质中精炼而成。
E: Remember? I've mentioned before that the art of alchemy is all about conversion, tempering, and ascension. This process also applies to the pursuit of truth. Regardless of how unbelievable this sounds, the truths of the world have been refined from the impurities.

C: 为何偏要急着赴死，活着不好么？
E: Why are you always finding ways to die? Isn't it good to be alive?

C: 那一日，无数天空之子自晨昏之眼的穹顶坠落，被金色的熔岩吞噬。
E: That day, countless Skyfolk fell from the dome of the Eye of Twilight, swallowed by golden lava.

C: 嗅…嗅嗅……
E: Sniff... sniff...

C: …哈哈哈！果然是条蠢到不行的流浪狗！
E: Haha! You really are a brainless mutt, aren't you?

C: *但是，各位公民哪，请不必为他的离去哀叹！因为大司铎人生最后的时刻是幸福的，因为他在耳目明晰时听见了天父最后的嘱托……*
E: But citizens, do not grieve his passing! In his final moments, Chaplain Phoros found peace. While he still had his wits, he heard the final words of the sky father...

C: 神谕曾令灰黯之手选择二人，赐予其一死之命运，但她们对彼此的心意，却为各自续下了漫长的凄美诗篇。
E: The prophecy once made the Hand of Shadow choose two people, granting one the fate of death. Yet their bond wove a hauntingly beautiful tale that stretched across time.

C: 所以，那「盗火行者」是赛飞儿小姐的伪装？骗术？像真的一样…这就是「诡计」半神的力量？
E: So... was that a Flame Reaver disguise? Or a magic trick? It looked so real... Is that the power of the Trickery demigod?

C: 打个比方，刚才，你们认出那块碎布是盗火行者的东西以后，心里想的是什么?
E: For example, what did you think when you realized that piece of cloth came from the Flame Reaver's cloak?

C: 好奇心还真重哪…你以为我会到处挥霍？哈，我打捞宝藏可不是为了这个。
E: Curiosity killed the cat, you know? Do you think I'll spend it all? Pfft. That's so not why I hunt for treasures.

C: 别忘了，我也是半神，那愚蠢的预言也有我一份：<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将与贪婪同行，亦将亡于分文」……</color>
E: Don't forget. I'm a demigod too, and there's a line reserved for me in that stupid prophecy as well... <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall walk with greed, and die over petty change."</color>

C: 这段时间，你是不是对那黑衣剑士…越来越执着了？
E: Lately, you seem more and more fixated on that swordmaster in black.

C: 好主意！…不过，那以后再来树庭就没盼头了。
E: Great idea! However, that would mean no more reasons to visit the Grove.

C: 如果指控成立…你凭什么觉得这些平民的性命能令我妥协？
E: If that accusation holds... what makes you think the lives of these civilians will sway me in the slightest?

C: 呃…这，这是……
E: Uh... this, this is...

C: 遵命，赛飞儿大姐头！
E: Aye aye, Boss Lady Cipher!

C: 哼，你被缩减到这幅模样以后，唯一还没退化的就是说话的艺术了。
E: Hmph, you may have been reduced to this form, but you still haven't lost your way with words.

C: 对，我是他们嘴里说的黄金裔——力大无穷的英雄！名扬天下的剑客！智慧超群的大学者！
E: So what if I'm one of those Chrysos Heirs they talk about? Those infinitely strong heroes? World-renowned swordsmen? Exceptionally intelligent scholars!?

C: 嗅…嗅嗅……
E: Sniff... sniff...

C: 该死！那些家伙……
E: Blast it! Those guys...

C: 「我已经太久没有目睹过你挥锤淬火的身姿了，刚刚竟看得有些入神。」
E: "I haven't seen you wield the hammer in so long... I couldn't help but be entranced by the sight."

C: 她被一把制式奇特的匕首刺穿了心脏。我亲眼看到以后才确信，那是「清洗者」佩戴的暗器。
E: She was pierced through the heart by a uniquely crafted dagger. I saw it for myself. It's one of the weapons carried by the "Cleaners."

C: ——是成为一个无私的人。
E: — was being a selfless person.

C: 我有预感，你我在此世还会再见。有机会时再较量一番吧，「救世主」。
E: I have a feeling we'll meet again in this lifetime. Let's have another showdown then, "Deliverer."

C: 不要蒙蔽自己。打你的心底…你认为这样做是正确的吗，赛法利娅？
E: Don't lie to yourself. Do you honestly think this is the right thing to do, Cifera?
Tsk...

C: 哼，多管闲事。
E: Hm. None of your business.

C: 我才能为那空白的一页，添上凡人的注脚。
E: ...to include a footnote for the everyday people in its blank page.

C: 创世涡心么……
E: The Vortex of Genesis, huh...

C: 雅辛忒丝，你很年轻…而且，你的模样也不像是能与泰坦抗衡的斗士。
E: Hyacinthia, you look very young... and you do not have the bearings of a warrior who can contend with a Titan.
Mmm...?

C: 走吧，该回树庭去了…不能让丹宝和小伊卡担心呀。
E: Alright, time to head back to the Grove... I shouldn't keep Dannie and Little Ica waiting.

C: 当真吗？这我可是第一次听说……
E: Really? That's the first time I've heard that...

C: …真的好敷衍呀，搭档！
E: ...That was totally insincere, partner!

C: 身负欧洛尼斯之力的异邦勇士，救世的先驱！
E: Warrior from the outlands! Endowed with the might of Oronyx! The vanguard of deliverance!

C: …泰坦将浑象仪赠予先祖，是为了让我们公平地划分阴晴昼夜，好让万物能在各自钟爱的天象下生长。
E: ...The Titan bequeathed the celestial globe to our ancestors, so that we could divide the light and dark equally between day and night, so that all things could grow beneath the celestial phenomenon they preferred.

C: 呵…那就让你看看吧，我们能做到的事……
E: Hmph... Then let us show you what we are really made of...

C: 有挑战性才好玩。
E: No fun if there's no challenge.

C: 那东西一直蔓延到现在。
E: That thing has been spreading ever since.

C: 都是前人的功劳——缇里西庇俄丝和阿格莱雅，你应该听过这两个名字。
E: It's all thanks to those who came before us — Tribios and Aglaea. You must've heard of these two names.

C: 别怕！如果有必要，就<color=#dbc291ff>施展「岁月」的神力回溯它吧。</color>
E: You have nothing to fear! We can <color=#dbc291ff>use the power of Time to rewind it</color> if we have to.

C: 但我能断定，主宰那印记的并非她的意识…她绝不会如逃兵般无顾尊严，在乌云的追赶下流窜。
E: But I am certain that the will behind that mark is not hers... She would not abscond like a disgraceful deserter, willingly exiled by the pursuit of dark clouds.

C: （晖之民们在与塞涅俄丝对峙…要聆听这段历史吗？）
E: (The Sunfolks are facing off against Seliose... Listen to this part of history?)

C: 过程很顺利，还剩一处「电路」需要修复……
E: Smooth sailing so far. We've got one more "circuit" to fix...

C: 一切顺利。继续前进吧，大家。
E: All good. Let's keep going.

C: 猖狂！我替你砍了她——
E: Madness! I will strike her down for you!!!

C: 对不起，向你们提出如此过分的请求。但我们活在一个不完美的时代里…不存在两全其美的选择。
E: I'm sorry for making such an unreasonable request of you all. But we live in an imperfect age... where there is never a perfect choice.

C: 扎格列斯掏出了藏于胃囊中的，属于刻法勒的火种。
E: Zagreus takes out the Coreflame that belonged to Kephale, which was hidden in their stomach.

C: 螺丝咕姆说你是幕后黑手。
E: Screwllum says you're behind all this.

C: 映照全世的圣火已在阁下手中。如今所要做的，不过一个抉择……
E: The holy flame that illuminates all worlds rests in your hands. All that remains is one choice...

C: 不禁引人思索：那份心灵感应莫非真的存在？
E: You can't help but wonder: Could there really be some kind of mental connection?

C: 嗯…只是少女的直觉，未必会成真哦。
E: Oh... it's just a girl's intuition. It might not mean anything.

C: 学成之后，我们就回哀丽秘榭，保护村子的和平不受侵扰。
E: Then we'd return to Aedes Elysiae, to help keep our village safe.

C: 那就向它抗争，直到最后。
E: Then we stand against it, until the very end.

C: 连你都这么说，果然还是不必开牌了吧……
E: Hearing that from you... maybe we really shouldn't unveil the cards...

C: 翻开「侍女」。
E: Reveal the "Servant."

C: 到处…都是怪物……
E: These creatures... they're everywhere...

C: 就是这样，战友。我们得齐心协力，一同战胜那位傲慢的王子咯。
E: That's right, comrade! It's time for us to teach that proud prince a lesson together!

C: 战友，我想听听你的直觉。
E: Well, comrade? What does your gut tell you?

C: 这究竟是谁的记忆…
E: Just whose memories are these...?

C: 切莫心急，剧目已经接近尾声。
E: Patience. We're approaching the final act.

C: 就像先前提到的那柄「权杖」，也是在<color=#dbc291ff>同一位星神</color>的注视下，才重获新生。
E: Much like that Scepter we spoke of earlier... It was only under <color=#dbc291ff>the same Aeon's glance</color> that it was reborn.

C: 呵呵，作为抵达世界尽头的回报，就由我来为二位解惑吧。
E: Heh, as a reward for reaching the end of the world, let me answer your questions.

C: 把逐火之旅讲给她听吧，然后…让她也成为这故事中浪漫的一笔。
E: Tell her about the Flame-Chase Journey, and then... let her become a romantic part of this story.

C: 我以「愤怒」铭记此世的全部。只要我还在燃烧，他们就从未离去。
E: I'll remember this world through anger. As long as I burn, they'll never truly leave me.

C: 你小子，视力比我想象中要好不少嘛……
E: Pretty boy, your eyesight's better than I thought...

C: 就像我过去认识的无数个她们…既狡猾，又天真。
E: Exactly like the countless past hers I've known... cunning, yet so naive.

C: 第十万八千六百四十二枚「纷争」火种，坠入火中……
E: The <unbreak>108,642</unbreak>nd Coreflame of "Strife" fell into the fire...

C: 两千四百零四万一千一百八十四枚火种……
E: Twenty-four million forty-one thousand one hundred and eighty-four Coreflames...

C: 把火种，交给我。让你我…尽快结束痛苦。
E: Hand over the Coreflame. Let's put an end to this suffering.

C: 这可真是…意外的收获……
E: Now that... is an unexpected revelation.

C: 不。你应该知道，假如「铁墓」从翁法罗斯的命运中{RUBY_B#完成}诞生{RUBY_E#}，它将给天幕之外的世界带去可怕的灾祸。而你漫长的徒劳……
E: No. You know the truth. If Irontomb is {RUBY_B#completed}born{RUBY_E#} from Amphoreus's fate, then it will bring ruin to the worlds beyond the sky. And all these countless lifetimes you've spent...

C: 容我拒绝：我必须将灵魂化为烈火……
E: Allow me to refuse: I must transform my soul into a raging fire...

C: 旁边的信使小姐，就是我在记忆空间最后遇见的人。记得那时你劝过我——
E: And you, Miss Messenger... we met in that memory space. You said to me—

C: 太卜大人说得没错。你的记忆，关乎流光忆庭的存亡。
E: She's right. The Garden of Recollection's existence hangs on your memories.

C: …这种话，下次让别人来说啦！
E: ...Oh stop, you're making me blush!

C: 谁知道呢？
E: Who knows!

C: 又来了……
E: That voice again...

C: 大门…变远了？太卜大人呢？
E: The gate... it moved? Where's the master diviner?

C: 对他们印象如何？
E: What do you think about them?

C: 他们本就是实验产物，自然也会随实验场的终结一同逝去。
E: They've always been the product of the experiment, so naturally, they will perish when the experiment ends.

C: 「命运爵」，知晓神谕的圣女，现在城中只有名为缇宝的这一位。为统合天下神谕，凯撒曾将她们掳作质子…不过，她们如今是奥赫玛重要的先知。
E: Dux Fatorum, the Holy Maiden who interprets the prophecy... Only the one named Tribbie remains in the city. The Imperator once took them as hostages in order to unify the prophecies of the world... But they are now Okhema's most vital prophets.

C: 总觉得…你是不是为了关注度，悄悄添油加醋了？
E: I get the feeling... you might've embellished a bit to keep people's attention.

C: …原来如此。难怪还没进门时，空气中就隐隐有股铁锈的味道。
E: ...I see. No wonder there was a faint smell of rust in the air before I even entered.

C: 我…甚至没法从您的话里听出半点自由的喜悦。
E: I... can't hear even the slightest hint of joy in your words.

C: 等到火种将我的双眼点亮，可能就没法像以前一样专注了呢。
E: By the time the Coreflame illuminates my eyes, I might not be able to focus as I used to.

C: 好好休息，为宴会做准备吧。
E: Rest well and get ready for the banquet.

C: 毕竟小凯撒对{NICKNAME}那么关注，我们和天才的悄悄话多半已经传进她的耳朵了。人家都能猜到接下来的发展……
E: After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to {NICKNAME}, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...

C: 凯撒？呵，谁知道，估计又躲在什么地方想歪点子吧。要我说，她从来就没正眼瞧过我们这些为她拼命的战士……
E: The Imperator? Hah. Who knows? Maybe she's hiding somewhere thinking up weird ideas again. If you ask me, she's never treated us soldiers properly, even though we put our necks on the line for her...

C: 灰鱼儿，小海兔，他们似乎还在商议。再靠近些吧，我会继续为你们传音……
E: Gray fry? Little sea hare? It seems like they're still talking. Get closer. I'll keep carrying their voices to you...

C: 不必再多说什么了……
E: All that needs to be said has been said.

C: 不过，无需等待太久。待到落幕时分，您一定能理解我与翁法罗斯的心愿。
E: But you won't have to wait long. When the curtain falls, you'll surely understand mine and Amphoreus's ardent wish.

C: （在匹诺康尼，我接过了「钟表匠」的礼帽，向「秩序」宣战，得到了「同谐」的力量……）
E: (I received the Watchmaker's hat in Penacony and declared war against the Order, then gained the power of the Harmony...)

C: （记忆在此处的行迹也处处可见，虽然不知道他们意图为何，但身处绝境，没有更多选择……）
E: (Traces of the Remembrance are also everywhere in this world. I don't know what they want, but I don't have many choices left in this crisis...)

C: 这是…欧洛尼斯的使者么？
E: Is this... a messenger of Oronyx?

C: 我不在时，世界发生了什么？
E: What happened to the world while I was gone?

C: 就像你说的，奥赫玛是人类的庇护所。*我们*从没打算让大家搬到斯缇科西亚去……
E: Like you said, Okhema is humanity's refuge. We never intended to get everyone moving to Styxia...

C: 谁都知道，来古士一定会把创世涡心当作目标。
E: We all know Lygus will set his sights on the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 「经由阿那克萨戈拉斯的仪式，『纷争』半神将自己的灵魂分为荣耀、勇气、坚韧、牺牲、理性五份，封入血晶，投身战场……」
E: "Through Anaxagoras's ritual, the Demigod of Strife split his soul into five: Courage, Honor, Tenacity, Sacrifice, and Reason, each sealed in blood crystal and cast into battle."

C: 哈，要的就是这个！愤怒能蒙蔽人的双眼，管他是什么「天才」，道理同样适用。等他深入议院，和我对峙的时候……
E: Ha, that's exactly what we want! Rage blinds even the brightest minds. Doesn't matter how much of a genius he is, the principle still holds. Once he storms into the Council and confronts me head-on...

C: 我相信，{NICKNAME}一定不会让人失望…一如既往。
E: I believe {NICKNAME} will never let us down... just like always.

C: 还有其他人，功成之后，你们亦会得到对应的奖赏。我许诺你们一个无忧的时代！
E: And to the rest, your triumphs will not go unrewarded. I promise you a new age, free of fear!

C: 现在，请用「岁月」的力量打开那扇通往海底的门。去寻找那位被忠诚折磨的典狱长吧。找到她，步入世界的涡心，然后为你我的一切恩怨作结。
E: Now, please use the power of Time to open the gate to the ocean's depths. Go find the prison warden tormented by loyalty. Find her. Step into the world's vortex. And once there... end everything between us.

C: 既然过往告一段落，就将「岁月」翻回当下——
E: Now that the past is settled, let's turn the page and bring Time back to the present...

C: 阅读碑文。
E: Read the inscription.

C: 这就是棘手的地方：他同时存在于两条时间线，而它们的内部时钟天差地别。在漫长的实验过程里，智械哥的神经完全习惯了这种状态，所以他才有主场优势。
E: That's where things get tricky. He simultaneously exists in two different timelines where the internal clocks are wildly different. That old Intellitron's neurons have completely gotten used to that over this prolonged experiment, and that's why he holds home-field advantage.

C: 如果有更多时间，你我也能做到。可惜现在没有如果，也没有时间。
E: You and I should be able to manage that too, if given more time. Unfortunately, there's no "if," and we don't have more time.

C: 那，激动人心的「智识」交锋，就拜托两位天才啦？
E: I'll leave the exciting clash of the Erudition to you two geniuses.

C: 吕枯耳戈斯…消失了？
E: Lycurgus... disappeared?

C: 剑旗爵，你的任务已经完成了。
E: Dux Gladiorum, you have completed your duty.

C: 光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年 法吉娜战役前
E: Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, before the campaign against Phagousa

C: 身份如此高贵，也只是神明的附庸么？
E: Do you mean that even individuals of such nobility are merely subordinates to a god?

C: 「她几乎没有思考，答得斩钉截铁——」
E: "She answered so quickly, as if she had made up her mind long ago."

C: 满是怀念的表情呢。但，我不是「她」喔？
E: Aww, that look... so full of memories... But... I'm not "her."

C: （气氛不太对劲……）
E: (Something doesn't feel right...)
...Yes.

C: 终于轮到我出场啦？哎呀呀，真是隆重！
E: It's finally my turn to shine? Ooh, this feels like such a grand occasion!

C: 对，属于「记忆」的答案，至今仍未浮出水面。
E: That's right. To this day, there have been no signs of the entity corresponding to the Remembrance.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>在三月七的精神遭到挟持时，是一阵「记忆」的涟漪保护了她，将她送进了这里。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And when March 7th's consciousness was seized, it was a ripple of the Remembrance that protected her and sent her in here.</color>

C: 终于停下了…等会儿，你刚才，是不是提到了{NICKNAME}？
E: Finally, it's stopped... Wait. Did you just mention {NICKNAME}?

C: 在她无计可施的那一天。
E: On the day that she ran out of options.

C: 这样一来，它就不再是「昔涟」一个人的回忆。
E: That way, it won't just be "Cyrene's" memories alone.

C: 这位星神在翁法罗斯扮演的角色尚不得而知。但如果昔涟无意间踏上了「记忆」的命途，她的「牺牲」就不止是为了重置轮回，还有其他意义……
E: We still don't know the role THEY play in Amphoreus, but if Cyrene accidentally stepped onto the Path of Remembrance, then her "sacrifice" wasn't just for resetting the cycle. There was another purpose...

C: 符文在风扇上，得先用时象仪让它停下。
E: The rune is on the fan. We need to use the Chrono Vessel to stop it first.

C: 「现在，翻开这本书吧——」
E: "Now, open this book."

C: {NICKNAME}乘客又在说胡话了。
E: And once again, passenger {NICKNAME} is talking nonsense.

C: 根据卡芙卡的说法，当我和「记忆」关联加深，这段回忆就会恰到好处地浮现，随后一场危机在劫难逃。
E: Kafka said that when my link to the Remembrance deepens, this memory will resurface exactly when it needs to... and an inevitable crisis will surely follow.

C: 看来恶战在所难免…
E: Looks like a fierce battle is inevitable...

C: 我还有机会和<color=#dbc291ff>她</color>取得联络。
E: I still have a chance to make contact with <color=#dbc291ff>her</color>.

C: 你一定会问我：如此代价，是否值得？
E: You probably want to ask me if it was worth it.

C: 不，让我留在这里。
E: No, I will stay here.

C: 哪怕要用我的双脚，遍历这山川大地的每一处角落……
E: Even if I must cross every mountain and valley on my own two feet...

C: 眼下还无法判断，但这一定不是他乐于看见的结果。连他都无从知晓的秘密，一定极其特殊，或者…极其危险。
E: It's hard to tell right now, but this definitely isn't the outcome he wants to see. For something to be hidden even from him, it must be either extraordinary... or unimaginably dangerous.

C: 联盟…不止罗浮吗？这无疑是好消息。如此一来，胜算就又多了一分。
E: The Alliance? Not just the Luofu? This is really good news. With this, our odds of victory just went up another notch.

C: 奇妙的是，这只奇兽竟重新生出了颅骨，但空空如也——它为大脑留出了位置，却从未拥有过它。
E: Remarkably, this chimera regrew its skull, but it was completely hollow inside. It had reserved a space for a brain it never possessed.

C: 拜托你的东西，带来了吗？
E: You brought what I asked for, right?

C: 空间在自我重置，我会对干扰源开展逆向工程。
E: The spatial field here is undergoing autonomous recalibration. Initiating reverse-engineering of the interference source.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>好啊，那就这么写吧——「诡计的羁客，赛飞儿」——她只想沙漠永远有水，好土永远有黄金，盗贼也能做英雄！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Alright, then write it like this: Cipher, Trickery's Traveler... All she ever wanted was for there always to be water in deserts and gold in fertile soil, and for even a thief to steal their way into legend!</color>

C: 粉色头发的可爱女孩…有三位！
E: So that makes... three adorable pink-haired girls!

C: 好大的竖琴……
E: That's one huge harp...

C: 你来判断。
E: It's your call.

C: 你们看，奇奇怪怪的东西，会不停地冒出来！
E: You see, weird stuff keeps popping up everywhere!

C: 孩子，你选错了敌人。你的诞生本是最宏大的命运，你将解放寰宇，正如长夜尽头的烈阳。
E: Child, you've chosen the wrong enemy. Your birth was meant to be the greatest destiny. You were to liberate the universe, like the blazing sun at the end of the long night.

C: 那「记忆」里的，爱笑的孩子……
E: That smiling child in the "memories"...

C: 嗯…你是谁？
E: Hmm... Who are you?

C: 看来，你已经归于「空白」了。
E: So, you've returned to a "blank space."
Look!

C: 以「记忆」为帛，这身华服如此耀眼……
E: Woven from Remembrance, this garment gleams so brilliantly...

C: 对，只需穿过最后的「门径」。
E: Yeah, we just have to go through the final Passage.

C: 「可惜咱们的目的地，和诗里完全相反哪。」
E: "Shame our destination's the exact opposite of the one in your poem."

C: 但即便如此，他也会选择将它背负。
E: Yet even so, he would still choose to bear it.

C: 最初的涟漪，消散了……
E: The first ripple has faded...

C: （白厄，我们做到了。）
E: (We did it, Phainon.)

C: 唯独启程的信念，我绝不会忘记。
E: But I never forget what set me on this path.

C: 踏上前来。在「开拓」的见证下，将「救世主」共通的名字，传唱后世吧——

C: 失却的一切，尽数汇集。用它编织胜利吧，救世主们——
E: All that is lost has now been gathered here. Use it to weave victory, Deliverers...

C: 这场前所未有的「开拓」，值得每个人倾尽全力！

C: 我会追上昔涟，改写结局。

C: 这些忆质，是被昔涟接纳的…银河众生的「记忆」。

C: 「但现在，你仍有机会做出选择。」

C: 「你的『开拓』之路还很长，孩子。我尽量长话短说。」

C: 「命运中见，{NICKNAME}。」
E: "See you in destiny, {NICKNAME}."

C: 昔涟…醒来吧……
E: Cyrene... Wake up...

C: 「而等待他们归还的火种，有四亿枚。」

C: 混沌的尽头，是一团纯粹的暗，纯粹的…「毁灭」。

C: 哀悼月，我令死亡不再是「均衡」的终点——

C: 回答我——这一切值得吗？

E: Look, there are several adorable outfits here! Trianne wants you to try them on so Trianne can draw you looking all cute!
Hehe...

C: 你们成为了真正的生命。
E: You have become true life forms.

C: 我们会监督{F#她}{M#他}，必须信守承诺！
E: We'll keep an eye on {M#him.}{F#her.} {M#He}{F#She} had better keep {M#his}{F#her} promise!

E: Stories this complex and twisted are always hard to believe. If anyone questions the truth of this tale...

C: 一件是金色…一件是紫色？

C: 「但阴差阳错，踏上另一条命途的PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>掌握了不同的力量……」
E: "In a strange twist of fate, PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> embarked upon a different Path and obtained a different power..."

C: 再追上那失却一切的旅途，小心地挑选，不安地记录。
E: Then, it would catch up to that journey where all is lost, carefully picking out stories and writing them down in trepidation.

C: 看，光照进来了。「救世主」的光，要照亮翁法罗斯啦。
E: Look. A light is coming in. The "Deliverer's" light is going to illuminate Amphoreus.

C: 现在投降还来得及。同为天才，真没必要撕破脸，到最后弄得谁也不好看。
E: There's still time to surrender, you know? You really don't need to burn all the bridges. We're all geniuses here. Don't make everyone lose face at the end.

C: 漫步群星的天才们，银河已经走到生死存亡的关头！我，天才俱乐部#83，黑塔，向你们发出召唤——
E: Geniuses who walk the stars! The cosmos has reached a moment where its very existence hangs in the balance! I, Herta, Genius Society #83, hereby summon you!

C: 得了吧！老子叫银枪•修罗。
E: Enough! My name is Silvergun Shura.

C: 逻辑非？
E: Logical negation?

C: 有一把枪，能给它准星里出现的生物打分，从0到<unbreak>100</unbreak>不等。
E: There's this gun, it can rate any creature within its crosshair as a score from 0 to <unbreak>100</unbreak>.

C: 后面已经十分接近空间站的关键区域，「军团」的主力应该也都集中在那里。
E: We're getting close to the central area of the space station, the main force of the Legion must be there.

C: 可惜被包围的是它们。
E: But they're the ones getting besieged.

C: 就算有也是陷阱，黑塔的收藏不可能对外展示。
E: Even if you could, it'd be a trap. Herta doesn't display her collections.

C: 你说你是真的，那你有证据吗？
E: What about your claim? And where is the evidence to support it?

C: 你发现了什么异常？速速说来，我可不想和它纠缠不清！
E: What is it then? Spit it out. I don't want to waste any more time with that thing!

C: 啥？我听不清，{F#丫头}{M#小子}，你大点声！
E: What? I can't hear you clearly, {F#lass}{M#lad}. Speak up!

C: 听说那恶棍曾在空间站留下不少私房宝贝，想必都藏在这里。
E: I've been told that the old scoundrel left many personal treasures in the space station. They must be hidden there.

C: 说得也是……
E: *sigh* You're right...

C: 你是…阿兰大哥的朋友！
E: You're... Brother Arlan's friend!

C: 但就在刚刚，我们确认到这里还存在着前所未见的怪物。
E: However, we just confirmed that there are monsters here that have never been seen before.

C: 唉，是啊。「军团」刚刚退走，空间站又是这个百废待兴的状态。
E: *sigh* I am. The Legion has only just retreated — the station is in absolute shambles.

C: 就是你小子造谣艾丝妲？
E: Are you the one who started the rumor about Asta?

C: 隐约可以辨认出是一张特殊权限卡——残角破碎，字面磨损，不知是否还可投入使用。
E: This special access card is vaguely distinguishable from the others — the corners are chipped and the writings are worn out. It's unclear if it works.

C: <unbreak>56</unbreak>月-当前
E: <unbreak>2157</unbreak> AE, Months <unbreak>56</unbreak>–present

C: 下一页。
E: Next page.
