E: It's just a rejection. It's no big deal to me. But what am I going to do with these rocks? Ridiculous carvings...

C: 所以我第一时间想到了你。
E: That's why I immediately thought of seeking your help.

C: 对了，这里是委托费，一共<unbreak>648</unbreak>…
E: By the way, here is your commission fee. A total of <unbreak>648</unbreak>...

C: 我什么都没听见。
E: I can't hear anything.

C: 据小队队员向我汇报，亚伯拉罕最后一次出现是在收容舱段。
E: According to the squad members, Abraham was last seen in the storage zone.

C: 如果能将他安全找回来，我会备下应物科的薄礼，答谢你救了我的燃眉之急。
E: If you bring him back safely, the Department of Implement Arts will reward you quite handsomely.

C: 你紧盯着熄灭的屏幕，若隐若现的荧光似乎要进行危险的倾诉。感应到来者的靠近，周遭莫名响起了邈远的窸窣之声，令人不寒而栗。
E: You stare at the empty screen. The faint fluorescent light seems ready to begin its dangerous display. Sensing your approach, there was an indescribable rustle that sounded off from the surrounding distance, enough to run a chill down your spine.

C: 法政科要反对的正是这一套强者正义论的框架。那些受星神漠视的权益，将由我们敬告；那些遭派系践踏之人，将由我们托起。
E: What the Department of Galactic Geopolitics wants to oppose is this status quo of the strong ruling over the weak. Those rights and interests ignored by the Aeons will be upheld by us. Those who are trampled will receive our help.

C: 一个死者的生平…
E: The life of a deceased...

C: 心里竟然有些隐隐的期待…
E: I can't wait...

C: 我会修正并还原原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>的出厂设置，今后，她将继续履行法政科向导的职责，与往常无异。
E: I will fix and factory reset Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak>. And then, she will continue to perform her duties as a guide for the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, as usual.

C: 作为回报，我想给你讲一个不知从什么时候听来的故事，你有兴趣听吗？
E: In return, I want to tell you a story I heard god knows when. You want to hear it?

C: 还是再等等吧。
E: Maybe later.

C: 你怎么也来防卫科那一套！不要开玩笑了，快帮帮我呀。

C: （他的说辞和阿兰的工作规划对得上，看来他果然知道关键信息。）

C: 不用麻烦波少！这种不正之风，我们就能帮你肃清！

E: You're head of the Security Department — you don't have anything to do with Professor Capote. Why did you suddenly start writing his reply cards for him, huh?

C: 小姐，我真的没有……
E: Miss, I really don't...

E: It says, "I will never reveal our goal."

C: 就像…这样！
E: Just like... this!

C: 是不是显示故障？
E: Could it be a display malfunction?

C: 这么久都没人发现？
E: No one noticed it this whole time?

C: …这个「问号」，的确很醒目。

C: 用你的脑筋想想办法！

E: Beautiful beings, are you disciples?

C: 没错，是些许我想亲眼所见的，{NICKNAME}提到的见闻。
E: Yes, it was something {NICKNAME} mentioned that I wanted to see in person.

C: 没关系，有任何危机我们都一起应对。
E: It's alright. We're in this together.

C: 我支持你。
E: I support you.

E: {NICKNAME}, it is an honor to fight against you.

C: 那您可太看得起我了，我就是一搞内购的，顺带做点无本买卖。
E: You flatter me — I'm just a peddler doing a little business on the side.

C: 我、我看见了，那个人消失的瞬间！啪的一下，很快的，连个骨头渣都没留下。
E: I—I saw it! I saw that person disappear! They vanished right before my eyes! Just like that — snap! It was so quick, n—no traces left — not even bones!

C: 够了够了，相信同事，交给专业的人解决吧。工作做完了吗？
E: Yeah, yeah, whatever. Just let the professionals deal with it. Did you finish your work?

C: 我就知道你会找我追根究底……
E: I figured you'd come to me to uncover the truth...

C: 嗯…这一点倒是成立。
E: Yes... that seems logically sound.

C: 那就有充足的理由怀疑，两起事件彼此相关。
E: ...then there's ample evidence to indicate that these two cases are linked.

C: 不知道，取决于你的朋友。
E: I don't know. That depends on your friend.

C: 没错，还差一把火。
E: Indeed. It needs one more spark.

C: 若做得到，就来试试罢。
E: Try then, if you must.

C: …是从什么时候开始怀疑我的？
E: Haha... When did you start to doubt me?

C: 若非我偶然取得灵火火种，出手干涉了冥火的传送，那些人早已是漂在窗外的太空垃圾了。
E: Had I not fortuitously acquired a spark of the Phase Flame and intervened in Duke Inferno's teleportation, those people would already be space waste — floating past the windows here.

C: 我正在欣赏风景，看得有些失神了。
E: I expect the views here had me lost in thought...

C: 嗯，极好的糕点。十克方糖，一朵风干的盐渍梅花。烘焙与烹饪，和培育宇宙同理，火候要掌握好，心思要缜密，遇到任何状况…都不能慌乱。
E: Mmm, an outstanding dessert. Ten grams of cubed sugar, one dried and salt-preserved plum blossom. Baking and cooking are the same as nurturing a universe. The heat must be controlled, planning must be meticulous, and one must not panic... no matter what happens.

C: （怎么回事…我这是…在说什么？）
E: (What's going on... what am I... talking about?)

C: 爱吃瓜是吧，一边去。
E: Did I ask about your favorites? Also, that's disgusting — what's wrong with you?

C: 你发现「阮•梅」造物根本放不进去……
E: You realized Ruan Mei's creation cannot be put in at all...

C: 我见你回收了主控舱段的生命体，非常感谢。你做得很好。
E: I see that you've recovered the lifeform in the master control zone. Thank you, well done.

C: 很合理的判断，我一定会成功。由我还原出的「它」将绽放前所未有的生命。
E: It is a logical decision. I will certainly succeed. The entity that I reconstruct will bloom into a life never before seen.

C: 一定是公司文化入侵。
E: Sounds like an invasion of IPC culture.

C: 还没呢，那些新兵蛋子太不让人省心了，我还得带他们一阵子。

C: 塔米拉小姐……
E: Miss Tamila...

C: 拍得不错啊，以后我想家的时候就多看看这张照片。
E: Not bad! Now I can look at this picture whenever I miss home.

C: 不过目前我还是得把算力集中到任务上，接下来将导航至——「贝洛伯格下层区」。
E: However, I should keep my computational power focused on the current mission. We will now be navigating to "Belobog Underworld."

C: 没事，有我在，你很安全。
E: It's fine. You're safe now that I'm here.

C: 我好像明白了什么，但暂时未检测到需要升级的程序。
E: I feel like I have learned something, but I cannot detect any systems that require upgrading.

C: 如果是真的，那帝弓在上！保佑遇险者获救。
E: If that's true, then by the Arbiter! I pray that they will be rescued!

C: 哎，这白茫茫的一片，咱们该往哪走？
E: *sigh* Snow as far as the eye can see. Which direction should we take?

C: 那倒不必了，你带我们进城吧？我们对路也不大熟。
E: No need, why don't you just take us to the city? We don't really know the way.

C: 嫌犯！放弃抵抗，投降吧！
E: Suspect! Relinquish your resistance!

C: 正是凭借那笔资金，贝洛伯格才得以建起如此高大的城墙…甚至连最初一批自动机兵的研发经费都是从那笔钱里划出来的。
E: It was with those funds that Belobog was able to construct its immense walls... Even the initial funding for the development of the first batch of automatons was drawn from the same pool.

C: 那你应该知道我们的身份了吧？连你的老板都对我们客客气气的，你这做下属的也该懂点礼貌才对！
E: Hmph, do you even know who you're talking to? If your boss knows to treat us with respect, you'd better start showing some yourself!

C: …什么公司，什么面试，废话真多…我的耐心已经到头了！
E: ...IPC? Interviews!? I don't know what you're rambling on about, but you're really testing my patience.

C: 我手头还有些事务，这次就不跟你们同去了。
E: I've got a lot going on right now, but I'll try to make it next time.

C: 我理解了。你口中的「长远利益」，可以被定义为宏观层面的文明存续。
E: I understand. Your "long-term interests" can be defined as the survival of civilization at a macro level.

C: 欢迎回来…真是难为情，又辛苦你们为这座城市到处奔波了。
E: Welcome back. I appreciate your help more than I can express — it couldn't have been easy running all over the city.

C: 我相信，在了解了这些信息之后，你身为大守护者，肯定能做出更明智的决断。
E: It is my hope that with this information, you will be better equipped as the supreme guardian to make a wise and informed decision.

C: 停下——请都停下！各位，请放下你们手里的武器！
E: Stop! All of you! Put down your weapons!

C: …我知道了。如果让我来选…我会签下这份合同。
E: ...It's okay, I've thought it through... If it were up to me, I'd... sign the contract.

C: 我们来这儿就是为了替她收集大家的声音。时间不等人，我们想知道你是怎么看的。
E: We're here to gather everyone's opinion on the matter. I know this is a little sudden, but we're running out of time. What's your take?

C: 抓紧时间去下层吧，我很好奇娜塔莎和希儿会怎么看这件事……
E: We'd better hurry to the Underworld and see what Natasha and Seele make of it all...

C: 我…算是勉强听懂了。本来以为只是公司的喽啰又闯了什么祸，没想到……
E: I... think I get it. At first, I thought it was just a few IPC ruffians overstepping their boundaries...

C: 大伯，没事吧？
E: Are you okay, sir?

C: 哇，这么多人…没想到克里珀堡还有这么熙攘的时候。
E: Whoa, the fort's packed... I've never seen this many people here before.

C: 喂喂，前面那两个怎么插队啊？懂不懂先来后到啊？
E: Hey, that's not fair! Get to the back of the line. Ever heard of first come, first served?

C: 没关系，再试一次。我们准备了很多备用的「潜爆机兵」。
E: It's alright — we prepared many backups. Try again.

C: 哇！「嘭」的一下就把他们炸晕了，效率真高！
E: Wow! We wiped them all out in a single explosion! That's what you call efficiency!

C: 解释「互助会」的情报
E: Explain what you found out about the mutual aid society.

C: 我是…从天外降临的神医。
E: I'm a... miracle doctor from beyond the sky.

C: 是啊…在家人去世之前，她还是挺开朗的一个人。
E: Yes... Before her family passed away, she was a carefree young woman.

C: 养父母一家是医学世家，我们俩从小就接触到了很多医学专著。长大以后，我们也都顺利进入了贝洛伯格的医学院校，走上了从医这条路。
E: My adoptive parents belonged to a prominent medical family — as kids, we were exposed to all kinds of medical texts. When we were older, both of us got straight into Belobog's medical school. We were on a path into the medical profession.

C: 我敬佩他的理想和坚持，虽然我觉得「风雪免疫」是个遥不可及的理想。
E: I do admire his vision and perseverance, even though "Blizzard Immunity" always seemed unachievable to me.

C: 在下层的那段时间，他接触到了一些受到轻微裂界侵蚀影响的患者。他们的身体对冷热的反应异于常人，这种特性让瓦赫十分着迷。
E: During his stay in the Underworld, he met patients affected by Fragmentum corrosion with mild symptoms. Compared with non-patients, their bodies reacted differently to hot and cold. And that fascinated Vache.

C: 也许真应了那句界种科内部的「拉明娜定律」，凡是我拉明娜「有可能会」搞砸的事，「就一定会」被拉明娜搞砸……
E: Maybe "Lamina's law" is really true. In the Department of Ecology, they have a saying, anything that Lamina "can" screw up, Lamina will "screw up."

C: 诡计多端的水魈。
E: That crafty Xenohydro.

C: 是时候重新检视一回密信了。
E: It's time to reexamine the letter.

C: 简单的动宾结构，重点应该放在宾语上…等一等，这个「不世」听起来确实有些耳熟。
E: In this sentence structure, the focus should be on the object... Wait a minute, "unearthly" does sound familiar.

C: 力压「反物质军团」的无敌强手，银河驰名的冉冉新星，岂是你这水魈可以冒充的？
E: The invincible conqueror of the Antimatter Legion, the infamous rising star of the cosmos. Who do you think you are impersonating, Xenohydro?

C: 我早就抢先一步提醒她，最近可能会有人冒充我找她套近乎，你说你不是水魈，有什么证据吗？
E: I warned her earlier that someone might pretend to be me to get close to her. Do you have any proof that you are not the Xenohydro?

C: 她一定会改过自新。
E: She is bound to turn over a new leaf.

C: 这道门没有开关耶。
E: I don't see a switch for the gate.

C: 你昨天见过我们，还记得吗？那时我们是作为可可利亚女士的贵客被招待的。
E: You saw us yesterday, do you remember? Madam Cocolia received us as honored guests.

C: 呃…你确定那不是失眠导致的幻觉？
E: Oh... Are you sure it wasn't some kind of hallucination induced by sleep deprivation?

C: 从这里开始搜索就不必多走回头路。不过从北边开始搜索也一样，我只是来时随便找了个方向罢了。
E: If we start from here, we can save a trip going backward. Technically, it'd be the same if we were to start from the north. I just picked this direction at random when we came.

C: {NICKNAME}——能听到吗——{NICKNAME}——！
E: {NICKNAME}! Can you hear me? {NICKNAME}!

C: 画面上的男性身着铁卫旧制制服，看起来风度非凡——如果他没做鬼脸的话。
E: The man in the picture is dressed in the old uniform of the Guards and has quite a classy look about him — if only he weren't making such a silly face.

C: 我已经又给妈妈送去了一封信，约好了会面的地点。我们就在喷泉广场的附近集合吧——别担心，行政区的周边环境我还大抵记得。
E: I've sent another letter to my mom telling her to find us near Fountain Plaza. Don't worry, I know my way around the Administrative District.

C: 花？
E: Flowers, huh?

C: 机械屋？抱歉，我不太明白…还是再想想吧。
E: Workshop? I'm not too sure about that... Let's see if we have other options.

C: …这样就可以了。希望它能在风雪里多伫立一段时间。
E: ...That should do. Hope it can withstand the snow.

C: {NICKNAME}，你愿意帮我们这个忙吗？
E: So, {NICKNAME}, would you like to help solve this case?

C: 啊，久仰大名，今天终于有幸见到您了！
E: Ah yes, I've heard so much about you! It's so nice to finally have the pleasure of meeting you!

C: 当然，不着急！等您准备好了再来找我就好。
E: Of course, take your time. Come back when you're ready.

C: 没想到还能用这种方式帮到大家…克拉拉很高兴！
E: I never imagined this would help you solve the case... That's great!

C: 呜…我和哥哥，我们只是想帮上忙……
E: *whimper* W—We were just trying to help...

C: {NICKNAME}，一下收集到了这么多部件，至少应该足够还原「齿轮与智慧」的大致结构了吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, with these parts, we should have enough to put the sculpture back together... more or less.

C: 可能这也是对你们付出努力的奖赏吧？
E: Or maybe it's just the fruit of your efforts?

C: 奇怪的时间点，「商店街」…难道……
E: Going out at unusual hours, the shopping street, could it be...

C: …佩拉，{NICKNAME}——我有一个请求，能麻烦两位前去<color=#dbc291ff>边缘通路</color>探查一下那里的情况吗？
E: ...Pela, {NICKNAME} — I have a request. I'd like the two of you to scout out <color=#dbc291ff>Backwater Pass</color> and see whether anything's happening there.

C: （什么动静都没有…是我记错暗号了吗？）
E: (There's no response... did I remember the wrong password?)

C: 行了行了，不扯没用的了。你赶紧跟我说说，上次那卷「微缩胶带」卖出多少价钱？
E: Alright, enough chinwagging. So, how much did the microfilm sell for?

C: （他开始怀疑我了…这可不妙。）
E: (He's starting to suspect me... that's not good.)

C: 呵呵，佩拉小姐言重了。如果实在没什么可考查的，想听听我的过去也无妨——两位可以随意提问哦？
E: Hehe, you're flattering me. If you really have nothing else to inquire about, then it's okay if you want to hear about my past — you two are free to ask questions.

C: …他们值得这样一个未来。这也是我运营诊所和儿童公社至今，还加入了「地火」的原因。
E: ...Because they deserve such a future. This is why I've been running the clinic nursery and the clinic, and it's why I've joined Wildfire.

C: 真的吗？你可不要骗虎克哦！
E: Really? You better not be tricking me!

C: 说什么呢，{NICKNAME}队员！面试不就是这样的嘛！
E: What are you talking about, {NICKNAME}? Isn't this what an interview is supposed to be like?

C: 那没事了，我先撤了。
E: No problem. I'll be off, then.

C: 没什么。来，跟我到休息区吧。
E: Nothing. Please follow me to the Rest Area.

C: （{NICKNAME}，你也看到了吧？！她刚刚肯定是笑了！）
E: ({NICKNAME}, did you see that!? She laughed, didn't she?)

C: …你花别人的钱不心疼是吧？
E: ...You only say that because it isn't your money.

C: 好的，「太吓人，不予展示」。
E: Okay, I'll just put down "too scary to specify."

C: 你和希儿配合得很好。
E: You and Seele work well together.

C: 漆黑虎克大人的事就是我的事。
E: Alright, I'll go help Pitch-Dark Hook the Great.

C: 傻孩子…老爹快干不动了，不知道还能陪你多久，总要为以后做做打算了。
E: My poor child... Daddy is old now. Who knows how long I can stay by your side? I have to start preparing for your future.

C: 只要虎克不惹事的话…
E: As long as you behave yourself...

C: 你这家伙，就不能好好说话嘛！
E: Hey, would you mind talking more nicely?

C: 叔叔我什么大风大浪没见过，怎么会被你们这对大小流氓吓到？
E: I've seen all sorts of things in my life. Why would I be afraid of you two little rascals?

C: 你从帐篷里拿走了什么？
E: What did you take from the tent?

C: 等会儿！有话好说！是不是这货的来路有问题？跟我无关啊——
E: Wait a second! Let's all just calm down! Is there something wrong with the source of this stuff? I mean, I've got nothing to do with it...

C: 就这两件，跟说好的一样。那就劳烦您了，嘿嘿——合作愉快！
E: As we previously agreed, just these two! Thank you so much for your help. Hehe — It's a pleasure to work with you!

C: 这座雪堆里似乎有什么东西……
E: There's something in this snow drift...

C: 营地里好像有什么东西…我们小心一点。
E: I think there's something in the camp... Be careful.

C: 对呀。实话实说嘛，佩拉。
E: Yeah, go for it, Pela.

C: 本来我是想承认的…现在突然没有那种欲望了。
E: I was going to say that... but now I suddenly don't want to.

C: 好啊。听说行政区南边新开了家不错的肉排馆，正好我们一起去试试看吧。
E: We can! I heard a pretty good steak place opened up in the south of the Administrative District. We can go try it out together.

C: 好啦好啦，别这么紧张。她肯定能照顾好自己的。
E: Alright, alright, calm down. She'll be able to look after herself.

C: 佩妮娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜——十六年前意外罹难的、贝洛伯格最优秀的极地探险家。
E: Penya Sergeyevna was Belobog's greatest outdoor explorer — passed away sixteen years ago.

C: 至于具体内容，除了佩妮娅女士本人，谁都没有读到过。他们只说她给佩拉留下了好多好多封信——
E: Apart from Madam Penya, nobody knew what the floppy disk contained... but they say she left Pela many letters.

C: 两百冬城盾是多少钱？
E: How much is <unbreak>200</unbreak> shield worth?

C: 就是这条路，我没记错。顺着它走下去，尽头就是孤儿院了。
E: This is the street alright. The orphanage should be at the end.

C: 史瓦罗先生说他的职责是「存护」。为此，他必须作出能够保存人类的决定。
E: He says that his responsibility is "preservation." To do that, he must make decisions that best protect humanity.

C: 请退后，本机将对该裂界生物进行无害化处理——
E: Please step back. I shall eliminate this Fragmentum creature...

C: 不愧是希儿，永远都这么准时。怎么样，你们找到能用的物资了吗？
E: Hehe, that's our Seele. Nothing if not punctual. So, did you find any usable supplies?

C: 工坊…敌人…必须清除……
E: Workshop... target... must be eliminated...

C: 我的脑海里也存有疑问，但是直觉告诉我，三月，丹恒，还有{NICKNAME}…他们三个就是这个世界的转机。
E: I also have doubts... But my gut tells me that March, Dan Heng, and {NICKNAME}... They are the new hope this world has been waiting for.

C: 欢迎回来。克拉拉小姐和客人。
E: Welcome back, Miss Clara and guests.

C: 毫无价值的说辞。你们并非来自地下，无权代表下层区的人类。
E: An inadequate pretext. You are not from the underground. You have no right to represent Underworld humanity.

C: 你想好了再说话！
E: Think before opening your mouth!

C: …这下就真相大白了吧？
E: ...So the truth is clear now, right?

C: 我知道费斯曼的探针的下落了…
E: I know where Fersman's probe is...

C: 嗯…
E: Right...

C: 小偷，闭嘴！吃洞洞机一拳！
E: Enough talk! How about a Diggertron knuckle sandwich!

C: 啊，还没有！{NICKNAME}，你愿意来参加虎克的生日聚会吗？
E: Oh! Not yet! {NICKNAME}, do you wanna come to my birthday party?

C: 虎克老大，你说的「大功臣」来啦。
E: Boss, the "big hero" you mentioned is here.

C: 你在害怕什么？
E: Why do you sound so terrified?

C: 山体上有几道突兀的痕迹，似乎是被某种金属利器剐蹭后留下的。痕迹的末端指向了远方的某处。
E: Some abrupt scratches left on the mountain which seem to be done by a metal weapon. The end of the scratches points to a distant place.

C: …克拉拉，你懂机械语吗？
E: ...Clara, do you speak robot?

C: 虽然会养「机械宠物」的人不算多，但时间一长，他们也形成了一个小圈子，交流饲养机器人的心得，甚至还会让它们…互相战斗。
E: Pets like that are pretty rare, but some of the folks who have them have formed a small community to share ideas. Some are interested in nurturing robots. Others... force them into battle.

C: 克拉拉想把事情调查清楚…这可能需要{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的帮助。
E: I need to look into something... I may require your assistance.

C: 纳入基地网络后，我将对该个体的核心模组进行全面维护，修复其硬件结构。
E: I will maintain the robot's core module and repair its hardware once it has been integrated into the base network.

C: 接下来就拜托你了，史瓦罗先生……
E: Mr. Svarog, let's get started...

C: （抚摸帕斯卡）
E: (Strokes Pascal)

C: 望不到边际的裂界，一群疲惫的银鬃铁卫，还有…弥漫着死亡味道的空气。
E: An endless Fragmentum, a few exhausted Silvermane Guards... and the stench of death in the air.

C: 大守护…别抖机灵！没有密钥，谁也不能接近！
E: The supreme guardian...? Hey, no games, y'hear? No dice without the encryption key!

C: 希、希露瓦？！
E: S—Serval!?

C: 我能再问问…他是什么时候联系你的？
E: And may I ask... when did he contact you?

C: 呼…呼……
噢噢噢噢噢噢噢噢噢！
E: Chaaaaarge!

C: 看来你还对我瞒了不少事啊…比如这位突然出现在军事禁区的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，还有那位茉莉——
E: Looks like you're keeping quite a lot of things from me... like this {M#gentleman}{F#lady} here who suddenly appeared in the military restricted zone... also that Molly...

C: …希莉儿？
E: ...Cyrille?

C: 我…想不起来。
E: I... can't remember.

C: …全都卷成了一团，我得费上很多力气才能把它们捋清楚，然后再一根一根地抽出来。我想我能做到…靠自己的力量。
E: ...It's shrunk up into a ball. It's hard to untangle it all, so I have to pull out each memory, one by one. I think I can do it... all on my own.

C: 外来者，来聊聊吧——你现在方便吗？
E: Outsider, let's talk. Are you free right now?

C: 谢谢你的善意，陌生人。很抱歉我不能对你道出真相……
E: Thank you for your kindness, stranger. I'm sorry that I can't tell you everything...

C: 这地方…让人起鸡皮疙瘩，不舒服。皮肤下面好像有虫子在爬。
E: ...This place makes my flesh crawl... like there are insects under my skin.

C: 没错。这里的裂界似乎与可可利亚产生了特殊的联系，它正在反复重现她的形象。
E: Yes. The Fragmentum here seems to have made a special connection with Cocolia. It's repeatedly generating forms in her image.

C: 侵入者……
E: Intruders...

C: 希儿，还有大家……
E: Seele, all of you...

C: 从天外降临的旅行者口中，她知晓了「星核」的秘密。她也知道，第一任大守护者阿丽萨•兰德没能摧毁「星核」……
E: The visitors from beyond the sky told her the secret of the Stellaron. She knew that Alisa Rand, the first supreme guardian, had failed to destroy it...

C: 有你帮忙传话，我就能放心赶回行政区了。必须通知杰帕德和希…呃……
E: While you do that, I'll head back to the Administrative District. I need to tell Gepard... Serv— ah...

C: 别怕，我身子骨结实得很。来，扶好我…咱们走吧。
E: Don't worry, I'm a tough cookie. Here, hold on to me... let's go.

C: 但我至少还能履行之前的约定，把我的故事告诉你。你愿意驻足聆听吗？
E: But at least I can fulfill my previous promise to you, and tell you my story. Would you like to stop and listen?

C: （《贝洛伯格大事年表》…想必就是这套书了。）
E: (Belobog Chronicles... It's probably this set.)

C: 星槎海街区目前只允许同行两个类型的星槎：<color=#dbc291ff>客运型和货运型</color>。
E: At the moment, there are only two types of starskiffs allowed on the streets of the Starskiff Haven: <color=#dbc291ff>passenger-type and cargo-type</color>.

C: 我没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 没有能联系上。
E: I failed to make the contact.

C: 看到什么有用的信息了吗？
E: Did you see anything that might help the case?

C: 这位女士，请您配合。
E: Madam, please cooperate.

C: 这是每天浇花时倒的营养液，你说的每次都要倒这么多，多了不行，少了不行。
E: No. It's the amount of nutrient solution that must be used when watering flowers. Ms. Luhui said that every time the amount must be just right, it can't be too much or too little.

C: 做好决定了，就不要后悔。
E: Don't have regrets after making a decision.

C: 找助手还是给故事选主角？
E: Are you looking for an assistant or the protagonist of a story?

C: {NICKNAME}，你有什么眉目吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, what do you think?

C: 我也是最近刚结束外勤差事回到这儿，丹鼎司里经历了刀兵人患，到处乱糟糟的，许多书都不在书架上。
E: I just came back from a foreign business trip myself. The Alchemy Commission had experienced a huge upheaval and armed conflict. Everything is a mess. So many books have been displaced from the bookshelves.

C: 你知道的也不少啊…
E: You sure know a lot about this...

C: 抱歉，我为神策府效力。
E: Sorry, I work for the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 一则寻物启事如同一张狗皮膏药突兀地粘在墙上。
E: A Lost and Found Notice has been slapped onto the wall, sticking out like a sore thumb.

C: 你是什么种类的蘑菇…我无法识别。不，你不是我的同族。
E: What type of mushroom are you... I can't tell. No, you're not the same species as me.

C: 哎，大多数时候，忧郁就只是忧郁，不能写成任何诗。
E: Ahh, melancholy is just melancholy most of the time. It doesn't make for any kind of poetry.

C: 我有一种要打架的预感。
E: I have a feeling that we're going to fight, aren't we?

C: 你家人都说我不思进取不顾事业。
E: Your family all said that I'm not a go-getter and I'm not career-focused.

C: 岭腹松阴李后檐。
E: Silence is golden.

C: 我是小聪的朋友，想和你聊聊。
E: I'm Cong's friend. Can we talk?

C: 刻痕经历了上百年的时间，早已变得不再清晰，你们反复确认了几遍，更加确信其含义。
E: The engraving was no longer clear due to the passage of hundreds of years. After checking it repeatedly, the two of you are even more certain of what the phrase meant.

C: 也许短生才最适合享受爱情的甜蜜。
E: Perhaps, short-life species are best suited to enjoy the sweetness of love.

C: 温符瑞的嘴角勾起一道弧线，那是对「同道中人」才会展露的会心笑容。
E: The corner of Wen Furui's lips curls upward. It's a genuine smile that one would only show to a compatriot.

C: 化外民就不要冒充仙舟人了吧？罗浮全是用鹤运物流的机巧鸟送快递的，你算是哪门子好鸟？
E: Can you not pretend to be a Xianzhou person as an Outworlder? The Luofu has already transitioned to cycranes from Heron Express for all our logistics needs, you look nothing like a bird.

C: 你想得可真美。
E: A sweet fantasy.

C: 给我全部拿下。
E: Arrest 'em all.

C: 这云骑老哥看上去好像不太对啊。
E: Something's wrong with this Cloud Knight captain.

C: 我可不敢对我的牌友们这么说。
E: I wouldn't tell my game mates that.

C: 我承认我确实骗过钱，不过对我来说，用三言两语就能给别人帮助，这样的快乐金钱根本比不了，你肯定很难理解吧？
E: I'll admit, I have cheated some people out of their money. But to me, if I can help another with just a few words, the money is inconsequential to the joy they'd feel, wouldn't you agree?

C: 没错没错，这根本就不是给你的礼物，遮遮掩掩的，你难道想私吞了不成？
E: That's right, that's right, the gift isn't for you at all. Are you sneaking around like this because you're trying to take it for yourself?

C: 哦？你是怀疑这「狐仙聊天」背后还有什么猫腻是吧？
E: Oh? You suspect that there is something more to this "Foxian Beauty Chat," don't you?

C: 我一向有反诈骗的警惕意识。
E: I have always been vigilant about guarding myself against scammers.

C: 语速急促的演讲一下子让陶德喘不上气，他开始艰难地喘息，等待你做出决定。
E: Todd gets breathless after speaking too fast. He waits for your decision while catching his breath.

C: 贝尼尼老师信件里的描述，提到过几个他曾去的地方，我在地图上把它们的位置全都标出来了。
E: Bernini mentioned several places he had visited in the letters. I've marked them out on the map for you.

C: （可陶德给的坐标明明就在这里，残缺的标识估计就在这附近了，或许…要在这附近找找？）
E: (But the coordinate that Todd gave leads here. The missing markings are probably around somewhere... Maybe I should look around?)

C: （成功了！果然如陶德所说…这玩意是光敏材料，只有在特定角度折射的光线下才能出现。）
E: (I got it! Just as Todd said... this thing is made of photosensitive material. It only appears under light refracted at specific angles.)

C: 你读懂了这无声的哀求，他希望你保持沉默。
E: You can hear him silent imploring. He wishes for you to stay silent.

C: 学会一直渴望通过与联盟打交道，获得稳定安全的长生疗法——整个仙舟学的起源便立足于此。
E: The Guild is always keen to obtain stable and safe longevity therapies from the Xianzhou Alliance — In fact, it forms the basis for all research into Xianzhou culture.

C: 但这个想法触犯了仙舟「十恶逆」的禁律，他知道自己不可以留下只言片语的线索，因此他使用了学会内部的标识，留下了众多看起来只是在描绘历史的图案。
E: But that violated the Xianzhou's "Ten Unpardonable Sins." Knowing he couldn't leave behind any traces, he used the Guild's markings and left behind a series of patterns that seemed to merely illustrate history.

C: 我不打算成为学徒…
E: I don't plan on becoming an apprentice...

C: 你回来找我们了，也就是安全的意思？
E: You're back! Does that mean we're safe now?

C: 你带着陶德告别了白露。
E: You take Todd to bid farewell to Bailu.

C: {NICKNAME}，能拜托你在附近找找有没有什么线索吗？半夏姐姐的心上人应该不会无缘无故地离开的。
E: {NICKNAME}, can you see if there are any clues nearby? I don't think Banxia's sweetheart would leave for no reason.

C: 不过要是治好了一个人，那个人能变得更好更健康的话，我喜欢！所以，你给我快快振作起来！
E: But I like it when someone gets better after I treat them! So you need to pull yourself together!
You...

C: 搜、搜什么东西呀？
E: S—Search for what?

C: 让我赶紧治疗完你，然后你赶紧滚！
E: Let me heal you so I never have to lay eyes on you again!

C: 还有什么治疗的必要吗？
E: Really? Do we still have to heal this guy?

C: 先去地衡司蹭蹭饭吧。
E: Let's get some food in the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 但这份力量本不属于我，而是来自我的前世之身，丹枫。他擅自改变了龙尊传承，酿成大祸，也最终遭受蜕鳞轮回之刑。
E: ...yet that power stems from Dan Feng — my previous incarnation. He altered the process of high elder succession, plunging everything into catastrophe... ultimately, he suffered the punishment of molting rebirth.

C: 如今我打算重拾旧事。我想以修复「建木」封印为交换，顺道谒见龙尊，看看能做些什么。
E: Now, I plan to face that shadow. In order to make amends, I want to repair the Ambrosial Arbor's seal... and visit the high elder, to see what more I can do.

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 曜青的天风君为你一力陈词，让十王司免去了你的死罪。但蜕鳞轮回之刑可避不过去了。
E: Caelorum Venti of the Yaoqing put forward a strong case for you, and the Ten-Lords Commission spared you from capital punishment. But the punishment of molting rebirth could not be avoided.

C: 一边寻找蜃影、一边释放回响，就这样谨慎前进吧。
E: Let's look for Mirage Echoes and send out pulses. Move carefully.

C: 这一路可真是凶险…
E: This has been a very dangerous journey...

C: 不、不好意思，谈到自己感兴趣的内容就有些控制不住……
E: M—My bad. I tend to get carried away when talking about things I'm interested in...

C: 嗯…这个问题解释起来有些复杂，各位先随我移步到那边的四方览镜吧。一边看一边解释比较方便。
E: Hmm... that's complicated. Come with me to the Foursquare Mirror — it'll be easier to explain.

C: 哎…不好意思，我不强求你们相信我的判断，只是……
E: *sigh* I don't want to force you into trusting my judgment, but...

C: 咱列车的宗旨就是帮亲不帮理。
E: On the Express, we always trust our own.

C: 没关系，我理解。毕竟诸位也是百忙之中抽时间来帮忙的。我会尽快处理。
E: Not to worry, I understand. After all, you're taking time away from your own affairs to lend a helping hand. I'll get everything to you as soon as possible.

C: 妖异！神秘！诡谲！仙舟志怪集大成之作《述异幽明录》震撼发售！
E: Demonic! Mysterious! Treacherous! The Xianzhou masterpiece, Records of the Supernatural, on sale now!

C: 你们两个先冷静一下，我觉得罗刹…不像这么幼稚的人。
E: Calm down a moment, you two. I don't think Luocha has anything against the book.

C: 建议你向执事们道歉。
E: I think the Realm-Keeping officers might disagree with you there...

C: 哎呀，「执事们亲临现场固然可敬，但终究欠缺了推理的灵光。」这也是渔公说的。
E: Hmph, I'll quote the Angler again: "The field officer is a diligent specimen, yet they lack the detective's instinct to deduce facts from evidence."

C: 三月七解释下。
E: March 7th, explain yourself.

C: 不行。如果人人都能通融，规矩还有什么意义？
E: I can't do that. Why bother making rules if everyone can just ask for a favor?

C: （不试试怎么知道！）
E: (Hey! You don't know if you don't try!)

C: 这是…接头暗号。看来真的是您。您稍等，我这就去把老大叫来。
E: That's... the code. So you're the one. Wait here a moment — I'll call the boss right away.

C: 好歹给个露脸的角色啊！
E: At least let the audience see my face!

C: 第二天就出了那么大的事，我们也一直没来得及找他说一声谢谢。
E: We were planning to thank him properly, but in the aftermath of the Arbor incident, we never had the time.

C: 我们本就打算将这个东西交给地衡司，也算是寻找恩公的线索。
E: We were planning on handing it over to the Realm-Keeping Commission — we suspect it's probably our best chance of tracing him.

C: 杨叔，我们要去哪儿啊？
E: Get going to where, Mr. Yang?

C: 不妙，有些怪物被坠机的骚动惊扰了。情况容不得耽搁。
E: Not good — looks like the crash disturbed monsters in the area. We need to get there — fast.

C: {NICKNAME}，进了司辰宫可不能突然这么拔高声线说话。
E: Uhh... Let's avoid sudden exclamations like that once we're in the Palace, {NICKNAME}.

C: 采翼的死，对驭空大人的打击很大。那场战役后，她没有按惯例那样上交采翼的遗物，而是留在自己身边，时不时拿出来翻看。
E: Caiyi's death was a big blow to Madam Yukong. After the battle, she refused to turn in Caiyi's possessions as per regulations. She kept them locked away — occasionally taking them out to admire.

C: 那算了，我们聊点别的。
E: Never mind. Let's talk about something else.

C: 当我从燃烧着熊熊烈火的星槎残骸中爬出，看到的是那颗无血无泪的星球未经大气修饰的天空。
E: When I climbed out of the burning carcass of the starskiff, I looked up into a clear sky — pure and seemingly unadorned by the atmosphere that arced far above us.

C: 这是我第一次听您谈起这些事……但是，妈妈，我已经不是懵懂的孩子了。成为斗舰飞行士是一条残酷的道路，这我早有准备……
E: Mom... this is the first time I've heard you talk about this... but I'm not a little girl anymore. The road of a fighter pilot is a cruel one, I know that now...

C: 啊？真的吗！谢谢妈妈！谢谢妈妈！谢谢妈妈！
E: Huh? Really!? Thank you, Mom! Thank you, thank you, thank you!!!

C: 因为我没有选择…
E: Because I have no choice...

C: 你这边的进度怎样了？
E: How's progress on your side?

C: 据说他们曾经是很好的朋友——不对，损友。阿刃忘了很多事情，这些他也记不太清楚了。
E: Apparently, they used to be good friends... Well, good friends who were bad for each other. Bladie forgot nearly everything, so he doesn't remember it well.

C: 命运是注定的吗？
E: Is destiny predetermined?

C: （转念一想，卡芙卡本就是恶人，云骑抓她天经地义啊……）
E: (Thinking about it, Kafka is a villain, and the Cloud Knights are justified in trying to capture her...)

C: 说的什么胡话，众兄弟，将这人拿下！
E: What are you talking about? Everyone, take them down!

C: 你在一旁好好呆着啦。
E: Stay where you are — I can handle this.

C: 要不了多久，星槎就会自塑成形，驶入空港。咱们去那儿等着吧。
E: The starskiff will take shape and enter the skyport. Let's go wait for it there, it won't be long.

C: 唉，建木复生，孽物遍地。连工造司的机要之物「造化洪炉」都快保不住了。
E: ... Since the Arbor's resurrection, the land has been crawling with abominations. *sniff* Even the Artisanship Commission's prized Creation Furnace is hanging on by a thread.

C: 不必惶急，饮月，我们再走一程。
E: Don't get anxious, Imbibitor Lunae. We have all the time in the world.

C: 饮月，还记得为你打造它的人吗？
E: Imbibitor Lunae, do you know who crafted it for you?

C: 这份寒意，绝不是血肉之躯能扛下的…
E: This cold isn't something normal flesh could withstand...

C: 离开罗浮这么久，我终于能来同你告别了。
E: After being away from the Luofu for so long, I can finally say farewell to you.

C: 我也不过是一介罪人，有什么资格代天典刑？
E: I, too, am a criminal. What right have I to deliver punishment?

C: 我听说「衔药龙女」能医百病，也想像普通人一样，求医问药，看个门诊。
E: I heard the Healer Lady is capable of curing all diseases. I'm here for the same reason anyone would be — for a check-up and consultation.

C: 你再仔细想想，当时停云将谛听交给你们，小谛听「呜汪」了一声……
E: Try and remember, when Tingyun handed Diting to you, and Diting woofed...

C: 这…是秘密行动。
E: Ahem... This is a covert operation.

C: 离开多久了…
E: (How long has she been away...?)

C: 长船中心的静室里，狼首人身的尊者自玄思中睁开双眼，预感到宿命之敌的来临。
E: In a silent room in the middle of the fleet, a wolf-head Master broke from his meditation and opened his eyes, facing up his fatal enemy.

C: 你相信我好不好！我知道，你肯定是来卧底的。我其实也是！
E: You're here undercover, right? So am I! You've got to believe me!

C: 你穿成这样那必然会被怀疑啊…
E: Of course, they're bound to have their doubts when you're dressed like that...

C: 紫菊、蓝桃，找地方处理了这个云骑。
E: Purple Chrysanthemum, Blue Peach, find somewhere to dispose of the body.

C: 信不过我？
E: Do you doubt me?

C: 嗯…也好。我们兄弟姐妹几人在长乐天传教数日，可能已经引起了猎狗们的注意…你去处理还安全些。
E: Hmm... this does have its advantages. Our brothers and sisters have been proselytizing in Exalting Sanctum over the last few days — we may have attracted the attention of the devils... Having you dispose of the Cloud Knight will be safer.

C: （这确实是药王秘传的内部命令。）
E: (It's an internal order from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.)

C: 无论如何，你已经证明了自己是一名称职的莳者。组织在长乐天的负责人会来见你。
E: You have already proven yourself to be a competent disciple. The head of our operations in Exalting Sanctum is coming to pay you a visit.

C: 你是神策府的卧底？
E: Were you an undercover agent for the Seat of Divine Foresight?

C: 那么，灰牡丹…不，神策府的猎狗，请你去死吧！
E: In that case, Divine Foresight devil, it's time for you to meet your demise!

C: 你的一手消息非常有用。敌暗我明，有了这些情报，神策府的决策也会更加精准。
E: You've managed to shine a light on the darkness of the enemy. With this intelligence, the Seat of Divine Foresight will be able to improve its strategy...

C: 关于药王秘传的信仰…
E: Tell me about the beliefs of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...

C: 阿财，你、你怎么开口说起话来了？
E: Acai!? S—Since when were you able to speak?

C: 公输师傅带着谛听转身背向你们，倔强地看向工造司内。
E: Master Gongshu turns around with his back against you alongside Diting, staring into the Artisanship Commission adamantly.

C: 我是流光忆庭的「信使」。三月小姐，请不要继续回溯过往。
E: I am a messenger of the Garden of Recollection. Miss March, please refrain from looking back upon your past.

C: 你是无名客。
E: You are the Nameless.

C: 你依稀记得所有黑塔空间站的员工，最低的行政等级是Ⅱ级。这样的工牌除了打开厕所外不知有什么作用。
E: You vaguely recall that researcher levels start with two. The only career path this permit opens is one that leads to the bathroom.

C: 表意识恐怕也没有！
E: I'm not sure your conscious mind does either.

C: 现在出发去下一站…呃不，上一站了，咱们走吧！
E: Let's move on to the next stop... Uh, I mean— the last stop. Let's go!

C: {NICKNAME}也绝不会在这里咄咄逼人，劝我放弃对我而言重要的事情。
E: {NICKNAME} would never try and force me to give up something so important to me.

C: 发生了什么？
E: What happened?

C: 那岂不是什么都不知道？
E: Sounds like we're still none the wiser...

C: 我刚才一摸口袋，突然发现口袋里多了这么个东西。
E: Huh, I just found this in my pocket... How did it get there?

C: 我也想瞧瞧这柄剑。
E: I'd love to take a look at that sword too.

C: 所谓魔剑——即便从未受训剑术之人，只要握住剑柄，便有高深奥妙的剑技在脑海中闪现；即便是手无缚鸡之力的弱者，也能以惊人的力量和肉眼难及的速度挥剑。
E: A cursed sword lets anyone, even a complete novice, wield it with insane skill. Just by holding the hilt, even the weakest rookie can brandish it with incredible speed and strength.

C: 嗯，你做好准备之后再来找我。
E: Alright, come back to me when you're ready.

C: 怀炎将军说这柄剑会改变你。
E: General Huaiyan said this sword would change you.

C: 就让我瞧瞧，你带走它的渴望，和我狩猎魔剑的愿望，究竟哪个更胜一筹！
E: Fine, let's see whose desire is stronger, your desire to take it away, or my desire to hunt down all cursed swords!

C: 多到我不愿再品尝绝望的滋味。
E: So much despair that I don't ever want to taste it again.

C: 这是作为剑与生俱来的命运，我注定会落入某人之手，进行战斗。风能选择停止吹拂吗？云能选择停止漂泊吗？不能，这便是受造之物的命运。
E: But being a sword is my destiny. I'm doomed to serve some master and fight battles endlessly. Can the wind choose to stop blowing? Can a cloud choose to stop drifting? No, it's the same for me, a creation with a predetermined destiny.

C: 可是，这是演武仪典的奖品，卡勒瓦拉的使团要是知道了…怀炎将军，将军您快说句话啊？
E: But this is the prize for the Wardance... If the Kalevalan delegation finds out... Please say something, General Huaiyan!

C: 在出发前，我从这株金树上折下一枝，希望能将它移栽至此，作为英雄回归故乡的见证。
E: Before leaving Kalevala, I took a branch from that golden tree, hoping to plant it here to represent the hero returning to his homeland.

C: 好姐姐，你究竟使的什么法子，让她转眼就相信咱们是什么「侦查人员」……
E: Are you a witch!? Just how did you manage to convince them in the blink of an eye that we're some kind of detectives...

C: 的确没什么区别。
E: Correct — exactly the same.

C: 你呀。
E: You.

C: 如此看来，钟珊不会是凶手。
E: That would suggest that Zhongshan is not the murderer.

C: 那可不成，工造司「解玉厅」把籀刻玉兆的技术看得可严了。
E: I'm afraid that's impossible — the Artisanship Commission's Hall of Jadeology keeps a close watch over the jade carving process.

C: 涨落在乾、震之间。行有眚，无攸利。
E: We're fluctuating between the heaven and thunder trigrams. A step forward bridges no distance hence.

C: 虽然……
E: Still...

C: 事毕之后，我会给你们足够的时间和她谈谈。
E: When we're finished, I'll give you enough time to talk to her.

C: 让我猜猜，「时间」、「空间」…接下来这个阵八成应该是和「能量」有关了吧！
E: Let me guess — time, space... I bet the next terminal is energy-related!

C: 正值用人之际，既然星核猎手有心让列车与我们缔结盟谊，景元就不客气啦。
E: We were in need of extra hands, and the Stellaron Hunters were kind enough to bring us together with the Astral Express — how could I look the other way.

C: 你是说…驭空？
E: You mean... Yukong?

C: 其实，我们是受景元将军和符太卜所托前往「丹鼎司」，故而路过此地。想请公输师傅为我们指路。
E: We're passing through on our way to the Alchemy Commission at the behest of General Jing Yuan and Diviner Fu. We'd like you to show us the way, Master Gongshu.

C: 那妖物可不得了！还能让司里机巧之物突然都像有了意志似地围着它转。谁上去怕是都得白白送命！
E: It's a dark and powerful entity. The robots... it was like they gained consciousness — they were moving in a circle around it. I fear approaching it is tantamount to suicide!

C: 你们瞧，这是工造司一直未完成的机关：「换境画屏」。
E: Look, this is one of the Artisanship Commission's prototypes: The Shifting Screen.

C: 那么公输师傅一定有办法吧？
E: I'm sure you know how to fix it.

C: 嗯，你问得好啊，孺子可教！
E: How observant — you would make an excellent student.

C: 停云小姐，仙舟的长生种…不会都这样吧？
E: Miss Tingyun, are the long-life species on the Xianzhou... all like this?

C: 也许他们中有人想到了，拒绝了{RUBY_B#药师}寿瘟祸祖{RUBY_E#}的「馈赠」。然而作为一整个文明，真的能抗拒长生不死的诱惑吗？
E: Perhaps some of them did reject the {RUBY_B#Yaoshi}Plagues Author{RUBY_E#}'s "gift." But how could an entire civilization resist the temptation of immortality?

C: 你吃屁吃！零食只有两包，那自然只有老大和我的份，你凑什么热闹？
E: Eat dirt! There are only two packs — just enough for me and the boss. Why would you get any?

C: 你向丹枢讲述了之前发生的事。
E: You describe what happened to Dan Shu.

C: 魁首大人，请先撤退吧，大业在即，我们不能被{F#她}{M#他}拖在这儿。
E: Master, please retreat now. Our main mission is impending. We cannot be stalled here by {F#her}{M#him}.

C: 丹枢带着她的「兄弟姐妹」消失在了道路的尽头。
E: Dan Shu and her "brethren" disappear at the end of the street.

C: 这些原始的机械生物，贫弱、孱弱、苦弱！走起路来每一个制动关节都在颤抖，外壳上的每一颗固定螺栓都要蹦出来了
E: These primitive mechanical creatures are poor, weak, and sickly! Every joint of theirs trembles and the bolts on their casings threaten to pop out as they move.

C: 好个帮助，这三位眼下在长乐天吵起来了，你们自己去问问情况吧。
E: You call that "help"!? Now the three are bickering in the Exalting Sanctum. Check out the situation yourselves.

C: 你怎么看着这么开心？
E: How come you look so happy?

C: 没错没错，家人现在相信我不是营销号了对吧！
E: Exactly! Now do you believe that my content isn't clickbait?

C: 算啦，我在这儿呆不了多久。所以咱们暂时好好合作，可以吗？
E: Never mind. I won't be staying for long, so let's get along while it lasts, shall we?

C: 雪衣大人，你没事真是太好了！
E: Madam Xueyi, I'm so happy to see you're alright!

C: 所以，汝等能在此时平安归来，十王司的运气不算太糟。
E: That is why the Ten-Lords Commission is not down on our luck today. We're lucky that you have all returned at this opportune time.

C: 是啊，再弱小的人也有他的长处。
E: Indeed. Even the weakest person has their strengths.

C: 呸呸呸，老子才不和口粮交朋友！
E: Friends!? Bah! I don't make friends with food.

C: 藿藿…
E: Huohuo...

C: 雪衣与寒鸦是什么关系？
E: What's the relationship between Xueyi and Hanya?

C: 我问得差不多了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 想看看具体的商品。
E: I'd like to peruse your goods.

C: ——我马上去找护理师！
E: I'll get the dream nurse right now!

C: 这是最后一堂课了，柯柯娜——我会把我知道的一切都教给你…绝不保留。
E: This is your final lesson, Cocona. I will teach you everything I know... I will hold nothing back.

C: 柯柯娜，你终于来了，我等你等了好久。
E: Cocona, you're finally here. I've waited for you for so long.

C: 嗯…你说得对。在「黄金的时刻」之下，埋葬了太多人美梦的残骸。
E: Mm... You're right. Buried are the numerous remnants of people's dreams beneath the Golden Hour.

C: 谜底揭晓——是船票！十天之后的船票，特别买了靠窗的座位…这样我们就可以一起欣赏银河的美景了。
E: The answer is: A ship ticket! A ticket departing in ten days. I even bought two window seats... We can enjoy the stars together that way.

C: …对了，庞德希望我能把这样东西交给您——是两张机动球比赛的旧门票，我猜那应该是你们一起看过的比赛。
E: ...Oh right, Pound wanted me to give you this — it's two expired tickets for the Roboball competition. I'm guessing it was a match you both watched back then.

C: 谢谢您，{F#女士}{M#先生}。谢谢您没有放弃我…哪怕这只是一时的宽慰。但至少您让我明白了…还有人在乎——还有人相信我能继续和它战斗下去。
E: Thank you. Thank you for not giving up on me... even if just for a fleeting moment. But you've at least let me understand now... that someone still cares — that someone believes in my resolve to fight it.

C: 普莱佐的眉毛挤在一起，似乎有些面露难色。
E: Prezzo's brows tighten, his expression a little contorted.

C: 现在明白了吧？他们说莱斯利已经不在了…但他们错了！真正的莱斯利•迪恩就在我们眼前，活生生地站在这里！
E: Do you understand now? They said that Lesley was gone... But they were wrong! The true Lesley Dean is right here, standing right before our eyes!

C: 说什么呢，我指的当然是给你签名的那个人！
E: What are you talking about? I clearly mean the one that gave you an autograph!

C: 我不知道该如何醒来，也记不起自己当时入住的房间号了。莫非在我身上真的发生了什么异变……
E: I don't know how to wake up and can't remember the room number I entered the dream from. Maybe there is something wrong with me...

C: 是梦就一定会醒。
E: With every dream comes an awakening.

C: 「——坐在这里与你谈判的人之所以是我，并不是因为我是所谓的舰长；而是因为只有我能忍受你身上的铜臭味。实话告诉你，我现在得强忍着不啐在你的脸上。」
E: "...The reason that I am the person sitting here in discussion with you is not because I am the so-called captain, but because I am the only person that can withstand your obsession with money. Honestly, it's taking all of my strength not to spit in your face."

C: 客房的地板上散落着一叠莱斯利•迪恩的照片写真，其中有几张还附着他的亲笔签名。
E: There is a stack of pictures of Lesley Dean on the hotel room floor, and some of them have his personal autograph on them.

C: 在我的家乡，他们认为善解人意的品质是来自神祇的馈赠——我敢打赌，您生来就拥有了这份礼物。
E: In my hometown, we believe that the ability to be empathetic to others is a gift bestowed by the gods... I would wager that this is a gift you have had since birth?

C: 没词了？
E: Nothing left to say?

C: 你怎么了，芙洛拉？怎么突然哭了……
E: What's wrong, Flora? Why are you crying...?

C: 所有冒险终归都有结束的一天。你以后要保重自己呀，芙洛拉。
E: Every adventure must come to an end some day. Take care of yourself, Flora.

C: 我的签名，只签了一半…唉，等下次吧。不知道莱斯利先生什么时候会再入梦……
E: My autograph, it's only half finished... Ah, I'll get it done next time. I wonder when Mr. Lesley will next enter the dream?

C: 您确认要雇佣佩德罗为您的大副吗？
E: Do you wish to recruit Pedro as your first mate?

C: 罗莎带着你来到了甲板上。
E: Rosa takes you to the deck.

C: 嗯？「选项」？噢，您是说「选择」啊。不不不，您执意不挂的话也不是不行，只不过我感觉这样就太低调啦，做人还是不能太内秀啊。
E: Hmm? Voice? Oh, you meant choice. No, no, if you're insistent on leaving it empty, that's fine too. I just think it's unbecoming for someone of your station. It never hurts to flaunt a little.

C: 放手去做吧，我相信你能行。
E: Go ahead. I believe in you.

C: 容我想想。
E: Let me think...

C: 年轻人，别着急！看看你的周围吧，匹诺康尼出了这么大的事，还有几个新客人敢入住酒店？让一位无名客担任大堂经理，这不正是家族迫切需要的正面宣传吗？
E: Young one, don't worry! Just look around you — with such a major disaster befalling Penacony, how many new guests would dare stay in our hotel? To have a Nameless become our lobby manager... isn't that the best kind of marketing The Family desires right now?

C: 叫我「球棒老板」就行。
E: Just call me Boss Baseballer.

C: 更重要的是…从现在起，每个需要前台服务的客人都必须来前台找你了。你将每位宾客的生杀大权牢牢掌握在自己手中…你可以用居高临下的语气回应他们的每一次提问。
E: More importantly... from now on, all guests who require concierge service will need to come to you. You now hold an iron grip over each guest's life and death... You can respond to every inquiry they have with condescension.

C: 当然，也有可能你过于豪放的装饰风格把客人全都吓——
E: Of course, it's also possible that your over-the-top style of decorations has frightened off all the gue—

C: 咻…有些惊险，但还算顺利。没想到你的第一位客人就身份不凡。
E: Whew... that was a bit of a fright, but at least things got handled. Who would've thought that Guest 1 would be someone of exceptional status?

C: 我虽不擅长辨识脸孔，但此时也敢斗胆做出判断…你我眼前之人正是星穹列车的开拓者，我命定的挚友——绝无混淆的可能。
E: I'm not good with people's faces, but I dare you to be the judge... You and I are looking at the Trailblazer of the Astral Express, my destined friend... There's no confusion about it.

C: 没错，我就是如此高尚。
E: That's right. I really am so upstanding.

C: 薪资、奖金什么的都是小事，面谈就行——但你真的不去征求下姬子女士的意见吗？要是因为挖墙脚伤害到了我们重要的合作伙伴，那可就得不偿失了~
E: Your salary and bonuses are no big deal. We can talk about those... But really, Shouldn't you go ask Miss Himeko what she thinks? It will not be worth the trouble if poaching harms an important relationship of ours~

C: …慢着，这可不公平啊，托帕总监。
E: ...Wait, that's not fair, Director Topaz.
Huh...?

C: 你想看吗？那我就给你瞅一眼。
E: Wanna take a look? Let me show you.

C: ——不、不行了，这句为什么莫名地好笑……
E: ...I—I can't hold it anymore! How come this line is so funny...

C: 呜哇！疼疼疼，我的手好疼……
E: Ouch! It's so painful! My hands hurt...

C: （帝垣琼玉…没想到居然是这么好玩的游戏！回车上以后一定要教会其他人……）
E: (Celestial Jade...... I never knew it was such a fun game! I have to teach the others when I get back to the Express...)

C: 粉毛狐狸、鸦羽怪人、云璃师父就这样留下…倒还好。
E: The pink-haired fox, the crow-feather weirdo, and Master Yunli staying... That's still not bad, I suppose.

C: 咳咳，三月是我的徒弟，临走之前还是得嘱咐几句嘛。
E: Ahem, as a master, I should pass on some words of advice to March before I leave.

C: 哎呀，这个时候就别管我了，你就帮帮铖杰找回手稿嘛。
E: Argh, don't mind me right now. Just help Chengjie find that manuscript.

C: 哎，我原本的偷懒计划泡空了。好吧好吧，不过关于手稿，你有什么线索吗？那什么设计稿，你懂，都长得一模一样。
E: Well, so much for my lazy day plans. Anyways, got any leads on the manuscript? Those manuscript thingies all seem identical to me.

C: 抱歉，出了这样的意外。
E: I'm sorry about this accident.

C: …星槎海…星槎…我只想看看星槎在天上飞。
E: ...Starskiff Haven... Starskiffs... I just want to see starskiffs soaring through space.

C: 等到那一天，我就是真正地出师了！想必师傅也会认可我的。
E: When that day comes, I'll be a real graduate! And my master will approve of me, I'm sure.

C: 啊，这么读着手稿，感觉就好像老师活了过来，重新站在我背后，指点我的课业。那些原本淡忘的温暖回忆，现在都回来了啊。莱恩老师，请再给我点时间！
E: When I'm studying the manuscript, it feels as though my master has come back to life. I can feel him standing behind me, and guiding me in my work. Those heartwarming memories that have long faded away all surge back to my mind. Master Ryan, please give me more time!

C: 我不知道自己哪一步做错了，每一步我都是按照设计图上来做的呀……
E: I have no idea what I messed up. I'm very sure I've done every step according to the manuscript...

C: 我看太卜司司库就挺闲的。
E: The Divination Commission custodian seems to be an easy gig.

C: 还是一如既往地受欢迎啊，「冠军」。
E: You're popular as ever, "champion."

C: …你还在为那事生我的气啊，希儿？我那就是一时上头……
E: ...Are you still angry at me over that one time, Seele? I just got a bit carried away...

C: 史瓦罗，加油！
E: Go, Svarog!

C: 有点骨气——那就再吃我两拳！
E: You've got guts... Time to end this!

C: （警觉地捏一捏彦卿的脸颊）
E: (Cautiously pinch Yanqing's cheek)

C: 唉？{NICKNAME}，你干嘛？
E: Huh? What are you doing, {NICKNAME}?

C: 嗯，这些往来行人里不仅有其他洞天的居民，还有像三位这样远道而来的客人。
E: Yep, there's people from other delves and travelers like you three who've come from afar.

C: 您也知道，这些日子来，数不清的外客涌入罗浮，星槎航道压力陡增。还没等来押解的星槎与航道管制，步离人狂徒便狗急跳墙了。于是有了方才您看到的一幕。
E: You know, with all the outsiders flooding onto the Luofu, the starskiff lanes are under immense pressure. The borisin desperadoes decided to put up a fight before the prisoner transport starskiff could get there, and that's what you just witnessed.

C: 在我们不知道的时候，一定发生了不少事。最好是这样……
E: A lot must have happened without our knowledge. At least I hope that's the case...

C: （我记得这家伙的性格<color=#dbc291ff>属于典型的吃硬不吃软，但姑且还算是遵守规则。</color>利用他的性格特点来对付他吧。）
E: (As I recall, this guy <color=#dbc291ff>won't listen to reason and can only be persuaded with intimidation. But he does seem to follow rules to some extent.</color> Let's use that against him.)

C: 斯科特先生，要是在庇尔波因特，入港的货物有安全隐患时，公司也会将它收容处置，没错吧？
E: If this were Pier Point, and incoming cargo posed a safety risk, the IPC would take it in for containment and disposal, correct?

C: 不一会儿，众人各自散去……
E: After a while, everyone disperses and goes their own way...

C: 浓缩。
E: Miniature.

C: 「吃点好的」，所以…晚上我们吃什么？
E: "Enjoy some tasty food" So... what's for dinner tonight?

C: 原以为罗浮演武仪典召开在即，能在擂台上一饱眼福，却没想到还能在治病救人的丹鼎司里瞧见这么一场精彩的战斗。罗浮之上的怪事还真多啊。
E: I thought I'd see my fill of impressive fights during the Wardance — yet here I am, able to witness a remarkable fight at the Alchemy Commission, of all places. Well, the Luofu is never short of surprises.

C: 「大捷将军」？这个称呼未免也太自恋了吧。不成不成！
E: Vanquishing General? Isn't that title a bit too narcissistic? I don't like it.

C: 这些日子以来，我不知吃了多少次败仗，早就明白了「天外有天，人外有人」的道理。但今日见识了飞霄将军的身手，心中又开始惴惴不安了。
E: I've had my fair share of defeats lately, and even though I know there are always more skilled swordmasters out there, seeing General Feixiao's skills today has made me feel a bit uneasy again.

C: 炎老襟怀朗照，晚辈铭感五内。但是，元帅交付的饬令，当众说开，这…合适吗？
E: Thanks for your kindness and sincerity, Elder Huaiyan, but is it appropriate... to tell everyone here about the Marshal's orders?

C: 接下来我和云璃先走一步，去为三月小姐置办些练剑的行头，权当是拜师礼了～
E: Yunli and I will head out and purchase some sword practice equipment for Miss March. Think of it as a little initiation gift.

C: 怀炎笑而不语，随即带着云璃离开了神策府。
E: Huaiyan, smiling silently, soon departs Seat of Divine Foresight with Yunli in tow.

C: 是啊，我将诸位带来神策府，是因为「将军有要事商讨」，怎么会…怎么会一眨眼的功夫，我和云璃就成了三月小姐的剑术师父？
E: Yeah, I brought you here because the general said he had some important matters to discuss. But how in the world... did Yunli and I suddenly become Miss March's swordplay mentors?

C: 将军！彦卿能为将军分担的不多，但彦卿……
E: General! I know there isn't much I can do to share your burden, but...

C: 呼雷？你是说那个呼雷？那个步离人战首？从七百多年前就被拘禁在罗浮幽囚狱中的呼雷？
E: Hoolay? You mean that Hoolay? The borisin Warhead? The same Hoolay who has been imprisoned in the Shackling Prison for over seven centuries?

C: 需要准备的东西不少…
E: There's quite a number of things to prepare...

C: 向下望去，无数监狱囚室如同蜂巢般密密麻麻展开，没入视线不可及的黑暗。
E: Looking down, you see a honeycomb of densely-packed prison cells extending deep into the darkness beyond your view.

C: 啊，云璃师父已经到了。久等了！
E: Ah, Master Yunli you're already here. Sorry for keeping you waiting!

C: 那就多有得罪了小姐！
E: Then I apologize in advance, Miss March!

C: 这艘竞锋舰，是以罗浮退役舰船改造而成的。在演武仪典正式举行前，暂时还不准人们登陆。
E: The Skysplitter is actually a decommissioned Luofu military vessel. People aren't allowed on board until the Wardance officially commences.

C: 怎么话说到一半，椒丘先生？
E: What happened, Mr. Jiaoqiu?

C: 长如一个琥珀纪的闭气和沉默后，你们听到箱子落地声。
E: After what feels like an entire Amber Era of holding breath in silence, you heard the sound of the crate touching down.

C: 他说什么？…兽舰？
E: What did he just say?... Beast ships?

C: 我不知道该怎么回答将军的问题。
E: I'm not sure how to answer that question.

C: 这名绝灭大君擅长操弄局势，布计令对手自灭。如今飞霄将军对罗浮内部的怀疑，恐怕也是——
E: The Lord Ravager is a master manipulator, adept at setting traps that lead her enemies to ruin. The current suspicions of General Feixiao towards the internal affairs on the Luofu are likely also...

C: 比起别人说什么，我更相信自己的直觉。
E: I trust my intuition more than any words.

C: {NICKNAME}说笑了，幽囚狱各处山重水复，层层相叠。还请来了持明的龙脉巧匠，用尽了洞天之术的奇巧。两位肉眼所见的只是幽囚狱的一部分。
E: You're funny, {NICKNAME}. This prison does contain many layers. We even brought in Vidyadhara Ichor Line craftsmen to introduce the ingenuity of delve enchantment. What you're seeing now is just one part of The Shackling Prison.

C: 这怎么可能，冥差们已经按照规程切断了箱子里机器的动力，还在箱子之外施加了封印。为何这些机甲还能行动？
E: But how is this even possible? The spiritfarers followed the protocols, cutting off power to the mechs and sealing the crates. How could these mechs still start moving?

C: 犯尽十恶，大逆不道的罪人都被镇于幽狱之底，以单独的洞天囚禁。若无谕令，等闲不会开启。
E: The most notorious felons are locked away in solitary delves deep down in the prison. Those delves can't be opened without proper authorization.

C: 寒鸦大人，各区域武弁正在重整队伍。那些机巧敌人正在到处游走，杀伤了不少同僚。
E: Madam Hanya, the wardens in all areas are regrouping. Those ingenium enemies are wandering around and causing heavy casualties.

C: 眼下情势危急，不是复盘审视的时候。两位，请先助我一臂之力！
E: Let's focus on the current situation right now. Please help me!

C: 寒鸦小姐，时间紧迫，再拖延下去，步离人恐怕将会逃离监狱。
E: Time is running out, Miss Hanya. If we keep delaying, those borisin will escape from the prison.

C: 我们将他们锁死在监狱里。
E: We trap them inside this prison.

C: 如果这就是他们想要的，我随时奉陪！
E: If this is what they want, I'm always up for a challenge!

C: 简单来说，狐人与步离人同宗同源，虽然如今形貌殊异，但二者在基因层面并无太大差别。这种药物能允许步离人暂时变化形骸，以狐人的面貌示人。
E: Simply put, foxians and borisin share a common ancestry. Although they look completely different now, there isn't much genetic difference between them. This medicine allows borisin to temporarily change their shape into that of foxians.

C: 不错，我与这些魔阴身交过手，他们使用云吟术遮掩身形。如果不谨慎观察，无人能察觉他们的行踪。
E: Exactly. I've engaged with these attackers before, and they used cloudhymn magic to hide their presence. Without careful observation, no one can detect them.

C: 就算出师不利也不必担心。一旦猎狼行动结束，许多事情将会真相大白。
E: And don't worry if things don't go smoothly. Once the Wolf Hunt operation is over, the hidden truths will come to light.

C: 在我们最绝望的时候，是长生主的先知「蟒古思」为我们指点迷津。靠她的指引，我们渐渐看到了希望。
E: In our darkest hours, it was a Prophet of the Master of Immortality, named Mangas, who showed us the way. Her guidance brought us hope.

C: 计程槎驾驶员只是每日辛勤载客的平凡人，<color=#eb4d3dff>若是轻举妄动向他求助，无论成功与否，都会引发严重的后果</color>…切记，千万要谨言慎行。
E: The starskiff pilot is just an ordinary but hardworking individual who ferries people from place to place every day. <color=#eb4d3dff>Understand if you thoughtlessly ask him for aid, you will reap severe repercussions regardless if the outcome is a success or failure.</color> ...Remember: Be mindful of your words and actions.

C: 没什么，就问你的船安不安全。
E: Never mind. I just wanted to ask if your starskiff is safe enough.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>我是曜青使节椒丘。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>I'm Jiaoqiu, envoy of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.</color>

C: 真是有步离色彩的神话…
E: How typical. Just another borisin myth...

C: 竞锋舰一切如常，没有特别的状况！
E: No, everything is normal on the ship. Nothing out of the ordinary!

C: 我…我明白了，前线怎么样了？
E: I... I see. How is the front line?

C: 月御将军呢…她有消息吗？我是她的医士，这时候我应该留在她的身边。
E: What about General Yueyu... Any news from her? I'm her healer. I should stay by her side at a time like this.

C: 末度，让我来告诉你步离人如何崛起！我们绝不会像老鼠一样躲藏在仙舟的街巷间，你应当是露出獠牙的饿狼，行走在满是羔羊的牧群。
E: Mok Tok, let me tell you how the borisin will rise to power! We won't hide like rats in the streets of the Xianzhou! We will be ravenous wolves, walking amidst a herd of lambs with our fangs bared.

C: 赐狼以穷途，令其寻得前路。饲狼以死数，令其食能果腹。苟且偷安，无处得生；抵死鏖杀，万世长存……
E: Gift the wolf a dead end, where new paths arise. Raise him to a doomed fate, where satiation lies. The cowards in forgotten corners, meet their unworthy demise. Yet the valorous, in brutal battles, embrace their eternal prize...

C: 竞锋舰
E: Skysplitter

C: 主要是我想象中的竞锋舰是很大的，但是它和我想象的不太一样。
E: Either way, I thought that the Skysplitter would be absolutely huge, so it's not quite how I imagined it.

C: 怎么会这样？好吧，我也是能理解的。
E: Seriously? Ah, alright, I understand...

C: 噗，对不起，我实在表现得不太专业。看来彦卿骁卫也有自己的任务在身啊。那就让我们期待三月小姐在赛场上一展英姿吧。
E: Ah, my apologies, this was very unprofessional of me. I see that Lieutenant Yanqing has his own affairs to tend to. Then let us look forward to seeing a valiant performance from you, Miss March!

C: 我明白了，三月七小姐、云璃小姐，我不是参赛选手，我是负责赛事安保的卫兵。
E: I understand what's going on, Miss March 7th and Miss Yunli. I'm actually not a contestant. I'm just here as a security guard.

C: 现场有厉害的选手来过吗？
E: Did any skilled competitors show up?

C: 你给我专心一点。
E: Hey, focus!

C: 让所有机巧鸟动起来，扫描每个打算出入港口的人。
E: Activate all cycranes and have them scan everyone coming in and out of the port.

C: 等你休假来找我呗？
E: Wanna come find me when you're on vacation?

C: 看来，你的血里不仅有狼的残忍，还兼具了狐的狡诈。
E: I see that it is not only the ruthless blood of a wolf that courses through your veins, but also the cunning blood of a fox.

C: 呼雷万岁！步离人的复兴必将到来！
E: Long live Hoolay! The borisin resurgence is at hand!

C: 对于狩猎而言，秘密是不可或缺的武器。没有秘密的人，只是被撕开皮肉，悲惨等死的猎物。
E: Secrets are a weapon that a hunter cannot live without. Those that have no secrets are no more than prey, cut open and waiting for death.

C: 而唯一的救治之道，在我手中。
E: And the only way to save her is here, in my hands.

C: 仙舟人将吞食与被吞食冠上「邪恶」与「正义」的名目，用这些名目来充当枷锁，铐住你的兽性，驱使你心甘情愿向他们的敌人冲杀。
E: The world is eat or be eaten. The people of the Xianzhou have made up the names "evil" and "justice" to describe these basic truths. They use these names as shackles to chain your wild nature and drive you to willingly slaughter their enemies.

C: 这一处…是你的「恐惧」。
E: This... This is your "fear."

C: 该是回巢的时候了，飞霄。
E: It's time to return to the pack, Feixiao.

C: 现在，我将以你的心兽为武器，以你的名字为猎物…飞霄！
E: Now, I will use your inner beast as my weapon and your name as my prey... Feixiao!

C: 病房就在那边，你们自己过去吧～下次有时间再来找我玩哦！
E: The infirmary is right over there. You can go by yourselves. Come back and visit me when you have time!

C: 我毫无怨言，飞霄，我很满足。
E: I hold no grievances, Feixiao. I am content.

C: 将呼雷的遗体移交曜青仙舟即可，至于向联盟解释的事情，由我来办就好。
E: Hand over Hoolay's remains to the Xianzhou Yaoqing, and I'll handle the explanations to the Alliance.

C: 仙舟联盟数千年未曾变改的目标，我们手中所握的锋镝，也许应该顺势而动，指向新的敌人了。待到仪典结束，我打算向元帅进言上奏此事。
E: The goal of the Xianzhou Alliance has not changed for thousands of years. Perhaps we should point the weapons in our hands toward this new adversary. I plan to bring this matter before the marshal following the Wardance.

C: 诶哟，蒂索克，什么风把你吹过来了？你不是最不爱来这种声色犬马之地了吗？
E: Oho, what winds have brought you here this time, Tizocic? I thought you detested such establishments of sinful pleasures?

C: 时刻当心，灰骑士——人很容易就会被这梦中的声色犬马绊住脚，忘记应行的路在何处。
E: Take heed, Gray Knight — it's easy to be bound in this dream filled with carnal desires, and it's easy to forget where one should go.

C: 时间不早了，二位抓紧时间去准备谈判吧。朕好不容易把你捞出来，别再把正事耽搁了。
E: It's getting late. You two should prepare for the negotiations. Now that I've finally gotten you out, you should return to your business.

C: 嘀嗒！这位「皇帝」似乎有些问题！我的直觉告诉我，她应该遇到了些危险，但不肯和你说！
E: Tick-tock! There's something wrong with the Emperor! My instincts tell me that she's in some sort of danger, but she refuses to tell you!

C: 朕不知道你们在说什么…
E: I don't know what you're talking about...

C: <size=36>够了！</size>
E: <size=36>Enough!</size>

C: 伊里潘，让她哭吧。有什么事，等她情绪平复了再说。
E: Illifan, let her cry. We can wait until after she calms down.

C: 我和你一样想要答案，孩子。我在这片无意义的梦境中滞留太久了。
E: Just like you, I wonder about the same thing. I've been stuck in this meaningless dreamscape for too long.

C: 请您稍等，螺丝咕姆先生。
E: Just a moment, Mr. Screwllum.

C: 这个泡泡…是查德威克？
E: Is this bubble... Chadwick?

C: 因此，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我想向你提出一个请求——我想请你代我将一样东西转交给滞留在梦里的卡尔德隆•查德威克博士。
E: So, I need a favor from you, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}. I'd like you to pass something over to Dr. Calderon Chadwick for me in the dream.

C: <size=28>零。</size>
E: <size=28>Zero...</size>

C: 他怎么会变成这样？
E: How did he end up like this?

C: 科学和技术本身并无善恶观念。过去的几百年里，他一直在为自己年轻时的一个念头「赎罪」。
E: Science and technology is not good or evil. For the past hundreds of years, he's been trying to redeem himself for a thought he had when he was young.

C: 又来了！不过这次的音量…似乎…减弱了一些。
E: It's happening again! But this time, it seems... quieter.

C: 关于你自己…
E: About yourself...

C: 鸟…呵呵，你是说那位「钟表匠」创作的动画片吧。
E: Birds... Heh-heh, you mean the cartoons that the Watchmaker created.

C: 它属于曾经的「折纸筑梦师」费歇尔，也是我的导师——他在晚年时带领我们这些折纸大学的学生一起整理了隐夜鸫的家史资料，这照片应该就是那时放进去的。
E: It once belonged to Origami Dreamweaver Fischer, who was also my mentor. In his later years, he led us Paperfold University students in compiling a family history of the Nightingales. This photo should have been from that time.

C: 他们是「最初的筑梦师」格拉克斯教授的学徒，更是创造十二时刻的传奇筑梦师。如今你目之可及的每一片梦境都留下了他们的手笔。
E: They were students of the first Dreamweaver, Professor Glaux, and legendary Dreamweavers who created the Twelve Hours. What you witness in each Dreamscape is their legacy.

C: 桌上堆着许多建筑的绘画草稿。笔触简略，但已然能看清画面中多座宏伟且奇幻的建筑。
E: The table is strewn with many architectural concept drawings. Their lines are simple, but you can clearly see the many grandiose and fantastical buildings in the drawings.

C: 不，是格拉克斯教授向你发出了邀请——请你正式加入「隐夜鸫」，成为一位筑梦师。
E: No, I'm here because Professor Glaux extended an invitation to you — to officially join the Nightingale Family as a Dreamweaver.

C: 我太久没见过他们的样子了。梦中人无法再次入梦，我连他们的脸都要忘了…就此深陷于梦中，也许就是属于我的完美结局。
E: I haven't seen their faces for so long. Dreamers are unable to enter dreams again. I've almost forgotten their faces... Perhaps being trapped deep in a dream is the perfect ending for me.
...Hey.

C: 又来一个没见过折纸小鸟的镇外人啾。我是流梦礁的「湛蓝爵士」啾。
E: Here comes another outsider that has never seen an origami bird, tweet. I am Dr. Blues from the Dreamflux Reef, tweet.

C: 「『白日梦酒店』竣工开业，第一届谐乐大典成功举办，各位家族成员见证『同谐』化身的降临……」
E: "The completed Reverie Hotel has opened. The inaugural Charmony Festival was successfully held, and all Family members witnessed the descent of the avatar of the Harmony..."

C: 隐夜鸫，多么令人怀念的名字……
E: Nightingales. Such a nostalgic name...

C: 唉，果然你也被外邦人困扰过吧？有的外邦人确实不太守规矩……
E: *sigh* You have been troubled by outlanders too? Some of them really test the law's patience here...

C: 我能不下去吗？
E: Can I not go down?

C: 为什么是我？
E: Why me?

C: 我要买一箱食物。
E: I want a crate of food.

C: 诶？你的意思是……
E: Huh? You mean...

C: 还不等她把话说完，一个人影便急匆匆跑了过来。母女二人识相地选择了回避。
E: Before she can finish her sentence, a figure runs over in a hurry. The mother and child tactfully excuse themselves.

C: 吾师不是穷凶极恶的罪犯！这里面肯定有什么误会……
E: Master is not some nefarious criminal! There must be some misunderstanding...

C: 这不是我能决定的，要看公民法庭会给出怎样的意见。
E: It is not up to me to decide. The public court will handle him.

C: 今天我们聚在这里，是因为受人尊敬的公共讲师，苏克提瑞斯，闯进了圣城仓库行窃。
E: The reason we are gathered here today is that the dearly respected public speaker, Soctires, trespassed on the holy city's warehouse and committed theft.

C: 不说亲自上阵作战，你有出资帮助灾后重建吗？你做到过所谓「奥赫玛人的财产只给奥赫玛人用」吗？
E: Forget about personal deployment — Did you offer resources to help rebuild in the aftermath? Did you hold true to your previous declaration that "Okhema's property is only for Okhemans"?

C: 在对抗黑潮的战争中，怜悯是无用的品质。为了保卫我们的生活，必须对苏克提瑞斯和他的外邦朋友们不留情面！
E: In the war against the black tide, mercy is a useless quality. To safeguard our lives, we must not show mercy to Soctires and his outlander friends!

C: …阿格莱雅？
E: ...Aglaea?

C: 但参与这种讨论是有风险的…民意就像一把火，没人能确定它会被引向何方。
E: But participating in such a debate has its risks... Public opinion is like an open flame, no one can predict where it will be directed.

C: 你认识帕里斯吗？
E: Do you know Paris?

C: 是入侵者！兄弟，咱们快阻止他！
E: Intruder! Brother, we have to stop them!

C: 但先前抵御敌军的将士已然凯旋，您所等待的那位帕里斯不在阵中，已是凶多吉少。
E: But the soldiers who fought off the enemy have already returned triumphant. That Paris that you wait for has not yet returned, which means his fate is likely one of misfortune.

C: 你不害怕我吗？
E: Do you not fear me?

C: …真是无趣而肤浅的话题，在这里继续讨论你的妄想吧，我还是对那边店中的盔甲更感兴趣。
E: ...Such a pointless and shallow topic. Continue indulging in your delusions as you please. I have more interest in the armor in that store over there.

C: 呵呵，循着金丝找到命定之人的位置，像是墨涅塔的寓言一样，是不是很浪漫？
E: Hah, following the golden thread to locate the person you are fated for... it's just like the fable of Mnestia. Don't you think it's romantic?

C: 梦中，我是一只瘦骨嶙峋的狮子，除了捕猎果腹外，没有思考其他事物的能力。
E: In my dream, I am a malnourished, starving lion. I can not think about anything but hunting for food.

C: 迷迷想想办法！
E: Mem, hurry and think of a way!

C: 这里应该就是缇宝说的地方了，但你就连那位大预言家的一根头发都没见着。
E: This should be the place that Tribbie mentioned, but you don't even glimpse a hair of that great soothsayer.

C: 不知道为什么，总感觉有点不爽……
E: I don't know why, but I can't help but feel resentful.

C: 什么玩意儿？
E: What's this?

C: 命运！伟大的命运会庇佑我们！我们终会战胜死亡和纷争，众神的目光将照耀我们荣耀的前路！
E: Fate! Glorious fate will protect us! We will eventually triumph over death and strife. May the gods' gazes shine radiant over our glorious advance!

C: 赞美欧洛尼斯！赞美欧洛尼斯！
E: Praise Oronyx! Praise Oronyx!

C: 可欧洛尼斯的眷属却又引领他们来到神殿，找到了背叛泰坦的圣女。
E: But Oronyx's kin led them again to the temple, where they found the Holy Maiden who betrayed the Titans.

C: 天外之音，不知道为什么，这些呓语明明和它毫无关联，但我却从中找到了它的影子。它是一直在等我回去么……
E: Echoes from beyond the sky — though these sleeptalk seemed unrelated, I discovered a shadow of the Titan within them. Have they been waiting for my return...?

C: （附近就有一位空闲的圣城卫士，也许他会知道些什么？）
E: (There's a city guard nearby that seems free. Maybe he'll know something?)

C: 嗅嗅，啊！我想到了！在很高的地方！接近天空的地方！
E: *sniff sniff* Ah! I know! An elevated place! A place near the skies!

C: 当然，我知道你想问的是结果。不妨这样理解吧，她…只是睡着了。她会重新睁开双眼，变回粉色的忆灵，再度踏上旅程，与你相遇……
E: Of course, I know you just want to hear the outcome. Let me put it this way. She's... just sleeping. Maybe she'll open her eyes again as a pink memosprite and once again embark on a journey to meet you...

C: 对此，我有自己的见解，写在了批注里。如果你对这类问题感兴趣，也可以把它列为自己的课题。
E: I have my own insights on this, which I've written in the annotations. If you're interested in this kind of stuff, you can make it your own research topic.

C: 那是一个囿于轮回，却从不言弃的世界。即便经历永劫的苦难，人们也会踏上相同的道路，做出一样的选择。它超越时间，是真正的「永恒之地」。
E: It is a world bound by cycles, yet also one that never surrenders. Even through eternal suffering, people will walk the same path and make the same choices. Transcending time itself, it is the true "Eternal Land."

C: 听说你找我有事…
E: I heard you have something to tell me...

C: 你在空间站里做的事我也有所耳闻，在我看来你的人品也称得上是这里数一数二的了。
E: I've heard of your deeds in the space station. In my opinion, you're among the best of us.

C: 你是老师还是我是老师？
E: Last time I checked, I am the teacher here, not the other way around.

C: 埃美丽一直都这样，哎。
E: Emily has always been like that.

C: {NICKNAME}，多亏有你在，真是帮了个大忙！
E: Thank goodness you're here, {NICKNAME}. You were a big help!

C: 喔，可能是外力冲击引起的……
E: Oh, that might be because of an external impact...

C: 所以…纯粹就是一场乌龙？根本没有人亲耳听见防盗门说话……
E: So... it's all a big misunderstanding? No one actually heard the security door talk...

C: 我倒是想全都要，但我这发质可经不起这么折腾咯。
E: I do want to try them both, but the quality of my hair won't allow me to experiment too much.

C: 但平时总归有些不太方便吧？
E: But it still gets inconvenient once in a while, right?

C: 乖乖，多亏了你啊，去聚会的时候老姐妹们都夸我，说我现在是个「潮人」了。
E: I have to thank you. My girlfriends at the party all said that I'm a fashionista now.

C: 真是开了眼了，居然就是这么常见的颜色，我总感觉这是否有点……
E: I really learned something today. They're just ordinary colors. I feel maybe this is a bit...

C: 我总结了过去的失败，得出一个结论：错不在我。
E: I've studied my failures and come to one conclusion: It's not my fault.

C: 我…我知道了，下次一定！又被您救了一次，实在是不好意思……
E: I... I will! You saved me again. I can't thank you enough.

C: 走了走了，得趁着「地火」反应过来之前赶紧行动！
E: Let's go! We have to act quickly before Wildfire has a chance to react!

C: 走吧，得赶在「地火」反应过来之前行动！
E: Let's get on with it. We have to act quickly before Wildfire has a chance to react!

C: 派送伊妮丝的快递。
E: Deliver Eunice's package.

C: 哎，我还是稍微添油加醋一下吧。
E: *sigh* I will just embellish the story a bit.

C: …我当然明白你的想法，吉尔伯特。但是这战功勋章可不是我想发给谁就发给谁的啊。
E: ...I certainly get your point, Gilbert. But this medal of merit is not something I can give to anyone I want.

C: 勋章不能外借吗？
E: Can't you just lend him the medal?

C: 那个，你还记得我想寄给老婆女儿的信吗？我昨天总算把它给写完了。
E: Uh, do you remember that letter I wanted to send to my wife and daughter? I finished writing it yesterday.

C: 那就辛苦你了，一会儿见！
E: Thanks again, I'll see you later!

C: 都准备好了。请拿好您的「侯爵夫人」——欢迎下次再光临「长夏」花店。
E: Here are your Marquises. Thanks for the purchase, and have a lovely day!

C: 他脸皮比较薄。
E: He's just too nice to say no.

C: 路过而已，您请继续…
E: Just passing by. Please continue...

C: 也请您相信，这些问题都是非常简单的。如果您有能力完成科学论文，那就一定能轻松答出我出的题目。
E: Please also trust me when I say that these questions are very easy. If you have the skills to complete a scientific thesis, then you should be able to handle a few simple questions from me.

C: 当然，也请您不要气馁，继续加强学习。到那时再来挑战吧。
E: Of course, you shouldn't be discouraged! Keep working on your studies, and then come back to try again.

C: …所以呢？
E: ...So what?

C: 霍华德。
E: Howard.

C: 我想再看一次题面…
E: Let me see the question again...

C: 咦？您是从哪里得到的消息？我完全没听说……
E: Hmm? Where'd you hear that? I haven't heard anything...

C: 喔哦…不愧是波瓦大臣看中的新星，您果然绝顶聪明！
E: Hooboy... you really are Minister Bova's rising star, huh! What an intellect!

C: 就去帮我问问嘛~问不出来也没关系，小女子不会怪你。拜托啦~
E: Just go and ask for me~ If you can't, it's okay and I won't blame you. But please~

C: 结果，现在距约定的时间已过去许久，他人还迟迟未出现…而我得守着这柜台，不方便离开，也无法前去查看他的状况。
E: But it's been long past the time of our appointment, and he's still not here yet. I need to look after the front counter and can't leave, so I can't go see what is happening.

C: 好啊好啊，谢谢你帮忙！这是我的一点心意……
E: Yes, thank you for your help! This is a small token of thanks...

C: 停停停——不许聊工作！你们这帮人…怎么都一个反应呀！
E: Hold it — Don't talk about work! You... Why do you all react in the same way!?

C: 来，看看菜单——想吃什么想喝什么都随便点，我请客！
E: Here's the menu — Order whatever you want. It's my treat!

C: 嚯嚯嚯…真神奇！想不到我这把老骨头还有看到它亮起来的一天…作为报答，老朽就让你看看我的宝贝吧。
E: Ohoho... Amazing! I didn't think my old bones would live to see this light up again... This old one will show you my treasure as a reward.

C: 我的儿子啊…他本想当个法官，哪知道时运不济——最后没了办法，终于挤进了「贝洛伯格供暖」，也算能养活自己了。
E: My son had wanted to become a judge, but these are bad times — He had to settle with a position in Belobog's heating system and make a living that way.

C: 这里很危险，快回家吧。
E: It's very dangerous here. You should head home.

C: …千万别，这不是真的从海上漂过来的，你要扔出去，万一回不来了……
E: ...Please, don't. This didn't actually float across the ocean. What if you throw it out there and it doesn't come back...

C: 你想起了在某些世界里，人们将茶叶放生于海中，间接引发了独立战争…任何放生行为都不可以小觑，今日也是一样。
E: At that moment, you remember that in a certain world, there were people who released tea leaves into the ocean, which indirectly brought about a war of independence... Any release should not be taken lightly, and today is no exception.

C: 我会否定这种自以为是的说法。
E: I disagree with this self-righteous opinion.

C: 我只是想试试不同选项的结果。
E: I just want to see what happens when I try something different.

C: 那么你以后还会遇到这个漂流瓶。
E: Then you shall encounter this drift bottle again.

C: 当然，像我这样自吹自擂可不行，还是得收集一些顾客的建议才好。
E: But of course, boasting about it like this does not a fine tea make. I need feedback and suggestions from my customers.

C: 最近我偶然得到些灵感，先连以滋补药材和新鲜蔬果为配料，栽了好些跟头，好不容易才捣鼓出新的配方。
E: Lately, I've been trying to make something new with fresh herbs, vegetables, and fruits. After some setbacks, I've finally developed a new recipe.

C: 休息区的灯光温暖而柔和，桌上的茶点似乎还冒着热气，但你很确定至少最近几时内都没人来过这里——或许法吉娜的眷顾不仅体现在她的圣水中，还包括这些永远温热的点心。
E: The rest area's lights are warm and cozy, meandering steam rising lazily out of the still piping-hot tea on the table. You are sure though that no one was here in the recent few hours — perhaps Phagousa's grace not only manifests in their sacred water but also in these eternally warm delicacies.

C: 莫非有人躲在墙壁后面轮班演奏——纵横星间的球棒侠，自然不会有这么幼稚的想法。
E: Could musicians be hiding behind the wall and taking turns to play it? The baseballer hero who has traversed stars would naturally not entertain such juvenile conjecture.

C: 塔兰顿的天秤
E: Talanton's Scale

C: 凡人在迷醉时最接近神明，便顺手借走一缕泰坦的灵光。
E: Mortals are closest to gods when they are intoxicated, and take the Titans' brilliance with them.

C: 昔日可容一方军阵的恢弘大道，今连一片落叶也难以负起。
E: The marvelous avenue that once held an army can barely bear the weight of a single fallen leaf these days.

C: 这种闹市，就算您特意乔装，也太容易被认出来——何况您完全没这样的打算。
E: Even if you had disguised yourself, you would be far too easily recognized in a market as busy as this... Not to mention you have no plans to disguise yourself.

C: …不过，道理朕是明白的。如今悬锋看似鼎盛，背后却危机四伏。在未名之敌黑潮的侵袭之下，就连尼卡多利也逐渐失神。
E: ...I understand your reasoning. Though Castrum Kremnos seems to be prospering on the surface, behind the scenes there is danger all around. Even Nikador is gradually losing their mind under the attacks of our faceless enemy, the black tide.

C: 克拉特鲁斯，您当真要离开悬锋城？如今悬锋正值鼎盛，王欧利庞对你又颇为重用，光是王翼冠军的名号就足使万人景仰了。
E: Krateros, are you really going to leave Castrum Kremnos? Kremnos is prospering and King Eurypon places great importance on you. Just the title of King's Aegis is enough to win the admiration of thousands.

C: 在我成为督战勇士的那天，歌耳戈看我的眼神，竟与以往并无二致…在她眼里，我还是一名亲切的旧友。
E: The day I became a Watcher, Gorgo looked me in the eyes exactly as she did back then... In her eyes, I was still her dear old friend.

C: 现在，只差最后一步——戴上王冠，完成你母亲的遗愿，成为新的悬锋之王。
E: Now, there is but one thing remaining... Put on the crown, fulfill your mother's wishes, and become the new King of Kremnos!

C: 怎么就抵挡不住了？
E: Why couldn't you resist?

C: 尽管这只是个「火种匣」，但在某些科幻电影里｢火种｣也是立方体的样子。
E: Though it's just a "Coreflame Box," in some science fiction films, "Coreflames" also take the shape of cubes.

C: 你不会认为光靠这地板就能给你把问题讲清楚吧？
E: You didn't expect the floor to clear up everything for you, right?

C: 呼呼…复杂的问题，令我脑袋燃烧……
E: Phew... Complicated questions make my mind burn...

C: 金色的流体徐徐升起，在装置顶部形成光球。
E: The golden liquid rises steadily, forming a glowing sphere at the top of the device.

C: 圣烛中的金色流体缓缓流转，仿佛在丈量着时间的刻度。
E: The golden liquid within the holy candle flows steadily, as if measuring the very passage of time.

C: 于是在启程前往冥界前，她拥抱了你——除你以外，世间再无他人能承受这道别。如今，你仍能忆起那耳边的轻语，以及空气中淡淡的花香。
E: Before you set off for the nether realm, she embraced you — no one but you could bear this parting. Even now, you can still hear her soft whispers in your ear, the faint scent of flowers lingering in the air.

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>某个莲池中</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>in a lotus pond</color>...

C: 你说话有点不一样。
E: You speak differently.

C: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o「与其在沉默里受辱，不如用豹炸来高呼！豹了！通通豹了！」)∋
E: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "I'm tired of suffering humiliation in silence, I'm going out with a seal-splosion! A seal-tastrophe!" )∋

C: 歌颂…不知…疲倦的…
E: To s—sing... tirelessly...

C: 你左右张望，都没能见到任何人影。既然如此，恐怕只能靠你来一探究竟了——
E: You look around you, but there is no one in sight. It seems that it is up to you to investigate...

C: 「神驹卡咏，带你渡过冥河，去往彼岸」
E: "Divine Steed Kaevo will guide you across the River of Souls to the other shore."

C: ……你来一下！
E: ...Over this way, please!

C: 哇，赛飞儿大姐头，你来真的呀！嘿嘿，让我看看里头——
E: Wow, boss Cipher, you're serious! Hehe, let me see what's inside...

C: 实践又不一定要在自己身上嘛…
E: Wait a second... who says the experiment has to be on yourself?

C: 巨手慢慢靠近木马，它那木质毫无生气的脸上似乎染上了一丝疑惑。在事情变得无可挽回之前，你听到了「它」的声音。
E: The giant hand slowly nears the wooden horse. Its lifeless face seems to show a hint of confusion. Just before things go too far, you hear "its" voice.

C: 这幅壁画记录着「海洋」之泰坦的神迹：孕育汪洋、举办盛宴、降下蜜酿…以及鲜为人知的奉献——阻拦最初的黑潮。
E: This mural depicts the Miracle of Ocean Titan: birthing the ocean, throwing banquets, pouring honey brew... and one lesser-known act of dedication — fending off the first black tide.

C: …我也邀请你与我一同仰望星空，那里有着我们未来的命运，它将决定我们能走多远。
E: Let me invite you to gaze at the stars together. Therein lies our future destiny, the compass of all we may achieve.

C: 清汤大老爷，你、你是来抓我的吗？
E: Honorable judge, are... are you here to arrest me?

C: 经过车主同意了吗？
E: Do you have the approval of the train's owner?

C: 我能够来到这里，就说明你一定认知过「记忆」和「流光忆庭」的概念。你所持有的记忆为忆庭开启了复制的信道，将我植入到你的脑海里……
E: Seeing that I'm able to be here, you must have already come to understand the concept of Remembrance and the Garden of Recollection. The memories that you possess have activated a pathway for the Garden of Recollection to make copies and implant me into your thoughts...

C: {NICKNAME}，你找到什么了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, did you find anything?

C: 我？
E: Me?

C: 哔——啵。
E: Beep — boop.

C: 奥列格兵长已经入驻前线了…他说过您一定会来的！
E: Captain Oleg's already hit the front lines... He said that you'd definitely come!

C: 收、收到，立刻出发！
E: R—Roger! Setting out!

C: 那个，既然您、您来了，我还是把最近的战况传、传达出来吧……
E: Then seeing as y—you're here, I may as well pass on the l—latest battle intel...

C: 但我们不会放弃。只要还有明天，我们就会坚持战斗下去。
E: But we cannot give up. As long as there's a tomorrow, we will continue with our fight.

C: （刚刚是你在求救吗？）
E: (Were you calling for help just now?)

C: 是「管家」偷的。
E: It was the butler.

C: （我们要找到「管家」要回奇物……）
E: (We have to find the butler and retrieve the Curio...)

C: 开启同步模式。
E: Activate sync mode.

C: 造物向你使了个眼色，暗示你「管家」不让它多说。
E: The creation gives you a look that indicates the "butler" did not permit it to say too much.

C: 啊？这这这，这是真的吗？
E: Ah? Is this true!?

C: （<color=#dbc291ff>我们还是绕去另一边</color>吧，那边的感应门是正常的。）
E: (<color=#dbc291ff>Let's go around to the other side, </color>where the motion sensor door is working as normal.)

C: 佩佩解除了同步。
E: Peppy desynchronized.

C: 你本想大摇大摆地走进去，但佩佩伸出短短的小腿拦住了你。
E: You want to saunter off, but Peppy stops you with its short legs.

C: 刚出生不久。
E: I'm a newborn.

C: 还不是因为断章…
E: Isn't it just because of cliffhangers...?

C: 这你都记得？
E: You actually remembered that?

C: 在思考我的事。
E: I'm thinking about my own things.

C: （一声挑衅的*哼*）
E: (Let out a provocative grunt)

C: 公输师傅照旧摆了个身段，眉毛一挑，似在暗示你要夸奖「匣里流光」一番。
E: Master Gongshu poses as usual and raises his eyebrow as if he is implying that you should praise Luminflux Pyxis.

C: 不说这个了，咱们开始吧。
E: Enough of the talking. Let's get started.

C: …这点子真不错，妙啊、妙啊。
E: ...Such a great idea.

C: 好啊，但我不能白干活。
E: Okay, but I don't just work for free.

C: 听说你曾经为符玄大人启动过阵基，如何操作应该不需要我多费唇舌了吧。
E: I heard you once started up a base terminal for Master Fu Xuan, so I shouldn't have to waste my breath telling you how to operate things.

C: 彩票不是捕捉穿越者的陷阱吗？
E: Isn't the lottery really just bait to apprehend illegal time travelers?

C: 我就想知道知道。
E: I just wanna know, though.

C: 那我肯定不会输。
E: Then I definitely won't lose.

C: 所以，要开始战斗了吗？
E: So, are you ready for another round?

C: 你的能力真是神奇，居然能把我救回来！
E: Your skills are like magic! You actually fixed me!

C: 在哪里开发不是开发呢？在工造司的工位上，在丹鼎司的病房里，在十王司的牢房里，其实开发环境都差不多的。
E: Why not? Whether in the workplace of the Artisanship Commission, the hospital ward of the Alchemy Commission, or the cell of the Ten-Lords Commission, the environment for game development is similar.

C: 而你，游客，你现在站在我的面前，即将为我解开这个死结。
E: And you, my guest, you now stand before me, about to untangle this knot for me.

C: 滴答。故障修复了，我的心魔也消散得无影无踪！
E: Tick-tock. The fault has been fixed. My inner demon has been completely vanquished!

C: 「诸事顺利。」
E: "All things will be smooth-sailing."

C: 嗯，你开心就好！顺便，刚才占卜的时候，交班的人发消息说他掉进喷泉里了。
E: Sure, as long as you're happy! Also, during the divination, the replacement student sent a message saying that he fell into the fountain.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 嗯…有位织者十分虔诚，仍试图倾听众神的指引。金丝带来消息，它正位于一座<color=#dbc291ff>神龛前…的石柱下</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... a weaver is devout, still attempting to heed the gods' guidance. The golden thread brings tidings: It is located at a <color=#dbc291ff>column... in front of a shrine</color>. Go look for it there.

C: 嗯…有位织者怀念过去，感时伤悲。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>对面不远的花丛中</color>，藏匿于花丛中。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who grows wistful with memories of the past, often touched by quiet sorrow. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie hidden <color=#dbc291ff>within the flower bush opposite, not far from here</color>.

C: 我找齐了这里的全部若虫。
E: I have gathered all the nymphs here.

C: 多谢你了，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 唉…希望您永远没有这样的体验。一向仰赖的才能在刹那间被抽走，滴水不漏的手法顿时漏洞百出，自己好像不是自己了似的。
E: Ah... I hope you never have to experience something like that. The talents that I have relied on over the years vanished in an instant. My once perfectly watertight handiwork was suddenly full of holes... It's like I wasn't even myself.

C: 一次也没能得手的小贼。
E: A petty thief that's never succeeded.

C: 我就是用这个法子，偷到了一个难以想象的秘密…也正因如此，咱现在才得以站在你的面前。
E: I used just this method to steal an unimaginable secret... Which is also the reason why I'm standing here before you.

C: 我急了吗？您可别胡说。要是有其他想聊的，我乐意奉陪；但要是再对这事喋喋不休，可别怪我要和你比划比划！
E: Am I? Nonsense. I am more than happy to acquiesce if you wish to speak on other things. But if you keep persisting on this matter, don't blame me for what happens next!

C: 你好像有点急了…
E: You sound agitated...

C: 扎格列斯还说过什么？
E: What else did Zagreus say?

C: 看样子，这箱子很有价值。
E: Seems like this chest is actually QUITE valuable.

C: 不错，识时务者为俊杰。
E: Smart move. Know when to yield.

C: 桀桀，没想到吧，这里也有我巴特鲁斯的身影。
E: Hehehe, didn't expect to run into me here, did you?

C: 巴特鲁斯这会儿很虚无。你知道为什么吗？
E: You know what? My mind is going places it shouldn't. Care to take a guess?

C: 不至于吧…就这种朦胧诗？
E: Really? She couldn't be sure about these misty poems?

C: 不知道。但按照有限的情报推断，最有可能的…是那个毁灭树庭的恐怖剑士。除了那缺乏理智的黑潮怪物，没人会故意去毁坏「瑟希斯之心」。
E: I'm not sure. But based on the limited information we have, the most likely culprit is the terrifying swordmaster who destroyed the Grove. Other than the mindless monsters of the black tide, no one else would deliberately damage the "Heart of Cerces."

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}啊，请指引我们——
E: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us —

C: 阁下，你这是……
E: Um, what brings you here?

C: 「欧洛尼斯，我呼唤你！——激起往西的涟漪！」
E: "Oronyx, I summon thee! Stir up ripples of past referee!"

C: 哗啦，滚过头了。
E: *whoosh* It rolled too far.

C: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
E: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

C: 可…成为「清洗者」虽然能够继承大量知识和记忆，却也意味着自己独有的记忆将被淡化、抹去。
E: But... becoming a Cleaner means inheriting vast knowledge and memories — at the cost of losing your own.

C: 有人托我来救你。
E: Someone sent me to find you.

C: 呃啊…时间不多了，拜托您抓紧时间看下一个匣子吧！
E: Ugh... Time is running out. Please, let's move on to the next Casket!

C: 不必看了…这不是装余火的匣子。我已经想起余火在哪里了。
E: No need to check... This isn't the right Casket. I remember where the ember is now.

C: 那刻夏证明过。我相信他。
E: Anaxa proved it's possible. I believe in him.

C: 哦，说来简单，就是模拟星神并向祂们发问。
E: Oh, in layman's terms, it will simulate the Aeons THEMSELVES. Then we can ask THEM questions.

C: 关于「模拟宇宙」内容…
E: About the content of the Simulated Universe...

C: 我会为你提供更多帮助。
E: I'll help you out some more. Don't worry.

C: 「是呀。当你想面面俱到的时候，事情就会越变越复杂。做减法是一门艺术，目前我们还不打算搞艺术。」
E: "Yup, things get more complicated when you try to cover all your bases. Minimalism is a real art form, and we're not doing enough of it right now."

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: 为了延长流程，系统加入了「区域」这个概念。现在穿过传送门，我们去下一个区域。
