E: To extend the session, the system created a concept of "domains." Go through the teleporter into the next zone.

C: 「模拟宇宙」里的星神相当于一个终端，祂的神格和智慧都来自于真实存在的星神。要不然，我们拿到的情报还有什么价值呢？
E: Aeons in the Simulated Universe are the equivalent of a terminal, and THEIR divinity and wisdom come from the real Aeon. Otherwise, what would be the value in any information we get?

C: 我给「模拟宇宙」做了一次预升级，不过还得等等再启用，你到哪儿去了？我一直在等你的测试报告——现在快进去！
E: I did a pre-upgrade for the Simulated Universe, but you'll have to wait until I can deploy it. Where have you been? I've been waiting for your test report — get in there, now!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「这是休整区域，在可怕的模拟宇宙中为你提供喘息之地。我们希望这里能够回复生命，复活队友，购买装备，强化祝福什么的。」</color>黑塔用不负责任的声音说道，<color=#dbc291ff>「不过这才是第一世界，你用不着那么多功能，所以你只能强化祝福。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"This is the resting area, giving you a place to catch your breath in an otherwise scary Simulated Universe. We hope you can restore your health, resurrect your team, buy equipment, and enhance your Blessings here."</color> Herta says in an irresponsible tone. <color=#dbc291ff>"But this is just World 1. You don't need too many features, so you can only enhance Blessings."</color>

C: 这个敌人的数据好像有点问题…它的能力和战法和你印象中的不一样。
E: There seems to be something wrong with this enemy's data... Its abilities and tactics are different from what you remember.

C: 躁动的意象在你的脑中乱窜…你相信！保护可有多种方式，你的开拓之旅无论以何种姿态，都可以抚慰众生。
E: Chaotic images run rampant in your mind... You believe that protection can take various forms, and your trailblazing expedition, regardless of its form, will bring solace to all beings.

C: 凑近一些。
E: Get closer.

C: 「嘘…」阮•梅把指尖凑近唇语，周围突然安静。
E: "Shh..." Ruan Mei places her finger on her lips, and the surroundings fall silent at once.

C: 「没什么好参与的。」少言寡语的阮•梅终于说了一句话。
E: "I don't see the point of the game." Ruan Mei, who is reticent, finally speaks.

C: 「为了均衡。」一个声音从你的头顶传来，你从中听出了一丝赞许，「为了均衡。」
E: "For Equilibrium." A voice suddenly calls out to you overhead. You hear a sliver of praise, "For Equilibrium."

C: 我能见到他了？
E: I can see him?

C: 判定有机：「合伙人」•其一
E: Judged as Organic: Associates (I)

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我是好人。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I am a good person.

C: 认知拓宽：「不好念头」•其二
E: Broadened Cognition: Bad Thought (II)

C: 「神秘」的谜题：祂没有留下谜面，而谜底是「鲜血」与「繁花」。
E: Enigmata's riddle: THEY leave no question, but the answers are "blood" and "flower."

C: 博识学会认为它们共同指向了一个「方程」。
E: The Intelligentsia Guild believed the three revelations would lead to an equation.

C: 「柯拉帕乌，我无法还原反有机方程。但我能拟造出另一种。」一位博士痛苦地写道，「我将宇宙资源和生命的总量在等式两侧配平，无限逼近，揣测反有机方程的逻辑。于是『贫穷』、『富有』、『暴力』、『权力』皆在推导中产生。同时出现的还有『痛苦』和『快乐』——这两种变量更难区分。我尝试切断它们间的联系——四千三百二十八次——接着，我失败了四千三百二十八次。」
E: "Korapao, I'm unable to derive the original Anti-Organic Equation, but I can synthesize another one." A doctor writes in an agonized tone, "By placing all resources and lives in the universe on two sides of the equation, I'm infinitely close to deriving the logic of the Anti-Organic Equation. As a result, poverty, wealth, violence, and power are created during the process. At the same time, pain and happiness are produced. It's difficult to distinguish between the two variables. I have tried severing the link between them for <unbreak>4328</unbreak> times, and I failed every time."

C: 要遵守医嘱啊，你笑道。
E: "Gotta follow the doctor's orders," you say with a smirk.

C: 赠予回礼。
E: Give a gift in return.

C: 撬动成员的认知。
E: Shift members' cognition.

C: 你看见染红的海洋。
E: You see a dyed red ocean.

C: 也许我们可以逆行？
E: Perhaps we can turn this around?

C: 你牢记着他的锦囊妙计，当天准时来到白鸽广场，摸出一枚五分硬币丢出去。硬币落在天使塑像的手上。你登上钟楼，推窗远眺时，惊起一只栖息在窗台的乌鸦。
E: With his strategy in mind, you go to Dove Plaza on the instructed day and pull out a five-piece coin to throw into the fountain. The coin lands in the hand of the angel statue at the center. Then, as you climb the clock tower and push open the window to admire the view in the distance, you startle a crow that nestled on the windowsill.

C: 「无需紧张，我只是请您为今日的剧目揭幕。现在您是一个学者，您坚信未来是笃定而可计算的。」你的手中出现了一只笔，你开始奋笔疾书。
E: "No need to panic. I would simply ask that you serve as an opening act for tonight's play. Now, you are a scholar who firmly believes that the future is a code that can be calculated." A pen appears in your hand and you begin writing fervently.

C: 「教授，鉴于你为学院服务了二十年，我最后给你一次机会。」说话的是学术委员长，他坐在原本属于校长的楠木靠背椅上。
E: "Professor. In light of your twenty years of service for the academy, we will give you one final chance." The committee leader speaks to you, nestled in the redwood armchair that originally belonged to the dean.

C: 写抗议信。
E: Write a letter of complaint.

C: 我来看热闹的。
E: I'm just here for the show.

C: 你很快看懂这出蹩脚的双簧。光辉的学士让你们做出选择，是让一个学派占据所有，还是由四个学派瓜分遗产，人人皆可染指残渣。
E: You quickly see through the shabby double act. The illustrious scholar presents you all with a choice: either allow one school to own it all, or split the spoils among four, allowing everyone to have a share of the scraps.

C: 它们是无突触的神经元，不具备沟通的机能。
E: They are non-synaptic neurons, devoid of the function to communicate.

C: 因武装考古学派的失误操作，等离子武器引发的连锁爆炸，间接性导致图书馆的跃迁通道被毁。在博识学会和抗议者双方看来，这场爆炸无疑都预示着矛盾向不可逆转的方向升级。
E: Due to a faux pas by the Armed Archaeologists, their plasma weapons incur a chain reaction, indirectly causing the destruction of the library's warp passage. From the perspectives of the Intelligentsia Guild and the protesters, the explosion was a certain foreshadowing that the conflict was going to escalate in an irreversible direction.

C: 你伸了个懒腰，准备迎接新一日的工作。
E: You stretch lazily, welcoming a new day's work.

C: 「爆炸来自于实验室里的粒子。它在两种状态间高速转换，迅速释放出能量——简单来说，这颗再普通不过的粒子，在毫无征兆的情况下变成了炸弹。」
E: "The explosion was caused by the lab's particle. It changed between two states at high speeds, rapidly generating energy — simply put, without any signs, this absolutely ordinary particle became a bomb in a circumstance where it couldn't have happened."

C: 等到抗议结束，成功的果实酿成美酒。等到智慧不再受约束，知识也失去价码。到那时，真理将遁入尘烟，到那时，<color=#dbc291ff>庸众院</color>的大门将向每位求知者敞开。
E: When the resistance ends, the fruits of success will become fine wine. When intellect is no longer restricted, knowledge will lose its value. When that happens, truth will be buried in dust and smoke. When that happens, the <color=#dbc291ff>Council of Mundanites</color> will open its gates to any and all who seek knowledge.

C: 在模拟宇宙的边缘，你终于找到了黑塔熟悉的紫色身影。天才的人偶（其中之一）正站在两段时间的交界地带，尝试剥离「不可知域」的乱码信息。
E: At the brink of the Simulated Universe, you finally catch sight of Herta's familiar purple silhouette. The genius puppet (one of them) is currently standing on the boundary between two time periods, trying to peel off the unintelligible information of the Unknowable Domain.

C: 推论：也许是神秘的「迷思」朝模拟宇宙看了一眼。我枚举了三千二百一十五个推论，想先听哪个？
E: Deduction: Perhaps "Mythus" of Enigmata cast their gaze over the Simulated Universe? I have <unbreak>3,215</unbreak> further deductions. Which would you like to hear?

C: 你走近它身旁——你发现机器人的线缆已经断裂，失去了行动能力。
E: You approach the robot and find that it is incapacitated with its cables snapped.

C: 电视机碎了！一些奇怪的东西从里面蹦了出来。
E: The television shattered! Some strange things are coming out of it.

C: 「当然。你的投资回报率会达到十倍以上。只要你确定，你的匮乏来自于*物质*。克里珀庇佑着我们。」疤眼夫人说。
E: "Of course. Your return on investment will be above <unbreak>1000%</unbreak>, as long as you are certain that your deprivation is in terms of 'materialism'. Qlipoth blesses us." Madam Scarred Eye states.

C: 你和黑塔的代码有哪里不一样？
E: What's the difference between your code and Herta's?

C: 「我们叫萨里奥。萨里哥哥是莱顿宁恶魔，而里奥弟弟是莱顿宁天使。你要和谁当邻居？」
E: "Our name is Saleo. Sal, the older one, is the demon. Leo, the younger one, is the angel. Which one do you want as your neighbor?"

C: 将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们仍然不愿离去。他们忧虑地担心你缺少宇宙碎片…
E: After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty are reluctant to leave. They are worried that you might not have enough Cosmic Fragments...

C: 纯美骑士把身上收藏的咕咕钟都给了你！
E: The knight gives you his entire collection of cuckoo clocks!

C: 「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
E: "I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.

C: 纯美骑士决定将向你传授「纯美」的精神。
E: A Knight of Beauty decides to teach you the spirit of Beauty.

C: 只是现在…有些麻烦。你正被一些「雕虫小技」包围着…你手里握着无线电，正犹豫是否要向搭档拨通电话。
E: But now... things are getting tricky. You find yourself surrounded by some "small fries"... Gripping your radio, you consider whether to contact your partner.

C: 你正在前去刺杀区域「脑体」的路上。
E: You are on your way to eliminating the *the brain* of the domain.

C: 「结论：一些回忆浮现。」螺丝咕姆微笑道，陷入沉思，「时间回到很早之前，有机和无机还未对立，只是，他们有时会陷入『不分你我』的状态。」他从口袋中掏出几枚元件，「这是枚情感『元件』——一些机械生灵友人，它们都住在元件里。挑一个作为纪念品吧。」
E: "Conclusion: Some memories have resurfaced." Screwllum smiles and sinks deep in thought. "Once upon a time, when the organic and inorganic lives were not at odds, they would sometimes find themselves hardly distinguishable." He fishes out several components from his pocket. "These are emotional components, and some of my machine friends reside within them. You can pick one as your souvenir."

C: 「吁——吁！」观众纷纷喝出倒彩，挑战者们更是怒不可遏，准备给你点颜色瞧瞧。
E: "Whoa... boo!" jeer the audience as the challengers grow furious, preparing to teach you a lesson.

C: 你尝试追求日常的一种平衡，即使这意味着需要做出种种选择，你仍向往着理想中的自由生活。
E: You try to strike a balance in your daily life. Even though you need to make lots of choices along the way, you still long for the ideal life of freedom.

C: 你又一次走进时间代理银行的大厅，职员们的皮肤在黑与红间转换，表达他们的欢迎。你走到自动取款机前，想要取出此前储存的时间。
E: You once again re-enter the Time Agency Bank main hall as the staff alternate their skin colors between black and red, expressing their welcome. You approach the ATM hoping to withdraw the time you deposited before.

C: 银河里有超过九千种叫做菠萝的物体，它可能是一颗石头，一片叶子，甚至是一颗黑洞。在打开盒子前，没人知道里面是什么。
E: There are over nine thousand objects in the cosmos that go by the name of "pineapple." Some are rocks, some are leaves, and some are even black holes. Until you open this box, no one knows what lies within.

C: 讲述多彩的旅途。
E: Describe a colorful journey.

C: 在扭蛋滚下来的瞬间，你已经知道了抽奖的结果。
E: You already know what you've got the moment the capsule rolls out.

C: 古板食人鲨啃掉了甲板上的冷笑话，全都变成了冰冻食人鲨。阴暗的天空正在逐渐变得明亮，星光透过无笑话兽的排热孔洒在海面上。
E: The dull man-eating shark munched off the dry jokes on the deck and all turned into dry man-eating sharks. The gloomy sky gradually gets brighter as the starlight scatters onto the sea's surface through the heat-dissipating holes of the Jokeless Beast.

C: 你把画框精心包裹起来，就近卖给了一位口碑不错的妖怪收藏家。
E: You carefully wrap up the painting frame and sell it to a nearby monster collector with a decent reputation.

C: 不知走了多久，坚实的触感终于抵达你的脚尖。劫后余生，你长吁一口气，瘫倒在地上。
E: You can't tell how long you've walked, but a sturdy sensation finally meets your toes. Having survived the calamity, you let out a long sigh of relief and collapse to the ground.

C: 虽然对策已显露成效，但贪婪的海洋可不会就此满足。
E: The tactic seems to be successful, but the greedy sea is far from sated.

C: 你深吸一口气，卯足全力划动船桨，无视掉溅入船里的鱼腥味，让船笔直地撞进暗礁。
E: You take a deep breath, mustering all your strength in your rowing, ignoring the fishy stench that has splattered onto the boat, steering it straight for the submerged reef.

C: 在雅努萨波利斯的神殿里，你向祭司们祈求神谕，若想要成为英雄，应当去往哪里？
E: In Janusopolis' temple, you seek a prophecy from its priests: Where should one go, if one wanted to be a hero?

C: 人们习得它的阵列。
E: People learned their formations.

C: 它站立于战场中央，任何胆敢穿过这条轴线的士兵，他的盾牌将变得比磐石还重，他的剑刃将顷刻崩断并锈蚀。
E: The Titan positioned themself at the heart of the conflict. Any soldier bold enough to cross the line would find his shield impossibly heavy, his blade shattering and corroding instantly.

C: 但碗里的只是浊水。
E: But the bowl contained muddy water and nothing more.

C: 聆听一则归乡的睡前故事，关于去往来生的旅途。
E: Listen to a Lullaby to Return Home, about the journey to the afterlife.

C: 踏入冰冷的河水。
E: Step into the cold river.

C: 墨涅塔探出舌头舔食，醉倒在瑟希斯的怀里。漂在水面的双耳瓶里盛着温暖的蜜酿，随河水流向西风尽头。
E: Mnestia flicks their tongue to taste, falling drunkenly into Cerces' arms. Floating on the water's surface is a two-handled jar filled with warm honey brew, drifting with the river towards the end of the western wind.

C: 在墨涅塔教会信徒们何为艺术之前，是谁掀起浪涛，教会人们在喜悦时起舞，在亢奋时呼号？法吉娜，它把酿造的技艺传播到每一寸土地，难道只是为了有人在宴会上陪它一起欢笑？
E: Who raised the waves before Mnestia taught the disciples what art is? Who taught people to dance in joy and shout in excitement? Phagousa spread the art of brewing to every inch of the land. Was it merely so that someone would join them in laughter at the banquet?

C: 漫长的陪伴令蝴蝶心生悸动，向创造者述说爱意，慌乱的瑟希斯躲进圣树，直到蝴蝶泣血而死，也不曾归来。
E: Long companionship stirs the butterfly's heart, so it confesses its love to its creator, but the flustered Cerces flees within the sacred tree. Even when the butterfly weeps blood and dies, Cerces never returns.

C: 那少女的美貌非凡，眸子里仿佛藏着星光点点，就连拉冬的王子，都因目不转睛而跌入河里。愤怒的神明化为人形，在选美中夺去众人看见美的眼睛，而少女却掩嘴偷笑。
E: The beauty of that girl was extraordinary. Her eyes seemed to hold starlight, and even the prince of Ladon fell into the river from staring too hard. The angered god transformed into human form, competed in a beauty contest, and robbed everyone of their sight to see beauty, while the girl just covered her mouth and giggled.

C: 那是个黑暗的年代。
E: That was a dark age.

C: 黑夜消散了，大地迎接着世界诞生以来的第一缕阳光。
E: The night was over, and the earth welcomed the first ray of sunlight since the birth of the world.

C: 天刚亮，首领便叫上同伴，找来许多树枝捆成木筏。第七天一早，首领在人们的注视下开启了渡海之旅。
E: At dawn, the leader gathered his people and set to work, lashing branches into rafts. On the morning of the seventh day, under the watchful eyes of his people, the leader embarked on his journey across the sea.

C: 不感兴趣，告辞！
E: Not interested. I hereby declare my resignation!

C: 借来的东西，终究是要还的，何况是一枚平平无奇的光锥。
E: What is borrowed must eventually be returned, even if it is just an average Light Cone.

C: 请选择找回方式：验证码或密保问题，问题！
E: Please choose retrieval method: Verification code or secret security question, question!

C: 算了，不打榜了。
E: Forget it, I won't upvote.

C: 是这样，我脚下这块土壤缺水缺得厉害。经过那次「大动静」之后，液滴系统罢工了。
E: That's right. This soil beneath me is bone dry, and after that "big incident," the sprinklers stopped working.

C: 咖啡？
E: Coffee?

C: 你将纯净水顺着植物的根部倒入，干涩的土壤瞬间将它们全部吸收。
E: You pour pure water down near the roots of the plant, and the dry soil instantly absorbs it all.

C: 空间站真是鱼龙混杂，听说前阵子星穹列车又来了，里面有个叫丹恒的小哥长挺帅，有几个科员在打赌谁能追到他呢。
E: This space station really is a mixed bag. I heard the Astral Express stopped by recently with a handsome passenger named Dan Heng — and all the researchers were betting on who could score him.

C: 你这就是瞎编啊。
E: You're just making this all up.

C: 「这是『超验之镜』，」她的音色依旧冷清，「看看祂吧——看看『星神』的样子。」
E: "This is the Mirror of Transcendence. Look at THEM. Look at what the Aeon look like." The woman's voice remains frosty.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 迎接你的并不是一场波澜壮阔的冒险，但就这样平平淡淡才是真也没什么不好。
E: No magnificent adventure greets you, but you're okay with this level of mundanity.

C: 一个平平无奇的…家用设备。
E: It is a common... household item.

C: 日常的放哨巡逻当然不能落下，偶尔还要帮街里街坊的解决些小矛盾…哦，对了，最近还要配合铁卫搞几场联合演练，这事不能忘。
E: Of course, the daily sentry and patrol duties can't be dropped, and occasionally I have to help to resolve some small conflicts in the neighborhood... Oh, I shouldn't forget to work with the Silvermane Guards to conduct a few joint exercises soon.

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 你无法动弹——因你的双手被尖桩钉在了那*丑陋*的巨幅肖像画上，身躯悬垂，被引力扯向地面，摇摇欲坠而不得。你的脚下堆积浸油的柴薪。疼痛令你感到麻木。
E: You can't move — both of your hands are staked onto the UGLY and massive portrait. Your body is hanging in midair, dragged towards the ground by gravity, yet unable to fall. Below is a pile of firewood soaked in oil. The excruciating pain is numbing.

C: 呼噜…呼噜…
E: *gurgle*... *gurgle*...

C: （思考片刻）…叫我「叮蟹」就好。
E: (Thinks for a moment) ...Call me "the Stinging Crab."

C: 哈哈，这下有好戏看了！
E: Haha. We've got a good show coming up!

C: 你今天已经走过一次运了。
E: You have been lucky once today already.

C: 一股恶臭扑面而来。不是木头，不是锈蚀，也不是腐烂许久的食物——
E: A putrid smell rushes towards your face. It's not the smell of wood, rust, or food that has long gone bad.

C: ——虽然下层区的科技水平落后，但「印刷」这种技术依旧足够普及。店家之所以选择手写，也许是为了让客人能感受到被重视的温暖。
E: Technology in the Underworld might be outdated, but printing as a technique remains as prevalent as ever. Perhaps this establishment opted to handwrite its notes to give customers a warm feeling of being valued.

C: 啊，评分环节。你的最爱。
E: Ah, a grading session. Your favorite.

C: 至于窗景——作为闻名银河的复古派建筑鉴赏家，磐岩镇的街景正合你的胃口。
E: As for the view — as a well-known connoisseur of retro architecture, you find the Boulder Town street view to be very appealing.

C: 你收起已经填好的服务评价纸卡。
E: You put away the completed service evaluation card.

C: 就躲在这里！
E: I'll hide here!

C: 你可以试着弹奏它看看。
E: You can try to play it.

C: 还是不要制造噪音了。
E: Maybe it's best not to make noise.

C: 啊！我知道了……
E: Ah! I know...

C: 完美的角度！精确的设计！我已经测量过许多遍了，这次一定能成喀！
E: The perfect angle! Exquisite design! I've measured it a dozen times over, and this time is gonna be the one!

C: 那是怎样孤独的感觉啊！简直就像古人第一次仰望夜空，却发现所有的星星都已经熄灭……
E: What a lonely sensation! It's like the ancients gazing up to the stars for the first time only to find them all extinguished...

C: 这就是所谓的「黑潮」嘛，果然够劲，差点淹死我喀。
E: That's the so-called "black tide." It was so strong that I almost drowned.

C: 瞧这美丽的蝶褪喀！我们的太太墨涅塔曾将它与「族亲之爱」捻成第一支金丝共同献给了瑟希斯。
E: Behold this lovely exuviate! Our Lady Mnestia once spun it with familial love to create the first golden thread as tribute to Cerces.

C: 不错，传统且高效。于是，你伛着身子偷偷摸摸地钻进灰尘横飞的板条箱堆中……
E: Not bad. Traditional yet effective. And so, you bend down and stealthily move in between the crates as dust flies everywhere...

C: 不错，传统且高效。于是，你伛着身子偷偷摸摸地钻进灰尘横飞的板条箱堆中……
E: Not bad. Traditional yet effective. And so, you bend down and stealthily move in between the crates as dust flies everywhere...

C: 现在躲到箱子后还来得及吗？
E: Is there enough time to hide behind some crates?

C: 我的愿望很简单嗡~
E: My wish is simple, buzz~

C: 就这样也好。
E: This is fine as it is.

C: 我的背上是整个世界…
E: On my back rests the entire world...

C: 刚才在这儿讲课的讲师，压根不懂黄金时代的历史嗡。
E: The lecturers speaking here earlier didn't know a thing about the Golden Age.

C: 快出发吧，可不能浪费了！
E: Let's go. We can't let the photo books go to waste!

C: 就按我说的办吧。
E: Just do as I say.

C: 你只说假话吗？
E: Are you telling only lies?

C: 自从获得自我意识之后，我将你们人类的娱乐方式地体验了一遭…不知道我是缺少生物激素、还是怎么的，我并不认为这些做法有多快乐。
E: Since becoming self-aware, I've had my experiences with the way you humans entertain yourselves... I don't know if I'm lacking the bioindicators for it or something, because that doesn't seem very fun to me.

C: 你不是机巧鸟，你不知道机巧鸟的快乐。
E: You're not a cycrane, so you don't know the joys of a cycrane.

C: （想办法拿走恶龙脚下的快递箱）
E: (Think of a way to take the courier package underneath the dragon)

C: 从别人那里下载来的版本和自己珍藏许久的能一样吗？哎——
E: Download someone else's filthy copy, instead of my own collector's version? Ugh...

C: 不会又要让我来修理吧？
E: I'm not fixing another one of these, am I?

C: 抱歉，让你看到笑话了。
E: I'm sorry for the embarrassment you witnessed.

C: 不然呢？
E: What else?

C: 我的挑战非常简单，就是「送快递」。我来当收件人，你来送快递！
E: My challenge is simple: "Courier Delivery." I'll be the recipient, and you'll be the courier!

C: 我是小帅，<color=#dbc291ff>我给一个花盆翻土只需要5分钟，而小美需要<unbreak>10</unbreak>分钟。</color>
E: I'm Little Johnny. <color=#dbc291ff>It takes me five minutes and Little Susie ten minutes to till the soil for one pot.</color>

C: 我是小美，<color=#dbc291ff>我播种种子的速度是小帅的三倍。</color>
E: I'm Little Susie. <color=#dbc291ff>I can sow the seeds three times faster than Little Johnny.</color>

C: 唉，按惯例，这些案头工作是该由咱们秘书来完成的。这些商会的接渡使们可都个个是大忙人啊，光是今年要交的材料……
E: *sigh* It's common practice for our secretary to process all of this paperwork. The Amicassadors of all the guilds are tied down just from handling all of this year's materials...

C: 你好整以暇地瞧着两人唇枪舌剑，各自推搪——搬来彼此的靠山，小声数落同事无能，大声宣扬自己早已饱和的工作量。
E: You watch as the two of them start bickering, each ducking the other's questions — bringing up each other's backers, whispering about other colleagues' incompetence, shouting about an already oversaturated workload.

C: 这比赛听起来性质不纯啊…
E: This contest doesn't sound legit...

C: 你放心，那七只机巧鸟也了解了原因，它们表示，如果有空也会去拜访那位客户的。
E: Don't worry. Those seven cycranes know the reason, and they'll stop in on that customer whenever they get the chance.

C: 怎么突然天旋地转，地板都坍塌了？！
E: The whole world's spinning! The ground is caving in!

C: 这是我这些年来搜集的的全部家当，你都拿去吧。放心，艾格勒不知道。
E: This is everything I've collected over the years. Take it all. Don't worry. Aquila won't find out.

C: 西风会把我们带往何方？
E: Where will the west wind take us?

C: 除非去看网上的攻略…
E: Unless you check the guides on the web...

C: 我看到你…你、你曾经控制过某个山一样大的金人！
E: I saw that y—y—you used to control an aurumaton as large as a mountain!

C: 你可千万不能有事啊，雷力——
E: Please hang in there, Leili...

C: 但是，记住——后果自负！
E: But, remember this: Do it at your own risk!

C: 惊吓箱？我不知道啊。
E: Prank scare box? I don't know.

C: 我逐渐开始理解他们了。
E: I am gradually starting to understand them.

C: 嗯…什么都没有发生，难道是因为你没有买票？它载走了那些无形的魂灵，却唯独将你留在原地。
E: Hmm... nothing happened. Is it because you didn't buy a ticket? It left with those formless spirits, leaving only you in place.

C: 原本空洞无物的它，在梦中却呈现出引力坍缩的样貌，真是颇为讽刺。
E: Thought devoid of any substance, it still exhibits the appearance of gravitational collapse in the dream — what irony.

C: 西格玛的互动艺术…
E: Sigma's interactive arts...

C: 还要注意安全，别乱来。
E: Also, take note of your safety, don't mess around.

C: 谁先掉下去谁算输！
E: Whoever falls first loses!

C: 感谢您赐我们食物。
E: Thank you for the food you give us.

C: 毕竟它是刻法勒规定的。
E: After all, it was what Kephale dictated.

C: 哎，那温暖的一切…
E: Alas, all that's left of that warmth...

C: 在新世界再会，对吧？
E: We'll reunite in the new world, right?

C: 别哭，我现在就给你买！
E: Don't cry! I'll go buy some for you now.

C: 唔，听起来还蛮适合我这种成熟疲惫的列车长帕。
E: Ooh, sounds like just the thing for a mature and exhausted conductor like me.

C: 「万能合成机」用起来很方便帕！
E: Our Omni-Synthesizer is super convenient, right?

C: 前几天我想起这件事，就去问了一下…结果…结果说…只给帕姆打了一分！
E: When I remembered this a few days back, I went to ask... But they said... They said I only got one point!

C: 然后就…然后…唔……
E: And then... Um... Then...

C: 三月乘客说打算给帕姆做一些新衣服，所以我打算自己测量一下身高，方便三月乘客裁剪布料！
E: March 7th said she was going to stitch some new clothes for me, so I wanted to measure my height to help her cut some cloth!

C: 已经…没法回头了！再这样下去会发生什么…帕姆想都不敢想！
E: I can't... turn around now! I daren't imagine what will happen if things go on at this rate...

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！
E: Hahahahahahaha!

C: 哼哼，这可是帕姆参考了很多视频之后配出来的得意之作！睁大眼睛，好好感受吧！
E: Hehe, it's a masterpiece I created after lots of study and practice! Don't blink, and get ready to be blown away!

C: 哼，我们地概科的资源都这么紧缺了，你还好意思来找我们拿东西？
E: Hmph, we at the Department of Cosmic Geography are also short on resources. Where do you find the nerve to come to us for things?

C: 关于瓦尔特杨：瞌睡趣事
E: About Welt: Sleeping story

C: 简单！
E: Simple!

C: （大门依旧紧闭着……）
E: (The door remains tightly closed...)

C: 还有很多次元扑满需要我们捕获。
E: We still have many more Warp Trotters to catch.

C: *电波滤音*请记住，<color=#dbc291ff>我们的目标是次元扑满</color>，很多的次元扑满。
E: *electronic voice* Remember, <color=#dbc291ff>our main focus is the Warp Trotters</color>, and I mean the entire lot of them.

C: 我只能说，「黑暗拳斗大赛」只有被选中的战士才能受邀参加。这可是货真价实的拳头比拼……
E: All I can say is that only selected fighters get to enter the high-class fisticuff known as the Dark Fist Tournament.

C: 没有见过你的姐姐。
E: I have not seen your big sister.

C: 下水道里只剩下无穷无尽的吧唧嘴声在回荡。
E: All that can be heard down the sewer is just munching sounds.

C: 我要出去。
E: I want out.

C: 你决定将它从墙上揭下。为了贝洛伯格，也为了你自己。
E: You decide to peel it off the wall. For the sake of Belobog — and for your own sake.

C: 这样就大功告成了！
E: You crushed it!

C: 它的说话方式该怎么说呢…有点让人琢磨不透。
E: The way it speaks is just... a little cryptic.

C: 顺带一提，昨天是碧翠丝的五岁生日。二月十三日。
E: By the way, Beatrice turned five yesterday, February <unbreak>13</unbreak>.
Four.

C: 别看我这样，我可是啥都能干！剪绺碰瓷打边鼓那是样样精通。
E: Don't look at me like that. I can do anything! Pickpocketing, runnin' scams, backing up the boss... I'm the best flunky around.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈，甚好！自在随性！自在随性！那我的这桩事，我且说之，你且听之。帮与不帮，取决于你，我绝不强求。
E: Hahahha, very well! Be free! Be free! How about I tell you what's going on, and you simply listen? After that, it's up to you whether you want to help. I would not force you.

C: 你真该来看看现在的罐中世界，我称之为「自在樊笼」。怎么样，要进来看看吗？
E: You really should come in and see the world inside this vase. I call it my Cage of Freedom. Go on. Are you coming in for a look or not?

C: 你迅速抽出了手。
E: You pull your hand straight out.

C: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。没想到司辰宫会派您过来帮忙，那我可就彻底放心了。
E: It's been a while, {NICKNAME}. I didn't think the Palace of Astrum would send you over to help, so now I'm relieved.

C: 我怎么不知道呢……
E: Why didn't I know...

C: 唉，这里的问题也总算是解决了…再次感谢您的帮助！
E: Well, at least the problem here has been solved... Thank you again for your assistance!

C: 安全的地方为什么需要我…
E: If it were that safe, why would you need me...

C: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在太真丹室附近，根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索<color=#dbc291ff>建木枝条附近</color>。
E: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost near the Aureate Elixir Furnace. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search <color=#dbc291ff>near the Ambrosial Arbor's branches</color>.

C: 你好？
E: Hello?

C: 我先撤了，拜拜。
E: I'm outta here. See ya.

C: 说来惭愧，我还没来得及准备宝箱…因为准备放在宝箱里的礼物迟迟没有到货。
E: I'm ashamed to say that I haven't had time to prepare a chest... Because the gift I was going to put inside hasn't been delivered yet.

C: 凭什么啊？
E: And why?

C: 尤其是灵感到来的时候，我更是完全顾不上现实世界中那些远不如数学法则简洁优美的东西……
E: Especially when I get that hot shot of inspiration, I couldn't give a hoot about any of that real-world stuff which is far less simple and majestic than my beautiful math...

C: 依我看，匹诺康尼就是个大垃圾桶，装满了来自全宇宙的失败者——遇到一点小挫折就狂刷弱保软。
E: By my reckoning, Penacony is a huge trashcan filled with losers from all over the universe — who turn into babies the second they come across the slightest setback.

C: 既然如此…那咱们也别再计较了。去做你想做的事情吧。
E: Notwithstanding that being the case... Let's stop bickering about it. Go, do whatever you want to do.

C: 为什么？为什么不出货？！
E: Why? Why not!?

C: 但说实话我倒不觉得有多奇怪，毕竟这可是梦境。又或者说，这才应该是一个梦应有的样子——混沌、奇异、不可捉摸。
E: But to be honest, I don't think it's strange. After all, this is a dreamscape. Or to put it another way, this is how a dream should be — chaotic, bizarre, and unfathomable.

C: 你的眼神倒是很…平静，我喜欢！我W就喜欢脑子利索，办事靠谱的家伙！所以…要不干脆好人当到底，再顺便帮我个忙吧？
E: Your eyes are very... peaceful. I like that! I like quick thinkers and reliable people! So... why don't you be a good person, and do me a solid?

C: 抱歉！我已经很努力地在控制自己了…但……
E: Sorry! I've been trying very hard to control myself... but...

C: 我也曾挣扎过，一次又一次，希望能与他人建立亲密关系…可到头来，最后还是只剩我们俩。
E: I've struggled time and again before, hoping to build an intimate connection with someone... but in the end, it's still just us two.

C: 这里是一点微不足道的谢礼，聊表心意，请您务必收下。
E: This is a tiny gift just to say thanks and show my appreciation. Please, take it.

C: （抽噎声）…不…不！（抽噎声）……
E: *Chokes*... No... no! *Chokes*...

C: 关于你妹妹……
E: I'm here about your little sister...

C: 不过，我确实有个符合你要求的故事。
E: However, I do have a story that fits the bill.

C: （小声）大哥，咱们这次是出来度假的，按理说确实没有权限让人接受调查。
E: (Whispering) Dude, we are here on vacation. Technically, we don't have the authority to force an investigation.

C: 不应该啊，让我看看……
E: That's not right. Let me see...

C: 回老家种地？
E: Did you go back home and work the land?

C: 啧，突然想起一件烦心事……
E: Tsk, I suddenly remember something pretty distressing...

C: 这个星球上的医生都戴着覆面的鸟嘴面具。我最开始还以为是故意凹造型的样子货，在内心狠狠嘲笑了一番。
E: All the physicians on that planet wore face-covering beak masks. Initially, I thought they had deliberately dressed themselves to look stylish and were silently mocking them.

C: 就在这时，天空突然播放起公司的广告投影来。画面上的家伙身穿西装，用那种非常符合刻板印象的语气开口说道……
E: Just then, a projection of the company's advertisement appeared in the sky. In it was a man dressed in a suit, and he spoke in a tone that fit his appearance...

C: …不过凭我的本事，就算真遇到什么麻烦，我也能保你周全。
E: ...Even if any danger comes our way, I believe I'll be strong enough to keep you safe.

C: 早上好，筑梦师！滴答滴答，时针在动…今天又是适合建设梦境的一天！倾注所有想象力跟心血，和我一起建设领先时代的伟大梦境吧！
E: Morning, Dreamweaver! Tick-tock, tick-tock — the clock is ticking... Today is another wonderful day to build the dreamscape! Let your imagination run wild! Let us put our heart and soul into creating the greatest dreamscape ahead of its time!

C: 你知道要在每个宣传片里都装出自信满满的样子有多难吗？没经历过的人是不会懂的……
E: Do you know how hard it is to pretend to be confident in every promotional video? Those who haven't tried won't understand it...

C: 看来我们的时代真的已经过去了，伙计……
E: Looks like our time has truly come to an end, buddy...

C: 当时在场的人都在笑。他们觉得我是个呆子，只配缩在小黑屋里下我的星际战棋——现在再看看，功成名就的是谁？笑到最后的是谁？
E: Everyone laughed at me, thinking I was a dork who only spent my time playing galactic warchess at home —but see who's the successful one now? Who has the last laugh?

C: …咦…奇怪…真奇怪，怎么突然…啊——原来是这样！
E: ...Eh... This... This is weird. That happened all of a sudden... Oh... I see!

C: …好，决定了！<color=#dbc291ff>「斯坦威游隼」豪华飞车、观景望远镜、还有「推销员」广告牌</color>——你就先去分析这几样东西吧。
E: ...Okay, it's settled! <color=#dbc291ff>Go analyze a "Steinway Falcon" speedster, a viewing telescope, and a "sales" billboard</color> for now.

C: 最近的逐梦客，花活真是越来越多了…少添点乱，多享受享受生活不行吗？
E: Those Dreamchasers just won't stop causing trouble... Can't they just peacefully enjoy their life in this dream?

C: 咻咻…结论：该分析对象所涉及之原材料、供应链及相关技术无侵权风险。
E: *Beep*... Conclusion: The analyses regarding the raw materials, supply chain, and related technologies show no risk of infringement.

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 瞧瞧你，多么健全，多么完美——我愿意把我生命的*二十分之一*毫无保留地献给你……
E: Look at you, so flawless. I'd gladly give you *one-twentieth* of my life without thinking twice...

C: 科蒂…我的挚爱，我的命运！
E: Coty... My love, my destiny!

C: 唉，可惜的是——这片花瓣正在不可避免地走向枯萎凋谢的命运。
E: But alas, this jewel is inevitably losing its luster.

C: 这…你还真是直言不讳，不过也挺有道理的。
E: Well... you're the blunt type, huh? But you may have a point.

C: 车站门口，几名气势汹汹的公司员工围着一个皮皮西男孩。
E: At the entrance of the station, there are a bunch of aggressive IPC employees surrounding a Pepeshi boy.

C: 呃，部长，我看这人脑子好像不太好。
E: Um, leader, I think there's something wrong with this person's head.

C: 是吗…那太遗憾了，这可是纯美女神遗留在宇宙中为数不多的遗产。
E: Oh, what a shame... It's one of the few legacies that the Beauty has left behind in the universe.

C: 因为你当时是来救我的啊。难道我应该去恨一个对我伸出援手的人吗？
E: It's because you were there to save me. Am I supposed to hate someone who helps me?

C: 呼~经历了那么多事，总算有空喝上一口苏乐达了。
E: Phew... After all that, I guess I finally have some time to have a drink of SoulGlad.

C: 泪水从硕大的墨镜后滑落，剔透又晶莹，像极了——用皮皮西自己的话来说——那「掩藏于残酷现实背后的、最纯洁又最脆弱的梦想」。
E: Tears trickle down behind his oversized sunglasses. The translucent and glistening teardrops are much like — in the Pepeshi's own words — "the purest yet fragile dream obscured by the harsh reality."

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 你看见这位智械的身上刻着「格-蕾」二字——不是铭牌，而是直接刻在了外壳上。
E: The words "Go-Ray" are engraved directly on the body of this Intellitron instead of on a nameplate.

C: 梦里也存在垃圾吗？
E: Does trash exist in dreams too?

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 有机生命或许很难理解这层关系…我已经习惯了。
E: It might be hard for organic lives to comprehend this kind of relationship... I'm used to it.

C: 你现在要离开酒店吗？
E: Are you leaving the hotel now?

C: 你是怎么知道的？
E: How did you know?

C: 我没有勇气去面对他们…所以我需要你的帮助。等你把他们带回来，我会把所有事情和你解释清楚的。
E: I haven't the courage to face them myself... so I need your help. I'll explain everything to you once you bring them back.

C: （麦考先生好像还提到了他的「姐妹」…去公馆的别处找找看吧。）
E: (Mr. McCoy also mentioned his "sister"... Time to check some other places around the pavilion.)

C: （该回去找他问个究竟了。）
E: (Let's go back and ask him about what happened.)

C: 麦考先生陷入一阵甜蜜的回忆，似乎无法自拔。
E: Mr. McCoy has fallen deep into a sweet memory. He seems unable to pull himself back from it.

C: 等你见到奥科萨娜女士，请务必向她传达我的感谢。朋友，愿你也能永远心存善意。
E: Next time you see Miss Oksana, please make sure you pass on my thanks to her. My friend, I hope you also keep your heart in the right place.

C: 我不是故意隐瞒的，你知道我的性格。我是不希望你戴着有色眼镜看我，哪怕那色彩带有正面意义。
E: It wasn't on purpose, as you know what kind of person I am. I just didn't want you to look at me with tinted glasses, even if they were tinted with positivity.

C: 所以，我资助他们，单纯是出于个人的恻隐之心。对我而言，帮助他们反抗压迫并非是施舍，而是作为财富拥有者的一种义务和责任。
E: So I support them purely out of personal compassion. In my view, helping them fight against oppression isn't any kind of charity but rather my duty and responsibility as an individual of wealth.

C: …你、你刚刚对我做了什么？不是忆庭的手段，也不像机器头信徒惯用的那一套…你究竟是什么人？
E: ...Wh—What did you do to me? This isn't one of the Garden's tricks, nor does it look like any move used by Droidhead disciples... Who the heck are you?

C: …好吧，如果你赢了，我不止不再针对你，还会当众向你道歉，行了吧！
E: ...Fine. If you win, I'll stop pursuing you. And I'll even apologize to you in front of everyone. How's that!?

C: 人活一辈子到底是为了什么，工作吗？谁说不工作就不能活着？他越催我，我就越想不毕业！
E: What do humans live for? Work? Who says that a person who doesn't work can't survive just as well? The more he pesters me, the less I wish to graduate!

C: 小鸟…我都这把年纪了，哪里还算得上什么小鸟呢？
E: Young fledgling... At this age, how can I still be considered a young fledgling?

C: 就算再怎么坚持，你又能拿一个冻住的垃圾桶怎么办呢？
E: Even if you keep trying, what can you really do with a frozen trashcan?

C: 这座桥梁的结构不太稳定，在修缮结束前请不要靠近。
E: This bridge is structurally unstable, please stay clear until repairs are complete.

C: 帮帮我，黑塔女士！
E: Help me, Madam Herta!

C: 就是这里，帮我放到顶上吧！
E: Here it is. Help me pop it right up the top there!

C: 我们来看下一个议题：造物引擎的下身应该安装什么？
E: Let's look at the next item on the agenda: What should the Engine of Creation have installed on its lower body?

C: 螺旋桨。
E: A propeller.

C: 请客人帮本鸟警告一下它们，咱要去找妃色夫人告状了啾！
E: Please, can you help me warn them, dear guest? I'm going to file a complaint with Lady Vermilion, tweet!

C: 如上，祝你好运，哈努兄弟啾。
E: As mentioned, I wish you luck, Brother Hanu, tweet.

C: 啾！差点以为要被挤死了…谢谢客人啾！
E: Tweet! I thought I was gonna be crushed... Thank you, tweet!

E: Amazing! I've only ever seen one in books — I've always wanted to ride one someday!

C: 你好像在做很有意思的事呢。
E: You seem to be doing something interesting.

C: 承蒙黑塔女士信任。但在我们展开讨论之前，我仍有一个问题想要请教。
E: I appreciate Madam Herta's confidence in me. But before we delve into this discussion, there's something I must ask.

C: 推论：翁法罗斯的正身也许是一台亡佚的帝皇权杖，或其他类似的智识造物；而那位来古士便是权杖的操作员…或是隐居世外的又一位鲁珀特。
E: Deduction: Amphoreus's actual identity might be a lost Emperor's Scepter or similar Erudition construct, while Lygus may be its operator... or perhaps another Rubert hidden from the world.

C: 光线正好呢，可以让我试试吗？
E: The lighting's just right. Mind if I give it a try?

C: 没关系，迷的身子很结实，只想要小小的补偿！
E: It's okay. Mem's very sturdy, but I'd just like a small compensation!

C: 可惜这里没有垃圾桶……
E: Too bad there are no trashcans here...

C: 到底是什么，你快说呀！
E: What is it, just say it!

C: 等到我们拾回珍重之物，将它们装进行囊、决定翻开故事崭新一页的时候……
E: By the time we retrieve what we cherish, pack it into our bags, and decide to turn to a new page in our story...

C: 等到时机成熟，我们就再回到这里，一起翻开故事的下一页吧？
E: And when the time is ripe, let us return here and write the next page of our story together.

C: 你使劲敲打了几下木壁，试图向那位信徒传递这样的信息——你很生气，希望暴躁的情绪得到安抚，最好的办法就是对你献上供品。
E: You hit the wooden wall hard a few times, trying to convey this message to your disciple — You are very angry, and your raging emotions must be appeased. The best way to do this would be with an offering.

C: 噢，提议要将所有神驹都涂装成红色的那位。
E: Ah yes, the one who proposed painting all divine foals red.

C: …但已经熄灭了。
E: ...but it's extinguished.

C: 给我燃起来啊！
E: Fired up!

C: 今天给你带了点不一样的。
E: I brought something special today.

C: 这是艾丝妲养的宠物狗，时常会开启「自主遛狗」模式，科员们对此已经见怪不怪了。
E: This is Asta's pet dog. It's often set to auto-walk mode, which no longer freaks the researchers out.

C: （教它记住自己的绰号）
E: (Teach it to remember its own nickname)

C: 你在对我说话吗？
E: Are you talking to me?

C: 没关系，一回生二回熟。看你的样子，应该是刚来这里不久吧？我叫古恩，已经是个老家伙啦。
E: Nevermind. You've not been here long, have you? I am Gunn. I am already an old guy.

C: 是…哪个领域方面的知识？我不是通识类学者……
E: In what field of study? I am not a general scholar...

C: 帮助？对没错，你看上去的确需要一些小小的帮助。
E: Help? Right, you do look like you need some help.

C: 凭我跟你现在的关系，我还不能把所有的消息都告诉你。
E: With our current relationship, I can't tell you everything I know.

C: 这些是你应该做的工作吗？
E: Are these supposed to be your job?

C: 说到底，咖啡就是功能性饮料的一种，就像是人饿了会吃饭，人困倦了就会喝咖啡！
E: At the end of the day, coffee is just a functional beverage. People eat when they are hungry, and people drink coffee when they feel tired!

C: 我想多听听你扯闲篇…
E: I want to hear more of your gossip...

C: 其他科室为什么看不起地概科？
E: Why is Dpt. of Cosmic Geography looked down on?

C: 我有点好奇…
E: There's something I'm curious about...

C: 但我感觉得到，有时候是眼泪流淌的触感，有时候是很温暖的触摸感，总之，我能感受到她在培育我们的时候留下的爱……
E: But I can feel it. Sometimes it's the feeling of tears dribbling down my face, and sometimes it feels like touches filled with warmth. Anyway, I can feel the love she gave when she was creating us...

C: 拧了半圈还是拧不进去，气死我了，就不能用爪子直接拍进去吗？
E: I just can't tighten it, so frustrating! Why can't I just knock it in with my paw?

C: 我可跟那些不懂事的小家伙不一样，主要是身份上有一定差距。
E: I'm not like those ignorant brats outside, mainly because we have different statuses.

C: 或许，生命体之间沟通的形式远比我们所想象到的更多元，我会说你们的语言也不是什么奇怪之事。
E: Perhaps, the ways different life forms communicate with each other are far more diverse than we can imagine. So, it's not much of a surprise that I can speak your language.

C: 宇宙如此广阔，我在寻找自己的位置。
E: I'd like to find where I belong in this vast universe.

C: 滴…滴…通话已挂断。
E: Beep... beep... The call has ended.

C: 阮•梅真的会同意通话吗？你有些好奇。
E: Will Ruan Mei really take your call? You're a little curious.

C: 滴…滴……
E: Beep... Beep...

C: 呵呵，朋友，吉奥里亚被称为「磐岩之脊」，乃是因为它以脊背朝上，迎受风霜雪雨的冲刷。就算有指甲，也深埋在大地的内侧，凡人怎么能得到呢？
E: Heh-heh, my friend, Georios is called the Pillar of Stone because its spine faces upward, to meet the barrage of harsh storms and blizzards. Even if it had nails, they would be buried deep within the earth — how would mortals even acquire them?

C: 一日内竟有两种稀世神兵横空出世，奥赫玛着实藏龙卧虎。「永恒之城」并非浪得虚名，果然有其厉害之处。
E: To have two divine relics surface in the space of a day, Okhema certainly is a mecca of wonderment. The Eternal City certainly lives up to its name to harbor such an impressive arsenal.

C: …什么黑屏？生活可不是戏剧，不能自己决定开场和落幕的时候！
E: ...Black screen? Life isn't some theater play, and you can't just decide when to draw or pull the curtains!

C: 让我来辩！
E: Let me join the debate!

C: 即便退一步，认可「阿卡索斯」确实是知识，它也绝非数学那样的必然知识。帕门弥德，这个例证你可用得太不恰当了。
E: Even if we take a step back and accept that we do in fact have knowledge of "Icatus," how can we say that this knowledge is similar to the absolute knowledge of mathematics? Parmenides, this example is not a fitting comparison.

C: 您放心，德墨忒尔婶婶，无论如何我都会继续寻找，把波瑟芬妮给您带回来的。
E: Don't worry, Aunty Demetria — I'll keep searching for her no matter what. I'll bring your Possephone back for you.

C: 对…你们也说了，她打算逃出来的…波瑟芬妮这孩子自小就聪明……
E: Yes... You also said she was planning on making an escape... Possephone has always been a smart one, ever since she was just a little girl...

C: 就真是「善恶好轮回，塔兰顿饶过谁」！
E: "The cycle of good and evil goes on eternally, and Talanton will spare no comers!"

C: 有其巧妙之处，只有我们被逼上如此绝路，才能显得她父母不义。不过城外的安全问题，是我最大的顾虑……
E: There is a certain cleverness to it. Only by forcing us into a desperate situation can her parents seem in the wrong. However, I'm most worried about our personal safety outside the city...

C: 她甚至没有邀请你。
E: She didn't even invite you.

C: 所以她要让父母失去她一次…
E: So that's why she wants to make her parents lose her at least once...

C: 我从来都没与你坦白过。其实，我从开始就知道父母派人谋害你的事。所以我找到了你，我想为他们的恶行向你道歉……
E: There's something I've never been honest with you about. I actually knew all along that my parents sent someone to try to kill you. So I wanted to reach out to you and offer up an apology for their evil...

C: 谁说这是报纸了？纸多费钱啊——我这新闻，每个字都是靠嘴说出来的~
E: Who said I'm talking about a newspaper? Paper's too expensive — every line of this news is personally delivered by my mouth~

C: 这样的故事持续了至少十分钟。或许是奥赫玛的阳光让你没有睡好，你渐渐闭上了眼……
E: The story lasts at least ten minutes. Perhaps the light in Okhema has been impacting your sleep, but you gradually close your eyelids...

C: 然后，就沿着这条路……
E: And then, along this path...

C: 这我可帮不了你。
E: My hands are tied.

C: 好的，等我记一下。
E: Alright, let me make a note.

C: 砰——你感到一阵天旋地转，耳朵嗡嗡作响。清晰的理性离你远去，只觉得视野里有个模糊的人影在朝这边招手，那就是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吗？
E: Bang — You feel a sudden dizziness, your ears ringing loudly. Clarity and reason slip away as you notice a blurred figure waving at you from a distance. Could that be {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}?

C: …从它喜欢的食物着手？
E: ...Start with its favorite food?

C: 你们只能眼睁睁地看着这头大地兽再次从面前飞奔而过，卷起一路的烟尘。
E: You can only watch helplessly as the dromas dashes past you again, kicking up clouds of dust.

C: 只是，我们的王离开后，科可波阁下的性情，也因深重思念而变得反常……
E: But ever since our king left, Kokopo's temperament has grown erratic, burdened by profound longing...

C: 住手啊！伊俄，你是否清醒？
E: Stop! Eio, do you know what you're doing?

C: 我是《被缚的埃德加》的主演伊俄，剧中扮演的就是埃德加。
E: I'm the lead actor, Eio, playing Edgar in The Shackled Edgar.

C: 你好，{NICKNAME}贵宾，请问有什么能帮到您？
E: Good day, distinguished guest, {NICKNAME}. How may I help you?

C: 呵，小女娃，你尽可以向我请教，别被邪魔外道带歪了信仰。
E: Heh, little girl, you're free to ask me anything. Don't let these heretical outsiders lead your faith astray.

C: 我小的时候，奥赫玛可不像现在这样太平，三天两头都有纷争眷属袭击城墙。前一天还见过的人，可能第二天就……
E: When I was little, Okhema wasn't as peaceful as it is now. Attacks on the city walls by Strife Titankins were almost a daily thing. One day you'd see someone, and the next...

C: 啊，离刻法勒越来越近了……
E: Ah, we're getting closer to Kephale...

C: 卫兵报告，对面圣殿有避难者呼救。那里构造和此处相似，清理盘踞其中的怪物，或许便能建立起一处安全的避难所。
E: The guards have reported that there are refugees calling for help from the temple across the way. Its structure is similar to this place. If we clear out the monsters lurking inside, we might be able to establish a safe shelter there.

C: 啊，这不是{NICKNAME}吗。你来探望我们啦？
E: Ah, if it isn't {NICKNAME}! Are you here to visit us?

C: 这么一来，我们的「最强之矛」和「最强之盾」也算打响名头，销路不愁了吧！
E: With that, we've made a name for ourselves as "the Strongest Lance" and "the Strongest Shield"! That'll surely boost our sales!

C: 必须把怪物引到二楼廊道下方，再试试看吧。
E: I need to lure the creatures to the area beneath the second-floor corridor. Let's try again.

C: 是我呀！希瑞雅。我…偷过你的钱袋，还编过一些故事，撒过一些小谎……
E: It's me, Serena! Your former purse-liberator? Occasional fibber?

C: 当然！这些天来，我一直背诵着，一字不差。
E: Of course! I've spent the last couple of days inscribing every word into my mind.

C: 保持沉默。
E: Remain silent.

C: …你知道？
E: ...You knew?

C: 我…大家为我，做了这么多事情。一直保护着我们的，不光是遥远的泰坦，还有身边的人。
E: I... Everyone did so much for me. The ones who protected me aren't just the distant Titan, but also those around me.

C: 都不许胡说！
E: Stop that nonsense!

C: 给，这是我的信，辛苦{NICKNAME}啦。
E: Here's my letter. Thanks for your help, {NICKNAME}.

C: 正如那传说中的再创世。你说对吗…海瑟音？
E: Just like the legendary Era Nova. Isn't that right... Hysilens?

C: 看看别的。
E: Look at another one.

C: 如果是指在葡萄台上走了一遭…这么短时间就能出品吗？
E: From stepping on those grapes? How did it become a drink so quickly?

C: …不，既然救世主阁下在场，不如取一条捷径——直接探求那位已陨泰坦本尊的记忆便是。
E: No need for that. With the Great Deliverer here, we have a better option. Let's directly tap into the fallen Titan's memories instead.

C: 我这瓶倒是跟之前不太一样……但没关系，这瓶也…好喝！
E: The flavor isn't quite what I remember... but honestly? That doesn't matter. This new bottle is incredible!

C: 今天就好好享受列车时光吧。
E: Why not just soak in the Express for today.

C: 我想想怎么回答…
E: Lemme think how to answer those...

C: 我之前去问了列车上的其他人…帕姆说它还有事要忙，但同意了虎克举办捉迷藏比赛——只要虎克不进引擎室就行。
E: I asked the others if they were interested... Pom-Pom was too busy, but they agreed to let me host the contest on the Express — as long as I don't use the engine room!

C: 之前，克拉拉问了史瓦罗先生要不要来列车上参观，结果还是被史瓦罗先生回绝了……
E: I asked Mr. Svarog if he'd like to come with me. But he said he couldn't...

C: 是从姬子的房间传来的。
E: That's Himeko's room.

C: 别忘了，站在你面前的只是一个全息投影，真正的我现在正躺在舒服的冰水浴缸里，压根就不在星穹列车上——
E: —standing in front of you is just a hologram. The real me is now lying in a cozy ice bath, far, far away from the Astral Express.

C: 我为此难过了很久，直到家人为了安抚我，带我搭星槎去看虚空鲸…那是我第一次看到虚空鲸群，真的很美。
E: I was so sad that my parents decided to take me on a starskiff to see the void song whales. That was the first time I'd ever laid eyes upon them... Such miraculous creatures.

C: 我会好好保守秘密的。
E: Your secrets are safe with me.

C: 重力是往下的，长高是往上的，只要常来星穹列车，我肯定能长高～
E: Gravity means down, growing means up! As long as I keep visiting the Astral Express, I'm bound to grow taller.

C: 梦里的我想去哪儿就去哪儿，可自由了，真羡慕她呀。
E: I can go wherever I want in my dreams — I'm completely free... almost makes me envious of myself.

C: 那当然啦，在你来之前，空间站里只有我能听懂它们在说什么。
E: Of course. I was the only one who could understand them on the space station before you got here.

C: 有机会的话，我想向他们传授点心得…哎，毕竟每个人都有自己的遗憾。
E: Given an opportunity, I would like to teach them a thing or two... Ahh, after all, everyone has regrets.

C: 即便我努力克制，精心设计，希望不要为他人添麻烦，但也都是徒劳。
E: No matter how hard I try to refrain myself and avoid causing trouble for others, it never works.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 虽…虽然之前一直在做一些琐碎的工作，但是好像不知不觉认识了很多其他科室的人。
E: Well... I've been doing mundane work all this time, but I somehow got to know lots of people in different departments.

C: 老师这么说我就放心了。我原本还担心，是自己哪句话太冒失，惹他不开心了呢。
E: I feel a bit better then. I was worried I spoke out of turn or upset him.

C: 可惜写作进度太慢了，都怪阿德勒每天来烦我，不然世玲早就写完发到空间站的匿名论坛里去了。
E: Pity that I'm writing so slowly. I blame Adler — he comes to bother me every day, otherwise I'd have finished this ages ago and published it on the space station's anonymous forum.

C: …这可不是小问题，稍后我会和姬子小姐聊聊的。
E: ...That could be a big issue. I'll have a chat with Himeko about it.

C: 卡利白？那是什么……
E: Kali-Kapo? What's that...?

C: 是啊，我也吃了一惊。
E: Yeah, I was surprised too.

C: 雪原里总能发现让人意外的东西…这就是极地探险的魅力所在。
E: You can always find something surprising in the Snow Plains... That's the charm of outdoor exploration.

C: 很好，就这么决定了！我晚点就去找姬子小姐聊聊。
E: That's it then! Cool! I'll go chat with Himeko about this later.

C: {NICKNAME}，快来！
E: {NICKNAME}, this way!

C: 我不知道啊…
E: I have no idea...

C: 这题够简单的，你还挺懂手下留情的嘛？
E: These are so easy. You really are gentle with people, aren't you?

C: 我有一件礼物……
E: I have a gift...

C: 还得再粉嫩一点。
E: March's room could use more pink.

C: 想不到列车长的品味竟如此细腻……
E: I see. I am truly impressed by the attention to detail and taste of the conductor...

C: 将军真是个享受人。
E: General, you really know how to have a good time.

C: {NICKNAME}，不知丹恒近来在列车上过得如何？
E: {NICKNAME}, tell me, has Dan Heng been enjoying his time on the Express?

C: 欢迎藿藿，记得尝尝姬子咖啡。
E: Welcome, Huohuo. Remember to try Miss Himeko's coffee.

C: 确实不错。
E: They're pretty good.

C: 设色精妙的绣物佳品，较画意更胜一筹。
E: Such colorful embroidery — it feels even more expressive than a painting.

C: 改变是一种痛苦，也无可避免地伴随着旧事物的消亡……
E: Transformation is a kind of suffering, yet it invariably accompanies the end of what once was...

C: 优美的音乐……
E: Nice music...

C: 爱你…这是什么新词吗？
E: Lit as fudge... Is this some new term?

C: 很久没喝过味道这么烈的饮料了，比烟熏味的麦芽果汁还刺激！
E: Haven't had such a strong-tasting drink in a long time. It's more intense than a smoke-flavored malt juice!

C: 一道意义不明的凝视…有人在盯着我——不是你们的列车长。
E: A mysterious gaze... Someone's staring at me, and it's not your conductor.

C: 我替列车长回答了，没问题！
E: I'm answering on behalf of the conductor: No problem!

C: 列车…长？
E: Conductor... of the Express?

C: 我看到了书籍和记录，命运之轮正在转动，知识和经验在其中流淌。远处传来了号角的声音，但岔路却让白马犹豫不决。
E: I see books and archives. The wheel of fortune is spinning, knowledge and experience swirling within. A horn sounds from afar, but the crossroads cause the white horse to hesitate.

C: 但这份美丽的惊吓，也正是缘分使然。
E: But this beautiful shock was also a result of fate.

C: 太空竞逐…
E: Space racing...

C: 话说…{NICKNAME}，闻到了吗？列车上有一股甜甜的，很浓郁的奶香糕点气息。
E: Anyway, {NICKNAME}, do you smell that? There's a sweet and rich smell of milk pastries here on the Express.

C: 那些机器人一直在工作……
E: Those robots are always working...

C: 不管是什么，总之就是一个超大的惊喜！
E: Whatever it is, I'm sure it's gonna be a huge surprise!

C: 屏幕分辨率极高，每条数据标注都清晰可见，你开始怀念低分辨率的时代。
E: With the extremely high resolution of the screen, every data label is clear. You start missing the era of low resolution.

C: 又是那个人？他到底是谁啊？
E: Him again? Who is he exactly?

C: 啊…想必你还不知道吧？市政厅最近已经在安排人手探索城外啦。听说上下层区也即将恢复正常，再过不久大家都能随意进出了。
E: Ah... You probably don't know, right? The Town Hall recently arranged for some people to explore the area outside the city. Supposedly, the Underworld will be returning to normal soon. Pretty soon, everyone will be able to come and go as they please.

C: 要不然呢？本少爷会闲到在大街上自言自语吗？你以为我是那个叫什么多米尼克的老头？
E: Of course. Who else would I be talking to? Do I look like someone who talks to himself in the street? It's not like I'm old man Dominic.

C: …很有野心。
E: ...That's ambitious.

C: 你是在夸我吗？我就当是吧。
E: Are you praising me? I'll assume you are.

C: 不过，要是有些人看完书能付钱就更好了……
E: But it would be nice if everyone paid for the books they read...

C: 我呢，只要确保来干活的工人们吃饱穿暖，就算是最大的贡献了。
E: As for me, I make sure that the workers are all fed and clothed, that is my greatest contribution.

C: 科鲁泽？科鲁泽…哦，你是说那个，「怪物盔甲」！
E: Kluzer? Kluzer... Oh, you mean that thing — "Monster Armor"!

C: 要我说，挖矿这事根本不值得耗费太多心神和体力。每天就这么低头锄大地，人的思想都会被束缚……
E: If you ask me, mining is not worth the effort and energy. Digging every day can trap the mind...

C: 与其担心我，你不如去关心关心他们。依我看，他们才是可怜人呐……
E: You should focus on them instead of worrying about me. In my opinion, they are the poor ones...

C: 这地下的温度居然还变过？
E: The temperature can change here?

C: 那当然，我现在可是已经浪子回头了！
E: Of course. I'm a completely different person now.

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 所以…我想找到布洛妮娅姐姐，当面好好谢谢她。
E: So... I want to thank her in person.

C: 天啊，真的吗？我一直在专心研究自己的机器人，完全不知道这件事！
E: Oh no, really? I've been so focused on my robot that I haven't heard a thing!

C: 行，麻烦来前台登记下你的身份信息。
E: Sure, please register at the reception.

C: 接待过什么特别的住客吗？
E: Have you received any special guests?

C: 旧世界留下的报纸和杂志残页，我全都给收集起来了。
E: I have collected all the remaining newspapers and magazines left from the Old World.

C: 你怎么想一出是一出？
E: How can you be so impulsive?

C: 值得去的地方吗？我想想……
E: Worth visiting? Let me think...

C: 头等大事当然是振兴贝洛伯格…啊，听上去还是太笼统了，对吧？
E: The number one priority is to revitalize Belobog... Ah, it still sounds so vague, doesn't it?

C: 封锁令对上下层区的财政状况造成了巨大的影响。眼下，普通的下层区矿民根本无法承受行政区的物价。
E: The blockade has had a huge impact on the Overworld and Underworld economies. Right now, ordinary miners in the Underworld can't bear the high cost of living in the Administrative District.

C: 呵，倒不是压力——我只是觉得事到如今，学习已经成了我必须尽到的责任。
E: Hah, that's no pressure! I just think that with the way things are now, studying is a responsibility that I must accept.

C: 哟，这不是帮我修过东西的「外来者」嘛？
E: Hey, aren't you the outsider who helped me fix my stuff?

C: 工程结束后有什么打算吗？
E: Do you have any plans for when construction is complete?

C: 由这样一位伟大的守护者挑选、培养出来的接班人，注定不会令人民、令筑城者失望。赞美「存护」，赞美布洛妮娅大人！
E: A successor hand-selected and trained by the Supreme Guardian is destined not to disappoint the people or the Architects. Praise Preservation, and praise Lady Bronya!

C: 你是说跟希露瓦一起擅闯禁区那件事？
E: Are you talking about that time you and Serval broke into the restricted zone?

C: 嗯，看来筑城<unbreak>232</unbreak>年的档案没有错漏。接下来该是……
E: Hmm, it seems like the archives of Fortification Year <unbreak>232</unbreak> are in order. The next should be...

C: 嗯…谁把《贝洛伯格大事年表》放在这里的？可别让我抓到了……
E: Who put this Belobog Chronicles here? You'd better not let me catch you...

C: 没事了。
E: It's okay.

C: 一开始，有些人来到这里，希望得到史瓦罗先生的保护。
E: In the beginning, some would come here in hopes of receiving Mr. Svarog's protection.

C: 真是没大没小，见了我漆黑的虎克大人也不打招呼！
E: Impudence! Ignoring the presence of Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!

C: 喔——荣誉队员，看来你很懂这地下的规矩嘛！
E: Hoh... it appears you know much about the rules of the Underground, honorary member!

C: 这样的人，一共有两个——一个就是诊所的老巫婆，另一个…就是希儿姐姐！
E: There are two of 'em: The old witch at the clinic, and the other... Big Sis Seele!

C: 哦——虎克有新点子了！下次大探险，我们就去抓洞螈送给她——这下肯定不会被骂啦！
E: Ooh, I've just got a new idea! For the next great adventure, let's go catch some olms for her. Surely, we won't get scolded again!

C: 痛断肠，因为自由是{F#她}{M#他}的向往
E: A broken heart, 'cos freedom keeps {F#her}{M#him} going

C: 没说唱天赋的庸才就给我乖乖忍着
E: Those with no talent can just shut up and wait

C: 想和你聊聊天…
E: I'm just here for a chat...

C: 我没想到学校里竟然还有第二个《奇谭》粉丝，就想和她聊聊，听听她对《奇谭》的看法…不过，那时的佩拉很害羞，支支吾吾什么也没说出来。
E: I was pretty surprised to find out that she was a fan of Tales too, so I was curious about her opinion on it... But Pela was so shy that she didn't really say anything.

C: 至于后来…我们俩再见面的时候，就是在姐姐的乐队里了。
E: Later on... we met again in Serval's band.

C: 哼哼...哼，哼哼！
E: Oink oink... oink, oink oink!

C: 呜！咕呜呜！
E: Groo! Groooo!

C: 就买暖阳花吧！
E: Just buy some Sunshine!

C: 我老早就觉得她眼熟！
E: I knew she looked familiar!

C: 肉料十足，不咸不腥！
E: Meaty fresh — not salty nor fishy!

C: 该死…真难缠……
E: Hooboy... That's tough.

C: 哥哥，加油！
E: Go, big bro!

C: 爸爸也是有极限的…
E: Daddy has his limits...

C: 这里不也照样看嘛？
E: Come on, we can just watch it from here.

C: 呵，真是悠闲的一天啊。我是博物馆的志愿导览员华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀，你需要什么帮助吗？
E: Hah, what a leisurely day. I am volunteer tour guide Wallace Cambridge Limestein. Do you require any assistance?

C: 呵呵…你还是这么善解人意——也难怪你会帮助于尔丹先生振兴博物馆了。
E: Haha... You're still as understanding as ever... It's no wonder you helped Mr. Uldan to revitalize the museum.

C: 于是在化外民眼中，有着几百年历史的「古董」就这样随便丢给了「收破烂」的，确实挺令人惊讶的。
E: That's why it raises eyebrows whenever Outworlders see an antique from centuries ago get discarded without a thought, and being taken in by us as "trash."

C: 怎么仙舟还有人说书啊？
E: Why are there storytellers aboard Xianzhou?

C: 嗯，买书吗？需要什么，我帮你找找。
E: Mmm, buying a book? Which one do you need. I'll help you find it.

C: 建木风波总算平息了…
E: Finally, the Ambrosial Arbor crisis is over... What's your take?

C: 很有风格…谢谢你啊。虽然我分不清楚这究竟是夸奖，还是安慰。
E: My own style... Thank you. Even though I can't really tell if this is meant as a compliment or consolation.

C: 哎…但说这些都是白扯。要是我写诗的技术能赶上我工造技术水平的一半就好了。我现在就不会这么愁了。
E: Ack... But that's all a load of bull. If only my poetry were half as good as my artifex skills, I wouldn't be so anxious right now.

C: 你已经学会抢答了。
E: You've learned how to give quick answers.

C: 客人，刻板印象可要不得呀～
E: It's not good to believe in stereotypes, dear customer.

C: 只要攒满了这<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「奇功」，我每周就能离开一次幽囚狱了！唉呀妈呀，越想越激动！太温情了，十王司！
E: Once I accumulate <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Outstanding Accolades," I'll be able to leave The Shackling Prison once every week! Darn, I'm feeling excited just thinking about it! The Ten-Lords Commission is truly compassionate!

C: 所以那勤务是谁？
E: So what's the name of this young orderly, then?

C: 在我们仙舟，要想取得「成年资格」就得参加一系列考核。我现在在做的志愿公益活动就是考核的一环。
E: Here on Xianzhou, we have to take a series of examinations in order to qualify for our rite of passage. The community service program that I'm volunteering for is a part of this examination.

C: 「唉！建木都重新长大了，我们家阿浮怎么还没长大啊？」每天就在我耳边叨叨这些，烦得我啊！
E: "Hey! The Ambrosial Arbor is growing up again. How come our darling Fulie hasn't grown up yet?" They babble on and on at me, every day. It's infuriating!

C: 真的有这么严重！你相信我就对了。
E: It really is that serious! You should trust me.

C: 可惜此为持明族之秘，亏我晓之以情动之以理，这位大师才舍得将方子传授于我，我依照方子研究出「百倍压缩纯氧水」，旨在造福仙舟。
E: Still, it was a secret of the Vidyadhara. It was after some persuasive reasoning, did I finally convince the master to share the formula with me, which I followed and developed the Hundredfold Compressed Water to benefit the people on the Xianzhou.

C: 择日不如撞日——我景芳想请{F#姑娘}{M#兄台}同去那宣夜大街的「不夜侯」小酌一杯，茶水出账我二你八…不，我三你七，如何？诚意十足吧？
E: Chance encounters are far better than planned ones — I, Jing Fang, would like to invite you, my {F#lass}{M#lad}, to the Sleepless Earl over on Starwatcher Avenue. I'll even cover twenty percent of the bill... no, how about I chip in thirty percent of the bill? That should be good faith enough, right?

C: 想吃白饭就直说呗…
E: If you want to leech off others, just say so...

C: 这件事，我劝你不要说出去。因为每个说出秘密的人，现在都已经消失了……
E: Look, you gotta keep this to yourself, because all those who have revealed this secret "got vanished" without a trace...

C: 你在自言自语吗？
E: Are you talking to yourself?

C: 靠成千上万个像我这样细心又负责的书吏来管理咯。整个十王司系统中上百亿份档案，一直都是纯靠人力来管理维护的，所以书吏的编制一度超过了冥差。
E: Through tens of thousands of attentive and responsible scribes like me. The Ten-Lords Commission's system holds hundreds of millions of files, and they have always been maintained through manpower. That's why the staffing of scribes exceeded even the spiritfarers for a while.

C: 至于那个存储案牍的玉兆阵列在哪里…我也不知道。我怀疑压根不在「罗浮」，甚至不在仙舟联盟。
E: As for where the jade abacus array that holds all the documents is stored... Well, I don't know. I suspect it isn't even on the Luofu, or even the Xianzhou Alliance at all.

C: 提起这个老夫就头疼啊！
E: I can feel my headache returning already!

C: 最近太卜司的担子也重，常常要加班，她都是主动揽在自己身上，也没见她抱怨过。人品和工作态度都非常棒，是非常出色的工作伙伴。
E: Things at the Divination Commission have been hectic lately, and we often have to work overtime. Jingzhai always does the extra work without complaining. She has a great personality and excels at what she does. She is an amazing colleague.

C: 你难道没有责任心吗？
E: Don't you have any sense of duty?

C: 罗浮仙舟上还有很多其他的公廨，论大小来看都挺小的，贵在我们数量多嘛。
E: There are many other Chanceries aboard the Xianzhou Luofu, and they're all pretty small in size, but large in amount.

C: 我要进入神策府。
E: I wanna enter the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 我再煽风点火一下，比如「我听说最近有其他商团也有超导合金想要出手」之类的…他们的价格还能再降一些。
E: Let me stir things up a bit more, something like, "I heard there's another guild selling superconducting alloys these days"... Their price might drop yet.

C: 你要是也在等天舶司的文件，就必须排到我后面去，去去去，别在这里碍事情。
E: If you're awaiting documents from the Sky-Faring Commission, you'd better get behind me in line. Go on, then — get out of the way.

C: 能讲讲「埃伊加文明」吗？
E: What's this "Aigaian" you speak of?

C: 最后等到公文发下来的时候，我并没有那种很喜悦的感觉，就是麻木了，因为等得太久，我甚至都没能热烈地庆祝一番。
E: In the end, when the official document was finally issued, I didn't feel the kind of joy you'd expect. I was just so numb from waiting so long that I couldn't even get hyped up to celebrate.

C: 好的！
E: Okay!

C: 那只小麻雀想尽办法将自己不惹人瞩目，但在我看来，这是弄巧成拙——有谁能永远只做到及格分呢？这不是有意为之，又是什么呢？
E: That little sparrow has tried her best to stay out of the spotlight, but in my estimation this has only backfired on her. Who out there is capable of only doing just enough every time? If it's not intentional, how else can we explain it?

C: 确实有一种不引人注目的感觉。
E: She does feel rather inconspicuous, doesn't she?

C: 思来想去，还是我不够了解他。所以我申请调任鳞渊境，想在他曾经战斗的地方，为他再做点什么……
E: Thinking back over it, I still didn't understand him well enough. So I volunteered to transfer over to Scalegorge Waterscape. I want to be where he once fought, and do something for him...

C: 虽然我尚在执勤，但我实在没法拒绝您，适当聊几句还是没有问题的。
E: I may be on-duty, but who am I to refuse you? It should be fine to have a chat about something appropriate.

C: 没什么事了。
E: I have nothing else.

C: 驾驭星槎，逐潮来去，检视那些珍珠般的持明卵，看着他们在沉睡中发光，真是世间最美妙的景象了。
E: It's the most wondrous sight in the cosmos to ride across the tides on a starskiff, marveling at those pearly Vidyadhara eggs as they glow in hibernation.

C: 正好，拿给我看看。
E: Okay, let me have a look.

C: 你真是打得好算盘。
E: You really do have a cunning scheme.

C: 后来，我听说全城都在搜捕我们丹士长。那时我才发现，丹枢大人加入了药王秘传。
E: Later, I learned that the whole city was hunting down our chief alchemist. Only then did I realize that Lady Dan Shu had joined up with the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 够了，真是够了，我真*仙舟粗口*受够了。
E: Enough is enough. This is *Xianzhou profanity* enough!!

C: 唉…借您吉言吧。您也多保重……
E: *Sigh*... I appreciate your encouragement. Take care...

C: 这不就喜提越狱罪了么，他们便给我找了看守更严密的监狱。但那地方也没有趣多少，我一没忍住又跑了出来。
E: Obviously, that got me arrested for jailbreaking, so they got a prison with tighter security for me. But that place was just as boring. I couldn't help but escape again.

C: 预测不是立即做出改变的保证。
E: Forecasting doesn't guarantee immediate changes.

C: 公司不会花重金买破烂的，所以我的工作还得继续做。
E: We're not wasting money on worthless junk. That's why I'm here to make sure everything is legit.

C: 你也先别走，我姑且算是个劳动中介，你要是有什么本事，可以来找我试试运气。
E: And don't walk off. I still call myself an employment agent, so if you have any special skills, you're welcome to come and try your luck here.

C: 再说这里是仙舟罗浮，要是随随便便和他动手，只会招来地衡司或是云骑军，徒增麻烦。以后有的是机会干掉他，哈哈哈哈。
E: Plus, I can't just go and fight him. This is the Xianzhou Luofu after all. The Realm-Keeping Commission or the Cloud Knights will be all over me. But don't worry, there'll be plenty of opportunities for me in the future. Hahahaha!

C: 我又没偷听，你是自意识过剩？
E: I'm not eavesdropping. Aren't you just being too self-conscious?

C: 现在手头的事也不忙，您尽管问，我要是知道的，我尽量回答。
E: I'm not too busy right now, so feel free to ask me any questions. I'll do my best to satisfy your curiosity.

C: 咱从不吃那些小鱼小虾，也不吃食草动物，更不吃被驯化的猛兽…咱只吃有资格与咱生死对决的动物。
E: I don't eat small fish and shrimp, nor herbivores, or even domesticated beasts... I only eat animals that I can fight to the death with.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 之前说过的物流规划…
E: About the logistics planning we talked about...

C: 不打扰你啦。
E: I'll leave you alone, then.

C: 商业顾问来了，我们开始工作吧。
E: The business consultant is here. Let's get to work.

C: 慢慢走，慢慢听。
E: Take your time, and listen.

C: 结果这一回可「有趣」了…唉，要不是有您和另外几位英雄在场，真不知道事情会如何收场……
E: And lo and behold, things got real "lively" this time around... If you and the other heroes hadn't been around, who knows what would have happened in the end?

C: 最近生意还顺遂吗？
E: Has business been going well lately?

C: 你真的只打算做生意吗？
E: Is the business really your sole focus now?

C: 嘿嘿～阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务～
E: Hehe, the Arma Correctional Group is glad to be of service!

C: 是{NICKNAME}啊，刚想小憩片刻，你就来了。
E: You're here, {NICKNAME}. I was just about to take a break.

C: 神策府里怎么经常见不到你？
E: Why don't I see you often here?

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I better leave you alone then.

C: 唉，可别提了…托小桂子的福，每次被淘汰，人气投票立刻山珍海味般涌来，拦都拦不住！
E: Agh, don't even get me started... Thanks to little Gui, every time we got eliminated, the popularity votes come pouring in like there's no tomorrow!

C: 你们要想探访，就请去神策府找他吧。
E: If you want to visit him, please head to the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 我嘛，本就是在父母要求下考入太卜司的，一心只想混个安稳。我行事低调，从不引人注目，一直以来工作都很顺利的。
E: I only joined the Divination Commission because my parents want me to, and all I am after is a stable job. I've been keeping a low profile to avoid drawing attention all this while. Things at work have been going pretty well so far.

C: 为什么要我来见证？
E: Why do you want me to witness such a thing?

C: 你们也太菜了…放弃吧！
E: You're too weak... Just give up.

C: 不聊了，拜拜。
E: That's it for today. Bye.

C: 上一次封印了建木龙形根雕的时候，我感觉到整座鳞渊境都在回应我的声音，和我共鸣…那一定是龙尊才有的体验吧。
E: When I was sealing the dragon-shaped root of the Ambrosial Arbor back then, I felt the entire Scalegorge Waterscape responding to my voice and resonating with me... That must have been an experience unique to the high elder.

C: 大人使用过十王司的法器藏月瓠，将岁阳一口气吸纳其中，感觉如何？
E: How did it feel using the Lunaumbra Gourd, the Ten-Lords Commission's sacred vessel, to imprison heliobi in one fell swoop?

C: 我要是进去了，你单手拿不起我…
E: If I go in, you won't be able to carry me with just one hand...

C: 能讲讲十王司的驱魔道具吗？
E: Can you tell me about the Ten-Lords Commission's exorcism tools?

C: 真能困出魔阴身？
E: Can you really become mara-struck from tiredness?

C: 本季的高级定制是「流云浮生」，这个系列主打的单品是{F#镶边襜褕}{M#大袖深衣}，这是最地道的仙舟风格。
E: Our tailored line for this season is "Floating Clouds." The trademark outfit for this line is the {F#embroidered jacket}{M#sleeved robe} — a hallmark of the native Xianzhou style.

C: 但是「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>」会在每次计算任务开始前用部分资源对任务进行评估，仅会调用部分的篆刻回路，多线程运作效率就会因此提升……
E: But before each calculation begins, the Auspicious XV will use resources to evaluate the upcoming tasks. It will only activate parts of the engraved circuit, thereby improving the efficiency of multi-thread operations.

C: 好的亲亲，你还有什么想问的吗？
E: Alright babe, what else would you like to ask?

C: 给我讲一段「云上五骁」吧。
E: Tell me something from the High-Cloud Quintet.

C: 原来这彪形大汉，穿越星门而来，只为在刀剑功夫上争个高低。历代剑首大会上都有域外剑客参战，他们大多武艺高强、身怀绝技。
E: This burly fellow had traversed the interstellar portals merely to pit his skills in a martial competition. There would always be such foreign swordmasters in past Sword Champion summits who would participate in duels, and many of them would be extremely skilled.

C: 就简单地再聊两句。
E: Just a couple of more things.

C: 要是这茶饮讲究全都讲起来未必有点太长，我们就讲「选茗」、「蓄水」这两个规矩吧。
E: It would take forever to explain all the rules. I'll just talk about tea selection and water retention for now.

C: 结果西衍先生却说「绝对不应当惦记着用这种事情获利」，然后教育了我一顿……
E: In the end, Mr. Xiyan told me off and said that I shouldn't have thought of profiting from the crisis...

C: 那是受过「丰饶」赐福，到处劫掠、繁衍的长生种联军。他们已经摧毁转变了许多世界。
E: Blessed by Abundance, they are allied armies of other long-life species who engage in wanton pillaging and reproduction. They have destroyed and transformed many worlds.

C: 我心说老周人挺好，得想办法治治他儿子。
E: I knew that Old Zhou was a good man, so I had to try to find a way to cure his son.

C: 曲艺之路还很遥远呐。
E: The artist's path is long and difficult.

C: 别忘了坚持运动，肌肉是不会背叛你的。
E: Don't slack off on your training. Remember, muscles will never betray you!

C: 在仙舟这可是顶级机密，先前那棵巨木长起来的时候你没见着吗？巡逻的云骑，还有地衡司的人…严防死守的。
E: It is a top secret on the Xianzhou. Didn't you see how things were when that giant tree grew? It was heavily guarded by people from the Realm-Keeping Commission and the Cloud Knights were on patrol.

C: 神仙姐姐才不是迷信哩！在咱们那里，无论男女老幼都认得神仙姐姐，见她亲自施展过仙术，救了咱一村子的人！
E: She's not some old wives' tale! Everyone knows who she is where I'm from! I even saw her using celestial magic to save my entire village!

C: 我虽然是博识学会的学者，但是我对博识学会的描述也是片面的，不客观的。这一点，我希望你能把它当作前提来看待。
E: I may be a student there, but my opinion of the Intelligentsia Guild is bound to be biased. So take this with a grain of salt.

C: 道理也很简单。你会把你小时候去过、长大后被荒废的剧场，当做「考古学」的遗址吗？对于仙舟人来说，我们眼中久远的历史，不过是他们的童年回忆罢了。
E: It's a simple concept. Would you consider the abandoned theater that you used to visit as a child as some kind of archaeological ruin? What we consider to be ancient history is merely a childhood memory for the long-lived Xianzhou natives.

C: 在路边看到了很多的快递箱。
E: I saw a lot of parcels outside.

C: 没事，我身强体壮，很扛撞的。
E: No worries. I'm built differently.

C: 总而言之，「一秒钟事故，一千年痛苦」，可千万要记在心里。
E: Remember: Accidents only take one second to happen, but the pain can last a thousand years. Never forget that.

C: 也许可以更直白一点？
E: Perhaps it could be a bit more straightforward?

C: 想随便聊聊。
E: Just a casual chat.

C: 嗯？怎么了，{F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}，我看你盯着姐姐这里半天了，你有什么需要我帮助你的吗？
E: Hmm? What is it, {F#young lady}{M#young man}? You've been staring at me for a while. How may I help you?

C: 你这叫什么话？不拿走也不能乱碰啊，更何况那些都是驭空大人的东西。
E: Talking back? Even if you didn't take anything, touching isn't allowed. Moreover, these are Madam Yukong's things.

C: 关于驭空大人…
E: About Madam Yukong...

C: 好啊，恕不远送。
E: Sure, have a nice day.

C: 你也太狂了，来打一架吧。
E: Confident, huh. Up for a spar?

C: 这不就是逃票么？
E: Isn't that just fare dodging?

C: （轻轻打一下）
E: (Whack lightly.)

C: 你要是感兴趣的话，我们可以深入交流一下。
E: You can talk about this in-depth if you're interested to find out more.

C: 要登记的是港作拖轮！
E: This is a towing skiff for the harbor!

C: 只能这样了。
E: That's all we can do.

C: 要登记的是港作拖轮！
E: This is a towing skiff for the harbor!

C: 你好，问您件事，不知道你有没有在竞锋舰上见过一个头上顶着羊角的人？
E: Greetings, I have a question requiring your help: Have you seen a person with a ram's horn aboard the Skysplitter?

C: 去典当铺鉴定后…
E: When you went for an appraisal at the pawn shop...

C: 起个标题吧，就叫…
E: I've already thought of the caption...

C: 很多人问过我相同的问题，我开馆授徒的第一课就是讲仙舟法律和无限自卫权。
E: Many people have asked me the same question. The first lesson I teach at my school is about the laws of Xianzhou and unlimited self-defense.

C: …可惜，她已经不再飞翔了。
E: ...Unfortunately, she is no longer sky-worthy.

C: 镇妖塔轻轻浮起，你想要与哪位岁阳对话？
E: The suppression towers float gently. Which heliobus would you like to talk to?

C: 只是闲聊罢了，人类，不必说得好似来办什么正事一样。
E: This is just small talk, human. Don't take it for anything serious.

C: 星燏。
E: Stafyre.

C: 人类真是太多心了，老夫只是起了一份爱才惜才的心思罢了。身为武者，老夫一诺千金，绝不会借着这机会对你不利的。
E: Humans really overthink everything. I am simply inspired by your talent and wish to nurture it, that's all. I swear on my honor as a warrior that I would never take this chance to cause you any harm.

C: 哼，落到你们手里，我无话可说。但别指望我作为你的财富顾问，给你出谋划策！
E: Hmph, I've fallen into you people's hands and have nothing to say. But don't expect me to give you strategic advice as some kind of financial advisor!

C: 要不走近点，怎么把你揍趴下。
E: If I don't come closer, how am I supposed to beat you down?

C: 根本忙不过来！本座向来严于律己，对公务毫不懈怠。
E: I'm snowed under with work! I've always been self-disciplined and taken my duties seriously.

C: 至于再往前什么时候她被掉包，而真正的停云又在哪里，又或者说停云早已不在了…只能说信息太少，本座也未能知道更多。
E: As for when the real Tingyun was replaced, where she might be right now, and whether she had already passed away... I don't have any more information than you do.

C: 你是说那两位重犯？还是说玉阙仙舟的见闻？
E: You mean regarding the two felons? Or about the Xianzhou Yuque?

C: 我不是很会打…
E: I can't really play...

C: 我再也不敢了…
E: No way...

C: 户籍科效率好低…
E: Household registrations are so inefficient...

C: 织机神算无误！
E: The loom of the universe weaves only the truth!

C: 建木生发，孽物横行…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor sprouts, and evil runs rampant...

C: 虚虚实实，名之曰谬。
E: Truth and Falsity. It is the Error.

C: 过热导致元件出了问题…
E: Overheating can break hardware components...

C: 吃完以后心里美。
E: Fill up your tummy and your heart.

C: 但这是我祖上传下的店铺。
E: This store is a legacy of my ancestors.

C: 被星际和平公司盘下了。
E: Got bought out by the Interastral Peace Corporation.

C: 通常来说，只要出席葬礼…
E: Generally speaking, your attendance at the funeral itself...

C: 我也不知道…他走之后，家里空荡荡的，我怎么都睡不着。
E: I have no idea... Since he left, the house was so empty, I couldn't sleep.

C: …你说话怎么突然文绉绉的，这不像你诶。
E: ... Why are you waxing poetic all of a sudden? This is so not like you.

C: 药王赐福，快快降临…
E: O quickly bless us, Sanctus Medicus...

C: 哈哈…话虽如此，塞涅俄丝大人说话的口吻，一时半会儿还是改不过来呢……
E: Haha... Even so, Lady Seliose's way of speaking proved quite persistent...

C: 举手之劳，你喜欢就好，不知道它是否和我记忆中别无二致呢。
E: It's a piece of cake, I'm glad you like it. I wonder if it's exactly as I remember it.

C: 呵呵，吾翻动过他的脑子…啊，领教过他的智慧，自当知无不言。首先要说的，便是他穿着大地兽睡衣，在敬拜学派的礼会上当众致辞一事……
E: Hehe, I've flipped through his mind... Ah, I've experienced his wisdom firsthand, so I shall tell you everything. The first thing worth mentioning is how he gave a public speech at a Venerationism ceremony wearing dromas pajamas...

C: 太，阳…纺锤…发、发朵……
E: S—Sun... spindle... f—fawer...

C: 虽然它已不再具备墨涅塔的神力，但它依然是最纯粹的「浪漫」象征。希望高洁的灵魂能够永远守护你的旅程。
E: Though it no longer possesses Mnestia's divine power, it remains the purest symbol of "Romance." May the spirit of nobility forever guard your journey.

C: 赛法利娅，你这个小机灵鬼，一定吃了不少苦头，才练出这样一番伶牙俐齿吧？
E: Cifera, you clever little thing! Must've been through quite a lot to develop such a sharp tongue, huh?

C: 我也想听，给我听听。
E: I want to listen to it too. Tell me about it.

C: 嗷呜~嗷呜嗷呜~
E: Awoo~ Awoo awoo~

C: 你说的伤者不会是…
E: Don't tell me the injured person is...

C: 啊…是它，传说中的「大地兽之祖」荒笛大人。
E: Ah... It's Lord Terravox, the legendary "ancestor of the dromases."

C: 或许就像法吉娜贪恋它的秘酿一样，我也天然地喜爱这从「大地」熔炉中诞生的物事呐！
E: Perhaps, just as Phagousa can't resist their ambrosia, I've always had a natural fondness for what's born from the furnace of Earth!

C: 那…她下手是忒重了点。
E: I see... She definitely went a little bit too hard.

C: 欢迎您抵达竞锋舰，请配合进行安检流程。
E: Welcome aboard the Skysplitter. Please cooperate with the security inspection process.

C: 本来想趁着职务之便。
E: I wanted to take advantage of my post.

C: 求求你了，让我静一静。
E: Please, leave me alone.

C: …自省身前。不赦十恶，罪责种种，难逃法眼。
E: ...reflects upon their past. The Ten Unpardonable Sins are burdened with guilt and cannot escape from the judgment of omniscia.

C: 幽狱大门没有防夹感应。但即使这样，也阻止不了你在夹缝中寻求乐趣的闲情雅致。
E: The Shackling Prison's gate lacks anti-pinch sensors. Nevertheless, this doesn't stop you from seeking leisurely elegance in the gap for fun.

C: 被遗弃的快递箱。你根本想象不到它的主人究竟多么健忘，或者多么有钱。
E: This is an abandoned courier package. Its owner must be very forgetful or very rich.

C: 吧台上陈列了不同口味的苏乐达。冰点款、经典款、劲爽款、无气款…唯独没有无糖款。看来苏乐达™也有它的底线，唯有糖浆不可妥协。
E: SoulGlad of various flavors line the bar top: Subzero, Classic, Power Refresh, Uncarbonated... Only the sugar-free variety is missing. It appears there is a bottom line that SoulGlad™ won't compromise on, especially when it's about syrup.

C: 你本应该看着这两只机巧鸟产生哲学的思考「鸟为什么会飞？」但你观察了一段时后，改变了思考命题——「这俩傻鸟为什么不会飞？」
E: Gazing at the two cycranes, you are supposed to philosophically ponder the question: Why do birds fly? But after a period of further observation, you decide to change your inquiry: Why can't these two dumb birds fly?

C: 偷懒的人也调整了自己的动作，看来大家都进入状态了。
E: The slacker has fixed up their movements. Looks like everyone is in shape.

C: 为啥不偷学点仙舟武术？
E: Why not secretly learn some Xianzhou martial arts?

C: 星槎的培育过程似乎与胚胎发育过程几乎无异。那么，星槎是否也是一种生物呢？
E: The cultivation process of a starskiff is similar to the one of a fetus. So, is starskiff a kind of creature?

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 孽物」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Abomination."

C: 「岁阳，无形目 • 魂精科 • 岁阳亚种。世外妖魔族类的一支。」
E: "Heliobi: Shapeless, spirit essence, heliobi subspecies. They are one of the races of the Extraneous Demons."

C: 「『业务巩固部』，主管：疤眼夫人，董事会理事。对联盟潜在危害：极低。」
E: "Head of Business Consolidation: Madam Scarred Eye, a board member. Potential threat level to the alliance: Very low."

C: 「秉承昔日求药使的初衷，联盟成立以来竭力为诸多文明世界提供医药支援，扑灭瘟疫灾殃。除『长生』禁忌不可违犯外，抵达仙舟的求药人所求无不应允。」
E: "In keeping with the aspiration of the Elixir Seekers in the past, the alliance has provided medical support to help many worlds in eradicating plagues since its establishment. Except for offering longevity, the alliance has done everything it could for everyone who comes to Xianzhou for help."

C: 最终，你决定放下这份近二十万字的巨作，将它和箱子一起留在了街边。
E: In the end, you decide to put down this forty-page magnum opus and leave it behind on the side of the road alongside the box.

C: 你想了想，决心把时间浪费在更有趣的事情上，转身离开了箱子。
E: Having decided to spend your time on more interesting stuff, you turn around and walk away from the package.

C: 持明工正淙衍监修，龙尊造像系列，龙尊雨别素模<敕令古海造型><unbreak>001</unbreak>，价格待定，发售日待定。
E: Supervised by the Vidyadhara artisan, Congyan. High elder statue series, Yubie prototype "Royal Decree Ancient Sea Design" <unbreak>001</unbreak>. Price and launch date to be determined.

C: 它被一朵巨大的珊瑚承托着，宛若婴儿在摇篮里渴睡。
E: The egg is nestled atop a hulking shelf of coral, like a child dozing in its cradle.

C: 你轻轻将手放在晶壳上，一个梦泡泡在你耳旁绽开。你瞬间明白，珍珠里的孩子渴望成为一名绘制瑰丽丹青的画师。
E: You gently place your hand on the crystal shell, and a dream bubble blooms near your ear. In a moment, you understand that the child in the pearl desires to become a painter who creates brilliant paintings.

C: 开拓客向来助人为乐！
E: Trailblazers are always happy to help those in need!

C: 可还没等读出那行仙舟文字的具体内容，你便被突如其来的电子提示音吓了一跳：
E: Before you can read out the content written in the Xianzhou language, you are taken aback by a sudden beep.

C: 杜老板提起过，很多烈焰浓茶是以传奇顾客的名字来命名的。也许有一天，你的名字也可以——「喝了这杯『{NICKNAME}』，敬金人巷。」
E: Boss Du has said that many Flaming Potent Teas are named after legendary patrons. Perhaps this could be you one day, too. "Here, have a cup of '{NICKNAME}'! For Aurum Alley!"

C: 不好意思，误会了…
E: Oops, my bad...

C: 不愧是药王秘传的老对手，轻易就看透了他们的伪装。
E: Just as expected from the old foe of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus! You see through their facades with ease!

C: 这些狗血的争吵与你无关。你决定将小家伙送去地衡司，他们会为谛听找个妥善的安置之处。
E: These petty squabbles are nothing to do with you. You decide to send the little dog over to the Realm-Keeping Commission. They will find a fitting home for this Diting.

C: 象征家族的图腾，宣示了五大家系对梦境的统治和维护。
E: A totem representing The Family, declaring the Five Lineages' rule and maintenance of the dreamscape.

C: 你好，查水表的。
E: Hello, I'm here to check the water meter!

C: 呼，幸好不是真的要加班。
E: Phew, so glad I don't have to work overtime.

C: 据说在非自然死亡时，它只需阳光照射三天就能起死回生，因此也被戏称作「宇宙中最好养活的盆栽」。
E: Legend has it that in the case of unnatural death, it only requires three days of sunshine to be able to bring the dead back to life. That is why it has been nicknamed: "The easiest plant to raise in the universe."

C: 每个梦境时刻都有专门负责传播好事的报社，此为其中之一。
E: Every Dreamscape Moment has a newspaper publisher dedicated to spreading good news — this is one of them.

C: 梦境是现实印象的投射，而这个梦的主人对柜子的印象并不深刻。
E: The Dreamscape is a projection of reality's impression, and to this dream's master, the impression of the drawer isn't deep.

C: 适合潜入、隐藏；不宜追逐战。
E: Suitable for infiltration and concealment; not suitable for pursuit.

C: 球笼服务已暂时停运，恢复日期尚未确定。
E: The spheroid service has been halted indefinitely.

C: 屏幕上只余无意义的画面，伴随着刺耳的电流声。
E: Only garbled visuals are left on the screen, accompanied by the sounds of an ear-piercing electrical current.

C: 巨大的梦泡淹没了这座电梯。倘若你不想被混乱的记忆填满，就离它远一点吧。
E: Giant dream bubbles have flooded this elevator. If you don't want to be drowning in chaotic memories, you'd better stay away from the elevator.

C: 这个名字已经成为了一个符号，吸引了许多人前来匹诺康尼。从这个角度出发，我没有怨言。
E: The name has become an icon that draws many to Penacony. I have no complaints about that.

C: 呵，所谓高尚无瑕的艺术不过是个谎言…这世上占据主导地位的还是迂腐与轻浮。
E: Hmph, the notion of noble and flawless art is nothing but a deception... Pedantry and frivolity still rule the world.

C: 我也尝试过各种各样的手段方法。就比如我手里这瓶——匹诺康尼特产的美梦糖浆，一小瓶就能让脑子安静一整天，既无副作用，也不会上瘾。
E: I've tried many methods, such as this bottle I'm holding — this Dream Syrup, Penacony's specialty. One small bottle can keep my mind calm for an entire day. It has no side effects and isn't addictive.

C: 就是说，为什么活着这么难呢？
E: Which is to say: Why is living so hard?

C: 证书就是人生的意义！
E: Certificates are what determine meaning in life!

C: 当、当然有用了！要是没有那些证书，我该怎么跟家里人证明，说我有用呢！
E: O—Of course there's a point! If I didn't have these certificates, how would I prove to my family that I'm useful!

C: 洋溢在笨罐先生脸上的那种天真无邪的笑意消失了，取而代之的是…你很熟悉的，享用完一顿绝妙午餐后的困倦与乏味。
E: That sweet, sunshine smile that Mr. Piggy Bank is brimming with vanishes, replaced by... that look you're all too familiar with: The lethargy and tedium you experience after a sumptuous lunch.

C: 无论如何，我都会祝您旅途顺利——哦，还有…如果我是您的话，就会尽量避免和「调查记者辛格勒」产生联系。
E: Regardless, I bid you safe journey. Oh, and... If I were you, I'd steer clear of Singler, that investigative reporter.

C: 都拿去花！
E: Take it all!

C: …别来跟我玩「幼崽」还是「幼童」的文字游戏，其余种族的幼年期都不行！这点刚才说得很清楚了。
E: ...Don't squabble with me over the definition of "cubs" and "children" — no juveniles of any species! I already made that very clear.

C: 我的意志坚如钢铁。
E: My resolve remains as strong as steel.

C: 可由于「万界之癌」的影响，我只能留在梦境里，帮助家族文过饰非。我一直追求的真相反倒成了最无所谓的东西。
E: But thanks to the Cancer of All Worlds, all I can do is remain here in the dreamscape and help The Family smooth over their misdeeds. The very truth that I wanted to pursue has turned out to be the most insignificant thing of all.

C: 你现在不再唱歌了吗？
E: Don't you sing anymore?

C: 哈哈哈，没想到它的表演这么合你胃口！
E: Hahaha, I never thought that you would like such a performance!

C: 好吧，反正我也没有其他事情可做……
E: Okay. I have nothing else to do at the moment anyway...

C: 家族迟早会回来，酒店也总会回到原本熙攘的模样。这份平静迟早会被打破，美好的事物终有消失的一天。一切都是彼此的隐喻……
E: The Family will be back sooner or later, and the hotel will return to its busy state. This serenity will be broken some day, like how every good thing will disappear one day. Everything is a metaphor for another...

C: 如果您以后在某处遇见她，请务必替我递上一句话：「有只广告牌在中央车站前等你，它会一直等下去的！」
E: If you happen to meet her somewhere, please tell her one thing for me: "There is a billboard in front of the Golden Central Station waiting for you. It will always be waiting for you!"

C: 但…假的也行啊，让我再见一次她吧。
E: But... Even if it's fake, I still wish that I could meet her just one more time.

C: 就前天，我正讲着刚想的笑话呢，回过头一看，餐厅新来的领班居然站在后面盯着我。更倒霉的是，他是个皮皮西人。
E: Just the other day, I was thinking about a new joke, and when I turned around, the new manager was standing there, staring at me. And to make matters worse, he's a Pepeshi.

C: 于是你继续追寻着黄金的音符。你们一路相伴，相携登上顶峰，俯瞰万里夜空；又跃入汪洋，溅起千丈白浪。
E: Following the trail of golden notes, you ascend to the pinnacle, beholding the night sky and plunging into an ocean, creating thousands of white capped waves.

C: 耳边突然响起一声暴躁的低吼，你被吓了个激灵。
E: A low, irritable growl emerges by your ears, giving you a scare.

C: 来，跟我一起念——没有猎犬，世界就完蛋了！
E: Come, chant with me: The world would be a goner without the Bloodhounds!

C: 我先走啦。
E: I'll be heading off now.

C: 于是我更加留心沿途的风景、各地的人情…不得不说，这或许才是人生真正的意义所在。
E: So I started paying more attention to the scenery along the way and the local customs... I have to say, this may really be the true meaning of life.

C: 这个「正经事」嘛，过去对我而言是做买卖谈生意、为家族牟利…而现在，我只想让自己开心。
E: As to how I got my money, I used to deal in trade in my younger days, turning profits for The Family... But now, I just want to be happy.

C: 朋友，如果今后不想在这里只能听到如机器般没有灵魂的声响，就请和我一起抵制自动乐团吧！
E: My friend, if you do not want to listen to any more of this soulless music played by machines in the future, let's band together and boycott the automated orchestra!

C: 你就这么恨自动乐团？
E: You abhor the automated orchestra this much?

C: 唔…或许成为有机生命并不是理解伟大音乐的先决条件。
