E: Hmm... Perhaps organic life isn't a prerequisite to understanding great music.

C: 你们的车不会出事故吗？
E: Your cars won't get into accidents?

C: 就算…可以给您交个底，真发生了事故，我们也有极为完善的售后服务，绝对不会让您的利益受损，这样可以放心了吧。
E: Even if... Well, I can assure you, in the event of an accident, our impressive after-sales care ensures that we will never compromise your interests, so you can rest assured.

C: 为了抹掉事故记录，这个月的公关成本上升了不少…哎，奖金又要变少了。
E: In order to erase the records of the accident, this month's public relations costs have gone up... *sigh* My bonus is going to shrink again.

C: 玩得开心，朋友，别让梦境留有遗憾！
E: Have fun, my friend! Don't leave any regrets in the Dreamscape!

C: 有时我也会感到劳累，也想摆脱这些印象…可大家的期许已经成了我的面具，戴上容易，摘下来难……
E: I feel tired too, sometimes. I want to escape these impressions... But people's expectations have become a mask for me; easy to wear, but very hard to remove...

C: 你老家是个怎么样的地方？
E: What is your home like?

C: 你在盯着…波奇？
E: You're staring at... Bocchi?

C: 一个诈骗嫌疑犯还不够，现在又来了个星际通缉的纵火犯。
E: As if a fraudster alone isn't enough, now I've got an interastrally wanted arsonist.

C: 音符引领你越坠越深。而后你仰头，终于得见钢琴家其人——
E: Deeply captivated, you follow the notes deeper and deeper. Finally, you look up and catch a glimpse of the pianist himself...

C: 你追寻着由他创造出的那些音符——你们一路相伴，穿越沉黑的湖底、坠入深蓝的永夜、跌进冷白的孤月……
E: You chase after the musical notes he has created. Together, you traverse the darkness at the bottom of the lake, the deep blue of the eternal night, and the cold white of the lonesome moon...

C: 您好，{F#美丽的女士}{M#英俊的先生}，能与您这样{F#美丽}{M#俊朗}的贵宾相遇，是我的荣幸。请让我为您调一杯饮品吧——
E: Greetings, {F#beautiful lady}{M#handsome sir}. It is an honor to meet such a {F#beautiful}{M#handsome} guest as yourself. Allow me to prepare a drink for you.

C: 这杯送您，尊敬的客人——希望您也能和我一样，享受知足带来的快乐。
E: Please take your drink, esteemed guest. I hope you find as much happiness in contentment as I do.

C: 身份判断：酒店贵宾。
E: Identity confirmed: Esteemed guest.

C: 我有问题！
E: I do need your assistance!

C: 让我看看你的货。
E: Let me see what you have for sale.

C: 我有话和你说。
E: I have something for you.

C: 你用手抚摸着杰诺的绒球。对方没有任何抵抗，就像一只享受服侍的小猫……
E: You run your hand over Jno's fluff ball. Jno enjoys it, much like a happy kitten getting some pets...

C: 好舒服，就像在泥塘里打滚……
E: So comforting... like rolling around in a muddy pond...

C: 你对「钟表匠」了解多少？
E: What do you know about the Watchmaker?

C: 很遗憾，我对那位大人物的真实生平知之甚少。但有关他的传说和梦境，我这里可是有不少存货！
E: Unfortunately, I don't know much about this great man, but I do have an extensive collection of his legends and dreams!

C: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
E: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

C: 只要您投入一点点{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}，窥梦电话就能自动检索你的通讯录，找到您正在熟睡的某位朋友——
E: Just insert a small amount of {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}, and the phone will automatically search your contacts for a sleeping friend and allow you to listen to their dreams...

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: 对店里的商品还满意吗？有任何意见，都可以直接向我提出，我们会尽全力改进。
E: Are you satisfied with the items in our store? If you have any suggestions, feel free to let me know and we will do our best to improve.

C: 哈哈哈，我还以为是什么事呢。不用担心，疾风侠会替你解决的。
E: Hahaha, I thought it was the end of the world! Relax, I'll help you.

C: （继续保持沉默！）
E: (Continue remaining silent!)

C: 我见过其他小鸟了。
E: I've met the other birdies.

C: 哇，真是太厉害啦！
E: Wow, that's amazing!

C: 您瞧，「知更鸟」是最近才被安装到「美梦排排乐」里的隐藏奖励机制，而您是第一个成功摇出三个「知更鸟」画像的幸运儿！
E: You see, the Robin is a hidden prize mechanism recently installed in Dreamy Slots, and you're the first lucky winner who gets three Robins in a row!

C: 谢谢你的帮助，但这件事情对我而言至关重要，我还得再好好考虑一下……
E: Thanks for your help, but this matter is of utmost importance to me. I still have to ponder on it properly...

C: 就拿我来说吧，除了工作，其余时间我都会回到现实，陪伴家人和宠物们——我家里养了几十只小动物。
E: Just take me as an example. When I'm not working, I'll return to reality to spend time with my family and pets — I have dozens of animals at home.

C: 这个嘛…最有名的苏乐达你肯定喝过了吧？那我推荐你试试噼咔白葡萄汽水，那玩意味道不咋样，但是劲儿特别足。美梦糖浆嘛…我倒是不太推荐，太甜了，而且喝完容易犯困。
E: Hmm... SoulGlad is the most popular one. You must have tried that, right? Then I recommend trying Pika White Grape Soda. It may not taste great, but it's got a lot of kick! Dream Syrup on the other hand... I wouldn't recommend it. It's too sweet and makes you really sleepy.

C: 别的不说，光是冒险中可能用到的资源装备，我就已经收藏了整整一屋子。
E: I already have a whole room full of resources and equipment that might be useful on an adventure, and that's just the beginning.

C: 于是你走近了些，轻轻拍了拍他垮塌的肩膀。
E: So, you approach him and gently pat his slumped shoulders.

C: 那群——狗东西！自己什么活也不干，一天到晚就知道对着别人指手画脚！
E: Those... scum! They never do any work themselves. All they know how to do is give orders!

C: 你是来匹诺康尼游玩的宾客？待的时间不短了吧，告诉我，你喜欢这个地方吗？
E: You're a visitor to Penacony, aren't you? You've been here for some time. Tell me, do you like Penacony?

C: 你肯定没想过吧，欺骗这个世界有多么容易。
E: I'm sure you've never thought how easy it would be to fool this world, have you?

C: 钟表披萨蛋糕卷，百层圣代柠檬挞；\n切片蛋糕飞碟堡，苜蓿色拉苏乐达？
E: We have Clockie Pizza, Cake Rolls, Hundred-Layered Sundaes, and Lemon Tarts\nSliced Cakes, Floatdisc Burgers, Alfalfa Salad, or SoulGlad?

C: 多亏了傻大个儿，之前那些找茬的、蹭吃蹭喝的，最近可是消停得很啊。
E: Thanks to that burly oaf, there's been far fewer people coming in and picking fights for free food and discounts.

C: 就知道你会问这个。当时情况紧急，没来得及详细说明，我也很少对人谈起。
E: I knew that was where you were going. The situation was critical back then, and I didn't have time to explain properly. I don't often talk to people about this, either.

C: 在常人看来这是一组平平无奇的隐夜鸫雕像，但他们其实各有所指。
E: To a regular person, they seem to be nothing more than a group of unremarkable Nightingale Statues, but they each have their own meaning.

C: 哇嘎嘎！呆站在这干嘛，别挡着我上菜呢。刚做好的美味的披萨，嘿，松脆，热腾得很！
E: Mwahaha! What are you staring at me for? You're in the way of my food! Freshly made pizza is so crispy and hot!

C: …您是想和我聊聊？当然可以，这儿的氛围很悠闲，正适合说说心里话。
E: ...You want to talk with me? Of course, the atmosphere is very relaxed, it's perfect for talking about what's on your mind.

C: 或许我该好好在这观察段时间，反思自己的观点了。
E: Perhaps I should reflect upon myself during my stay here.

C: 你还真是会挑问题。对，我得好好想想。但在得出结论前，我对它们的厌恶不会改变。
E: That's a touchy subject. I need to think more about it. But until I come to a conclusion, I won't change my distaste for it.

C: 你会尊重它们吗？
E: Will you show them respect?

C: 想听听你对我的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about me.

C: 可以啊，您想和我聊些什么呢？
E: Of course, what do you want to talk about?

C: 不过这不也挺好吗？干的活越多，钱就越多，离梦想就越近。
E: But that's not bad, no? The more work I have, the more money I make, and the more money I make, the closer I am to achieving my dreams.

C: 然后，再把卖掉的钱拿走九分，将吃剩的残渣施舍给我，美其名曰赏赐。
E: And then, they'll run off with most of the money and give me the scraps that remain as a "reward."

C: 我怎么就成你恩人了？
E: When exactly did I become your benefactor?

C: 哈哈，这当然是因为你们搞定了「谐乐大典」原定的调弦师啦。
E: Haha, of course it's when you sorted out the original Chordmaster for the Charmony Festival.

C: 「谐乐大典」？你就简单理解为我们的一种「祈愿」仪式吧。
E: The Charmony Festival? You can just think of it as a kind of "prayer" ceremony for us.

C: 人们纷纷发送讯息，告知彼此这个重要的消息，内容只有简单的两个字——「「石剑」」！
E: Everyone was sending messages to each other about this important news, and they only needed to use one word: "Stoneblade"!

C: 红哨小姐体内的某个机械器官发出了一阵聒噪的哨声，充分代表了她此时的心境。
E: Miss Red Whistle lets out a harsh squeal from a mechanical component somewhere inside her, which vividly represents her current state of mind.

C: 可惜啊…梦里什么都有，但连夜空都是假的。我看不见星星。
E: It's a shame though... We have everything here in the dream, but even the sky is fake. I cannot see the stars.

C: 那个「家族」里真的还有正常人吗？
E: Is there anyone normal in that "Family"?

C: 哇哦…流梦城寨还真是个好地方啊。这气氛，这打光——都是素材！好久没像现在这样思如泉涌了，爽。
E: Wow... Dreamflux Fortress is truly wonderful! This atmosphere, this lighting... It is all material! I have not felt my thoughts rush like this in some time. It feels amazing!

C: 科琳收敛了情绪，用一抹微笑取而代之。
E: Colleen gathers her emotions and sheathes them with a smile.

C: 所谓的忆质动力学，便是研究其运动规律并加以应用的学科。
E: And so, memoria dynamics is the study of its laws of motion and their application.

C: 那股影响流梦礁忆质的异常力量似乎消失了……
E: That abnormal energy influencing the memoria of Dreamflux Reef seems to have disappeared...

C: 哎呀…不好意思，年纪大了就是容易自顾自唠叨起来，我还是先给你简单介绍一下吧。
E: Oh. I'm sorry. It's far too easy to natter on about yourself once you get to my age. Let me give you a brief rundown of what we do.

C: 关于猫头鹰老师…
E: About Professor Owl...

C: 别看老师总待在树上，搭建美梦小镇的时候，森林里藏着不少坏蛋，老师和钟表小子把它们都解决了，是硬派鸟中的硬派鸟啾。
E: He may look like he just perches in a tree all day, but when we were building Dreamville, there were so many baddies lurking in the forest. The Professor and Clockie took care of them all. They're the most hardcore among the real hardcore birds, tweet.

C: 只是最近记性有点差…你手头有神奇的的「魔法硬币」吗？有它我就能想起来了啾！
E: It's just that my memory's been hazy recently... Do you have any of those wondrous magic coins? I'll be able to remember with them, tweet!

C: 让我想想…对了，剧场里种了不少稀奇古怪的植物，有个好奇心很重的孩子，多半还在<color=#dbc291ff>花坛周围</color>逗留啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, plenty of bizarre plants have been planted at the theater, and there's an infinitely curious child that usually loiters <color=#dbc291ff>around the flowerbed</color>, tweet!

C: 我是受雇于隐夜鸫家系的筑梦师…至少明面上是。
E: I am the Dreamweaver hired by the Nightingale Family... or at least I am in name.

C: 当我了解了苏乐达的故事，听闻了那位圣人救济罪人的传说，我便大受感动。那时我就立志，一定要将苏乐达和苏萨先生的心愿传向整个宇宙！
E: Once I learned about the story behind SoulGlad and the legend of how that saint redeemed the sinners, I was deeply moved. From then on, my resolution was cemented — I was determined to spread SoulGlad and Mr. Sousa's wish to the entire universe!

C: 为了改善犯人们的生活，苏萨先生靠狱中的食材以及阿斯德纳星系特有的「梦见草」调配出了「苏乐达」。
E: To improve the lives of these criminals, Mr. Sousa concocted SoulGlad using ingredients available in the prison and Dreamleaves, an herb that only exists in the Asdana star system.

C: 我们会通过各种渠道向银河各界推广苏乐达，力争在每一个重要星球上兴建一座苏乐达主题乐园、一座苏乐达主题公寓、一座苏乐达主题酒店、一座苏乐达服饰广场……
E: We will promote SoulGlad across the cosmos using various media channels, heavily investing in key planets to build SoulGlad theme parks, SoulGlad themed apartments, SoulGlad themed hotels, SoulGlad themed fashion plazas...

C: 你以前也是无名客吗？
E: Were you also a Nameless once?

C: 呃…一些蒙尘的明珠。
E: Ah... I mean, some dust-covered pearls instead.

C: 船上总是人来人往，带来不少外面的传说。
E: Aboard the ship, people come and go all the time, bringing with them tales of the outside world.

C: 谁又能想到，机油也是如此合适的调味料？
E: Who knew Machine Oil could be used as seasoning?

C: 看，这就是最重要的职业素养。客户有时候就是这样，越离奇复杂的事态，对他们来说越有说服力。
E: Now that's a professional answer! Some clients are easier to persuade when you share bizarre tidbits like this.

C: 切开是漂亮的粉红色，长时间的静置让牛排锁满肉汁。火候完美，入口嫩如吞拿鱼腹的细致，不会有牛肉的纹理，轻轻咀嚼便融化。唇齿间的香味令你着迷。
E: "Upon slicing, it reveals a gorgeous pink hue. Let it rest to unlock incomparable juiciness. Its tenderness compares to tuna belly, effortlessly melting away, leaving behind a lingering enticing aroma."

C: 咦？您…我…不是……
E: Huh? I—I am not...

C: 你为什么会来到匹诺康尼？
E: What brought you to Penacony?

C: 有时候我在想…就算我的裙装和这里的装潢一样奢华，可灯光熄灭之后，还会有人认得我记得我吗？我好害怕有一天，所有光环都会消退，只留下我…却被时间和所有人抛弃。
E: Sometimes I wonder, even if my outfit fits right in with all these luxurious decor, will anyone remember me after the lights go out? I'm scared to imagine the day I no longer enjoy the glitz and glamour, when I'm just the bare me... forgotten by time and everyone else.

C: 可惜，到目前为止，我独自看风景的时间加起来不超过五分钟。只能说…悲哀吧，呵呵。
E: Unfortunately, I can't even manage to get in five minutes of alone time to take in the views. Kind of sad, isn't it?

C: 风浪总是伴随机会，关键是要能够从容不迫地分析形势，做出最合理的判断，就像现在这样——耐心…冷静…等候…唔，不知道公司的谈判进行到哪个环节了？
E: Fluctuations always bring opportunities. The key is to calmly assess the situation and arrive at the most rational decision, like what I'm doing now — waiting, but with patience and composure. Ugh, I wonder how the IPC negotiations went?

C: 可以让小鸟们都回来吗？
E: Can you get the birds to return?

C: 蛋笨是的读复着跟来过倒？
E: !drawkcab siht taeper uoy fi loof a er'uoY

C: 虽说目前还处于预售阶段，但顾客们实在太热情，把未来一整年的出货量都给包圆了。真是拿他们没办法…您瞧，就是这款——
E: Well, they're still in the pre-sale phase, but the customers are so excited about them that they've ordered one whole year's worth of merchandise. They really know how to surprise me, huh? Look, this is what they ordered—

C: 有些住客总是对我们的小店抱有不切实际的期待，这又不是艇上包间的餐厅，有大厨给你现做！说什么「卖得贵」，真的服了！
E: Why do some guests have such terribly unrealistic expectations of our store!? We're not a restaurant serving private cabins of the airship, nor do we have a chef to serve meals cooked-to-order! I can't believe they're actually complaining that our prices are high!

C: 没什么事的话我就继续工作啦——诶，趁我和船长聊天，你们在干什么呢？想偷懒？你们不会犯那种愚蠢的错误，对吧？
E: If there's nothing else, I'll get back to work... Hey! What do you think you're doing while I'm reporting matters to the captain? Slacking off? You wouldn't do anything as silly as that, right?

C: 初次见面，星穹列车的开拓者，侍者亚梅塞菈为您服务。结论：您有<unbreak>13%</unbreak>的概率遭遇了「迷路」问题，<unbreak>85%</unbreak>的概率遭遇了「饥饿」问题。
E: Nice to meet you, Trailblazer of the Astral Express. Attendant Amsella at your service. Conclusion: There's a <unbreak>13%</unbreak> chance that you are lost, and an <unbreak>85%</unbreak> chance that you are hungry.

C: 不要学音乐，不要学音乐，不要学音乐！！！重要的事情说三遍，根本找不到工作，找不到一点。年轻人，千万不要被一时的激情冲昏头脑啊！
E: Don't study music, don't study music, don't study music!!! Important points have to be repeated three times. It'll be impossible for you to find a job. No job at all! So, youngster, don't be carried away by a moment of passion!

C: 这是匹式霸凌！
E: This is outright Penabullyism!

C: 既然成为派对之王的「梦想」备受歧视，那我抓紧换个别的吧。
E: Since being the Party King isn't considered a "real" dream, I guess I'd better come up with a new one.

C: 从建校起就有的老传统了，每年正赛开始前的周末，组委会都要将大家聚在一起，为今年的赛事预热造势。
E: That's a tradition we've kept going since the university's founding. Every year, the organizing committee would gather everyone on the weekend before the actual race, to build up hype and excitement for the event.

C: 只是…我们和所谓的标准体型生物体育竞技时，常常落下劣势，他们跑一步，我们要跨两步，有时候是三步。
E: It's just... When it comes to physical competition against so-called standard-sized organisms, we are often at a disadvantage — when they run one step, we have to take two, sometimes three.

C: 对吧！那家伙明明脑子挺好使，怎么就这么小心眼？不能把心思用在正道上吗？！
E: Right!? He's clearly a smart guy. How can he be so hung up on such petty things? Can he not just put his mind to good use!?

C: 不过说真的，人要是没了好奇心，和下水道里的鳄鱼又有什么区别？
E: But seriously, if humanity loses their curiosity, how are they any different from a crocodile crawling around in the sewers?

C: …拒绝…没有…深眠…我不想…还不是——嗷！
E: ...I refuse... I will not... slumber... I don't want... It's not... Oww!

C: 我看看是谁发的…哦，刚加入的新生……
E: Let's see who's been sending them... Oh, it's a new student...

C: 学忍术？呃…我当时是这么说的嘛，好像有点记不清了。让我想想，想想……
E: Learn ninjutsu? Hmm... Did I say that? I don't quite remember. Let me think. Let me think...

C: 你为什么要待在这里呢？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 你还会和乐队成员联系吗？
E: Will you still keep in contact with the other band members?

C: 我很高兴…能在最后的校园时光里遇到经理、乱破忍首，还有乐队的两位同伴。谢谢你们。
E: I'm very glad... that I met you, Head Ninja Rappa, and my two bandmates during the final moments of my school time. Thank you all.

C: 我厌恶财富学院的那群人很久了！
E: I've been tired of those Fortune Academy snobs for far too long!

C: 我没什么问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 你看到富贵眉头紧皱，几欲落泪。
E: You see Richie frowning, almost on the verge of tears.

C: 说不定过不了多久，我就能登上更大的舞台…这些都要感谢{NICKNAME}你啦！多亏了你，跟你搭戏我才能被芮克导演发掘！
E: Who knows. I might soon be destined for bigger stages... and it's all thanks to you, {NICKNAME}! It was because you partnered with me that I was discovered by Director Reca!

C: 好、好的，{NICKNAME}同学可以随时找我，我平时就在这里……
E: O—Okay, you can look for me anytime, {NICKNAME}. I'll just be right here...

C: 好、好的，{NICKNAME}同学可以随时找我，我平时就在这里……
E: O—Okay, you can look for me anytime, {NICKNAME}. I'll just be right here...

C: 看她这双天真无辜的眼眸——你还要将自己的罪行贯彻到底吗？
E: Staring at that pair of naive, innocent irises — are you truly going to follow through with your crime?

C: 为了这个目标，我一定会努力的，因为…因为…这就是我的「忍法」。
E: I will work hard for this dream because... because... this is my ninjutsu.

C: 很遗憾，我的记忆体逐渐被漫长的时间磨损，最初的记忆早已模糊不清。即便是列车长，也只隐约记得是某位无名客将我制造而成。
E: I apologize, my memory unit has been worn down by the gradual passage of time, so my earliest memories are hazy. Even the conductor only vaguely remembers it was some Nameless who created me.

C: 我还有几个比较短的「一句话幽默」。机会难得，就一并讲给您听吧。
E: I have a couple of one-liners. It's a rare opportunity, so let me share them all with you.

C: 关于星期日…
E: About Sunday...

C: 第五次谐乐大典期间的量产苏乐达，曾作为军用品运往战场，具有极高的历史价值。
E: A flavor of SoulGlad mass-produced during the fifth Charmony Festival. It was once used as military rations and transported on the battlefield. It also possesses great historical value.

C: 饶是见惯大场面的银河球棒侠，此情此景也有些应接不暇——因为合照微笑次数过多，嘴角开始抽搐；而握惯球棒的手龙飞凤舞地捏起笔，竟隐隐有些发抖。
E: Despite being the Galactic Baseballer who's used to all sorts of grand occasions, the current situation leaves you feeling a little overwhelmed — as the corner of your mouth starts to twitch from smiling for too many photos. Even your hand, honed of muscle and skill from swinging your bat, has started to tremble faintly.

C: 你的雕像被放置在长廊的中心位置，仿佛是船上的守护神，默默注视着过往的船员和客人，传递着一种无形的力量。
E: Your statue is placed at the central location of the long gallery, like a guardian of the ship, silently watching over the passing crew and guests, radiating an unseen strength.

C: 我比底座还高诶。
E: I'm taller than the base.

C: 梦里就我们一家报社。
E: We're the only newspaper agency in the dream.

C: …不可理喻。
E: ...Incomprehensible.

C: 居然又撞上了同事！
E: Only to bump into a colleague here!

C: 谁和我说有保底的？
E: Who told me this has a guarantee system?

C: 好酷的跑车！
E: Wow, this sports car is so cool!

C: 唔，好晕…
E: Ah... I'm feeling dizzy...

C: 我要喝十瓶苏乐达！
E: I want to drink ten bottles of SoulGlad!

C: 咱们是无福消受咯…
E: We definitely can't afford anything here...

C: 不会爆炸，吓不到人。
E: Nah, they won't pop or scare anyone.

C: 准确来讲，您挥手的总时长为<unbreak>13</unbreak>分<unbreak>45</unbreak>秒，其间包括两次时长分别为1分<unbreak>23</unbreak>秒与3分<unbreak>58</unbreak>秒的中断……
E: To be more precise, you have been waving for <unbreak>13</unbreak> minutes and <unbreak>45</unbreak> seconds, including two interruptions of 1 minute and <unbreak>23</unbreak> seconds and 3 minutes and <unbreak>58</unbreak> seconds, respectively...

C: 要是我跟他们一样有钱，我保准比他们更神气！到时候我就开车带着你，飞遍匹诺康尼的天空！
E: If I have as much money as they do, I'd be even more awesome! I'd take you and fly around the entire Penacony!

C: 什么时候都不下班。我们是匹诺康尼的支柱，必须要源源不断地产出好消息才行。
E: All hours here are working hours. We are the backbone of Penacony, and we need to keep releasing good news.

C: 有瓜？在哪在哪？
E: Any gossip? What's the scoop?

C: 别灰心，兄弟，你的努力我都看在眼里。比起试图依靠海选一夜成名的那些家伙，能每天专注一个事情的练习，你已经是生活的巨星了。
E: Don't fret, buddy. I can see that you're working hard. Compared to those who harbor daydreams of achieving stardom overnight, the fact that you're focused on practicing one thing every single day already makes you a superstar in everyday life.

C: 看着吧，我会追上他们的，然后你就会知道，那些光鲜亮丽的人，和我们并没有什么不同。
E: Just watch, I'll catch up to them, and then you'll realize that those flashy, gorgeous characters are no different from us.

C: 呃，他是我们的临时工。原本是负责这片区域的保洁人员……
E: Um, he's our temp staff. He used to be the cleaner for this area...

C: 听说了公司的人到了。
E: I heard the IPC's people have arrived.

C: 都是延毕的学生，在争社团部长的位置。哎，他们那是没新人了吗？
E: They both delayed their graduation and are arguing over the club president role. Are there no new candidates?

C: 筑梦学院的学生去参加工程实习时，财富学院偶尔会借用他们的大教室——当然是免费借用，财富学院从不干吃亏的事。
E: When the Dreamweaver Academy students attend building project internships, Fortune Academy will occasionally borrow their vast classroom — free of charge of course. Fortune Academy never takes a losing deal.

C: 梅芙恩女士，鸢尾花家系家主，谐乐学院名誉校长。曾于荒原之中傲然绽放的蓝玫瑰——自她之后，鸢尾开遍原野，美梦姹紫嫣红。
E: Lady Maeven, Iris Family Head, Charmony Academy's honorary dean. A blue rose who once bloomed supreme in the wasteland — With her leadership, the Irises spread across the barrens, dreams blooming in kaleidoscopic vibrancy.

C: 毕竟大部分成员参加社团，都是出于好玩的心理，强行以专业的水准来要求所有人，既不现实，也没什么意义，对不对？
E: Most members join clubs out of sheer fun. It's not very practical to force professional standards on everyone, and it's pretty meaningless too, no?

C: 你这也太拼命了吧…
E: You're really going all in for it...

C: 跟着我的节奏哦。三、二、一……
E: Follow my rhythm now, six, seven, eight...

C: 一个只有你我的地方…
E: A place for just the two of us...

C: 行商不易，后会有期。
E: Wish you all the best in your business.

C: …上一世，我是预言中翁法罗斯的救世主。我的降生给所有瑟希斯的信徒带来希望，树庭上下倾尽所有将我养育至预言中对抗黑潮的那一天。
E: ...In my previous life, I was the prophesied savior of Amphoreus. My birth instilled hope in every faithful disciple of Cerces, with the Grove sparing no expense in bringing me up for the day when I am prophesied to stand against the encroaching black tide.

C: 亻尔摇了摇头，努力睁大眼睛，向前伸出手手手——
E: You shaaake your head, strug gling to open your eyes wide. Your haaaands reach out ahead, but—

C: 嗷呜？
E: Awooo?

C: …那它现在消气了吗？
E: ...Has the dromas calmed down now?

C: 难、难道说，我还能退化？
E: W—Wait... I can regress even further?

C: 幸好！这一切都只是你喝了法吉娜盲盒之后产生的狂想，它不是真的。
E: Fortunately, this is all just a wild fantasy after you drank the Phagousa Blind Box. It's not real.

C: 趁你的身体还没有彻底反应过来，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的神威已经褪去，你又重新变回了人类的模样。
E: Before your body fully reacts, the power of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} fades away, and you turn back into a human.

C: 我会，保卫奥赫玛的安全，不保卫的时候，我会做饭。
E: I'll be protecting Okhema, and when I'm not, I'll be cooking.

C: 要不，说说你的研究吧。
E: How about telling me more about your research?

C: 那确实是暌违已久的美味了。我记得那是吾师与我初见时亲手烹饪的，还放了雅努萨波利斯的特产。
E: They did indeed have a wonderful flavor that I have not enjoyed for a long time since. I remember my teachers cooked them the first time that we met. They even added some Janusopolis specialty ingredients.

C: 但从某种角度上说，他也是最不像悬锋人的悬锋人。
E: Though, in some ways, he is the least Kremnoan of all.

C: 当然可以！小灰想聊些什么呢？又想听*我们*给你唱预言的歌谣吗？
E: No problem! What would you like to discuss, Little Gray? Do you want to hear our song of prophecy again?

C: 给我看看。
E: Let me see.

C: 没什么话要说啦，再见！
E: That's all I wanted to talk about. Goodbye!

C: 好的，再见，下次有机会再一起聊聊天吧。
E: Okay, farewell. Let's talk again when we get a chance.

C: 我应该已经被黑潮带走了...为什么偏偏是我留下来？
E: I should have been taken by the black tide... Why did it leave me behind?

C: 我没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 男子在口袋里摸索了半晌，终于小心翼翼掏出一枚脏兮兮的硬币。硬币的一面刻着个哭脸，另一面则是笑脸。
E: The man digs around in his pockets for some time before carefully pulling out a dirty coin. The coin has a crying face engraved on one side and a smiling face on the other.

C: 不想加入热闹的人群？
E: Don't you want to join in the bustling crowd?

C: 能给我介绍下你的研究吗？
E: Could you please tell me about your research?

C: 据说浴场的泉眼是法吉娜的恩赐，不同浴池的泉水各有不同的效果。除了治愈身心的常见功效外，传闻黄金裔专用的池水可能蕴含微量的泰坦之力。
E: Legend has it that the fonts of the spring water are a gift from Phagousa, and different baths can give you different effects. Besides the usual effects of healing both body and mind, rumor has it that waters in the Chrysos Heirs' bath contain vestigial traces of Titan power.

C: 好咧！躺累了泡澡，泡无聊了再躺回来享受美食——你试试就知道了，这才是美好的一天……
E: Alright! When I tire of lying down, I'll bathe. When I'm bored of bathing, I'll lie down again and enjoy some delicious food... Try it for yourself, you will realize that this is true perfection...

C: 据说有一次，王亲自率军攻打奥赫玛，一路高歌猛进，却在追击时不慎坠入了奥赫玛人设置的陷坑中……
E: It's said that when the king personally led the army in a siege against Okhema, their warpath was paved with fury and song, but they carelessly fell into a dastardly Okheman trap...

C: 什么馈赠，我看看。
E: What gift is that? Lemme see.

C: 但我告诉你，宝贝儿…过去这儿可不是这样的…鱼儿们…起舞…醉客们…纵欲、起舞、纵欲……
E: But let me tell you, my dear... It wasn't like this in the past... The fishes... they dance... The drunks... frolicking, dancing, frolicking...

C: 信仰法吉娜的城邦，我们很少去。迄今为止，奥赫玛，我们最喜欢。
E: The city of Phagousa's faith, we rarely visit. Okhema, our favorite, it is so far.

C: 当然，操作员只管按您说的操作，具体是要抓个什么东西，还是把哪的屋顶给掀了，他们绝不会多一句嘴。
E: Of course, the operators only listen to what you say. Be it something you want to catch, or some rooftop you want to tear down, they get the job done with no questions asked.

C: 得嘞，朋友，常来光顾哈？
E: Be well, friend. Stop by often, eh?

C: 这天外之音来自一个被称为圣女的骗子，一个目不能视却要指引他人的盲者，名为帕西提亚的凡俗女子的心……
E: This celestial echo comes from a liar conferred with the title of Holy Maiden. A blind person who couldn't see guiding the masses, the heart of an ordinary woman named Pasithea...

C: 想想看，远古时期就得到广泛认可，据说是由刻法勒创立的五大时段，竟然被证实需要修改，这是多么令人震惊的发现啊！
E: Imagine this — the five periods of the day, established by Kephale in ancient times and widely recognized ever since are now proven to need modification. What a startling discovery!

C: 你对这份工作还真是上心…
E: You take your job seriously...

C: 我发明了一双「腿」，穿上它们，哪怕是腿脚不便的人，也能够像扎格列斯的黄金裔一样健步如飞，甚至能一跃千里。不用我多说，你应该能理解它的价值。
E: I invented a pair of "legs." Once worn, even those with limited mobility can move swiftly like the Chrysos Heirs of Zagreus. They can even leap great distances. You don't need me to elaborate. I'm sure you can understand their value.

C: 在遗迹里偶尔能看到的那只大手，「蛊惑之手」，把那东西拿来用这事，是我出的主意，后来联合着工匠们一起，捣鼓了几个月，就给做成了。
E: The giant hand occasionally seen in the ruins, the "Bewitching Hands." It was my idea to use that thing. Later, together with the craftsmen, we tinkered with it for a few months and finally made it.

C: …都说了我兄长不可能做那样的事，况且真论起来，还是你们的嫌疑更大一些吧？
E: ...I've already told you. My brother could never do such a thing. Besides, if we're being honest, your suspicion is far greater than ours, isn't it?

C: …他不是这个意思，但你说的「达成了某项秘密交易」实在过于暧昧不清……
E: ...That's not what he means. It's just that your "making a secret deal" comment is a bit too vague...

C: 真想像你一样到处旅行啊~想看看欧洛尼斯的更高处有什么、想瞧瞧塞纳托斯的冥河尽头在哪里……
E: I really want to adventure about like you. Want to see what waits beyond the heights of Oronyx, and where the end of the Thanatos' River of Souls lies...

C: 看花了，有什么推荐吗？
E: I'm feeling overwhelmed. Do you have any recommendations?

C: 这是个远离喧嚣的好地方——没有了浴池人群的烦躁，高温蒸汽带来的晕眩感也在清爽的凉风中尽数消散，无名的虫类在低唱，瀑布述说着不可解的预言。
E: This is a great place away from the bustle — none of the clamoring bath crowds, and the faintness brought about by the hot steam vanishes with the cool breeze. Nameless bugs trill in low song, with the waterfall whispering inscrutable prophecies.

C: 好呀，我想听听有多「惊世」。
E: Sure, I'd like to know how "mind-blowing" they are.

C: 石板上的内容要付费阅读，会议交流也要收费入场，普通居民根本没有接触这些知识的机会。
E: You have to pay to read the slates' contents, and it's paid admittance for meeting discussions. Ordinary citizens have no chance to even come into contact with such knowledge.

C: 对了，你知道神悟树庭吧？人们都说，我们那儿有着翁法罗斯数一数二的聪明人。不过你可别在意这些吹捧，归根结底，做学问的基础还是做实验。没钱没平台，再聪明也白搭。
E: Oh yes, you know of the Grove of Epiphany, yes? Everyone says that we house all the brightest minds in Amphoreus. But don't listen to all that horn-tooting. At its heart, experimentation builds the foundation of knowledge. Without money or platform, even the smartest scholar is a fool.

C: 不谈生意，能和你聊聊吗？
E: No business talk. Can we just chit-chat?

C: 我还有事，先不聊了。
E: I've got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 至于可怜的奥赫玛人，他们的生产水平很高，几头角猪算不上什么损失——我还留了借条呢。
E: As for the poor Okhemans, they've got a rich production line. A few hornswines mean nothing to them. I even left an IOU.

C: 这样啊，也好…我是没胆也没能力去为了荣耀拼杀，我还想多活两年呢。
E: I see, that's good too... I haven't the guts nor ability to spill blood in the name of glory. I still want to live a couple more years.

C: …不愧是「法吉娜的圣兽」！仅凭触碰便足以令人心醉神迷，你充分领略到了它的神奇。
E: ...This is exactly what you'd expect from a "sacred beast of Phagousa!" Just a touch is enough to enchant you. You immediately come to understand its mysterious powers.

C: 华劳斯。
E: Wallace.

C: …怎么大家看起来都不是很熟的样子，还是说你比我还怕生？
E: Why does everyone look like they barely know each other, or is it you who's more introverted?

C: 老夫是个固执的人，想效法黄金世的古人走遍已知的整个世界…有幸众神垂怜，保我一路逢凶化吉。年轻人，你要是有兴趣，我可以和你讲讲古今朝圣的区别。
E: I am a stubborn old man, and I want to follow in the footsteps of my ancestors in the Era Chrysea and visit every corner of the known world... Fortunately, the Gods showed me mercy and protected me from harm along the way. Youngster, if you are interested, I can tell you the differences between the pilgrimages of today and ancient times.

C: 好啊，让我学习学习。
E: Alright, I'm down to learn.

C: 那你之后有什么打算？
E: Well, what do you plan to do from here?

C: 再说了，这里每日都有无数外邦人进进出出，难道都要靠三相神谕验明来历？
E: What's more, we have countless outlanders coming and going through these halls every day. You think we should rely on the tripartite prophecy to identify every last one?

C: 阁下，莫非您回心转意，想向三相神殿表露诚心、求取神谕？
E: My Lord, could it be that you have had a change of heart and wish to show your piety to the Temple of the Three Fates in exchange for a prophecy?

C: 都是熟人了，不问了。
E: I know everyone well, and there's nothing more I need to know.

C: 在*我们*离开雅努萨波利斯后，这座城邦的黑暗愈发深重。继任的圣女遭受了较之*我们*更加严峻的控制…比如，现在生活在奥赫玛的「传谕梦母」。
E: After we left Janusopolis, the darkness that shrouded the city grew heavier. The Holy Maidens who succeeded us endured even stricter control — such as the current "Oracle Dreammother", who resides in Okhema.

C: 预言中的黄金裔有许多个吗？
E: Are there many Chrysos Heirs in the prophecy?

C: 逐火…果真是不断失却的旅途。
E: Losses... are indeed a constant on the Flame-Chase journey.

C: 来吧，随便聊聊就行。
E: Come on. Just a small talk.

C: 就因为他们说话「有分量」，而我可以用上。
E: Because their words actually make a difference, and that's what I want.

C: 抱歉，占用了您不少时间，请收下这份小小礼物。当然，如果您喜欢戏剧，我们可以再深入聊聊……
E: Sorry to take up so much of your time. Please accept this small token. Of course, if you're a fan of theater, we can talk more...

C: 在被问到感受如何时，有人如此说到，「很好，很舒服。现在我必须睡觉了…把枕头拿走吧——我再也不需要它们了。」
E: When asked how they are feeling, someone replied, "I feel good and comfortable. I must sleep now... Take the pillows away. I don't need them anymore."

C: 我不会啊…
E: I... don't know how.

C: …啊，{NICKNAME}阁下，你能够平安凯旋真是太好了。
E: It's great to have you back, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 尽管…我还做不到像风堇小姐那样，为每位罹受苦难的伤患都展露出开朗的笑容……
E: Although... I still can't show a cheerful smile to every suffering patient like her...

C: 您客气了。需要帮助的话，请尽管来找我。
E: You're too kind. If you ever need help, please don't hesitate to find me.

C: 也期待和{F#女士}{M#先生}你在新世界再次相遇哦！
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, let's meet again in the new world!

C: 我不怕。
E: I fear nothing.

C: 自那以后，据我所知，我和其他同僚，还有其他信众们再也没得到过它的回应。这究竟算什么？是它抛弃了我们…抑或是…它遭遇了什么？我也不知道……
E: Since then, neither I, my fellow priests, nor any followers have heard anything from them. What does this mean? Have they abandoned us... or has something happened to them? I simply don't know...

C: 你感觉好些了吗？
E: How are you feeling?

C: 恐怕他们只是觉得好玩而已…
E: I think they just did it for the thrill...

C: 商贩汇聚，征战不休的城邦也放下兵戈。街巷、圣殿的廊柱都挂满鲜花，说着不同城邦方言的人们支起帐篷，赞美彼此健美的身体，角逐月桂花环……
E: The merchants convene, and constantly warring city-states pause their conflicts. Streets and temple columns are adorned with flowers, people speaking different dialects pitch tents, praise each other's athletic bodies, and compete for laurel wreaths...

C: （几天前，有一些可怕的人闯进我家里。我看到，他们说悄悄话，如果姐姐不消失，就要取走我的眼睛。）
E: (A few days ago, some scary people broke into my house. I saw them whispering, and they said that if that lady didn't disappear, they'd take my eyes.)

C: 振作，再创世要成功了！
E: Cheer up, the Era Nova is about to succeed!

C: 「赶紧喝吧，等天真塌下来，你手头上好的秘酿就都浪费了」，哈哈哈！
E: "Hurry and drink up. When the sky truly collapses, your good ambrosia will all be wasted," hahaha!

C: …抱歉，这玩笑的确有些不合时宜。其实，我刚也经历了九死一生，现在满脑子只想着快点迈入新世界，好和家人朋友们重逢。
E: ...Sorry, that joke was a bit out of place. I went through such a bad experience that all I think about now is stepping into the new world and reuniting with my family and friends.

C: 抬起头，直起腰，别一副哭丧着脸的模样。
E: Lift your head, straighten your back, and don't look so downcast.

C: 嗯…有位织者熟悉晖之民的信仰。金丝带来消息，它正仰望着<color=#dbc291ff>穹顶</color>，念诵着耳濡目染的祷告呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is familiar with the faith of the Sunfolk. The golden thread brings tidings: They are looking up at the <color=#dbc291ff>dome</color>, reciting prayers it has absorbed over time.

C: 嗯…有位织者渴望一段赤诚的友谊。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>井道的壁面上</color>，寻找同行的伙伴呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who yearns for a sincere friendship. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>the well shaft's wall</color>, looking for a companion.

C: 贵客早已知晓黑潮对翁法罗斯大地的摧残，无论人还是奇兽，都无法从它的影响下幸存——唯有一物例外。
E: The esteemed guest is already aware of the devastation the black tide has wrought upon the land of Amphoreus. Neither humans nor strange beasts can survive its influence, only one thing is an exception.

C: 无论如何，感谢你一直以来的协助。
E: Regardless, thank you for your continued assistance.

C: …还真是直白的预言。若说能攥拳的神体，恐怕只有那边的扎格列斯之手了。但所谓的机灵又是什么呢？
E: ...Now that's a straightforward prophecy. If there's any divine form capable of a clenched fist, it must be the Hand of Zagreus over there. But what exactly is this spirit of divine machine?

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 别的都好说，最后那条纯属冤枉——那丫头可凶了，谁敢欺负她啊！
E: Everything except that last one is fine. That girl's fierce. I mean, who'd even dare to bully her?

C: 哆徕咪，咪徕哆~
E: Do re mi, mi re do~

C: 我早就忘记了。说不定我是搬家来迷境的，也说不定是在久远的梦里见过迷！
E: I've forgotten. Maybe I moved here. Or maybe... maybe I dreamed of the Maze long ago, memi.

C: 昔涟发出均匀的呼吸声，看上去睡得正沉。
E: Cyrene's steady breathing suggests she's sleeping soundly.

C: 没问题。闲逛之余，也做点什么吧。回忆总在不经意间留下，不是吗？
E: Absolutely. And while we're hanging out, let's do something fun. Memories are often made when we least expect them, aren't they?

C: 好呀！人家也有想做的事，可以和你一起吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Great idea! I have something in mind too. Can I join you, {NICKNAME}?

C: 写信，真*天空粗口*难啊……
E: Writing a letter is so *Skyfolk swearing* hard...

C: 听着也不错，蜜酿最能助长聊天的兴致了。想聊些什么？
E: Sounds good too. Honey brews are the best way to get the conversation flowing. What do you want to talk about?

C: 将来？自然是煊赫荣耀——凯撒的荣耀，我的荣耀，还有家族的荣耀。
E: Future? Unrivalled glory, of course. Of the Imperator, of my own, and of my family.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, thank you.

C: 甚至，她还赐我断锋爵的名号，允我之后亲手击败那蛮神、夺取火种……
E: And she even bestowed upon me the name of Dux Fragoris, allowing me to defeat the savage god myself and take the Coreflame...

C: 好啊，那我就不打扰阁下了，再会！
E: Alright. I won't bother you anymore, great one. Another time!

C: 几个菜啊，喝成这样。
E: What, a few sips and you're already this far gone?

C: 本狮又问，问他，这个时间还有讲座，讲师是谁啊？
E: I a—asked him again, this lecture is held at such a late hour, who is the speaker?

C: 哪儿来那么多规矩！
E: Since when were there so many rules?

C: 到底是哪边？
E: Which one is it?

C: 我就知道小鸟们喜欢你。这是老鸟准备的一点谢礼，收下吧。
E: I knew the birds liked you. This is a token of appreciation from this old bird. Please take it.

C: 了不起的新同学，谢谢你对折纸树林教育的助力，请务必收下老鸟的心意。
E: Distinguished new student, thank you for assisting Paperfold Woods' educational process. You must accept my token of appreciation.

C: 咕咕…噢！有个喜欢天文学的孩子，它搞不好又蹲在<color=#dbc291ff>某处的星球仪</color>上呢。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who loves astronomy. They might be crouched over <color=#dbc291ff>some armillary sphere</color>.

C: 关于那位古恩老师…
E: About Mr. Gunn...

C: 守护大家的心灵，坚守最后的港湾。这，就是我卡波特的职责。
E: Safeguard everyone's heart and defend our harbor. This is my job, Capote's job.

C: 那你可就找对人了，其实我正在调查这场袭击的内幕。
E: You've come to the right person. I am investigating this attack.

C: 朱红色的还是靛蓝色呢……难道我真的记错了？
E: Is it red or blue... did I make a mistake again?

C: 还有一些事情想要问…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 对于复兴建设，你有没有什么想法？
E: What's your take on the recovery construction?

C: 实不相瞒，我也老实说吧。他们认为我的想法过于天真烂漫、不切实际。
E: I'll be honest with you. They think my idea is premature and unrealistic.

C: 被你这么一问，我脑子里还真糊涂起来了。一下子好多事儿都冲出来了。真是不能提，不能想啊。
E: Now that you brought it up, I am actually confused. I just remembered so many things all at once. The past really doesn't bear being remembered.

C: 因为我知道，更为严重的症结，并不在于外部的纷扰，而是内部的扭曲。
E: Because I know the worse issue lies in internal distortion instead of external disturbance.

C: 「戈矛回到了主人之手」…或许它的密钥也是？
E: "The Spear returns to its master's hand"... perhaps its encryption key does too?

C: 我会等待你的归来，直到我忘却为何而等待。
E: I'll await your return, until I forget why I even began waiting.

C: 王座上灰烬的余温提醒你，「毁灭」的金血烧尽了过往种种，那些同伴存在的「记忆」如今只在你的脑海里根植。
E: The lingering warmth of ashes on the throne reminds you: the golden blood of "Destruction" has burned away all that came before, and those "memories" of your companions now only exist deeply rooted in your mind.

C: 但要我说，你在，故聒噪在——世界从来就不静谧，也不默然。
E: But if you ask me, you exist, and therefore noises do, too. The world has never been peaceful or silent.

C: 聚焦于「城邦」这一概念，通过鲜明的装修风格、经典的地方菜品、传统的特色餐具及用餐礼仪，让顾客们全方位多角度地沉浸在美食文化中……
E: Focusing on the concept of "City-State", through distinctive decorative styles, classic local dishes, traditional specialty tableware, and dining etiquette, customers can immerse themselves in food culture from multiple perspectives...

C: 没、没有他们说得那么夸张，我就是突然觉得，像这样忙起来其实还挺充实的……
E: I-it's not as dramatic as they make it sound... I just suddenly realized that being busy like this actually feels pretty fulfilling...

C: 您看，这外观，朴实无华之中尽显格调；您瞧，这手感，精雕细琢铸就绝佳体验！
E: Look here, the appearance — understated elegance with impeccable style. And feel this, the craftsmanship... meticulously sculpted for an absolutely sublime experience!

C: 我记得那里朝阳，怎么会幽静深邃嘛？
E: I remember there was sunlight there. How could it be so tranquil and profound?

C: 那么，咪发迷要做一个追逐风的旅客，去捕捉最后一丝菜香迷！
E: Well then, Mifamem shall become a traveler chasing the wind, to catch that last whiff of delicious aroma!

C: 好久没接到花园的工作，是没什么要帮忙的，还是找到了更优秀的团队嗷呜？
E: Haven't gotten any garden work in a while. Is there nothing to help out with, or did you find a better team awoo?

C: 先玩到这吧。
E: Let's call it a day for now.

C: 外面的世界太热闹啦！这里有闪着荧光的粉色花朵，猜不透怎么造出来的大屋子，还有来自世界各个角落的客人……
E: The world out there is just so lively! There are glowing pink flowers, enormous buildings made in ways I can't begin to guess, and guests from every corner of the world...

C: 这就是——世界送给我们的最好的礼物！
E: This is the greatest gift the world has given us!

C: 是我为粉发的爱卿新取的爵名，听说她与「冬霖爵」塞涅卡出自同族，皆是天空城邦的后裔。
E: It is a new peerage I have bestowed upon my dear, pink-haired subject. I am told she and Seneca, the Dux Brumalis, are from the same clan, descendants of the Sky city.

C: 当然有——我的「后」棋，亦是我棋盘上的干将。
E: Of course there is. My "Queen" piece, who is also a mighty general upon my chessboard.

C: 这一定意味着，新的故事正在某个地方发芽吧？
E: This must mean that a new story is sprouting somewhere, right?

C: 幸亏不是扳手腕大赛。
E: Good thing it wasn't an arm wrestling contest.

C: 呜嗡…嚼嚼……
E: *Nom nom nom...*

C: 当然，我没忘记要把这样东西郑重地交给你，和如今那位「大地」的新神——
E: Of course. I haven't forgotten to hand this over to you solemnly, and to that new God of "Earth"—

C: 嗯…有位织者观看了你在这世界探索的全程。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>这趟旅程的终点</color>，期待见证你走向崭新的未来呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has been watching your every step through this world. The golden thread brings tidings: They're waiting at <color=#dbc291ff>the end of this journey</color>, eager to witness you step into a bright new future.

C: 这里怎么有块石板…？
E: What's this stone tablet doing here...?

C: 嗯，我想说的就是这些，开饭的时候见。
E: Mm, that's all I wanted to say. See you at mealtime.

C: 注销管理员权限之前，吕枯耳戈斯用了一点时间将我捏塑成型，并留下了一道谜题——
E: Before revoking Administrator privileges, Lycurgus took some time to mold me into shape, and left behind a riddle...

C: 我？哎呀哎呀，我没有什么有趣的过往呢……
E: Me? Ahhh, I don't have an interesting past...

C: 当一个人的意志与命途发生重叠时，就可视为其行走在命途之上；如果他的意念足够强大，便可从命途中汲取少许力量。这样的人被称作「命途行者」。
E: A person is considered to be on a Path when their will overlaps with that Path. If the person has a strong enough will, they can draw power from that Path. Those who can do so are called Pathstriders.

C: 「了解」当地的人文生态，融入其中。
E: Understand the local culture and immerse ourselves within it.

C: 唔，这么快就回来啦？
E: Oh, back so soon?

C: 但是出于人类基本的好奇心，我还是壮着胆子走近看了一眼。我心里想，一眼，就看一眼。
E: But, out of basic human curiosity, I dared to take a closer look. I keep thinking to myself, just one look, just one look.

C: 怎么，你还真对这矿车感兴趣？那成，场地已经铺好了，这回的难度可是实打实的！要不你也来一起看看？
E: I guess you really are interested in mine carts? Well, I've laid out the site for you already. I've made sure it's challenging this time! Why don't you give it a try?

C: 哼，我就不信你今天还能解出来。
E: Hmph, I don't think you'll be able to solve this one.

C: 滴、答…呼……
E: Tick, tock... Snore...

C: 滴答！这是什么地方？刚刚的浣熊呢？
E: Tick-tock! What's this place? Where'd that raccoon go?

C: 想不起来了…算了，应该不是什么重要的事吧！
E: I can't remember... Forget it, it can't be that important!

C: 滴答！对不起，请不要用这种厌恶的眼神看着我了！
E: Tick-tock! I'm sorry! Please don't look at me with those disdainful eyes!

C: 从现在起，我保证我打扫过的客房会是最舒适、最整洁的。
E: From now on, I'll ensure that the rooms I clean are the cleanest and most comfortable.

C: 喔，您就是大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}吧？抱歉，我刚才忙着研究，没留神……
E: Oh, if it isn't the famous {NICKNAME}? I'm sorry. I was immersed in my research and lost track of everything...

C: 原来如此…居然能让您这样的专家都陷入苦战，这位设计师果然不是泛泛之辈呢。
E: So, that's how it is... The game designer must be quite talented if they can put even a pro like you through the wringer.

C: 虽然没有证据，但我们怀疑来者是「星核猎手」。这群人神出鬼没，危险得很，个个都在「公司」通缉中榜上有名。
E: I have no evidence for this, but we suspect the intruders were Stellaron Hunters. These guys are elusive and highly dangerous. Every single one is on IPC's wanted list.

C: 监控室中央放着一台平平无奇的电脑……
E: There's an ordinary computer terminal in the middle of the monitoring room...

C: 好，那就拜托你了……
E: Great, off you go then...

C: 有时候，一幅作品无法臻于完美，缺的便正是这灵感的一笔！
E: Sometimes, when a piece of art cannot be perfected, all that's needed is just this stroke of inspiration!

C: 雷比尼大笑着离开了。
E: Rebini leaves, laughing.

C: 雷比尼如疾风般从你眼前消失，复又出现在你面前——嘴角挂着尚且温热的油脂。
E: Rebini vanishes from your sight before reappearing — a trickle of warm grease lining the edge of his lips.

C: 不用了，就算把其他展品也放上去，大家的注意力还是会放在冰雕上。
E: No. Even if we put them out, everyone's focus would still be on the ice sculptures.

C: 重点描述「母亲的爱」吧。
E: Emphasize her motherly love.

C: 在母亲大人治下，最为知名的法令便是「封锁上下层区」。一方面，这一举措稳固了贝洛伯格的后方，但也确实造成了太多无谓的牺牲——人们对此多有分化。
E: Under mother's rule, the most well-known decree was the "blockade of the Overworld and the Underworld." On one hand, this measure secured Belobog's rear, but it also resulted in many unnecessary sacrifices, causing a lot of controversy among the people.

C: …没想到，你竟然真的找到了如此宝贵的史料。我稍后马上安排人根据你的发现对展签内容进行修正…当然，还要把这个发现上报给克里珀堡。
E: ...I can't believe you have found such a precious historical source. I'll get someone to revise the content of the exhibit label based on your discovery later... Of course, I must also report this to Qlipoth Fort right away.

C: 就到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 一张概念图稿，记录了艺术雕塑「齿轮与智慧」的迭代历程。
E: A piece of concept art. It records the iterative process of the sculpture, Gears and Wisdom.

C: 「约翰•匹克之选」牌缝纫机是贝洛伯格工业转向轻型化的重要标志，这也是它为何会被张贴在这里的原因。
E: John Peak's Choice brand sewing machines are an important symbol of the shift toward a light industry in Belobog, which is why this is posted here.

C: 然而，贝洛伯格的绝大多数居民都选择乘坐有轨电车通勤。出租车高昂的价格令许多人望而却步。
E: However, a vast majority of Belobog citizens choose to commute by tram. Taxicabs' high price would stop most people in their tracks.

C: 「终于，积蓄的阴火于某个静谧的雪夜炸响，在一场精心设计的骗局中，希莉儿被自己的子民夺去了生命；」
E: "Finally, a hidden deposition ignited and exploded one snowy night. In an elaborate, premeditated trickery, Cyrille lost her life to her own subjects."

C: 幽灵星槎？我很久之前就听人说过类似的「都市传说」……
E: A phantom starskiff? I heard of a similar "urban legend" long ago...

C: 唯一的诡秘之处在于甲板上满是血污，像是发生过什么争斗…他进一步检视了航线图，发现这艘星槎来自岱舆仙舟，去往苍城仙舟。
E: The only mystery was that the deck was covered in blood, as if there was a rough battle before... The worker examined the route map and found out that this starskiff originated from the Xianzhou Daiyu and was heading toward the Xianzhou Cangcheng.

C: 失去方向的星槎，迷航了……
E: Looks like the starskiff had lost her direction and gone off course...

C: 登上去？你怎么会这么想，万一遇到什么怪事可怎么办？
E: Board it? Why would you do that? What if something strange happened to you?

C: 放心，我们是不会出卖你的…
E: Don't worry. We will not betray you...

C: 思念变成一艘星槎飞回来了，原来岁阳也会做这样的事……
E: A person's thoughts for someone could take the form of a starskiff and return. I see, so heliobi are even capable of such a thing...

C: 最重要的是——不要忘了这是我给你拍的照片！
E: Most importantly... Don't forget that I gave you this picture!

C: 确实，巡镝和信用点之间兑换也很方便。
E: That's true, and they made it much more convenient to exchange strale and credits.

C: 嘘！这可不能大声说出来啊。
E: Hey! What's gotten into you?

C: 没错没错，{F#她}{M#他}可比我头脑灵活多了。
E: See? {F#She's}{M#He's} a quick thinker.

C: 不安的情绪已经愈演愈烈——现如今人人都担心「金人巷就要没了」。商会必须做出点什么，至少要为本地商户再争取到一些利益。
E: But now the chill is setting in — everyone is worried that Aurum Alley is going to disappear. The Merchant Guild has to do something to help the merchants here.

C: 我也是码头工人，我怎么可能向着星际和平公司呢……
E: I'm a dock worker, after all. How could I conspire with the IPC?

C: 我还没有准备好。
E: I'm not ready yet.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 码头已经改善了运输效率，发货量也在不断增加。
E: The dock has improved shipping efficiency and transaction volume is increasing.

C: 不要再夸我了，我会不好意思。
E: Omg, stop it~ You're making me blushhh~

C: 游客并没有减少！
E: There are actually more customers coming to the Alley!

C: 你的说法不就是在倚老卖老吗？
E: You can't just rely on your age and experience...

C: 你的意思是说现在的金人巷无法超越当时的金人巷？
E: Are you suggesting that the Alley is a shadow of its former self?

C: 你小子！
E: You snake!

C: 就这么定了！
E: Sign me up.

C: 这拍摄的主题还挺自由的嘛。
E: The last two are a little... random.

C: 三、二、一…茄子！
E: Three, two, one... Cheeeese!

C: 机巧鸟，你最好的物流朋友！
E: Cycranes of a feather ship together!

C: 这真的是正向宣传吗？
E: Are you trying to scare people away?

C: 我们取得足够的资金，才有底气和公司共同竞标。
E: Having enough funding to back up our bid is key to competing with the IPC.

C: 好的，请稍等。
E: Okay, one moment please.

C: 不好意思，再说一遍？
E: I'm sorry. Could you repeat that?

C: 没想到在这里也能听到你的「激辩」…就结果而言，您应该是成功了吧？
E: I didn't expect to hear you "debating" here... As far as the verdict was concerned, you won, right?

C: 以后？多久以后？按你们仙舟人的时间观念，五百年以后？哈哈，这里的商铺们等得起吗？
E: Later? How much later? For the Xianzhou, does "later" mean <unbreak>500</unbreak> years? Haha, can the shop owners here wait that long?

C: 码头上出运输事故，你怎么会知道呢？
E: How did you know about the frequent accidents at the dock?

C: 没错，如今金人巷游人数量没有达到巅峰时期的十分之一，那时金人巷车水马龙、摩肩接踵，是真正的「罗浮第一夜市」。
E: That is correct. The number of customers visiting the shops was ten times what it is today. The Alley was alive, and was credited as the best night market on the Luofu.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you all right?

C: 我故意没有通过「金人智能测验」逃过一劫。
E: I purposely failed the Aurumaton Intelligence Test so I'd be able to slip by unnoticed.

C: 不是我，是导航抽风了！
E: Not me, the navigation does!

C: *呼噜呼噜*
E: *snoring*

C: 看这个衣服的配色——紫蓝相间，让人忍不住联想一位名叫桑博的「老朋友」。
E: The color palette of the clothes — shades of purples and blues — reminds you of an "old friend" named Sampo.

C: 最好最好！可得仔细地、地毯式地勘测！
E: That's good! Check every inch of the place!

C: 不然你和我一起来？
E: What if you come with me?

C: 我的宝贝<unbreak>223</unbreak>号感应仪，可是不会有问题的！
E: My precious Sensor No. <unbreak>223</unbreak> will never malfunction!

C: 感应仪的反应…
E: The sensor's reading...

C: 刚才是发生了什么爆炸吗？哎哟！往后退点！
E: Did something explode? Agh! Get away!

C: 可是…这个怎么玩呀？{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你帮帮我好不好？
E: But how... do we play with this? Can you help me, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}?

C: 现在，你终于迎来了和它的「二人世界」。
E: Now, you are finally alone with it.

C: 好像是…鼻孔？而且不是人类的鼻孔。
E: It looks like... a nostril? It's not a human nostril.

C: 这桩买卖我十拿九稳！
E: This deal is mine!

C: 信息是什么？你讲慢点，我听不懂！
E: What is infer-mayshun? Speak slower, I don't understand!

C: 他讲得太快了，而且就那么几句话，我早就不想听了。
E: He speaks too fast, and he kept repeating the same few sentences, I got bored.

C: 馆长于尔丹先生好像在找您…完成他的委托之后再继续经营吧？
E: Curator Uldan seems to be looking for you... Why don't you continue operating the museum after completing his assignment?

C: 那我单点一个笑话。
E: In that case, I'll just order a joke.

C: （吃红色花纹的）
E: (Eat the candy with crimson swirls)

C: 这是一颗跳跳糖，但那在你舌尖蹦跳的节奏似乎颇有规律，你甚至觉得它们在你耳边组成了一只摇滚乐队——不算太吵的那种。
E: This candy bounces on your tongue with a surprisingly regular rhythm, and it even feels like they're forming a rock band in your ear — not too loud, though.

C: 欢迎光临梦境贩售店，爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
E: Welcome to Dreamscape Sales Store! Dr. Edward at your service!

C: 有人发出了第一声呐喊，随后众人热烈响应。监狱内的暴力行为数量飞增，动乱波及了整个分区……
E: Following the first cry of rebellion, the other inmates respond enthusiastically. The number of violent incidents in the prison skyrockets, plunging the entire division into pandemonium...

C: （去体验一下这枚梦泡里的「小小哈努行动」玩法吧。我向您保证，他们的关卡设计相当出色！）
E: (I recommend you try the "Hanu's Adventure" stage in this dream bubble. The stage is very well-designed!)

C: 别误会，这可不是我们能成为同伴的意思啾。我要借你们的手，狠狠削弱那个鳄鱼头，好为我的鸟之帝国开辟道路。
E: Don't get me wrong. I'm not saying I'm on your side. I just need you guys to weaken that crocodile so that I can pave my way to the founding of my Bird Empire.

C: 我们这些中层迷钟担心下属变成「惊梦剧团」，于是就拿了一些积木玩具给它们解压。
E: Middle-management Dream Tickers like us fear that our subordinates will turn into the Dreamjolt Troupe, which is why we brought some building blocks to help them decompress.

C: 下次再聊…
E: Let's talk next time...

C: 汉密尔顿…这家伙，不管你现在在哪……
E: Hamilton... You annoying fool, no matter where you are right now...

C: 「美食节目还能有什么幺蛾子？」你感到疑惑。
E: "What kind of surprises could there be in a gourmet show?" you doubt.

C: 汪！我坏掉的收音机，你还没赔偿哇！
E: Woof! You still haven't paid me back for the radio you broke!

C: 酒吧就这么大，你跑不掉的汪！
E: Even if this lounge is big, you won't escape!

C: …汪？我听错了？
E: ...Woof? Did I hear that right?

C: 不过，现在请先祝福我们吧~
E: But for now, please give us your blessing.

C: 我说我说，您不是有些特别厉害的能力嘛？能不能麻烦您进到人家的心里，看看到底是哪里堵住了呢？
E: Hey, there? Don't you have some awesome powers? Could you dive into my heart and see what is blocking me?

C: 我为你准备了用于模拟的思维空间，看清楚了——我们，所谓的「美梦剧团」究竟过着怎样的生活。
E: I've prepared a Mindspace for simulations. Watch closely and see what kind of life we Sweet Dreams Troupe members are actually living.

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 汪！来了哇，等你好久了！
E: Woof! There you are! I've been waiting for you!

C: …是什么意思？
E: ...What does that mean?

C: 并且，它们遭到了噩梦侵袭，就算现在看起来温和，只要稍微受点刺激，瞬间会暴露出本性。怪物就是怪物，你拯救不了它们。
E: What's more, they're corrupted by the Nightmare. Even if they seem harmless now, they'll show their true colors at the slightest provocation. Monsters are monsters, beyond redemption.

C: 最后给你点时间，仔细想清楚。
E: I'll give you one last chance to think it over.

C: 那群猎犬…他们来过了？我现在就去联系猎犬家系的家主。
E: Those hounds... they've been here? I'll contact the head of the Bloodhound Family right away.

C: …你先看看它们的情况。
E: ...You should check on them first.

C: 既然决定了要经营这家酒吧，就好好负起责任来。
E: Now that you've decided to run this lounge, take responsibility for it.

C: 走吧。我们去会会那群猎犬。
E: Let's go. We'll go meet those hounds.

C: 其他的无名客？
E: Other Nameless?

C: 你和帕姆拆开了包裹，发现了一个卷轴样式的投影装置。
E: You and Pom-Pom open the package and discover a projection device in the style of a scroll.

C: 我是前无名客•玛姬，从银河遥远的过去向你发来最新的问候！
E: I'm Mag, a former Nameless. I bid you the latest greetings from the distant cosmic past!

C: 具体做法嘛…解释起来会非常抽象，你直接上手试一次就明白了。
E: As for specifics... Well, the explanation can get a little abstract. I think if you try it out for yourself, you'll get it.

C: 突然说得好正式啊！
E: Why'd you get so formal all of a sudden?

C: 但是可以肯定的是，后来踏上旅程的人们一定会想起你，当他们遇上寒风时，他们会想起这一丝温暖；当他们遇上酷暑时，他们会想起这一丝凉爽……
E: But what I am sure of is this, the people who join this journey later will certainly think of you. When they encounter chilling winds, they will remember your warmth. When they endure brutal heat, they'll think of your cool breeze...

C: 脑袋好重…好想下班啊……
E: My brain hurts... Kinda wanna get off work already...

C: 是的！
E: That's right!

C: 你为什么自己不去找？
E: Why don't you look for it yourself?

C: 导演，我们的剪辑工作可以开始了吗？
E: Director, can we start editing now?

C: 听上去有故事啊。
E: Sounds like you have a story to tell.

C: 啊，星穹列车…难道是「钟表匠」先生的……
E: Ah, Astral Express... Could that be Mr. Watchmaker's...

C: 广告牌演员还会在这里停留一段时间，如果有补拍需要可以随时联系我。
E: The billboard actors will stay here for a while. If you need to reshoot anything, feel free to contact me.

C: 就由我，伟大的、出资最多的潮玩娃娃广告牌——
E: Allow me, the great Trendy Doll Billboard with boundless resources...

C: 我也想当小镇英雄！
E: I also want to be the town's hero!

C: 再等一下。
E: Wait for a while more.

C: 谢谢，谢谢！我们终于自由了！
E: Thank you. Thank you! We are finally free!

C: 哎呀，看看那个可怜的钟表，他好像需要帮助！
E: Oh no, look at that poor clock, he looks like he needs help!

C: 说不定被哪位导演相中——下一部《钟表小子》就是你来拍了呢？
E: One of the directors might even take a fancy to you — the next Clockie could even be shot by you!

C: 对了，记住我们的要求——需要拍摄<color=#dbc291ff>所有演员</color>。
E: Oh right, don't forget our criterion: <color=#dbc291ff>Everyone</color> has to be in the shot.

C: 滴答！最后一瓶苏乐达肯定就在前面了！
E: Tick-tock! The last bottle of SoulGlad must be up ahead!

C: 哎呀，导演的心胸真是宽广。
E: Ah, the director sure is considerate.

C: 呃…您应该在指导他的过程中也有所收获吧？
E: Uh... I'm sure you've gained some knowledge during the directing process, right?

C: 天呐，你可真是我的大救星，那就全靠导演了！
E: Thank goodness, you're a lifesaver! You can handle the whole thing, then!

C: 不能，拜拜。
E: I can't. Bye.

C: 用暴力镇压。
E: Suppress them with violence.

C: 因为木头老爷太丑了吧。
E: Because Old Man Wood is very ugly.

C: 至于刚才的问题…相信导演心中会有自己的答案吧。
E: As for that question... I believe you'll have your own answer, deep down in your heart.

C: 笑得肚子有点疼。
E: My sides are sore from laughing so much.

C: 游戏要去哪玩？
E: Where do I play the game?

C: 故事向近期在银河间颇有名气的某位球棍使用者*致敬*。取材于现实，再加一点魔幻、一点荒诞…
E: The story pays homage to a baseball bat user who recently became famous throughout the cosmos. It's based on reality, with a pinch of fantasy, and just a hint of absurdity thrown in...

C: 嗯？难道还有假的我吗？
E: Huh? Of course, why do you ask?

C: （站起来，准备出发）
E: (Stand up and prepare to move out)

C: 武器和筑梦拼图有什么关系？
E: What do the weapon and Dream Jigsaw have to do with one another?

C: 践行巡猎的仙舟追逐着丰饶赐福的子民，殊不知这最后的追逐却落入了精心布置的圈套。
E: The Xianzhou that follows The Hunt pursued those who were blessed by Abundance, only to find themselves falling into a carefully laid trap.

C: 关于新课题…
E: About your new project...

C: 在星神的交响乐里，仍有那么多音符在不间断地演奏着，独属于凡人的赞美诗。
E: Within the symphony of the Aeons, numerous notes still play uninterrupted, hymns exclusively for mortals.

C: 这场实验会持续相当长的时间，很抱歉不能留在此地与你共勉。但请相信，我会时刻关注你的动态。
E: This experiment will last for a considerable duration, and I apologize for not being able to remain by your side. However, please be assured that I will be monitoring your progress constantly.

C: 你这人满脑子都是幻戏呢。
E: You're really into immersia, huh?

C: 用来激励自己学剑的好理由！
E: Sounds like a great reason to stay motivated!

C: 没听说过，请你哪里来的滚哪里去。
E: Never heard of you. Now scurry back to wherever you crawled out from.

C: 把狗改成猪就算新剧情了吗？
E: So, he just changed "barking" into "squealing" and that's supposed to be a different story?

C: …只要用心练的话。
E: ...As long as she trains diligently.

C: 毕竟，这是你学狗叫的地方。
E: Well, this is the place you lost a bet and barked like a dog, after all.

C: 喂！三月七，你们到底对斯科特专员做了些什么！
E: Hey! March 7th! What did you do to Specialist Skott!?

C: 我、我在星槎海休息。在这里看着星槎一艘一艘过来过去，很解压的。
E: I—I'm taking a break at Starskiff Haven. Just watching the starskiffs sail one by one, it's really relaxing.

C: 别怕！三月小姐，我来了！
E: Fear not, Miss March! Here I come!

C: 这字也太难看了…你刚才要没给我读一遍，我都没认出来写的是什么。
E: The writing is terrible... I wouldn't have understood it if you hadn't just read it to me.

C: 没…谁都没说话！你听错了！
E: No... no one said anything! You must have imagined it!

C: 来吧，「孤狼」斯科特，瞧瞧本大爷的厉害吧！
E: Bring it on, Skott the lone wolf! I'll show you what I'm made of!

C: 难道没有那种，可以在短时间内打通经脉、提升修为、强身健体的仙丹吗？就是那种，只要吃一颗，立刻能成为绝世邪剑仙的丹药！
E: I mean, don't you have some miracle pills that can instantly unlock my meridians, boost my cultivation, and make me a super strong hero? You know, the kind where you just pop one and instantly become an invincible swordmaster!

C: 别把这家伙和我们相提并论。
E: Seriously, don't even compare this guy to us.

C: 不得人心？你说什么呢，这金人巷里谁不喜欢我活泼可爱的小三月？
E: Unpopular? What are you talking about? Who in Aurum Alley wouldn't like a cheerful and adorable young lady like me?

C: 马上就要和斯科特对决了，真是紧张。
E: I'm going up against Skott soon. I'm so nervous.

C: 但是这样击败他非常解气！
E: But defeating him like this would feel pretty satisfying!

C: 现在，你听明白我们的话了吗？
E: Now do you understand what we're trying to say?

C: 在咱们「染指派」的医术理论中，药就是食，食就是药。人如其食，故而对症进食便能疗疾愈患。
E: In our Ranzhi School's medical theory, medicine is food, and vice versa. We are what we eat, so the right food for the right ailments would naturally cure us.

C: 三月，灵砂大人已经同意你了…
E: March, Master Lingsha has already agreed to your request...

C: 听说这支学派成员在星际战争中全部罹难…你猜怎么着，遭遇袭击的主舰返回了他们的母星。
E: Rumors said that all members of this school were killed in the interstellar war... but guess what? The mothership that encountered the ambush returned to their home planet.

C: 在游戏里，机器人也是可以用复活药水的，就别管科学界了。
E: Robots can also use revival potions in games, so don't worry about the scientific community.

C: 三月七眼神忽然恢复光彩，仿佛刚才的木讷之态一扫而空。
E: March 7th's eyes suddenly regain her luster, wiping off the lifeless appearance from moments ago.

C: 早就发现了，等着你呢。
E: We noticed. We're just waiting for you.

C: 青雀小姐，完全误会了！我是来太卜司书库寻找绝世剑谱的。
E: You've gotten the wrong idea, Miss Qingque! I came to the Divination Commission repository in search of an ultimate sword technique.

C: 三月七，喜欢换个地方上班吗？
E: March 7th, are you looking for a new job?

C: 之前，妾身从丹士长玉络那里得知，建木灾乱期间丹鼎司丢失了不少禁书，找回来又费了不少功夫。丹鼎司本不是能收纳禁书的机构，于是我和太卜大人商量了一下……
E: I previously learned from Chief Alchemist Yuluo that many forbidden texts were lost during the Ambrosial Arbor disaster, and it took a lot of work to recover them. The Alchemy Commission is not an organization that should be used to store forbidden texts, so I came to discuss with the Master Diviner...

C: 剑已成冢…只余孤「剑魔」一人……
E: This blade is now my tomb... The "Blade Demon" remains here alone...

C: 我暂时没想到什么好方法……
E: I don't know right now...

C: 嗯嗯。
E: Hmm...

C: 你发现了吗？噗噗，被同好发现了自己的小心思，还真是令人高兴。
E: Oh, you noticed? Hehe, having a fellow enthusiast notice my train of thought makes me so happy.

C: 从金色到铜色，越醒目的颜色代表着这些离散忆质的密集度越高。当你在街头疲惫游走了一天时，你能瞧见一只金光灿灿的垃圾桶，该是多么振奋人心的事情啊。
E: From gold to bronze... the brighter the color, the more concentrated the scattered memoria is. I figured that catching sight of a bright and shining gold trashcan after a long day of working yourself to the bone would be a wonderful feeling.

C: 有没有可能这就是我留下的…？
E: You don't think they're the ones I left, right...

C: 如果不加以阻止，它们只会继续采用暴力交友方式。到时候可就是血流成河了！
E: If we don't stop them, they will just continue to use their violent methods to make friends. If that happens, it will be a bloodbath!

C: 那么，回头见啦，我的朋友！
E: Well then, may we meet again, my friend!

C: 你搞快点啦，我等不及了。你不会是…害怕了吧！
E: Hurry up, I can't wait anymore! You're not... scared, are you?

C: 你怎么来参加演武仪典了？
E: Why did you come to participate in the Wardance?

C: 素裳居然说成语了！
E: Sushang used an idiom!

C: 卢卡将好梦气泡饮一饮而尽，脸色渐渐恢复了红润。
E: Luka finishes the Sweet Dreams Soda in one gulp, his face gradually becomes a bright red again.

C: 杰帕德先生如此信任我，将代表贝洛伯格出战的机会交给了我。我不能辜负这些人。我要将胜利献给他们！
E: Mr. Gepard placed his faith in me... entrusted me with the chance to represent Belobog. I cannot disappoint him. Any of them! I must offer nothing less than victory!

C: 谢谢你！教练！我一定会全力以赴，认真训练的！
E: Thank you, Coach! I'll do my best to keep up and train seriously!

C: 哼，豪言壮语。我对贝洛伯格并无恶意。我只是希望确认一下，在躲过了那次债务危机后，贝城人是不是真的有能力自己站起来。
E: Hmph, a lofty proclamation. I harbor no ill will towards Belobog. I merely wish to see if, after evading that debt crisis, the people of Belobog can truly stand on their own.

C: 所以，你明白了吧，你和我的相似之处远比不同来得更多。卢卡，我希望贝城能靠自己的力量复兴。
E: So, you understand now? We have much, much more in common than you think, Luka. I hope that Belobog can find the strength within to lift itself up.

C: 哎！这不是{NICKNAME}吗？你在我们圈子里可有名了。
E: Ah! Isn't this {NICKNAME}? You're super popular in our circle.

C: 茄子！
E: Cheeeese!

C: 我一定积极治疗，战胜病魔。
E: I'll do it, I'll stay positive and defeat the demons of this illness.

C: 能代表罗浮仙舟守擂…彦卿想必是个身手了得的战士吧？这么一想，心里还真有些没底啊！
E: To be able to represent the Xianzhou Luofu... This Yanqing must truly be a legendary fighter. I'm not feeling so sure of myself now that I think about it.

C: 所以也许等你离开熟悉的家乡，去往陌生的「罗浮」以后，就会明白答案了。
E: When perhaps you leave your cozy hometown and head to the unfamiliar Luofu, you will find your answer.

C: 说话！！！
E: Speak up!!!

C: 是我技不如人，波提欧没做错什么。
E: I was outclassed. Boothill didn't do anything wrong.

C: 谢谢尾巴大爷！
E: Thank you, Mr. Tail!

C: 我们走了，回头见。
E: We're leaving. See you some other time.

C: 不过景元将军修改了赛制，希望能给选手们更多机会，体现武者双方对决的美感。
E: But General Jing Yuan has amended the rules, hoping to give more opportunities for the contestants to showcase the beauty of duels.

C: 唉…正因为是历史故事，我才更觉得难过。
E: But... the fact that it's history makes it even sadder.

C: 我早就准备好了。
E: I've been ready for a long time.

C: 真是料不到的结局。
E: It was an unexpected ending.

C: 伊戈尔，那个红发高大的拳手，就这样出现在了擂台上。他每一次挥拳都好像肩负着一个世界的重量。
E: Igor, a tall and red-haired boxer, appeared in the ring. Every swing of his fists felt like it carried the weight of an entire world.

C: 浓缩。
E: Condensed.

C: 发生了什么？
E: What happened?

C: 这个问题实在是太深奥了，单这事儿，驮那师父能和你唠上个十几年。
E: This question is much too profound. Master Dhyana can talk your ear off for decades on this subject alone.

C: 提问：什么修正了你的结论？
E: Question: What revised your conclusion?

C: 我于空寂中来，为众生而生，故，不害亦不衍。
E: I am born of the void, born in servitude to all beings, thus I shall neither harm nor transgress.

C: 你们两个听好了，这片宇宙中唯一真实的东西是从天而降的陨石，是反物质军团的火焰，还有我手里的枪。
E: Listen up, you two! The only truths in this universe are stuff like meteors that fell from the sky, the flames of the Antimatter Legion, and the gun in my hand.

C: 在高频超载的尖啸声中，所有的机械造物从被反有机方程的诅咒操控中得到了释放。
E: In a high-pitched screech of overload, all mechanical creations are freed from the control of the Anti-Organic Equation's curse.

C: 之后得好好感谢一下尾巴大爷和藿藿！
E: I'll have to thank Mr. Tail and Huohuo properly for their help!

C: 恭喜卢卡选手获得比赛的胜利，感谢卢卡选手的教练{NICKNAME}接受记者提问。
E: Congratulations to Luka for winning this match! And thank you to his coach, {NICKNAME}, for accepting this interview.

C: 呃…那…咱们开打吧？
E: Er... Right... Then let's begin our battle?

C: 好了，这次提问就到这里了。
E: All right. That's it for your questions.

C: 赶紧退赛吧，别来玷污演武仪典！
E: Give up now! Don't taint the Wardance ceremony!

C: 一段时间后，竞锋舰报刊亭附近……
E: Some time later, near the Skysplitter newsstand...

C: 好了，不多聊了。快来玩枘凿六合吧。关于这个游戏，我应该不用多做介绍了吧？
E: All right, enough chatter, come play the Hexanexus. I trust I don't have to describe this game to you?

C: 怎么样？你没有什么感想吗？
E: What do you think? Any thoughts?

C: 我们是「观忍社」的成员，负责运营这次音乐派对的主播账号，正在寻找能给社团虚拟形象画海报的人…要是你知道什么的话，请告诉我们！
E: We're members of the Ninja Appreciation Society, charged with running the music party's livestream account. We're looking for someone who can draw posters for the society's virtual avatar... Please tell us if you've got any leads!

C: ——此番演奏是何等的忍•神速！实在令人目不暇接。然而…还能更快！
E: ...A performance that is truly worthy of ninja-like swiftness! Absolutely overwhelming! However... it can be even faster!

C: 为乐队成员应援。
E: Provide support for the band members.

C: 哎呀，对我们来说，当然是希望办得越久越好啦。
E: As for us, of course, we'd like it to last as long as possible.

C: 啾？刚才是不是你在舞台旁边晃悠，原来是同行，你在乐队里担任哪个位置啾？
E: Tweet? Aren't you the one loitering about the stage just now? Didn't know you were one of us. What role are you in your band, tweet?

C: 行呀，空间站正好需要点能让大家都嗨起来的活动。就算没法去现场，我也会收看你们的直播的！
E: Sure, the station needs some explosive event to get everyone hyped anyway. Even if we can't be there in person, I'll still tune in to your live stream!

C: 加把劲，你的摇滚程度快比得上机械屋的废弃引擎了。
E: Keep it up. Your rock 'n' roll vibe can almost rival the discarded engines of the workshop.

C: 嗯。
E: Yeah.

C: 这个……
E: Well...

C: （咦，收到了新的消息。这次是…达凡绮发来的？）
E: (Huh, a new message. This time it's... from Dafanchy?)

C: 别忘了，当时也是她最先提出要退出乐队，这种摇摆不定的人怎么能相信！
E: Don't forget. It was her that first said she was going to leave the band. How are we supposed to trust such an indecisive person?

C: 听听你们在台上演奏的是什么，还是音乐吗？乱七八糟，稀里糊涂…不堪入耳！
E: Just listen to what you bunch are performing on stage. Is that even music? It's discordant and chaotic... A cacophony on the ears!

C: 此刻，在下已经怒不可遏了——
E: I am unable to contain my swelling rage anymore...

C: 就算只剩最后一人，忍者也绝不会逃离战场！
E: Even if we're down to the last man, a ninja will never withdraw from the battle!

C: ——前来参见！
E: ...seeks audience!

C: 艾尔菲，你听我说，当时我是被那个坏家伙给骗了啊…都是财富学院的错！
E: Arfey, listen to me, I was lied to by that scoundrel... It was all Fortune Academy's fault!

C: ——我等，即是「缭乱」！
E: ...We are the Dazzling Ninja!

C: 合唱赞歌，要的就是整齐、响亮、有气势！
E: For a choral hymn, what's required is unison, loudness, and impact!

C: 和我有什么关系？
E: What's it got to do with me?

C: 行，不过那个地方很冷，你多带点衣服吧。
E: Sure, but it's cold there, so bring extra clothes.

C: 要说能带来灵感的趣事…对了，刚才过来的路上，有个白色的东西从我眼前一闪而过，还发着奇怪的光，搞不好是什么新物种！
E: If I had to recall something interesting that inspired me... Oh yeah, while I was on the way here, something white darted across my path. It was glowing in a strange light — might be some sort of new creature!

C: 好吧，我知道…就是开个玩笑，嗯。
E: Fine, got it... It was just a joke, yeah.

C: 会觉得后悔吗？
E: Do you regret it?

C: 多说了个不字吧你…
E: "Won't" make money...?

C: 这玩意儿哪来的？
E: Where did this even come from?

C: 咱们这买卖，和那酒馆里的饮料也没啥区别，主打一个情绪价值！来，给你看看完整的商品清单，包满意。
E: This trading biz of ours isn't any different from the drinks available in that bar — we're all selling a sentimental value! Come, take a look at the complete goods list. Satisfaction guaranteed.

C: 你别说，最近解压玩具越来越流行了。谁让世界上净是些让人笑不出来的事呢？
E: Honestly though, these stress relief toys are really getting popular these days. Then again, the world's full of turmoil that makes it hard to laugh.

C: 这个好！嘿嘿，看你们以后还敢不敢偷吃列车长的应急干粮～
E: This is good! Heehee, let's see if you lot would still dare to steal Pom-Pom's emergency rations!

C: 既然如此，明天我会直接来叫你起床。
E: If that's the case, I'll wake you up tomorrow.

C: 杨大师！也收我为徒吧！
E: Master Yang! Please accept me as your student too!

C: 请别用那种眼神看着我，亲爱的无名客们！向阿基维利起誓，我和动画里的那个人完全不一样！
E: Please don't look at me with such eyes, my dear Nameless! I vow on Akivili's name that I am a complete contrast to that person in the animation!

C: 不必了，丹恒。你为列车操劳了太多，也该让我慰劳一下你了。安心享受美食吧。
E: No need, Dan Heng. You've worked so hard for the Express, and it's my turn to thank you. Please enjoy your food in peace.

C: 三位！还没有品尝菜品就提前离席，是一种非常不礼貌的行为。
E: Hey! Leaving before you've tried my dishes... that's awfully rude.

C: 顺便一说，「纡尊降贵」是我最近学会的仙舟成语。特别适合阴阳怪气，很喜欢。
E: By the way, "high horse" is a Xianzhou idiom I learned recently. It's very subtle, and I like it a lot.

C: 病毒？我看看…哦！不好意思，这个索引系统是「烛墨学派」开发的。软件本身免费，主要靠同期发售的「无用过滤镜」来盈利。
E: A virus? Let me see... Oh! Sorry, this index system was developed by the Candelagraphos. The software's free, and it mainly makes money from the "Unproductive Filter" it sells at the same time.

C: 三月，我们快制服{NICKNAME}。
E: March, we must restrain {NICKNAME} quickly.

C: …全体预备！抢！
E: ...Everyone, ready! Go!

C: 嗐，没事儿。一回生，二回熟。下次我们再抢……
E: Bah, it's fine. Practice makes perfect. We'll get 'em next time...

C: 还好我们在受灾宙域的外围，简单做一些应急准备就好帕！
E: Good thing we're outside the affected disaster area. Some basic emergency prep should suffice!

C: 你再碰那个控制面板，我就把你敲晕。
E: I will knock you out if you touch that control panel again.

C: …不对，真有狗叫！而且这个口音，一听就是……
E: ...No wait, it's really a dog! And this accent, it's probably...

C: 一夜无梦
E: No dreams tonight

C: 晚餐会议结束后\n\n列车某处
E: After the Dinner Meeting ends\n\nSomewhere on the Express

C: 没错，这也就是我把你喊过来的原因了——报名需要提交「证件照」，{NICKNAME}，来帮我拍一张吧！
E: That's right, and this is the reason I called you here. We need an ID photo for registration. {NICKNAME}, help me take one!

C: 两位无名客，开拓之余还有空暇来这儿闲逛，真是雅兴。
E: My dear Nameless, you managed to wring precious time out of your grand Trailblazing schedule to casually stroll about here? So aesthetically refined.

C: 话说回来，「镜头万花筒」和普通镜头之间，到底有什么区别呢？
E: Hey, what's the difference between this Camereidoscope and a normal lens?

C: 这个镜头很危险，还是不用为好。相信本姑娘的直觉！
E: This lens is super dangerous, so we better not use it. Trust my gut!

C: 唉，练了这么久胆子，还是要找人帮忙，实在丢人。
E: *sigh* You've been training your guts for so long, and you're still looking for help. Pathetic.

C: 尾巴大爷，刚刚我也不知怎么回事…突然就……
E: Mr. Tail, I don't know what happened just now... I suddenly...

C: 可别怪本大爷没提醒你，又找理由不喝浮羊奶，会长不高的。
E: I don't need to remind you that you won't grow taller if you keep finding excuses to avoid drinking puffergoat milk.

C: 越来越有主张了呢！
E: You're getting more assertive!

C: 呃…暂时还是不要打扰他们了吧？
E: Err... Probably not the best time to interrupt them?

C: 风堇的话音未落，所有奇美拉都齐刷刷地站在了你们身后。
E: Before Hyacine finishes her sentence, all the chimeras are lined up nicely in front of you both.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>领队奇美拉</color>——这便是人们对我的称呼，但我并不喜欢。奇美拉是团结的整体，不该再被*人为*地划分出等级高低。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Alpha Chimera</color> — that's what people call me, though I dislike it. Chimeras are a unity of their lesser selves, and should not be artificially segregated into hierarchies of ability.

C: 你们可以做选择，但需要想清楚代价，不是每次，都能有后悔的机会。
E: You all have to make a choice, but also be aware of its cost — one doesn't always get a chance to regret one's decision.

C: ——看看在这个周期内，谁的小队能取得更高的名次呢？
E: Let's see whose squad can achieve a higher ranking this season!

C: 没想到最后的对手竟然是只奇美拉…灰宝可别掉以轻心，使出全力，让它心服口服！
E: I never thought my final opponent would be a chimera... Be careful, Grayie! Give it everything you've got and make them submit!

C: 这是…属于理性的胜利！自由放任解决不了问题，只有在*充分*管理下的团队才能超越生物的极限。
E: This is... a victory that belongs to reason! A laissez-faire attitude won't cut it. Only a squad under ample management can surpass the limits of all life.

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 牛豹了！现在，恭喜你解锁了大哥设置的隐藏关「超级变态关」，可以来挑战我的超机密级小海豹阵容了！
E: Awesome! Now, congratulations on unlocking the hidden stage set by me, the Super Insane Stage! You can now challenge my top-secret elite seal lineup!

C: 哼哼~果然还是放在这里好。
E: Hmmm... Here is definitely a better spot to place it.

C: 小灰，这边这边！
E: Little Gray, over here!

C: 提摩斯老师，这里只有一枚猫猫硬币。
E: Mr. Timos, there's only a Cat Coin over here.

C: o((ŏωŏ; )o「豹豹要缇宝大人的抱抱才会好」)∋
E: o((ŏωŏ; )o "I want Lady Tribbie's hugs to feel better!" )∋

C: 与其说必胜法，不如说小灰和泡泡的实力远在*我们*之上。
E: Rather, it's more that Little Gray and Bubbles are just way beyond us in skill.

C: 庭院的人说它精神状态不太好，但没想到是这么不好。
E: The Courtyard warned me about its mental state, but this is worse than I imagined.

C: 哼，{NICKNAME}，一起上吧！嗷呜嗷呜~
E: Hmph, {NICKNAME}, let's do this together! Awoo-awoo~

C: 我是乡下来奥赫玛的土「豹」，听不懂你这些流行词。
E: I'm a humble "seal" from the Okheman countryside. I don't understand your trendy terms.
Umm...

C: 咳…因为泡泡精力旺盛而烦恼的奇美拉饲养员们，也可以悄悄松口气了。
E: Ahem... The chimera caretakers who've been troubled by Bubbles' boundless energy can finally let out a sigh of relief.

C: 我和这只橡胶海豹很早就认识了，这家伙强得不可思议。
E: I've known this Rubber Seal for a long time. It's astonishingly strong.

C: 泡泡，噢，我的泡泡。
E: Oh Bubbles, my Bubbles.

C: 小飞儿确实是这个性格，阿雅说这就叫「懒」。
E: True. That's how Little Ciphy is. Agy said this is called "being lazy."

C: 我做了一个预言梦！但是梦的内容我不能说，打死我也不说……
E: I had a prophetic dream! But I can't say what it was, no matter how much you threaten me...

C: 可恶，是新的小海豹指挥官。
E: Darn, it's the new baby seal commander.

C: 浴场的观众将目光紧紧地盯在你们的身上。
E: The audience at the baths stares at you intently.

C: 阿格莱雅你的防猫装置失效了…
E: Aglaea, your cat repellent device has failed...

C: 没看好奖杯，我们兄弟实在愧疚，请阿格莱雅大人原谅。
E: We failed to secure the trophy properly, and we brothers feel truly ashamed. Lady Aglaea, please forgive us.

C: 现在，专注于当下的比赛吧。
E: Now, focus on the upcoming match.

C: 看上去很帅气。
E: Looks pretty neat.

C: 咱这游戏的原型是「星际文明成果展示大会」，每个琥珀纪都会在庇尔波因特举办两次。
E: This game is inspired by "Interastral Civilization Achievement Exhibition," an event held twice each Amber Era at Pier Point.

C: 但在决定做这部作品之前，我更多是个旁观者：看了许多别人的故事，自己却没有要表达的情感……
E: Before this project, I was just a spectator: hearing others' stories but having nothing of my own to say...

C: 《银河球棒侠传说》？
E: Legend of the Galactic Baseballer?

C: 好的，这段时间我都会留在这里，有问题可以随时来找我。
E: Alright, I'll stay here. If you have any questions, feel free to come find me.

C: 为了不让那些没能玩到的玩家留下遗憾，我们特意复刻了测试版，并将其命名为《银河球棒侠传说：启程篇》。
E: To make sure those who missed out don't feel left behind, we've recreated the beta version and named it Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Departure.

C: 「在狡猾『公爵』的诡计下，正直的球棒侠一时不察，坠入了连通着茫茫多未知世界的黑洞。」
E: "Under the cunning tricks of the Duke, the righteous Baseballer is caught off guard and falls into a black hole that connects to countless unknown worlds."

C: 这…您就有所不知了。
E: Ah, you don't know the whole story.

C: 别别别，别告诉她老人家，她还以为我在曜青仙舟度假呢！
E: Absolutely not! She thinks I'm having a nice relaxing time on the Xianzhou Yaoqing!

C: 宝了个贝的，所以光是打这破游戏没有办法解除诅咒是吗？
E: Fudge me sideways, so we can't actually solve the curse by playing this game?

C: 啾！
E: Tweet!

C: 看来，转型成为游戏实况博主的计划要推迟了……
E: Well, looks like I'll have to postpone my plans of shifting into a game streamer...

C: 不得不说，匹诺康尼可真是个好地方，尤其是这儿的酒吧。就连波提欧兄弟，也对这儿的口味赞不绝口。
E: I've got to say, Penacony is quite the place, especially the bar. Even my bro Boothill's been raving about the drinks.

C: 好啊。
E: Sure.

C: 我不奢望一次面谈能让这家伙醍醐灌顶，但要是能放过我的邮箱，我也就谢天谢地了。
E: I don't expect one conversation to work miracles, but if it stops them from flooding my inbox, I'll gladly take it.

C: 呼…呼……
E: *snore*

C: 「一觉解千愁」。
E: "Nap It All Away."

C: （这个调饮配方，或许还有发掘的空间……）
E: (This recipe might have more potential to explore...)

C: 假如人偶有自己的主见，至少能赞美得更有新意吧。喝喝看也无妨，就当光顾你的生意了。
E: If puppets had their own opinions, at least they could come up with more original compliments. Might as well give it a try, I'll consider it patronizing your business.

C: 人偶把感官信标接收到的数据发给我了。嗯，看起来味道不错。
E: The puppet just sent me the latest sensory beacon data. Hmm, seems the flavor was decent.

C: 您理解了吗？「悲悼」伶人又「被盗」了，令人黯然神伤。
E: Now the Mourning Actor's got nothing left. What a mourn-umental loss! Get it?

C: 请慢用。
E: Please enjoy.

C: 这为我们增加了不少工作量。不过无关痛痒，最后刃处理了侍者，我处理了饮料。
E: It added a bit of work for us, but no harm done. In the end, Blade took care of the bartender, and I handled the drinks.

C: 真有些受宠若惊呀。不过你放心，花火大人会当好榜样的。
E: I'm truly flattered. But rest assured, Miss Sparkle will set a good example.

C: 没错。这个答案非常好。
E: That's right. That's an excellent answer.

C: 离开？你们不一起了吗？
E: Leaving? You're not staying with me anymore?

C: 你不会是觉得我的工作比你轻松吧？你知道在黑咕隆咚的地底，想找值钱的古代遗物有多难吗？就算你自个儿找到了好东西，也肯定会被无良买家坑的。
E: Do you think my job is easier than yours? Do you realize how difficult it is to find priceless ancient relics in the pitch-dark underground? Even if you did manage to find something good yourself, those unethical buyers would run circles around you.

C: 升天？谁敢吃这玩意？
E: Sounds fishy. Who on earth would take dodgy drugs like this?

C: 「血战」让你给吃了？
E: What happened to the fight against the Plagues Author demon?

C: 无名客不止您一个，那几位英雄也都在这段冒险中贡献了自己的力量。是否有可能，把别人的事迹移花接木到您身上？
E: Nameless, you're not the only one, right? Those other heroes have also thrown themselves into this adventure. Is it possible to perhaps fudge things a little so that YOU will be the one doing those deeds?

C: 你这龙尊的故事倒是有意思，只是颇有些棘手。枝蔓横生，条缕纷乱。和我自己编的那些云上五骁的传奇可差远了。
E: This high elder story of yours is interesting, but a little tricky to pull off. It branches off in all directions with some red herrings. It's way different from the masterpieces I've personally written about the High-Cloud Quintet.

C: 我要发大财！
E: I wish to be rich!

C: 刚出生就穿着衣服？
E: Born wearing clothes!?

C: 现在嘛…我们需要一些星槎生长促进剂，来促进星槎种子的生长，为我们提供足够分量的柄材。
E: Now then... We need some starskiff growth boosters to stimulate these seeds — and give us enough material to make a hilt.

C: 好个幻胧，竟早已预感到了{NICKNAME}一行的异动，打算以宝藏为饵，将无名客们一网成擒！
E: How cunning! Realizing {NICKNAME} and the others' unusual actions, Phantylia was planning on using the treasure as bait to lure the Nameless into its trap!

C: 放入「无根纯水」
E: Put in the Bona Aqua

C: 言简意赅，不落窠臼！大，宝，剑！端的是好名字！
E: Concise, but unconventional! Big, sword... Truly a splendid name!

C: 你俩能给个准信吗？
E: Can you guys give me a definite answer?

C: 我觉着…这事恐怕不得行咯。
E: Well... I'm not sure about that...

C: 放心，报酬少不了你们的。
E: Don't worry. You will be generously paid.

C: 我看你们喝得开心，根本就没注意到我…哎，那就麻烦{NICKNAME}将「杜氏茶庄」纳入到物流规划之中吧，这样码头就会有新的运单了。
E: You were too focused on enjoying tea to notice me... {NICKNAME}, please add Du's Teahouse into the logistics plan so the docks can get some new orders.

C: 但是要转型，就等于重新开业，想把店铺的名头打响可不容易，我想了半天也没想出个所以然来。
E: The thing is, if I were to make the switch, it would be like opening a whole new shop, and I'd have to start from scratch and build up a new customer base. I've been thinking about it, but I haven't quite figured out how to do it yet.

C: 我刚才也看得津津有味的，泊阳老板也和我这边谈好了合作事宜，事不宜迟，那就麻烦{NICKNAME}将「清玩斋」纳入到物流规划之中吧，这样码头就会有新的运单了。
E: That was fantastic. Boyang and I have worked out all the details of our cooperation. {NICKNAME}, please add Elegance Pagoda into the logistics plan so the docks can get some new orders.

C: 再次睁开双眼，你发现自己来到了一个陌生的地方，呜呜伯出现在了你的眼前。
E: When you once again open your eyes, you realize you've arrived in an unfamiliar place, with the Wubbaboo before you.

C: 我不知道这是什么，也不懂那个什么「战线」该怎么玩……
E: ...I have no clue what this is or how to play that "Aetherium Wars" thingy...

C: 不得不说，这个什么《以太战线》可真好玩——我都连着肝了好几天了，饭都没顾得上吃！
E: I've gotta say, Aetherium Wars is really fun, I've been grinding for several days straight — barely even had time to eat!

C: 高手玩家？那是谁？
E: Elite player? Who?

C: 桂乃芬姑娘可真是风风火火的…希望之后还能遇到她。
E: Hehe, Guinaifen's enthusiasm is super contagious, I hope we bump into her again.

C: 今天就先休息吧，{NICKNAME}。明天再前往下一站——<color=#dbc291ff>「空间站『黑塔』的决胜乐园」</color>……
E: Let's call it a day and get some rest, {NICKNAME}. Tomorrow, we're bound for our next destination — <color=#dbc291ff>the Victory Zone on Herta Space Station</color>.
That's...

C: 难道他真的有阴谋？
E: So you too think he could be up to something too?

C: …但我感觉有点…舍不得它了——虽然它只是一只以太灵……
E: I just can't help but... feel a little attached — even if they are only an Aether Spirit.

C: 总之，今天的行程就到此为止啦。既然已经回到贝洛伯格了，我们就在歌德宾馆再住一晚吧。
E: Let's call it a day, shall we? And since we're in Belobog, it means another night at the Goethe Hotel!

C: 嘿嘿…陪我折腾这么久，真是辛苦你啦。
E: Hehe... Thanks for sticking with me through everything.

C: 打工人真不容易啊…
E: It's a tough life working for the IPC...

C: …啊！我明白了！
E: ...Ohhhh! I get it!

C: 刚才那个呜呜伯好像还挺开心的…我们应该是做了正确的事情吧？
E: That Wubbaboo back there seemed quite happy... it must mean we're doing something right.

C: 你们赶紧来挑战我——不要浪费我的时间——！
E: Hurry up already. Stop wasting my time!

C: 要不要跟老桑博较量一把试试？别担心，我保证会跟你公平对决的~
E: Why not test your skills against old Sampo? Don't worry, I'll make sure to play a fair game~

C: 还是算了。
E: Actually, let's forget it.

C: 是你啊，想要来领福利吗？
E: Oh, it's you! Are you here to claim benefits?

C: 感觉…这地头和我们老家的调调有几分相似：天寒地冻的，到处都是冷冰冰的铁疙瘩…哎，还是罗浮好啊～
E: You know, this place kinda reminds me of home... Not the Luofu, my real home. Barren, icy, jagged shards sticking out everywhere... I guess nothing really beats the Luofu, huh?

C: …但我得承认，你们刚才的表现确实不错。
E: ...But I gotta give credit where it's due, nice work.

C: 游乐场？听起来好像很有意思！面具叔叔，你可以把我也带上吗？还有鼹鼠党的各位！
E: A "musement park"? That sounds fun! Is Uncle Mask gonna take Hook and all The Moles?

C: 星际决胜庆典锦标赛即将开始，请各位观众有序入场——
E: The Interastral Tournament Festival championship is about to commence. Please, take to your seats...

C: 家人，你终于来了！要是缺了你，咱们这支「捉鬼小队」可就缺了一个强大战力！
E: Yo, what's up! You're finally here! Without you, our ghost-hunting squad would be nothing!

C: 言归正传…除了被镇伏在绥园里的浮烟，洪炉破碎后，还有不少岁阳逃逸在外。
E: As for our mission... Cirrus was locked up in Fyxestroll Garden, but there were a lot of other heliobi that escaped after the Creation Furnace was broken.

C: 你是说…浮烟？
E: You mean... Cirrus?

C: 啊，无聊到令人心碎，连偶尔有飞虫掠过都成了乐趣。但这一次，有几只小飞虫一块找上门来了……
E: Ugh, this tedium... even the insects can't hold my attention any longer. I wonder if these ones will prove to be more entertaining?

C: 看来{NICKNAME}是铁了心要我奉还人情了。
E: It would appear you are eager to see me assume the debt.

C: 到最后，奇兵还是我啊…
E: Can we practice our masterstrokes first?

C: 嗯…请一定要小心。
E: Mm... please be careful.

C: 剩下的事，一会在群里聊吧。
E: Let's continue in a group chat.

C: 我本该将岁阳连根祓除，送入洪炉。可惜那时藿藿的身子骨太过衰弱，为了能保住她的生命，我只能书写符敕，将那东西暂时镇伏在她体内。
E: Normally, I would have just purged the heliobus and sent it back into the furnace. But Huohuo's body was too frail and weak to perform a purging. The best I could do without harming her was to inscribe a talisman seal — enough to subdue the thing living inside her, at least for a while.

C: 大姐姐，你还挺会给人灌心灵鸡汤的嘛，不如来丹鼎司的医馆挂牌当个心理医士吧？
E: Hehe, alright, alright, I don't want everyone to feel too sorry for me... Hey, did you ever think about joining the Alchemy Commission as a psychotherapist?

C: 大家…还好吗？
