E: Is everyone... okay?

C: 先走了。
E: I'm heading off.

C: 不必为上一次胜利感到窃喜…
E: Don't let your previous victory go to your heads...

C: 我会不断试探，不断挑战。
E: I will never rest...

C: 不先去问问浮烟？
E: Shouldn't we talk to Cirrus first?

C: 剑悬在空中，指向位于波月古海上遥遥相望的彼处。你们什么也看不清。
E: Yanqing's sword hangs in the air, pointing to the distance across the Lunarescent Depths.

C: 对了，有没有可能，今天藿藿突然得到了关于尾巴的线索…这样一来，以她的性格一定会去找回尾巴的。
E: What if Huohuo came across a lead today — something that sounded like Tail's doing...? Knowing her, she's probably gone looking for him...

C: 连判官也感到为难吗？
E: Surely the Ten-Lords can fix this?

C: 对啊，浮烟肯定知道岁阳到底能做什么。
E: Yeah, Cirrus is bound to know what this heliobus is up to.

C: 十王司的阵法尚在，岁阳是无法离开绥园的，你自以为得计的一手不过是困兽之斗。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission's matrix is still intact — the heliobi cannot leave Fyxestroll Garden. You may think you have the upper hand, but you're nothing more than a caged animal. You will never leave here.

C: 你懂什么，这算是老子和十王司签订的「互不侵犯契约」。
E: What do you know? This is between me and the Ten-Lords Commission — a non-aggression pact, if you like.

C: 接下来，也许还会有岁阳的漏网之鱼，不过已是微不足道的小事了。
E: There may have been a few heliobi that slipped through the net, but they are of no major concern.

C: 哎哟我去，你就说回没回来吧？！
E: Oh c'mon! You wanted them to return — they returned!

C: …结果竟然是一个不知道「下棋为何物」的臭棋篓子，谁能想到呢？
E: ...Turns it was some amateur that didn't even know what chess is! Who'd have thought it?

C: 若昔女士…如果我没有猜错，文远先生与你初见面时，已经变了很多吧…你注意到了吗，即便不附身，你在无意中也会消耗宿主的身躯……
E: Miss Ruoxi... If I'm not mistaken, Mr. Wenyuan has changed much since the two of you met... Have you noticed that despite not taking possession, you still unintentionally consume the host's body...

C: 若昔！你知道的，我从来不在乎这些。
E: Ruoxi! You know, I never cared about any of that.

C: 怎么会呢？您愿意放过我们，我又怎么敢出尔反尔、恩将仇报呢？
E: How could I? How could I go back on my word like that and bite the hand that feeds, after you'd been willing to let me go?

C: …这真的是岁阳的原因吗？
E: ...Is it really a heliobus causing this?

C: 愚蠢，我本可以让你富可敌国！
E: Fools! I could have given you all unimaginable fortune!

C: 藿藿要是遇到困难也随时告诉我们。
E: Make sure you tell us if you come across any trouble, Huohuo.

C: 后来，我找到风水大师，他看着罗盘说「这房子虽有窗轩却不通阳气，虽有院墙却不能聚财；东面病役众多，西面人丁不齐。四方不顺，五行相克……」
E: After some time, I found a geomantic master. He checked his compass and said that: "Though there are windows and pavilions, there is no flow of yang energy. The courtyard walls do not foster a growth of wealth. There is sickness to the east and the population to the west lacks harmony in community. The four directions are not favorable and the five elements clash..."

C: 稍等一下，我还没准备好
E: Hold on a sec. I'm not ready yet.

C: 现在就去调查看看吧…
E: See what we can find out...

C: 我叫煞火，你快收了我吧。
E: My name is Burnie. Hurry and claim me!

C: 是为了和朋友告别吗？
E: To say goodbye to a friend?

C: 那只叫作星燏的岁阳，说自己离开造化洪炉只是为了自由，其他的岁阳也是这样吗？
E: That heliobus named Stafyre said it left the Creation Furnace for freedom. Do you think the other heliobi are the same?

C: 「降魔机巧鸟」，启动！
E: Cycrane, start!

C: 居然…还真有啊。
E: I can't believe... it's really me.

C: 唔啊啊啊啊啊！
E: Ughhhhhhh!

C: 它们…被人类的念头吸引，却又变得比人类更糟了。我不想，像它们那样……
E: They... were attracted by humans' thoughts but became worse than the humans. I don't want... to be like them...

C: 我先回列车，你想好了就来和我说一声！如果你打算把它带给判官，封印起来…就不用特意告诉我啦。
E: I'll return to the Express now. Let me know what's your decision! But if you wish to bring it to the Judges and seal it... spare me the details.

C: 把捉鬼小队和符箓的事一五一十讲给了三月七。
E: You explain to March 7th about the ghost-hunting squad and the talisman.

C: 大家还是先去忙自己的事吧，之后我再安排大家来录视频。至于「粉丝提问」的事，我等会儿就去征集，就拜托{NICKNAME}你看看有什么有趣的提问啦！
E: Everyone should finish up with their own stuff first. I'll arrange for you to shoot the video content later. As for the Fan Q&A segment, I'll collect those up in a bit. {NICKNAME}, can you please see if there are any interesting questions?

C: 我想想啊……
E: Let me think about it...

C: 这个…这个…这个是秘密，不能说。
E: It's... it's... it's a secret. I can't tell you.

C: 虽然这个账号名叫「小桂子Guinevere」，但是它并不是我。「小桂子Guinevere」承载着很多人对它的想象，早已不是某个具体的人了。
E: This account may be called "LilGuiGuinevere," but it's not mine alone. "LilGuiGuinevere" bears many people's expectations — it stopped being just one person a long time ago.

C: 呃，你们有什么事吗？
E: Um, what do you want?

C: 我看有位小姑娘挺眼熟的…就是你、你是那个主播对吧，最近很火的那个什么小桂子来着？
E: One of you girls looks like someone I know... You, you there. Are you that famous vlogger who went viral recently? Little Gui, right?

C: 我只是想亲眼见见你，没有别的意思…之前十万粉丝纪念问答活动，我还留言问过你会不会有粉丝见面会呢，可惜问题没被选中。
E: I just wanted to see you with my own eyes and really didn't mean anything else by it... During the hundred thousand fans event, I even submitted a question about whether you'd be doing any fan meet-and-greets — but sadly my question never got picked.

C: 没想到是这么好的结局…
E: I never expected things to wrap up so nice and neat...

C: 里面也不是什么贵重物品，就是些小点心，还有一封信。她在信里说，觉得我上次跟她说话，很在乎工作，看上去超级强势。
E: There's nothing valuable inside, just some snacks and this letter. In it, she said that I seemed to really care about my work when we met last time, and that I was pretty intense.

C: 但你的顾虑也很合理，就算每天打扫，这种事还是会不断发生……
E: But these concerns of yours are also reasonable. Even if cleaning is performed daily, similar things will keep happening...
Uhh...

C: 既然咱们目标一致，那正好，我有些东西要给你，或许会对你的培育工作有帮助。
E: It's fine since our goals are aligned. I have some things for you that you might find helpful with your nurturing job.

C: 有造物在马桶上睡着了，空气中弥漫着不妙的味道。
E: One creation is sleeping on the toilet. A putrid stench fills the air.

C: 揉进我们的馅儿～
E: Add it to our stuffing~

C: 我有很多其他故事，但并非为你而准备。若你想听，我也可以讲，只是这并不能使你获得奖赏。
E: I've got lots of other stories, but they're not just for you. I can tell you the stories, if you'd like — you just won't be rewarded for it.

C: 是挺有意思的。
E: Really, quite fascinating.

C: 不错！算你有心。来！大声告诉其他人，你打算为这杯光荣的饮料，取什么名字？
E: Not bad at all! Come forth and announce with honor! What shall this glorious beverage be named?

C: 喂，新来的！我们去找个地方坐下，你把那杯饮料拿过来。搞快点！
E: Hey, newcomer! Find a befitting seat for me and bring my beverage! Hurry!

C: 呀！
E: Yikes!

C: 「对家族来说，这是必须解决的大麻烦。」
E: "For The Family, this is a big problem that must be solved."

C: ——大的要让着小的，大小都一样，没毛病！
E: ...The big one should give way to the smaller ones. Nothing wrong with that!

C: 咦，要让人家来玩嘛？
E: Oh, me?
...I understand.

C: 我没法反驳。
E: I can't argue with that.

C: 装帧华丽的邀请函瞬间被撕成了碎屑，逐梦客的脸色也随之变得愈发苍白。
E: In the blink of an eye, the gorgeous invitation is torn to shreds. Colors drain from the Dreamchaser's face instantly.

C: 真是倒霉！霉到家了！呜，紧张就想要上厕所…可这哪有呢？
E: What bad luck! Oh, this is terrible! Oooh, I need a bathroom when I'm nervous... but where is it?

C: （完成那副拼图后，酒吧内出现了相应的器具摆设。）
E: (After completing the jigsaw, the respective item appeared in the lounge.)

C: 你们…是特意过来欺负我的吗？
E: Are you... here just to bully me?

C: 听我说，即使你现在没有发狂的迹象，但只要是「美梦剧团」，就不可避免地会受到噩梦的侵袭，趁现在神智还清楚，早点逃到安全的地方。
E: Listen, even if you're not showing signs of frenzy now, as part of the Sweet Dreams Troupe, the nightmare will eventually corrupt you. So leave now and find a safe place while you still have your sanity.

C: 好可怕！不是告诉人家说，酒吧里很安全的嘛？
E: That's scary! Didn't you say that the lounge is totally safe?

C: 等不了一点！
E: I'm not waiting any longer!

C: 这是怎么回事，脑袋有点发晕，像是喝了很烈的酒，心情却很平静。嘿嘿，你们好啊！
E: Well, what's happening here? My head feels a bit dizzy, like I've had a strong drink, but somehow I'm feeling calm. Hey there, nice to meet you all!

C: 汪！前面好像听到了说话的声音哇！
E: Woof! I think I hear voices up ahead!

C: （听到了不少黑桃的内心想法，它应该对我比较信任了吧？）
E: (I just heard a bunch of Spade's thoughts. I guess he must trust me more now.)

C: 你确定要选大的？大的大的大的…噢，我想起来了，肯定是大的！
E: You sure you want to choose big? Big, big, big... Oh, Now that I think of it, I bet it's gonna be big!

C: 那就大的咯？不改咯？…再不说话就开咯？
E: So, you're going big? Not gonna change...? Speak now or forever hold your peace.

C: 记着，我不管你是谁，只要你站在那个破木台子后面，手边摆着那些脏杯子，你就得老老实实听我的话，按我的想法去做。是我给你的钱，懂吗？
E: Remember: I don't care who you think you are. As long as you are behind that dilapidated lounge and have those dirty glasses next to you, then you better listen to me and do what I want. I'm the one paying you, got it?

C: 快别做梦了，醒醒。这么好的事，怎么可能轮得到我们呢。
E: I should just stop daydreaming and snap out of it. I should have known better that we don't deserve something so great.

C: 人家最近也正发愁呢，黑暗的梦境酒店里，总感觉有些什么吓人的东西在蠢蠢欲动，可想找个安静的地方走走，就只能去那儿呀。
E: It worries me, too. I've always felt something creepy lurking deep within the hotel in the Dreamscape, but if I want a quiet place, there's not much of an alternative.

C: 唉。热烈的情感转瞬即逝，玻璃杯已然见底，而我内心的空洞仍未填满。
E: *sigh* Passionate emotions are transient. The glass is empty, yet the void in my heart remains unfilled.

C: 好在，这杯迷人的饮料让我与你相识了。
E: Thankfully, this delightful drink has made us acquaintances.

C: 即使心头被愁云笼罩，你的善意与调饮技巧仍旧给我留下了极深的印象。
E: Despite the sorrow clouding my heart, your kindness and drink-mixing mastery have deeply impressed me.

C: 呀！听着就很难受。虽然您这么说…可心里头的想法哪有这么容易压下去呀。
E: Ohh, that's tough. Even if you say that... it's not easy to suppress what's on your mind.

C: 这是你现在的想法么？
E: Is that what you are thinking now?

C: …为什么你要帮我？
E: ...Why did you help me?

C: …为什么你要骗它？
E: ...Why did you lie to them?

C: …冰块？
E: ...Ice cubes?

C: …为什么这么说？
E: ...Why do you say that?

C: 我留在这里，寻找那些遭到抛弃、但神智仍旧清醒的「美梦剧团」。我建立了这家酒吧，为怪物们调制饮料，想办法安抚情绪，希望能改变它们的命运。
E: I stayed here, searching for the abandoned Sweet Dreams Troupe members who were still sane. I established this lounge, making drinks for those monsters and finding ways to calm them down, hoping to change their fate.

C: 哎，这就是流离之人必须踏上的颠沛旅途。再会吧，不愿交出真心的调饮师。
E: *sigh* This is a desolate journey that a wanderer has to make. May we meet again, reticent drinksmith.

C: （这只狗是故意来惹我生气的吗？）
E: (Is this dog trying to rile me up on purpose?)

C: 记录「司令」的情况。
E: Record information about Mr. Bigwig.

C: 我在和亲爱的调饮师进行私密聊天，你不准插话！
E: I'm having a private conversation with our dear drinksmith here. Mind your business!

C: 你觉得我会信吗？
E: Do you think I'd believe you?

C: 好
E: Alright

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>#@</color><rhythm><color=#eb4d3dff>$%</color><rhythm><color=#eb4d3dff>&#</color><rhythm><color=#eb4d3dff>@$</color><rhythm><color=#eb4d3dff>#!</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>#@</color><rhythm><color=#eb4d3dff>$%</color><rhythm><color=#eb4d3dff>&#</color><rhythm><color=#eb4d3dff>@$</color><rhythm><color=#eb4d3dff>#!</color>

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪  汪      汪
E: Woof  Woof      Woof

C: 汪  汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof  Woof

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof

C: 准备开始正式的合唱吧！
E: Prepare to begin the choir proper!

C: 当哈努兄弟转头时，<color=#f29e38ff>长按屏幕</color>来停止跳动。
E: When Brother Hanu turns, <color=#f29e38ff>{LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} and hold the screen</color> to stop moving.

C: 它以为把那些小心思隐藏得很好，但大家早就看出来了。
E: It thought it hid those thoughts well, but everyone saw right through the facade.

C: 英雄，您看，咱要不再进去一趟？外包嘛，不寒碜。
E: Maybe we should go in again, hero? Just outsourcing work, nothing big deal.

C: 你这么一说，我都考虑去给黑天鹅小姐当个学徒了。你瞧，我要是学成了，每次跃迁之前算上一卦，保准当次的开拓之旅顺顺利利的……
E: But since you've brought it up, maybe I should take a lesson or two from Miss Black Swan. Think about it: If I master the art, I can divine our future before we do a warp jump. It'll guarantee a smooth trailblazing expedition for sure!

C: 当然是我！
E: I did, of course!

C: 嗯，她估计早就发现了。 不过问题不大，我们这就要溜了——对了，你不是说想去「绿洲的时刻」吗？反正我现在也无聊得很，干脆和你一起好了。
E: Yes, she probably found out about us long ago. However, it's no big deal, for it's time for us to slip away... Right, didn't you mention that you wanted to visit the Moment of Oasis? Since I have nothing else to do right now, I'll go with you.

C: 不过说实话，我是没什么信心啦，一上来就接触这么大的项目…这压力我有点吃不消。
E: But to be honest, I'm feeling really anxious about this. To be involved in such a huge project so soon after I arrived... I think the stress is a bit too much.

C: 喔，那当然不错～我一贯的原则，就是绝对要让合作伙伴拿到实惠。
E: Absolutely. My principle has always been to ensure our partners get real, tangible benefits.

C: 公司会这么好心？
E: Is the IPC really that generous?

C: 我怎么会惹…啊！糟糕……
E: How could I have possibly made an enemy... Oh no!

C: 卢卡选手，此地不宜久留。快走吧，这里我来应付。
E: Luka, it's not safe to stay here. Go quickly, and I'll deal with this.

C: 听说选了个仙舟的代言人
E: Heard they chose a Xianzhou ambassador.

C: 结论：未能与黑塔取得联系。
E: Conclusion: No contact established with Herta.

C: 求之不得。
E: That's all I've ever wanted.

C: <unbreak>40</unbreak>字以内，谢谢。
E: Sure. Keep it under <unbreak>40</unbreak> words, please.

C: 禁止套娃帕！
E: No copycat excuses!!!

C: 在「派对车厢」二楼恰好有个闲置房间，可以当做{NICKNAME}的房间～走，我们快去看看吧！
E: There's an unused room on the second level of the Party Car that you can move into, {NICKNAME}. Let's go over and check it out!

C: 再怎么大也就是个杂物间…
E: It's big, but it's still a storeroom...

C: 不想睡纸箱子，就暂且以「搭建卧室」为目标吧！
E: Unless you want to sleep in a cardboard box, I suggest prioritizing the renovation of your bedroom first.

C: 列车长也理解，万事开头难。
E: But Pom-Pom also knows that the first step is always the hardest.

C: 晚上好，亲爱的无名客。恭喜您完成了卧室的建造，看到这个房间恢复生机，我由衷地感到高兴。
E: Good evening, dear Nameless. Congratulations on finishing the bedroom construction! I'm genuinely thrilled to see this space come to life.

C: 评比最高分，可以获得「卫生之星」的称号！顺带一提，丹恒乘客已经蝉联三届「卫生之星」了帕。
E: The highest score will receive the title of Hygiene Star! By the way, Dan Heng has been the reigning Hygiene Star for three consecutive years!

C: 一周前就已经通知过了，现在临时抱佛脚，为时已晚了帕！
E: You were notified a week ago. It's too late to scramble at the last minute now!

C: 原来是百分制吗？！
E: So it's a percentage scale!?

C: 你不是真正的帕姆！
E: You're not the real Pom-Pom!

C: 你被公司忽悠了！
E: You've been deceived by the IPC!

C: 真是独特的庆祝方式！
E: That's a unique way of celebrating.

C: 大家碰杯，饮尽杯中的饮料，随后欢笑着告辞，一起离开了你的房间。
E: The group raises their glasses, drinking in unison, then with laughter, they bid farewell and exit your room together.

C: 呜嗡！（驮子！）
E: Grumph grumph! (Beast of Burden!)

C: 这个辈分好像有点怪…
E: The family tree feels a bit questionable...

C: 你能听懂大地兽话？
E: You can understand dromas language?

C: 原来灰宝在惦记这个吗…好啊，就当是报酬了。
E: So that's what you're after... Sure, we got a deal.

C: 作为家长，是时候拉它一把了。
E: And as the parent, I should step in and help.

C: …好吧，之后还是由你来转述。
E: ...Alright. I'll let you do the translating from here.

C: 呜嗡。呜……（谢谢你，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}。我想…应该没事了，嗯。）
E: Grumph. Grumph... (Thank you, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. I think... I'm okay now, hmm.)

C: 呜嗡！（哇，我错了，不要吃我啦——哈哈……）
E: Grumph! (Wah, I'm sorry, please don't eat me — hahaha...)

C: 别太责怪自己。
E: Don't be too hard on yourself.

C: 它只是去泡了个澡。
E: It just went to take a bath.

C: 是不是还有调查分团？
E: Is there also a Survey Corps?

C: 还是跟过去看看吧。
E: Maybe I should go with you to take a look.

C: 呜嗡嗡，呜嗡嗡嗡！（它之前还瞧不起我，但现在我已掌握岁月的神力，它就认我做老大啦——我可不止这一个小弟哦！）
E: Grumph, grumphhh! (It used to look down on me, but now that I've mastered the divine power of time, it calls me boss. I don't just have one little follower!)

C: 好吃！
E: Yummy!

C: 你们两个在偷偷摸摸搞什么？我警告你，休想调包我的宝贝！
E: What are you two mumbling about? Don't get any ideas about swapping out my treasure!

C: 翁法罗斯有一个美丽的传说：相传，法吉娜是世间最好的琴师，海洋造物听到她的琴声会变得温和，风浪听到她的琴声亦会平息。
E: Amphoreus has a beautiful legend: It's said that Phagousa was the best lyre player in the world. The ocean calmed, and the winds stilled at the sound of her music.

C: 而我不太相信这个说法，悬锋人淬火冶金发达，应更惯用金属器皿才是。
E: I'm skeptical of that tale. Kremnoans, with their advanced metalworking, would more likely favor metal vessels.

C: 当然不是，但是…怎么说呢，这其实是在说您武德充沛呀！
E: Of course not, but... how should I put this? What I meant is you're brimming with martial prowess!

C: 喊出来：「请给我更多糕点吧！」嘶嘶，我会为你服务——
E: Shout this: "I beg you, give me more pastries!" Zztzzt. I'll be at your service.

C: 在此期间，一伙无名客抵达了拉蒂卡兰，利用巨龙留下的水资源开垦土地、建立聚落。当巨龙醒来时，这颗星球已经变得鸟语花香。
E: During this period, a group of Nameless arrived at Ladiklan, using the water resources left by the Giant Dragon to cultivate the land and establish settlements. When the Dragon awoke, the planet had already become a paradise teeming with birds and flowers.

C: 迷路迷境的生态也太神奇了吧！
E: The ecology of Membrance Maze is just amazing!

C: 餐馆的事处理得差不多，该去参加那个迷其林美食评审了。
E: Now that everything's settled at the restaurant, it's time for the Memchelin Food Review.

C: 城邦里的店铺不是经常会庆祝节日嘛，譬如法吉娜的狂欢月，还有纪念云石天宫的建成。
E: You know how shops in the city-state host seasonal celebrations? Like Phagousa's Month of Carnival, or the anniversary of the Marmoreal Palace?

C: ——迷！迷迷！继续为白厄主厨应援！
E: Memem! Mem! Keep cheering for Chef Phainon!

C: 难分胜负啊。
E: Hard to tell who's gonna win.

C: 抱歉。
E: My apologies.

C: 你不是这辈子都不会工作吗？
E: Didn't you say you'd never work another day in your life?

C: 给你一个建议：放弃那不切实际的沙拉吧。优秀的厨师不会挑剔食材，利用手头的材料做好每一道菜，才算是对它们的敬意。
E: Want my advice? Forget that fancy salad. The mark of a great chef is making the most of what's at hand. They don't nitpick ingredients.

C: 哼。脚踏实地，这点还不错。
E: Hmph. At least you're practical. I can respect that.

C: 我宣布——宴会正式开始！
E: I hereby declare — the feast has officially begun!

C: 该结束啦。毕竟宴会过后，妖精们就该回去睡觉了。它们可都是早睡早起的好宝宝。
E: It's a good time to end it~ After all, once the feast is over, the fairies need to go to bed. They're all such well-behaved little early birds.

C: 想和你复盘餐馆办的活动。
E: I'd like to review our restaurant event with you.

C: 不过，\n问及他是否仍如幼时那般怕痒，\n他始终避而不答。

E: Tribios...\nThis name has not been mentioned for some time.

E: "Ahh! Stop nagging!"\nThe mischievous child pouts.

C: 直到月色升腾，\n一支华簪将老妇的白发结盘。
E: Yet when the moon rises,\nA magnificent pin graces the old lady's pale locks.

C: 以三百侠盗锒铛入狱，\n换一位泰坦叹而受囚。
E: Three hundred thieves shackled in imprisonment,\nIn exchange for a Titan's resigned confinement.

C: 「辛苦你了，伙伴。」
E: "Thank you for all you've done, friend."

C: 泰坦以肋骨将它托举、慢慢向上，\n巨龙的脊梁割裂岩层、剖开土壤。
E: The Titan lifted them up by their ribs, slowly raising them,\nThe dragon's spine sliced through the strata of rock, cutting open the soil.

C: 大地将背叛的记忆刻进岩层，\n直到<color=#9e5738>「长夜」</color>将它们翻阅。
E: Earth carved the memories of the betrayal into its strata,\nUntil <color=#9e5738>"Evernight"</color> would leaf through them.

C: <color=#9e5738>「不朽」</color>能治好巨龙的神躯，\n<color=#9e5738>「不朽」</color>能指引生存的末路。
E: <color=#9e5738>The Permanence</color> can heal the divine form of the Giant Dragon,\n<color=#9e5738>The Permanence</color> can guide life past its end.

C: 危难之际，\n生灵搭起龙形的桥梁，\n我率它们向星空蹇行。
E: In our darkest hour,\nThe living beings form a bridge of dragons,\nAnd I lead them limping towards the starry sky.

C: 「现在想想，那段日子过得真充实啊。」 ——三月七 「这叫痛并快乐着。」 ——{NICKNAME}
E: "Looking back now, those days were really fulfilling." — March 7th "No pain, no gain, am I right?" — {NICKNAME}

C: 「看看，像不像一位公主？」 ——三月七 「原来你一直是这么看待自己的吗……」 ——丹恒 「我也想换身衣服，当个魔王。」 ——{NICKNAME}
E: "Look! Don't I look like a princess?" — March 7th "So that's how you've seen yourself all this time..." — Dan Heng "I want to change my clothes and become a devil, too." — {NICKNAME}

C: 我是奥赫玛的君王，\n我曾直面诸神，\n又何惧诸神之后高悬的<color=#9e5738>「律法」</color>。
E: I am the sovereign of Okhema.\nI once faced the gods,\nSo what do I have to fear about the <color=#9e5738>"laws"</color> hanging behind such gods?

C: 在翁法罗斯，\n随处可见无名的造像。
E: In Amphoreus,\nuntitled statues are a prevalent sight.

C: 「给我一把锄头也无妨。」\n「是不是凡铁，要看我能用它写下何种诗篇。」
E: "Even a rake would do."\n"Let its worth be judged by the verses I compose with it."

C:
如同无法落下的眼泪。
舍弃如此果断，
只因他在抉择中，
对于伤害自我，总是毫无保留。
E:
Like a tear that cannot be shed.
Such a resolute willingness to let go,
Comes only from the fact that in decisions,
He is utterly unafraid to hurt himself.

C: 无人见证的决死之时，\n他仍手持掀翻干草车的秘术，\n孤身一人，直面恶敌。
E: And in that unwitnessed moment of his death, final tragedy,\nHe still held the hay cart spell steady,\nStanding alone, facing the evil enemy.

C: 「但你若是无人倾诉……\n行吧，那坐下说说也无妨。」
E: "But if you have no one to talk to...\nFine. You can sit and converse."

C: 投下长长的影子，\n迈向永恒的白昼。
E: who casts a long shadow over the world, and\nwho strides toward everlasting daylight.

C: 「我虽已目不能视，\n但仍想身着您制的衣。」
E: "Though I can no longer see,\nI still want to don the garments you weave."

C: 「喂，{NICKNAME}，你的寻宝方式也太浪费了！打败的机兵不要乱扔，捡回去修一修，涂上新漆，放到古代遗物市场上，老人小孩都爱买。走，让我老桑博教教你什么叫勤俭的寻宝者~」
E: "Hey, {NICKNAME}, that's such a wasteful way of treasure hunting! Don't just toss aside those trashed automatons. We can just fix them up a little, give them a new coat of paint, and put them up on the ancient relics market. I guarantee even the elderly and children would fight for it. Come, let ol' Sampo teach you how to be a thrifty treasure hunter~"

C: 「前面的那台机兵太危险了，仅靠银鬃铁卫的兵力，可能没办法阻止它…{NICKNAME}，绝不能让他离开遗迹，请和我一起打倒它吧！」
E: "That automaton in front is too dangerous. We might not be able to stop it with the Silvermane Guards... {NICKNAME}, we can't risk it leaving the ruins. Please help me defeat it!"

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「物资扑满」</color>携带补给物资的丰饶扑满出现！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Supply Trotter</color> A Trotter of Abundance carrying supplies appears!

C: 精英•召唤能力
E: Elite: Summoning Ability

C: 普通•召唤能力
E: Normal: Summoning Ability

C: 角色升星后，除了获得数值属性提升，<color=#f29e38ff>角色赋能</color>效果也将获得强化。\n例：真理医生可在战斗中<color=#f29e38ff>连续丢出粉笔</color>攻击敌人。
E: After a character is upgraded, besides gaining stat increases, their <color=#f29e38ff>Character Empowerment</color> effects will also be enhanced.\nFor example: Dr. Ratio can <color=#f29e38ff>consecutively throw chalks</color> to attack enemies in combat.

C: 在「超频博弈」中，每个节点开始时，将自动获得<color=#f29e38ff>更多经验与金币，但不再获得利息</color>。
E: In Overclock Gambit mode, at the start of each Node, you'll automatically gain <color=#f29e38ff>more Experience and Gold Coins, but no longer receive Interest</color>.

C: 开拓等级提升后，可以在列车长<color=#f29e38ff>帕姆</color>处领取相应的等级奖励。
E: As Trailblaze Level increases, you can claim corresponding rewards from <color=#f29e38ff>Pom-Pom</color>, the Express' conductor.

C: 每个世界都有一个世界商店，可以通过探索获取该世界独属的特殊货币。在世界商店里消耗对应货币可以购买配方、遗器和材料，累计消耗一定货币后还可以直接领取相应的额外奖励。
E: Every world contains a World Shop. You can explore a world to obtain its unique currency and use this currency in the corresponding World Shop to purchase recipes, Relics, and materials. Once you've spent enough of the unique currency, you will also receive corresponding bonus rewards.

C: 除了参与<color=#f29e38ff>开拓任务</color>推进故事发展，探索的旅途中还会遇到各种各样的任务。
E: Aside from completing <color=#f29e38ff>Trailblaze Missions</color> to progress the storyline, other missions can also be encountered in the exploration.

C: 若需要切换视角继续推进故事，点击此处以进入【命路群像】。
E: If you need to change your POV to continue the story, you can select here to enter "Fate's Ensemble."

C: 与<color=#f29e38ff>栖木</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>机巧鸟本体</color>交互后可以启动并遥控机巧鸟。
E: After interacting with the <color=#f29e38ff>roost</color> or the <color=#f29e38ff>cycrane itself</color>, you can start remotely controlling the cycrane.

C: 工造司中神秘组织制作的空间接合装置，名为<color=#f29e38ff>枘凿六合</color>。因其艰涩难懂、过于硬核，常常无人问津。与之交互后，可开启<color=#f29e38ff>枘凿六合</color>进行解谜。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Hexanexus</color> is a space junction device made by a mysterious organization in the Artisanship Commission. It attracted almost no notice because it is difficult to understand. Interact with the <color=#f29e38ff>Hexanexus</color> to activate it and solve the puzzle.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>剩余电量不足</color>时无法开启更多挡板。\n点击<color=#f29e38ff>重置</color>可重置所有挡板状态。
E: You cannot activate any more plates when you <color=#f29e38ff>do not have enough energy left</color>.\n{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} <color=#f29e38ff>Reset</color> to reset all plates.

C: 若某个筑梦模块的表面<color=#f29e38ff>已经形成了梦泡桥梁</color>，移动该模块将会<color=#f29e38ff>摧毁</color>已经成型的桥梁，建造该桥梁所消耗的梦泡充能将被<color=#f29e38ff>回收</color>。
E: When the surface of a Dream Module has <color=#f29e38ff>already formed a Bubble Bridge</color>, moving the said module will <color=#f29e38ff>destroy</color> the formed bridge, and all the Bubble Charges expended on building the bridge will be <color=#f29e38ff>returned</color>.

C: 在地图中，点击「扎格列斯之手」的图标，可以查看<color=#f29e38ff>「翻飞之币」</color>的收集情况。
E: In the map, {LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} on the Hand of Zagreus icon to check the <color=#f29e38ff>Coin of Whimsy</color> collection status.

C: 如果连通的路线上存在<color=#f29e38ff>战利品标识</color>，前往场景的对应位置便能够获得它。同一个罗盘可能存在多个连通方式，但通常只有一种路线能够经过<color=#f29e38ff>战利品</color>所在位置。与罗盘<color=#f29e38ff>再次交互</color>可以修改路线。
E: If there are <color=#f29e38ff>treasure icons</color> on the connected route, you can obtain them by traveling to their corresponding positions in the location. There are multiple ways to connect routes with a single compass, but there's normally only one type of route that passes through all the <color=#f29e38ff>treasures</color>. <color=#f29e38ff>Interact</color> with the compass again to edit the route.

C: 具有<color=#f29e38ff>突袭能力</color>的敌人会根据你的行动进行倒计时。在计时结束时发起攻击<color=#f29e38ff>扣除耐力值</color>。\n该敌人会直接出现，但<color=#f29e38ff>不会封锁周围的区域</color>。
E: Enemies with <color=#f29e38ff>Surprise Attacks Abilities</color> will initiate a countdown based on your actions. When the countdown ends, they will launch an attack that <color=#f29e38ff>reduces Stamina</color>.\nThese enemies will immediately appear, but <color=#f29e38ff>will not lock down the surrounding area</color>.

C: 在「末日幻影」中，开拓者需要直视「终末」的投影，战胜曾经面对的<color=#f29e38ff>首领强敌</color>。
E: In Apocalyptic Shadow, Trailblazers must face projections of Finality and defeat <color=#f29e38ff>bosses</color> they have faced before.

C: 在晚餐会议中，可获取<color=#f29e38ff>「建造蓝图」</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>「装饰」</color>。<color=#f29e38ff>「建造蓝图」</color>可解锁区域内的装修项目；<color=#f29e38ff>「装饰」</color>可在家居定制中布设在房间的不同位置。
E: You can obtain <color=#f29e38ff>Construction Blueprints</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Decorations</color> during Dinner Meeting. <color=#f29e38ff>Construction Blueprints</color> can unlock renovation projects in the area, and <color=#f29e38ff>Decorations</color> can be placed in different areas across the room based on your choice.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「榜样风范」</color>可以将所有队员的值日等级提高至队中<color=#f29e38ff>最高值日等级</color>。
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>Passenger Paragons</color> card can elevate all members' Duty Level to match <color=#f29e38ff>the highest Duty Level</color> within the team.

C: 至尊武器是一种极其强力的特殊传说武器。\n进化至尊武器需要1件传说武器和1件满级普通武器。\n至尊武器「至尊幻彩全垒打」=传说武器「彩虹投手」+8级「平平无奇的球棒」
E: Esteemed Weapon is a type of exceptionally powerful and special Legendary Weapon.\nOne Legendary Weapon and one max-level normal weapon is needed to evolve an Esteemed Weapon.\nEsteemed Weapon "Supreme All-Color Home Run" = Legendary Weapon Rainbow Pitcher + Lv. 8 Unremarkable Bat

C: 每次合成将从3个随机更高品质的随机奇物中选取1个获得。最高获得3星奇物。
E: Each synthesis allows you to select one out of three random Curios with higher quality. The highest-quality Curio that can be obtained is a 3-star one.

C: 敌方目标在陷入持续伤害时，获得1层<color=#f29e38ff>【烈毒】</color>，【烈毒】状态下的敌人受到的持续伤害<color=#f29e38ff>必定暴击</color>。
E: When enemy targets become afflicted with DoT, receive 1 stack of <color=#f29e38ff>"Toxic."</color> DoT taken by enemies in the "Toxic" state <color=#f29e38ff>are guaranteed to CRIT</color>.

C: 每天都会有固定数量的顾客光顾，餐馆<color=#f29e38ff>晋级</color>后会吸引来<color=#f29e38ff>更多顾客</color>；\n尽量在营业结束前服务完所有顾客
E: A fixed number of customers will visit each day. After the restaurant <color=#f29e38ff>levels up</color>, it will attract <color=#f29e38ff>more customers</color>.\nTry to serve all customers before closing time

C: 流星捎来讯息，据说统治银河的「黑斗篷魔王」，掌控着所有人梦想中的最强球棒。为了找到这根球棒，我决定离开家乡，遍历诸多星球，踏上漫长的寻宝旅途。
E: A shooting star has sent word that the Black Cloak Demon King that rules the cosmos is in control of an ultimate bat that everyone dreams of having. To find this bat, I decided to leave my home and travel to countless planets, embarking on a prolonged journey to find the treasure.

C: 从起点开始！很棒的选择，脚踏实地才能变强~那么，让我们出发吧！

C: 冻结吧！
E: Freeze!

C: 江湖…难啊……
E: A hero's life... is hard...

C: 已经结束的过去，并不重要。
E: Past victories don't guarantee future ones.

C: 露出破绽咯~
E: Found your weakness~

C: 也是一片心意嘛~
E: Hope you like them!

C: 坏不了的。
E: I won't break.

C: 御主，与你并肩作战是我的荣幸。无论未来如何，我们共同经历的一切都将成为铭刻在历史天空中的星辰。
E: Master, it's an honor to fight by your side. No matter what the future holds, everything we've experienced together will shine as lasting marks in the tapestry of history.

C: 守护者的未来，在此注定。
E: A Guardian's future is decided here.

C: 我就说吧？根本没我做不到的事～
E: Ta-da! Another one off the to-do list.

C: 不管是机械、科研还是音乐，我好像每样都很精通喔？啊，所以…我不擅长的事，只有「赚钱」了吧？
E: Mechanics, research, and music are all things I'm pretty good at, wouldn't you say? But I guess making money's not on the list...

C: 不过如此。
E: Is that all?

C: 克拉拉也困了，想靠着史瓦罗先生的手臂睡一会儿，你要来试试么？
E: I'm getting sleepy — time for a nap on Mr. Svarog's arm. Are you coming?

C: 价钱加倍，服务加倍！
E: Double the pay, double the service!

C: 打、打人不打脸！
E: Hey! W—Watch the face!

C: 虎克的洞洞机，比史瓦罗的拳头还要大！哼！
E: Hook's Diggertron is mightier than Svarog's fist! Hmph!

C: 通通——拿走~
E: Yay! Let's take it all!

C: 姐姐她多才多艺，我其实很佩服…算了，还是别告诉她了。
E: I actually admire her for her many talents... Don't tell her I said that.

C: 战局如牌局，见机就行事~
E: Fights are like gambling — you have to choose when to strike!

C: 无论是驾驶星槎亦或统领天舶司，仙舟的航向上始终都有驭空大人的身影。论「使舵」的本领，小女子还所差甚远。
E: Whether it's driving starskiffs or leading the Sky-Faring Commission, Madam Yukong is always present in the Xianzhou's course. I'm still lacking in my skills as a helmswoman.

C: 时运…不济啊…
E: Not my... lucky day.

C: 赶早不如赶巧。
E: Better late than never!

C: 星光之下，并无新事。但托你的福，我有了全新的体悟。
E: Nothing is truly new in the universe, but thanks to you, I now see things in a new way.

C: 能令你动剑的对手，想必不简单哪。
E: An enemy worthy of your attention is a formidable enemy.

C: 拭目以待吧。
E: Let's wait and see.

C: 这尊威灵唤作「神霄雷府总司驱雷掣电追魔扫秽天君」。是从古书里看来的称谓，只是名字太长不好记，便掐头去尾简称为「神…君」。
E: This spiritus is called Lightning-Wielding Thunder-Clapping Soul-Squashing Lord. It's a name I read from an ancient text, but it's too long to remember, so I just abbreviate it to the Lightning... Lord.

C: 这你躲不了啦。
E: Dodge this.

C: 或许…我的心从未远离这片星空。
E: My soul has never wandered far from this celestial expanse.

C: 疾走先得。
E: Speed, not haste.

C: 天舶司下辖的商团各有所长，我听闻停云所领的「鸣火」商团最善自平凡之物中筛出价值，这倒暗合卜筮之道，在万物中窥见潜在的可能。
E: The various merchant guilds under the Sky-Faring Commission each have their own strengths. I've heard that Tingyun's Whistling Flames is adept at producing value by sifting through piles of ordinary items. Such is the way of divination: Seeing potential possibilities in everything.

C: 同其他仙舟一样，「罗浮」也会举办「星天演武」的仪典，旨在考校云骑军的实力进退。谁要是在剑术一项上胜出，就能摘下「剑首」的头衔！
E: Like the other Xianzhou ships, the Luofu also holds the Luminary Wardance to test the strength of the Cloud Knights, and whoever wins the sword competition receives the title of Sword Champion!

C: 剑，随我心。
E: Strike... with heart!

C: 赶快收赏钱啦！
E: Quick, snatch it all up!

C: 哎呀，我就算足不出户，也可以听见她的声音，「急人所急，有求必应」——对吧？
E: Ah, even if I don't step outside, I can still hear her. "Be eager to help those in need" — that's her, right?

C: 熟读医理，寻找药材，打开格局。没有什么是不能入药的，越是疑难杂症，越是要依靠不拘一格的药方才行~
E: Study medicine, find herbs, and broaden my horizons. Everything can be used as a medicine. The rarer a disease is, the bolder the prescription must be~

C: 姬子小姐，同往常一样，交由我来处理便是。
E: As always, Himeko, I can handle it.

C: 天洪奔涌…
E: The heavens surge...

C: 再等下去，吾阳寿将尽…
E: I can't spend my wakespan waiting...

C: 姐姐，速速判罚罪业后，同我一起走走？
E: Sister, once you've passed down your judgments, why not join me for a stroll?

C: 结束了，继续前进吧。
E: Done. Let's keep going.

C: 或许桂乃芬小姐并非刻意为之，但她不光让自己的生活熊熊燃烧着，还照亮了其他人的人生…就像个小火锅似的。
E: Guinaifen might not realize it, but by living her life like a roaring fire, she also illuminates the lives of others... like the little flame under a hot pot.

C: 「天击将军大战伏波将军」…联盟有不少人爱看类似的热闹，实不相瞒，我也一样——论运筹帷幄、决胜千里，景元与爻光孰胜孰负？
E: "The Merlin's Claw vs. The Seiche Queller"... Many in the Alliance enjoy this kind of spectacle, and truthfully, so do I. When it comes to strategic brilliance and decisive outcomes, I wonder who would win, Jing Yuan or Yao Guang?

C: 什么猎物能惊动两个将军？让我开开眼。
E: What prey would require the attention of two generals? Let me see for myself.

C: 我要将你们，尽数熔断！
E: I'll melt you all down!

C: 妾身与怀炎将军算不得多熟，但也曾为他制备熏香。嗐，别看老将军平时一派乐呵的样子…发起怒来的烟硝火气，可是冲得很呐。
E: I would not consider myself close to General Huaiyan, but I have prepared incense for him before. Don't be fooled by the old general's usual cheerful demeanor... When he gets angry, it's like there's steam coming out of his ears.

C: 炉中无火烟自出。
E: The smoke rises from the fireless stove.

C: 曜青人喜欢谈论我，但有些人真的看到我时，会尖叫着缩成一团。
E: The people of the Yaoqing like to talk about me, but when some people actually see me, they curl up in a ball and scream.

C: 「死而复生」总归是种奇妙的体验，可阮•梅小姐却教我什么都别想，只需规律作息，专注运动便可恢复健康，语气轻松得…像是举手之劳。
E: "Resurrection" is always a strange experience, but Miss Ruan Mei instructed me to not overthink things. I just needed to follow a regular routine and focus on exercise to regain my health. Her tone was so relaxed... as if this was all a simple task.

C: 生命的编组中，父母平等，因而我的名字取了二者的姓氏。
E: In the grand fabric of life, both parents are equal, and thus my name combines the surnames of each of my parents.

C: 风险越大，回报越大……
E: The bigger the risk, the better the reward...

C: 流淌吧…过往的刀光。
E: Stream forth... the gleam of old blades.

C: 听，谐乐的低吟更加清晰了……
E: Listen, the harmonies are becoming clearer...

C: 也许最后，我也能拥有自己的梦……
E: Maybe I can finally have my own dreams...

C: 加入战场。
E: Joining the battle.

C: 厉害…十分准确的判断。
E: Impressive... Impeccable precision.

C: 这位客人，请别生气…
E: S—Sorry! Please don't be angry...

C: 开始今天的工作吧…！
E: Let's dive into today's duties!

C: 我们多久没有合奏一曲了？真怀念啊。
E: How long has it been since we performed together? I missed this.

C: 井然有序，很好。
E: Everything is in its place, excellent.

C: 无名客的欲望和行为总是很坦诚。与你们交易，同等的「真诚」便是最合适的价码。
E: The actions and desires of the Nameless are always sincere. When dealing with you, the same sincerity is the most fitting price.

C: 我不会假装自己有把握和你再见…但如果我们再见，希望那时的我不是尸体。
E: I won't fool myself thinkin' our paths'll cross again... but if they do, let's hope I ain't pushin' up daisies.

C: 代表凡人知识边界的是什么？很多人觉得是天才俱乐部，我觉得是我。
E: What represents the boundaries of mortal knowledge? Many people think it's the Genius Society, but I think it's myself.

C: 很嚣张嘛。
E: Feeling bold?

C: 那段至美的旋律，曾在黑暗的时光中抚慰我的心绪。千年后，欢宴不再，海洋已寂寞无主，唯有涛声依旧在我耳边回响。
E: That most beautiful melody once comforted my heart in the dark days. A millennium later, the feasts are long gone and the ocean stands masterless, with only the tides continuing to echo softly in my ears.

C: 缇宝：{NICKNAME}，明天见啦。\n缇宁：如果明天见不到，那就……\n缇安：明天的明天见啦！
E: Tribbie: {NICKNAME}, see you tomorrow.\nTrinnon: If we don't see you tomorrow, then...\nTrianne: We'll see you the day after tomorrow!

C: 不怕不怕，缇宝不怕……
E: Don't be afraid... I'm not afraid...

C: 征途，以血和火铸就。
E: This journey is forged with blood and flames.

C: 离别总是来得如此之快…愿我们都不会停下各自的脚步。
E: Farewells always arrive so quickly... I hope neither of us will stop moving forward.

C: 风堇，我们一起为生命送上庄严的告别吧。
E: Hyacine, let us both give life a dignified farewell.

C: 我闻见血的气息…小海狮，浪已来袭。
E: I smell the scent of blood... The waves are already here, little sea lion.

C: 守护，始终是我的职责。
E: My purpose has always been to protect.

C: 掣地，擎天！
E: Earth shatters. Heaven trembles!

C: 从天真无邪的「迷迷」，到青春活泼的「昔涟」，因为有你，人家的故事越来越圆满了呢。无论涟漪如何荡漾，都是我们亲手写下的诗篇呀♪
E: From the innocent "Mem" to the lively "Cyrene"... you made my story more and more complete. No matter how the ripples stir, they are all odes we ourselves wrote down together ♪

C: 好多了。
E: Much better.

C: 到我了。
E: It's my turn.

C: 好梦成真！
E: Dreams do come true!

C: 放心交给我吧，杨叔…咳，瓦尔特先生。
E: I'm on it, Wel—... Ahem, Mr. Yang.

C: 球棒侠等级按钮
E: Baseballer Level Button

C: 对指定敌方单体造成等同于【致幻人鱼】<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>攻击力的冰属性伤害，同时有<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的<u>基础概率</u>使受到攻击的目标陷入【冰蚀】状态，持续<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>回合。同时【致幻人鱼】会陷入无法战斗状态并解除【幻身】状态。\n【冰蚀】状态下，敌方目标每回合开始时受到等同于自身<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>生命上限的冰属性持续伤害。该【冰蚀】状态可叠加。
E: Deals Ice DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of "Hallucinogenic Mermaid's" ATK to one designated enemy, with a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict the "Glacial Erosion" state on the targets for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). At the same time, "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" will be knocked down and dispels the "Phantom Illusion" state.\nWhile in "Glacial Erosion" state, enemy targets take Ice DoT equal to <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of their Max HP at the start of each turn. This "Glacial Erosion" state is stackable.

C: 完成噩梦难度挑战
E: Complete the Nightmare difficulty challenge

C: 梦主为昔日友人写下的时祷书。
E: A prayer book written by the Dreammaster for an old friend.

C: 可偏偏那「死地」的降临，正因你在众人当中…
E: But "death" will come because you, out of all people...

C: 将杀王棋•绝境
E: King in Check: Plight

C: 苹果糖
E: Candied Apple

C: 为了金织的荣耀
E: For the Glory of the Goldweaver

C: 自身受到伤害时：自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When this unit takes DMG: This unit's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 自身受到伤害时：对后1格同伴造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: When this unit takes DMG: Deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> DMG to the companion 1 tile behind.

C: 对战开始或被召唤时：对<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>最低的对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of combat or when summoned: Deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to the opponent with the lowest <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的暖龙龙获得自身当前<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力</color>。攻击时，额外对目标后方最近的奇美拉发动1次等同于<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=2 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>的追加攻击
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Toasty Dragon in the team gains <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color> equal to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the current <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP</color>. When attacking, additionally performs an attack on the nearest chimera behind the target, dealing 1 instance of DMG equal to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=2 width=1 height=1>ATK</color>.

C: 同伴攻击时：与前1格同伴交换位置，并使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>，<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>
E: When a companion attacks: Swaps positions with the companion 1 tile ahead, its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, and its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的蝶糕糕为<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力最高的我方奇美拉施加【祝福】。拥有【祝福】的奇美拉被击倒时会以<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值重新对战，最多生效1次
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Butterfly Cake in the team grants "Blessing" to the ally chimera with the highest <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK. When a chimera with "Blessing" is defeated, it will rejoin the battle with <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP. This effect can trigger up to 1 time.

C: 喜欢小三月嗷呜~
E: I like March, awoo~

C: 得到了成长的机会~
E: Here's a chance to grow~

C: 穿梭在花园的火箭队！
E: Team Rocket blasting through the garden!

C: 登上王座！
E: Claim the throne!

C: 不灭，不朽！
E: Permanence remains!

C: 可别怪我下手太重呀。
E: I won't be going easy on you.

C: 闪亮登场！
E: Yours truly has arrived!

C: 再战
E: Try Again

C:
・星期日和知更鸟迎接了进入梦境的你，并使用「调律」帮助你适应忆质。
・在梦境贩售店遇到「爱德华医生」，体验了来自阿基维利的梦泡。
・一位被认为是偷渡犯的少女向你求助，你挺身而出从追捕者手中解救了她。在此期间，你还遇到了自称为治安官的加拉赫。
・少女自称是鸢尾花家系的艺者流萤，她作为向导，带你游览了黄金的时刻。
・流萤发现了跟踪你的「桑博」，他把你们带去了一间夜总会，并让你体验了一场奇特的垃圾桶之梦——「桑博」说，这场梦揭示了美梦的真相。
・流萤承认自己隐瞒了身份，邀请你前往她的秘密据点。
・在前往秘密据点的路上，你发现了向你求助的钟表小子。
E:
・ Sunday and Robin welcomed you into the dreamscape, and used "Tuning" to help you adapt to the memoria.
・ You met Dr. Edward at the Dreamscape Sales Store and experienced a dream bubble from Akivili.
・ A girl believed to be a stowaway asked for your help, and you stepped up to rescue her from her pursuers. During this time, you also met Gallagher, who claimed to be a security officer.
・ The girl introduced herself as Firefly, an artist from the Iris Family, and she guided you through the Golden Hour.
・ Firefly discovered "Sampo," who was shadowing you. He took you to a nightclub and let you experience a strange trashcan dream. "Sampo" said this dream revealed the truth about sweet dreams.
・ Firefly admitted she had concealed her identity and invited you to her secret hideout.
・ On the way to the secret hideout, you found Clockie, who had asked for your help.

C: 花火：准备爆破
E: Sparkle: Ready to Detonate

C: 欢迎来到乐园！
E: Welcome unto Paradise!

C: 长夜将尽，飞蛾扑火。
E: The long night draws to a close, as moths dance into flames.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>【生命计数】：</color>敌我双方单位拥有【生命计数】，<color=#f29e38ff>受到攻击时</color>不会损失生命值，但是会减少【生命计数】。【生命计数】<color=#f29e38ff>归零时</color>单位将陷入无法战斗状态。我方角色<color=#f29e38ff>消灭敌方目标</color>时可回复【生命计数】。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>"HP Count":</color> Both ally and enemy units have an "HP Count." Instead of losing HP <color=#f29e38ff>when attacked</color>, they will lose "HP Count" points. When the "HP Count" <color=#f29e38ff>reaches zero</color>, the unit will be knocked down. Ally characters can recover their "HP Count" by <color=#f29e38ff>defeating enemy targets</color>.

C: {Img#1}回忆最终如何呈现，是由你决定的。在那场美梦结束时，你以流萤渴盼的方式，将她铭记。 做梦的人，也是造梦的人。造梦的人，也是做梦的人。 献出自己的往事，才能织就最美好的梦境。 人们不会沉溺其中，不愿复醒。他们会在美梦中，重新获得面对未来的勇气。 然后，向着明天。
E: {Img#1}How your memories manifest is ultimately up to you. When that sweet dream ended, you etched Firefly in your memories in just the way she wanted it to be. The dreamer is also the dream-maker. The dream-maker is also the dreamer. Only by offering up one's past can the most beautiful dreams be woven. People will not lose themselves within them, unwilling to awaken. In their beautiful dreams, they will regain the courage to face the future. And then, walk toward tomorrow.

C: 命运交叉的盛会
E: The Gala of Crossed Destinies

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯的大胃袋里可以掏出一切宝贝！（骗你的）\n…桀桀，咱俩朋友一场，有空记得回来看看。
E: You can find all sorts of treasures in Big Chungus Bartholos "Spirithief"! (Just kidding)\n...Hehe, we're friends, come back and visit when you have the time.

C: 我方攻击敌方目标后，每击破1个敌方目标，使我方额外积累<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>点「战意值」。
E: After allies attack enemy targets, every enemy target that becomes Weakness Broken additionally accumulates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> Grit Value for allies.

C: 往小了猜
E: Think younger

C: 真是知道了一个好小众的秘密！
E: What a niche secret I've discovered!

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血。天谴之矛下的歌者，唱诵着赞美战士与疯王的诗句，以神咒呼唤尼卡多利的赐福。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They are singers under the Lance of Fury. In their lyrics come praises for soldiers and the mad king, using divine spells to call upon Nikador's blessings.

C: 在遥远的造物世，艾格勒打造黎明机器后，它又在刻法勒协助下创造了代表各种泰坦的奇兽。如今，那些伟大巨兽的灵魂已经混沌不堪。
E: In the ancient Era Creatura, Aquila, after forging the Dawn Device, collaborated with Kephale to bring forth the legendary beasts embodying the Titans. Today, the souls of those great beasts are now in utter chaos.

C: 狮震八方•皎阳似火的飞翼兽
E: Earthshaker Leo: Solblaze Winged Beast

C: 进入蓄力状态，7回合后施放【太初有为】。
E: Enters the Charge state. After 7 turns, uses "Im Anfang war die Tat."

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量风属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Wind DMG to one designated target.

C: 锁定1个我方目标，进入【点亮未来】状态，下次行动施放【赞美艾格勒】。
E: Lock on to 1 target and enters the "Light the Future" state. "Praise Aquila" will be used with next action.

C: 【月夜天马】受到的伤害均由【狮震八方】承受。<u>【后排目标】</u>被消灭时，【月夜天马】受到的伤害提高。
E: DMG dealt to "Moonlit Pegasus" will be borne by "Earthshaker Leo." When <u>"Back Row Target"</u> is defeated, "Moonlit Pegasus" takes more DMG.

C: 每个当前生命值为0以下的目标使【蚀心影魔】造成的伤害提高。
E: For each target with current HP below 0, increases DMG dealt by "Corrupting Shadowfiend."

C: 对我方全体目标造成少量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets.

C: 渐宽广
E: Allargando

C: 堕化
E: Depravation

C: 攻击过后，「律令」消散。与此同时，天际涌现肆虐的虫影，一具黑色格拉默铁骑的利爪贯穿流萤的胸膛。「生亦有时，死亦有时。」
E: After the blast, the "divine law" vanished. At the same time, swarming silhouettes of insects filled the sky as the claws of a black Glamoth Iron Cavalry ran Firefly through the chest. "Life, too, has its time. Death comes for us all eventually."

C: <color=#f29e38ff>拉扎莉娜</color>曾打造出「忆质航路」，令误入忆域之人漂往能实现他们「渴求」的地方。砂金回忆起真理医生的告诫，幸好砂金相当好运。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Razalina</color> once created the "Memoria Path," which guided those who had strayed into the Memory Zone to places where their "desires" could be fulfilled. Aventurine recalled Dr. Ratio's warning. Fortunately, Aventurine was quite lucky.

C: 在热砂的时刻，流萤告别即将迎战神主日的列车组，独自飞向天空。「剧本」必将应验，但流萤想尽力决定自己的「死亡」如何到来。
E: At the Moment of Scorchsand, Firefly bid farewell to the Crew who were about to face The Great Septimus, and flew alone into the sky. The "script" would inevitably unfold, but Firefly wanted to do everything possible to choose how her own "death" could come to pass.

C: 完成戮力双雄「噩梦」难度挑战
E: Complete the Synergy Duo in Nightmare mode

C: 借用摆渡人的船只。
E: Borrow the ferryman's ship.

C: 绿奇迹（觉醒）
E: Green Miracle (Awakened)

C:
据传在遥远的黄金世，巨龟仍行走于世间。
它也曾是大地的造物，比大地兽更加庞大。
日与夜都为它赐下祝福，阳光和月光为它的壳刻上花纹。
人们在它身旁建立城邦，听它口吐箴言、分享智慧。
巨龟讲述的故事比年轮更加久远。就连那头掣地的巨龙，也曾被深深吸引。
它教会人们翻动土壤、辨别矿藏，观察日月与星辰的轨迹……
日复一日，年复一年，直到某天，人们发现它的身躯化作了岩石。
因为它已奉献出所有的知识，只剩下自己的胸膛。
于是一片树林自它背上诞生，
时至今日，茂盛依旧。
E:
Legend tells of a giant turtle that roamed the world in the distant Era Chrysea.
It, too, was a creation of Earth, even larger than the dromas.
Day and night bestowed their blessings upon it, as sunlight and moonlight etched patterns on its shell.
People built their city-states beside it, listening to its words of wisdom and sharing in its knowledge.
The stories the giant turtle told were more ancient than the rings of time. Even the seismic Giant Dragon was deeply captivated.
It taught people how to till the soil, identify minerals, and observe the trails of sun, moon, and stars...
Day after day, year after year, until one day, people discovered its body had turned to stone.
For it had given away all its knowledge, leaving only its own chest behind.
Thus, a forest was born upon its back,
and to this day, it continues to flourish.

C: 神赐珍宝（其一）
E: Divine Treasures (I)

C: 冥界航行
E: Sailing in the Nether Realm

C: 击破特攻提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Break Effect increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 黑天鹅竟然要离开了，回想起来，她…████奇怪，你什么都回想不起来。
E: Black Swan is actually leaving... Thinking back, she... ████████████████ Strange, you can't remember anything at all.

C: 流萤一直在和某位同伴进行通讯，从她们的交流来看，她们的身份和目的都绝不简单。\n继续追索吧，联想到此前感知到的杂音，她们一定与梦境的异常有关。
E: Firefly has been communicating with a partner. From their conversation, their identities and objectives are clearly not what they seem.\nI need to stay on their trail. Considering the static I sensed before, they must be connected to the anomalies in the dreamscape.

C: 往事毕，此刻，是让黑天鹅眼见为实的时候了。
E: The past is behind us. Now, it's time for Black Swan to see it with her own eyes.

C: 悲伤的记忆也同样珍贵——你若能坦然地接受分别，就能拥有创造重逢的力量。
E: Sad memories are equally precious. If you can accept farewells with grace, then you'll gain the strength to create reunions.

C: 她的长梦值得拥有更美好的结局，当遗憾业已存在，它也将弥补的机会永永远远地交到了你的手中。
E: Her long dream deserves a better ending. While the regret already exists, she has forever placed the chance to make things right in your hands.

C: 寻找真相
E: Uncover the truth

C: 暂时还难以断言。但这件事的严重性倒是很清楚——也许，有人让你遗忘了无比重要的信息。
E: That's hard to say for now, but the gravity of the situation is clear. Someone might have made you forget some critically important information.

C: 那自称艺者，被家族追捕的少女。当然，她的身份已经不再是秘密。
E: That girl who called herself an artist and was hunted down by The Family. Of course, her true identity is no longer a secret.

C: 听起来只是自我安慰。
E: Sounds like you're just trying to make yourself feel better.

C: 不先避避？
E: Shouldn't you take cover first?

C: 抱歉，我没办法说服自己视而不见。
E: Sorry. I just can't bring myself to look the other way.

C: 尽管其中一部分遭人窃取，但「匹诺康尼」的记忆，已再度清晰起来。
E: Though part of it was stolen, the memory of Penacony has become clear again.

C: 这，竟然……
E: This is... unbelievable...

C: 附近，似乎有一道微弱的「不协和音」。
E: There seems to be a faint "dissonance" nearby.

C: 她想要逃离命运，最终，却还是在匹诺康尼与虫群抗争至死。命运的可憎，正因它不容抗辩。
E: She wanted to escape her fate, but in the end, she died fighting against the Swarm in Penacony. The detestable thing about destiny is that it brooks no defiance.

C: 我见过许多看似高明的伪装，能掩盖外表，但藏不住内心。你也不例外。
E: I've seen many clever disguises that can conceal appearances, but they can never cover up who a person really is. And you're no different.

C: {NICKNAME}，你没想杀死{M#他}{F#她}。你出手只是为了驱散我和那位忆者…为什么？
E: {NICKNAME}, you didn't mean to kill {M#him.}{F#her.} You only did that to drive me away from that Memokeeper... but why?

C: 我的「剧本」向来只有几行。除此之外的，不必要，也不需要。
E: My "script" has always been brief. Other than that. Anything beyond that is unnecessary.

C: 而是注定的生，与注定的死。
E: But rather a destined life, and a destined death.

C: 这回，我们恐怕揭开了一场「灾难」呢。亲眼去看看吧。
E: This time, I'm afraid we've uncovered quite a "disaster." Let's go see it with our own eyes.

C: 什么时候看出来的——<color=#dbc291ff>歌斐木分享力量的「律令」，也是他施予我的禁制。</color>
E: When did you figure it out... <color=#dbc291ff>that the "divine law" used to share power with me was also the shackles he placed upon me?</color>

C: 当然是…「毁灭」。
E: Why of course... the Destruction's.

C: 你不该找到这来——给我一个理由，否则我要投其所好，请你再死一次了。
E: You weren't supposed to find your way here. Unless you can give me a reason, I'll indulge you... By letting you die once more.

C: 这可未必。既然你知道我，就别试着赌一把了。这句忠告，算是我给朋友的见面礼——
E: I wouldn't be so sure. Since you know who I am, you should know better than to gamble. Consider this warning a welcome gift from a friend...

C: 或许您的朋友正是因此遇害——「梦主」想要借此知晓，格拉默铁骑是如何得到「繁育」的力量。
E: Perhaps that's why your friend was killed. The Dreammaster wanted to find out how the Glamoth Iron Cavalry obtained the Propagation's power.

C: 众星因何残忍
E: Why are the stars so cruel?

C: 好了，我们就此行向殊途。你获生，我赴死——何者为佳，唯有神明知晓。
E: Well then, our paths diverge here. You go towards life, and I towards death. Which path is better, only the gods know.

C: 哦？知更鸟小姐？
E: Oh? Miss Robin?

C: 时间不多，长话短说——呀，还押韵了呢，我真棒！
E: Time's short, so I'll condense the report. Oho! That even rhymed! I'm so talented~!

C: 你刚才所说的一切，的确很不同寻常啦，但我相信……
E: All the things you listed are quite extraordinary indeed, but I believe...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>是要穿过火焰，点燃自己，发出最热烈的光。</color>我的命运不会坠入黑暗，我会自己……
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It's about going through the flames, igniting yourself, and burning with the most intense light.</color> My destiny won't fall into darkness. I will...

C: 美梦结束之后，明天才会到来。人们会继续向前，看到许许多多崭新的事物。
E: Only after the sweet dream ends will tomorrow come. People will keep moving forward, discovering countless new wonders.

C: 领衔主演
E: Lead Actors

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我没有给你看过任何人的记忆，包括我自己。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I never showed you anyone's memories, not even my own.</color>

C: …你没事吧？
E: ...Are you okay?

C: 「罹患失熵症的人，物理结构会陷入不可逆的慢性解离，慢慢消失。你依旧能跑、能跳、能和他人交流。一切看起来都那么正常，只不过你总是比别人慢一点点……」
E: "Those afflicted with the Entropy Loss Syndrome will experience an irreversible chronic dissolution of their physical form, gradually fading away. You can still run, jump, and talk with others. Everything seems normal, except you're always just a little slower than everyone else..."

C: 就算如此，你也是到最后，才会忘记我……
E: Even so, I'll still be the last thing you forget...

C: 你感到耳边的声音开始渐渐模糊，消去——
E: The voice at your ear blurs, then fades into silence...

C: 可死亡的平衡已被打破。不知从何时起，塞纳托斯不再引渡世人。被困于冥滩的第<unbreak>2778</unbreak>天，你决定自救。
E: The balance of death has been broken. At some point, Thanatos ceased to ferry souls. On the <unbreak>2,778</unbreak>th day of being trapped on the Nethershore, you decide to take matters into your own hands.

C: 匮乏。仅仅远望一眼，你便感到无比匮乏。你的脊椎开始思考，口器吱咯作响，渴望用一场血肉的盛宴填满空若无物的胸腔…你最好把视线移开。
E: Scarcity. Just one distant glance, and you feel the overwhelming scarcity. Your spine begins to think, your mouthparts clicking and grinding, yearning to fill the empty void in your chest with a feast of flesh and blood... You'd better look away.

C: 哼，那就堂堂正正地来挑战我吧。
E: Hmph, then come challenge me fair and square.

C: 小奇美拉乖乖，把门开开~
E: Little chimera be a good kid and open the door~

C: 女孩的目光是如此恳切，令你几乎忘却自己面对的只是往昔幻影。或许启目集记录的除了故事本身，还有关于世界的更多信息。甚至——
E: The girl's gaze was so earnest that you almost forgot you were looking at nothing more than a shadow of the past. Perhaps the scroll of enlightenment held more than just stories. Perhaps it also carried truths about the world itself, and even...
